title: Aamiaispullia (Breakfast Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1/2 yeast cake
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 3 1/2 cups flour

## Directions

1. Warm the milk mixed with sugar and salt
2. Add the yeast and a part of the flour and let rise
3. Mix with the melted butter and the rest of the flour, kneading well
4. Form into rolls and let rise
5. Brush with egg and bake for 15-20 minutes

title: Ahvenvatkuli (Perch Chowder)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds perch
- 5 tablespoons butter
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 2 tablespoons salt
- 3 tablespoons chopped parsley
- 1 chopped onion
- 4 cups water
- Pepper

## Directions

1. Scale the fish, clean and rinse.
2. Rub inside with salt and place the roe back into the fish.
3. Lay the fish in a buttered saucepan having butter, salt, pepper, flour, parsley and onion between the layers of fish.
4. Cover with hot water, let simmer 20 to 30 minutes.
5. Place on a platter, pour the sauce over and lay small potatoes around the fish.

title: Aivot (Brains)
body:
## Ingredients

- brains
- cold water
- salt
- pepper
- onion

## Directions

1. Soak in cold water.
2. Put on fire in boiling water seasoned with salt, pepper and onion.
3. Cook 10 minutes.
4. Put in cold water to set.
5. Remove fibres and skin.
6. Prepare as sweetbreads and serve with any kind of sauce given for sweetbreads.

title: Allemande Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of white beef stock
- 1/4 teaspoonful of salt
- a little pepper
- a little lemon juice
- yolk of 1 egg

## Directions

1. Prepare as usually and add a little lemon juice, lastly one yolk.

title: Allemande-kastike (Allemande Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1½ cups white beef stock
- ¼ cup cream
- 2 yolks of egg
- Lemon juice
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Prepare as for milk sauce
2. Add some lemon juice
3. Last of all add the yolks of egg and cream
4. Season with salt and pepper
5. Serve with fish, meat or vegetables

title: Almond Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- ¾ cupful of butter
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 6 tablespoonfuls of cream
- 4 eggs
- 1 cupful of flour
- ¼ lb. of almonds
- 1 teaspoonful of baking powder

## Directions

1. Peel almonds and grind finely
2. Beat yolks of eggs and sugar to a froth
3. Mix with cream, butter, flour, baking powder and almonds
4. Add whites of eggs, whipped to a froth
5. Pour the mixture in a buttered mold or in small forms and bake in a moderate oven

title: Almond Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of cream
- 4 yolks
- ½ lbs. of sugar
- ½ lb. of almonds
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla

## Directions

1. Peel and grate or pound almonds.
2. Cook in ½ quart of cream.
3. Beat sugar with yolks.
4. Pour cream slowly in it and whip in double-boiler until it is thickened.
5. Add the rest of the cream, when the mixture is cold.
6. Freeze.
7. The almonds may be browned with sugar in a fryingpan, cooled and chopped, if brown ice cream is desired.

title: Almond Meringue
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of almonds
- 8 tablesp. of powdered sugar
- 1 white of egg

## Directions

1. Peel almonds and cut in pieces.
2. Beat whites of eggs to a stiff froth, mix with sugar and almonds.
3. Drop with spoon on a baking sheet, bake in a slow oven until lightly browned and dry.

title: Almond Omelet (Manteli-omeletti)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- sugar
- vanilla
- chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Beat separately whites and yolks of 2 eggs.
2. Mix the yolks with 2 tablespoonfuls of butter, 2 tablespoonfuls of milk, 2 tablespoonfuls of flour, a little sugar and vanilla.
3. Stir thoroughly.
4. At the last add the beaten whites into it.
5. Fry on a slow fire.
6. Sprinkle one half of it with almonds, then fold.
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and chopped almonds, browned in butter.
8. Serve cold with fruit sauce or caramel sauce.

title: Almond Rings
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 ozs. of butter
- 1/2 lb. of powdered sugar
- 1 egg
- 3 ozs. of grated almonds
- 1 lb. of flour

## Directions

1. Wash butter, work to a froth and mix with remaining ingredients.
2. When thoroughly mixed, force it through a pastry bag on baking sheet into rings.
3. Bake in a slow oven.

title: Ananas-Charlotte (Pineapple à la Charlotte)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pineapple
- 1/2 package gelatine
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 pint whipped cream

## Directions

1. Peel the pineapple, remove the eyes. Grate.
2. Dissolve 1/2 package of gelatine in pineapple juice over the fire, add 1/2 cup of sugar, pour into the grated pineapple.
3. When cool, add 1 pint of whipped cream.
4. Put into a wet mold to set.

title: Ananas-vesi jääitelö (Pineapple Ice)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups water
- 3 cups sugar
- 1 grated pineapple
- Juice of 2 oranges
- Juice of 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Cook the sugar in the water for 15 minutes.
2. When cool add the pineapple and the juices.
3. Freeze.

title: Ananashyytelö (Pineapple Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup grated pineapple
- 2 cups water
- 3/4 cup sugar
- juice of 1/2 lemon
- 2 tablespoons or 1/2 package gelatine
- white of 1 egg (optional, for clarifying)

## Directions

1. Dissolve the gelatine in 1/4 cup cold water
2. Put into a boiling double boiler, add the boiling water and sugar, stir until the sugar is dissolved
3. When half jellied add the pineapple and the lemon juice
4. Pour into a wet mold to set
5. May be prepared of the juice of pineapple having the mold filled with alternate layers of pineapple and the jelly
6. If clarified with the white of an egg, the jelly will look nicer

title: Ananashyytelö (Pineapple Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of pineapple
- 2 cupfuls of water
- 1 cupful of sugar
- juice of ½ lemon
- 2 ozs. of gelatine
- 2 whites of eggs and shells for clarifying

## Directions

1. Put pineapple liquor, water, sugar, lemon, gelatine and lightly whipped whites of eggs in a saucepan and stir on the fire until the mixture comes to boiling point.
2. Let simmer 5 minutes.
3. Drain through a cloth.
4. Pour clear jelly in the mold, let it get firm.
5. Fill the mold with cut pineapple, pour the rest of the jelly on.
6. Let get quite firm.

title: Ananaskohokas (Pineapple Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 pound pineapple, grated or cut in cubes
- 4 egg whites
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed for banana souffle by using 3/4 pound of pineapple grated or cut in cubes instead of bananas.

title: Ananaskohokas (Pineapple Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 pound of pineapples cut in dice
- whites of 4 eggs
- 4 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice

## Directions

1. Peel fruit and cut into cubes.
2. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar and juice of a lemon.
3. Let stand for a while.
4. Beat whites of eggs to a froth, add little by little the remaining sugar and fruit stirring gently.
5. Butter a mold, turn the mixture into it.
6. Bake 10—15 min.
7. Serve with lemon sauce.

title: Anchovy Canapes
body:
## Ingredients

- toast
- anchovy paste
- butter
- hard boiled eggs, yolks and whites

## Directions

1. Lay on toast anchovy paste, mixed with butter.
2. Line with chopped yolks and whites of hard boiled eggs.

title: Anchovy Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 teaspoonful of anchovy paste
- juice of 1/2 lemon
- yolk of 1 egg
- a little cream
- minced parsley

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and milk, add anchovy paste, lemon juice, yolk, a little cream and minced parsley.
2. Stir over the fire until hot.

title: Anchovy-kastike (Anchovy Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup milk
- 1 teaspoon anchovy paste
- ½ lemon juice
- 1 egg yolk
- cream
- salt and pepper
- parsley

## Directions

1. Make a gravy of butter, flour and milk.
2. Add anchovy paste and lemon juice.
3. Mix in egg yolk added to some cream.
4. Stir over the fire until hot.
5. Season with salt and pepper and add a sprinkling of parsley.
6. If used with fish, prepare with fish stock; if with meat, use meat stock and milk; if with eggs, use milk.

title: Angel Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 11 whites of eggs
- 1 cupful of granulated sugar
- 1 cupful of flour
- 1 teaspoonful of cream of tartar
- 1 teaspoonful of sherry or vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat whites of eggs to a stiff froth
2. Sift sugar many times and add slowly into the beaten whites
3. Mix with flour, sifted six times with cream of tartar, and seasonings
4. Pour the mixture into an unbuttered domeshaped mold and bake in a moderate oven about 40-50 minutes
5. The cake may be covered with following mixture: 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar, 2 tablespoonfuls of sherry

title: Angel Cake (Sponge Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 7/8 cup flour
- 1/2 teaspoon cream of tartar
- 1/2 teaspoon vanilla and lemon juice

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites until stiff.
2. Sift sugar several times and add gradually to the whites.
3. Work into the whites little by little flour sifted six times with cream of tartar and flavorings.
4. Pour into unbuttered tube tin.
5. Bake in a moderately hot oven for 40 or 50 minutes.

title: Anjovis Kastike (Anchovy Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- anchovy essence
- 3 cupfuls of beef stock or milk
- 2 - 3 tablespoonfuls of sour cream

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and beef stock
2. Add anchovy essence to taste and sour cream
3. Serve with fish or meat
4. When served with fish, use fish stock instead of beef stock
5. When served with eggs, use milk instead of beef stock

title: Anjovis-voileipiä (Anchovy Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- toasted bread slices
- anchovy paste
- butter
- hard boiled egg

## Directions

1. Mix butter with anchovy paste
2. Spread on toast
3. Decorate the top with rows of chopped white and yolk of egg

title: Ankan-paisti (Roast Duck)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 duck
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 teaspoonfuls of salt
- 2 cupfuls of meat stock

## Directions

1. Clean the duck.
2. Rub with salt inside and out.
3. Melt butter in a dripping-pan, place the duck in it and let brown well on every side.
4. Sprinkle with salt, and pour into the pan hot meat stock for basting.
5. Baste frequently.
6. Roast slowly 1 1/2 - 2 hours.
7. Strain the gravy, skim and season as usually.

title: Ankeariashyytelö (Eel à la Aspic)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eel
- Salt
- Pepper
- Lemon juice
- Water
- Onion
- Fish stock
- Gelatine

## Directions

1. Clean the fish and remove the backbone.
2. Cut larger fishes in pieces 3 inches thick.
3. Sprinkle with salt, pepper and lemon juice and put aside for 10 minutes.
4. Roll together and fasten with string.
5. Boil slowly with salt, pepper and onion until tender.
6. Lift off to cool.
7. Make aspic of the fish stock as directed for salmon.
8. Cut the rolls crosswise in slices and place in a mold to set with the aspic.
9. Or pour some aspic on a platter, lay the slices of fish over it, and cover with aspic.
10. Arrange the jellied pieces on a platter in a ring and place bits of jelly in the center.
11. Garnish around with tomato, lemon and lettuce leaves.

title: Ankerias-keitto (Eel Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 lbs. of eel
- 4 quarts of meat or fish stock
- 1 cupful of white wine
- 6 tablespoonfuls of lemon juice
- 1 carrot
- 1 leek
- 1 sprig of parsley
- 1 parsnip
- 1 stalk of celery
- 1 cupful of peas
- 1 cupful of cauliflower
- 1 cupful of asparagus tips
- 10 peppercorns
- 1 bay leaf
- salt, clove and cinnamon
- ½ cupful of tomato liquor
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- yolks of 3 eggs
- 1 quart of small pears

## Directions

1. Skin the eels, clean and cut them into one inch pieces.
2. Cook them in 1 quart of fish stock mixed with 3 tablespoonfuls of lemon juice, bay leaf and pepper, being careful not to break the pieces.
3. Leave the fish in the same liquor until next day.
4. Strain the bouillon and put to boil with the vegetables cut into cubes.
5. Add peas, cauliflower and asparagus a little later.
6. Cook the peeled pears in a small quantity of water with lemon juice, white wine, a piece of cinnamon and a few cloves until tender.
7. If the pears are too large, cut them lengthwise into slices.
8. Thicken the soup with butter and flour.
9. Put into it the eels, pears with their own liquor, and the strained tomato liquor.
10. Whip the yolks and pour the soup gently into it.
11. Cream may be used with the soup if wanted.

title: Ankkapaisti (Roast Duck)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 duck
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 2 teaspoons salt
- 2 cups meat stock

## Directions

1. Clean the duck.
2. Rub inside and out with salt.
3. Melt the butter in a roasting pan.
4. Place the duck in the pan, brown well on every side.
5. Sprinkle with salt, add hot meat stock to the drippings.
6. Baste often.
7. Roast slowly from 1½ - 2 hours.
8. Strain the drippings, skim and prepare the gravy as directed.

title: Annan Kakku (Annie Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4-5 eggs
- butter, sugar and flour, in equal quantities, as much as the weight of the eggs
- ¼ cupful of almonds
- 1 yellow lemon rind
- ½ cupful of brandy
- 1 teaspoonful of baking powder

## Directions

1. Wash butter and rub to a cream.
2. Separate yolks from whites.
3. Beat yolks with sugar, add blanched and chopped almonds, grated lemon rind, butter, flour, brandy and lastly the stiff beaten eggs.
4. Pour the mixture in a buttered mold and bake in a moderate oven about 1 hour.

title: Annankakku (Annie's Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 or 5 eggs
- Butter, sugar and flour in equal quantities, each as much as the weight of the eggs
- 1/4 cup chopped almonds
- Yellow rind of a lemon
- 1/2 cup brandy
- 1 teaspoon baking powder

## Directions

1. Rub until creamy the sugar with the butter
2. Add the yolks beaten until frothy
3. Add almonds and grated lemon rind
4. Add brandy and flour sifted with baking powder
5. Last fold in the whites beaten to a firm froth
6. Pour into a buttered tin
7. Bake for 1 hour in a moderate oven

title: Appelsiini Hyytelö (Orange Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 oranges
- 3 cupfuls of water
- 2 ozs. of gelatine
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice
- 1/2 cupful of sugar

## Directions

1. Dilute gelatine with 1 cupful of cold water.
2. Add 2 cupfuls of boiling water.
3. Strain and mix with sugar, orange- and lemon juice.
4. Mold and put aside to set.
5. Serve with any kind of salad.

title: Appelsiini Kermajäätelö (Orange Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of cream
- 1/2 cupful of orange juice
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 6-8 yolks of eggs

## Directions

1. Prepare in the same way as vanilla ice cream.
2. Instead of vanilla use orange juice and a little grated orange rind.
3. Last of all add the remaining cream without cooking.

title: Appelsiini laserrus (Orange Icing)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of granulated sugar
- 1/2 cupful of water
- one or two whites of eggs
- juice of an orange
- grated rind of an orange
- 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cook sugar with water until the syrup threads when dropped from spoon
2. Beat one or two whites of eggs to a froth
3. Pour the syrup slowly into it stirring well
4. Add juice and grated rind of an orange
5. Add 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice
6. Stir until the sugar has thickened and holds its shape

title: Appelsiini-Kermajäätelö (Orange Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup orange juice
- yellow rind of 2 oranges
- rind of 1/2 lemon

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed for vanilla ice cream.
2. Before freezing add 3/4 cup of orange juice, the yellow rind of 2 oranges and the same of lemon.

title: Appelsiini-laserrus No. 1 (Orange Icing No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- ½ cup water
- 1 or 2 egg whites
- juice of 1 orange
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice
- grated yellow rind of 1 orange

## Directions

1. Boil 1 cup sugar in ½ cup water until it threads when dropped from a spoon
2. Beat 1 or 2 egg whites to a firm froth
3. Add the syrup gradually to the eggs, stirring well
4. Dilute with the juice of an orange and 1 teaspoon of lemon juice
5. Mix in the grated yellow rind of an orange
6. Stir until thick and holds its shape

title: Appelsiini-laserrus No. 2 (Orange Icing No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons orange juice
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice
- grated yellow orange rind
- 1 cup confectioner's sugar

## Directions

1. Have 2 tablespoons orange juice and 1 teaspoon lemon juice and some grated yellow orange rind
2. Add 1 cup confectioner's sugar little by little
3. Stir until smooth

title: Appelsiini-Vesijäätelö (Orange Ice)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups water
- 2 cups sugar
- 2 cups orange juice
- 3/4 cup lemon juice
- Yellow rind of 2 oranges and 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Grate the yellow rind of 2 oranges and 1 lemon
2. Cook rind with sugar and water for 15 minutes
3. Let cool
4. Add orange juice and lemon juice
5. Strain and freeze

title: Appelsiinihyydyke (Orange Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 oranges
- 3 cups water
- 2 tablespoons gelatine
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- 1/2 cup sugar

## Directions

1. Dissolve the gelatine in 1/2 cup of cold water, add 2 cups of boiling water.
2. Mix with sugar, orange and lemon juice, stir until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Strain through a cloth and pour into a mold to set.

title: Appelsiinihyytelö (Orange Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 oranges
- 1 lemon
- 3 cups water
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 tablespoons or 1/2 package gelatine

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed for lemon jelly.

title: Appelsiinihyytelö (Orange Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 oranges
- 3 cupfuls of water
- 1 lemon
- 6 ozs. of sugar
- 2 ozs. of gelatine
- few drops of carmine

## Directions

1. Prepare in the same way as lemon jelly without whites of eggs.

title: Appelsiinikastike (Orange Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- juice and yellow rind of 2 oranges
- 2 teaspoons cornstarch
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon currant jelly or juice of 1/2 lemon

## Directions

1. Mix the cornstarch with the sugar
2. Add the orange juice, the yellow rind and the lemon juice
3. Stir over the fire until thick

title: Appelsiinimarmelaadia (Orange Marmalade)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds oranges
- 2 lemons
- 5 pounds granulated sugar
- 1½ quarts water

## Directions

1. Wipe carefully oranges and lemons.
2. Peel and remove the white part of the peel.
3. Cut the peel in strips, simmer in 1½ cups water for ½ hour.
4. Divide the fruit sections, remove the seeds and the fibre.
5. Let simmer in 1½ quarts water for ½ hour.
6. Drain without stirring through a fine cheese cloth.
7. Cook stirring constantly the drained liquor with sugar and the cooked yellow rind in its liquor for 15 minutes.
8. Fill the glass jars, cover as directed.
9. Serve with tea and toast.

title: Appelsiinimarmelaatia (Orange Marmalade)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 lbs. of oranges
- 2 lemons
- 5 lbs. of crystal sugar
- 1.5 quarts of water

## Directions

1. Wipe oranges and lemons well.
2. Peel them.
3. Cut away the white part from the inside of the peels, then cut the peels into thin strips and put 1.5 cupfuls of water to simmer slowly for half an hour.
4. Cut the fruit in pieces and remove the seeds.
5. Put to simmer slowly in 1.5 quarts of water for about half an hour.
6. Pour the mixture into a fine straining cloth to drip by itself.
7. Cook the juice obtained and the strips of fruit peel with its liquid and sugar for 15 minutes stirring constantly.
8. Pour the marmalade into small jars and preserve as usual.
9. Serve with tea and toast.

title: Appelsiinimehu (Orange Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 oranges
- 8 pounds granulated sugar
- 2 ounces lemon acid powder
- 2.5 quarts cold water

## Directions

1. Grate the yellow rind of the oranges
2. Peel the oranges and crush them in the sugar in a large bowl
3. Add the grated yellow rind
4. Mix in water that has been boiled and cooled
5. Let stand in a cold place for 2 or 3 days, stirring now and then until the sugar is dissolved
6. Add the lemon acid, stirring constantly
7. Strain through a fine cloth and bottle up
8. Seal
9. Dilute with water when served according to taste

title: Appelsiinimehu (Orange Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 oranges
- 8 lbs. granulated sugar
- 2 ozs. lemon acid powder
- 2 1/2 quarts cold water

## Directions

1. Grate yellow rind of oranges
2. Peel oranges and mash with sugar in a big bowl
3. Add the grated yellow rind into it
4. Mix with boiled cooled water
5. Keep in a cold place 2-3 days stirring now and then until the sugar has quite dissolved
6. Put lemon acid into it stirring well
7. Drain through a tight cloth
8. Bottle, cork and keep in a cool place
9. When serving add water to taste

title: Appelsiinin-kuorimehu (Orange Rind Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- Peels of 5 oranges
- 5 cups sugar
- 2 teaspoons lemon acid
- 1 quart water

## Directions

1. Remove the white part from the peels of 5 oranges
2. Cut the peels into strips
3. Put the peels with sugar and lemon acid into a large bottle
4. Add water
5. Let stand on a window sill in the sun
6. Shake the bottle every day for about a week
7. Strain and bottle up
8. Seal
9. When served add water according to taste

title: Appelsiiniomeletti (Orange Omelet)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 1 1/2 tablespoon lemon juice
- rind of 1/2 orange, grated
- butter
- sugar-coated orange slices

## Directions

1. Beat separately whites and yolks of 3 eggs.
2. Mix the yolks with 4 tablespoons of sugar, 1 1/2 tablespoon of lemon juice and grated yellow rind of 1 orange.
3. Last of all add the whites beaten lightly.
4. Melt some butter in an omelet pan, turn the mixture into the pan, let cook.
5. Fold once and serve on a hot platter with slices of orange thoroughly sugared.

title: Appelsiiniputinki (Orange Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 2 cups cream
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup orange juice
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- 1/2 package or 8 leaves gelatine

## Directions

1. Beat the egg yolks with the sugar
2. Add the lemon and the orange juice
3. Beat over the fire until thick
4. Add the dissolved gelatine
5. Let cool
6. Mix in the whipped cream and the whites beaten stiff
7. Put into a wet mold
8. Serve unmolded

title: Appelsiinitipat (Orange Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- Oranges
- Fritter batter
- Lard for frying
- Sugar

## Directions

1. Peel the oranges
2. Separate the sections
3. Remove the seeds carefully
4. Dip the pieces of the fruit into the batter
5. Cook in lard until light brown
6. Sprinkle with sugar
7. Serve with fruit sauce or plain

title: Appelsiinitipat (Orange Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- oranges
- fritter batter

## Directions

1. Peel oranges, cut lengthwise into six parts.
2. Take out seeds carefully and dip the pieces of fruit in fritter batter.
3. Cook in boiling lard.
4. Serve with sauce or sprinkled with sugar.

title: Apple Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of cream
- cupfuls of apple sauce (cooked with sugar)
- 1/2 grated lemon rind
- 7 leaves or 5 tablespoons of gelatine
- fruit and macaroons for garnish

## Directions

1. Mix apple sauce with lemon rind and gelatine.
2. Add cream, whipped to a froth.
3. Wet a mold with cold water and pour the cream mixture into it.
4. Let get firm.
5. Turn on a serving dish and garnish with fruit and macaroons.

title: Apple Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- washed unpared and uncored apples
- cold water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cut apples in pieces lengthwise.
2. Place on fire in cold water, having water just enough to cover the apples.
3. Cook to a mash.
4. Place to drain on a cloth without stirring.
5. Weigh the juice and cook slowly with equal amount of sugar, stirring often, so as not to burn the mixture.
6. Cook about half an hour, place in jars, cover as directed, preserve.

title: Apple Marmalade
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 lbs. of apples
- 2 1/2 lbs. of sugar
- 3 cupfuls of water

## Directions

1. Wash apples, cut in pieces and cook in 3 cupfuls of water until it becomes a sauce.
2. Force through a sieve and return to the fire.
3. Simmer with sugar stirring all the time until of firm consistency.
4. Spread on an oiled or buttered platter.
5. Cut in pieces, dip in granulated sugar and dry.

title: Apple Pears
body:
## Ingredients

- apple sauce
- brandy
- pink color
- apples
- sugar
- 1 cupful of apple liquor
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sherry
- 2 tablespoonfuls of brandy
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls of corn starch
- pink color
- cake or puff paste shell
- cream

## Directions

1. Mix apple sauce with a little brandy and pink color; beat well
2. Pare apples, split in two and cook in sugar
3. When cold, prepare sauce of apple liquor, sherry, brandy, sugar, corn starch and a little pink color
4. Place the apples on cake or shell of puff paste
5. Put the apple sauce in the center of serving dish
6. Lay the apple cakes around
7. Garnish with cream

title: Apple Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of small apples
- 3 ozs. of sugar
- 5 cloves
- 1 1/4 cupfuls of water
- 3/4 cupful of vinegar

## Directions

1. Wash and wipe apples carefully.
2. Boil up sugar, water and vinegar.
3. Place the apples in and let simmer until half cooked.
4. Place apples in a glass jar and put the cloves on.
5. Cook the liquor for a little while and pour it on the apples.
6. Seal the jar and keep in a cool dry place.
7. Pears and peaches may be pickled in the same way.

title: Apple Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- pastry for pieplate
- sliced apples
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice
- a little salt
- cinnamon
- a little butter
- water
- egg

## Directions

1. Cover pieplate with pastry
2. Fill with sliced apples
3. Mix 1/2 cupful of sugar, 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice, a little salt and cinnamon
4. Pour over the apples
5. Dot with a little butter
6. Moisten the edges of the pastry with water
7. Place upper crust on
8. Press the edges together and fold them under
9. Brush over with egg
10. Bake in a moderate oven 1 hour

title: Apple Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 large sour apples
- 1/2 quart of water
- 6 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 3/4 quart of bread crumbs
- 1/2 cupful of almonds
- 2 eggs
- yolks of 2 eggs
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Pare and core apples, cut in slices and cook in water with sugar and vanilla to a sauce.
2. Let cool.
3. Beat yolks until light and whites until stiff and dry.
4. Blanch and chop almonds finely.
5. Mix bread crumbs, almonds, yolks and lastly whites with apple sauce.
6. Pour the mixture in a buttered mold, sprinkled with bread; bake in oven about 3/4 hour.
7. Let cool.
8. Turn out of the mold, cover with whipped cream.

title: Apple Sauce Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of apple sauce
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 3 whites of eggs
- 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice
- whipped cream for serving

## Directions

1. Mix apple sauce with sugar and lemon juice.
2. Add whites of eggs, beaten stiff.
3. Serve in small glasses, covered with whipped cream.

title: Apple à la Charlotte (Cold)
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- sugar
- sherry
- apple liquor
- pink color
- corn starch
- 1/2 cupful of thin cream
- 4 leaves of gelatine
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of sherry
- 5 tablesp. of whipped cream
- sponge cake

## Directions

1. Pare and core apples, cut into slices crosswise
2. Cook with sugar and a little sherry
3. When soft, set to cool
4. Baste with a sauce made of apple liquor, colored to a fine pink and thickened with corn starch
5. Scald cream, sugar and gelatine until the gelatine is dissolved
6. When cool, add sherry and whipped cream
7. Wet small molds with cold water and fill them with the mixture
8. Let harden
9. Cut foundations of sponge cake, place the apples on them
10. Unmold the mixture of cream on the apples
11. Arrange them in circle on a serving dish
12. Pour the whipped cream in centre of it

title: Apple- and Bread Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of apples, cut in pieces
- 3 cupfuls of bread, cut in pieces
- 1 cupful of sugar
- a little cinnamon
- 1 tablespoonful of butter

## Directions

1. Cut bread and apples in small cubes and mix with sugar and cinnamon.
2. Dot with bits of butter.
3. Bake in oven, first covered, then uncovered to brown the surface.
4. Serve with whipped cream.

title: Artisokka-keitto (Artichoke Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 quarts of bouillon
- 1 quart of artichokes
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- salt and pepper
- 2 yolks of eggs
- 1 cupful of cream
- 1 cucumber

## Directions

1. Scrape the artichokes, rinse and put them for a little while in water mixed with vinegar.
2. Cook them in bouillon until soft and pass through the strainer.
3. Thicken with butter and flour, let boil for a few minutes more.
4. Whip the yolks and cream, pour the soup slowly in it, whipping well, season with salt and pepper.
5. Peel the cucumber, remove the seeds and cut it into pieces. Cook until tender with a little bit of butter; add to the soup.
6. Serve with fried bread dice.

title: Artisokkakeitto (Artichoke Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ quarts bouillon
- 1 quart Jerusalem artichokes
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- salt and pepper
- 1 cucumber
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 cup cream
- vinegar and water

## Directions

1. Scrape the artichokes, rinse and put for a while into water mixed with vinegar so as to prevent them from turning dark.
2. Cook in meat stock until tender.
3. Pass through a sieve.
4. Thicken with butter and flour and cook for a few minutes longer.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Peel the cucumber, remove the seeds, and cut in cubes.
7. Cook with a little butter until tender.
8. Add the cucumbers to the soup.
9. Last of all mix with the eggs and cream if desired.

title: Artisokkasalaatti (Artichoke Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- artichokes
- salted water
- French dressing
- vinaigrette dressing
- mayonnaise dressing

## Directions

1. Cook the artichoke in salted water until the leaves are easy to part.
2. Let cool.
3. Serve with French, vinaigrette or mayonnaise dressing.

title: Asparagus Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- asparagus
- salted water
- lettuce leaves
- mayonnaise sauce
- hard-boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Cook asparagus or only tips in salted water until tender.
2. Dish on lettuce leaves.
3. Line with mayonnaise sauce.
4. Mix with hard-boiled eggs if desired.

title: Aspic (Clarified Savory Gelatin)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cupfuls of well seasoned chicken or beef stock
- 4 tablespoonfuls of tomato
- ½ onion
- juice of 2 lemons
- ½ box or 12 leaves of gelatine
- 2 egg whites

## Directions

1. Put all the ingredients into a saucepan, add two whites (beaten until half stiff) and the shells.
2. Set on the fire and whip until it begins to boil.
3. Let simmer 5 minutes.
4. Strain through a tight cloth.
5. If not thoroughly clear, strain once more, without pressing the cloth.
6. If a darker color is desired, add a few drops of kitchen bouquet.

title: Aspic (Clarified Savory Gelatin) - Easier Method
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of minced carrot and celery
- 2 slices of onion
- a little parsley
- 1 bay leaf
- 2 cloves
- 2 tablespoonfuls of tomato
- 2 teaspoonfuls of beef extract
- 2½ cupfuls of water
- 1 box or 20 leaves of gelatine
- salt
- pepper
- juice of 2 lemons
- white of 1 egg

## Directions

1. Put in a saucepan 2 tablespoonfuls of minced carrot and celery, 2 slices of onion, a little parsley, 1 bay leaf, 2 cloves, 2 tablespoonfuls of tomato, 2 teaspoonfuls of beef extract and 2½ cupfuls of water.
2. Cover and let boil ½ hour.
3. Add 1 box or 20 leaves of gelatine; stir until the gelatine is dissolved.
4. Season with salt, pepper and juice of 2 lemons.
5. Clarify with white of an egg.

title: Aurinkokakku (Sunshine Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 9 egg whites
- 6 egg yolks
- 1 cup powdered sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 1/2 teaspoon cream of tartar
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice or vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat the egg whites to a firm froth, add cream of tartar, continue to beat for 10 minutes.
2. Beat the yolks with the sugar until frothy, add lemon juice and the egg whites.
3. Last of all gradually mix in the flour sifted several times.
4. Bake in an unbuttered tub tin for 30 or 40 minutes.
5. After removing from the oven let cool in the tin upside down.

title: Aurora-pääryniä (Aurora Pears)
body:
## Ingredients

- pears
- sugar
- 2 tablespoons lemon juice
- 2 tablespoons chopped almonds
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 2 tablespoons gelatine or 2 leaves
- 1 cup whipped cream
- 1 pound chocolate
- 1/2 cup hot water
- 1 cup sugar
- small lump of butter
- sponge cake

## Directions

1. Pare and core the pears leaving the stems on
2. Cook with sugar until tender, let cool
3. Mix together all the ingredients except the cream, stir over the fire until the gelatine is dissolved
4. Let cool, add the whipped cream
5. Dissolve the chocolate, cook the sugar in the water, add gradually the chocolate
6. Fill the pear cores with the mixture
7. Baste the pears with chocolate caramel
8. Place the pears on and around a foundation of sponge cake
9. Have whipped cream in the center

title: Baba
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of scalded milk
- 1 yeast cake
- 1 lb. of flour
- 1/2 grated lemon rind
- 6-8 eggs
- 12 ozs. of butter
- a little salt and sugar

## Directions

1. Beat eggs and sugar until light, add milk, salt, lemon, yeast and flour, mixed with melted or softened butter.
2. Mix the batter well and let it rise.
3. Knead on a pastry board and put in a mold to rise.
4. Bake in a moderately hot oven.
5. When done, brush over with a warm mixture made of sugar, liqueur and water.
6. Let cool and brush with the following mixture: 1 cupful of wine, 1/2 lb. of sifted sugar.
7. You may also add currants and raisins to this.

title: Baba (Baba)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup scalded milk
- 1 cake yeast
- 4 cups flour
- 1/2 grated rind of lemon
- 6 or 8 eggs
- 1 cup butter
- Salt and sugar

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs with the sugar
2. Add the milk, lemon rind, yeast, flour and butter rubbed until creamy or melted
3. Beat hard, set to rise
4. Knead on a board and put into mold to rise again
5. Bake in a moderate oven
6. When done, baste the top with mixture made of sugar, brandy and water
7. When cool, coat with 1 cup of wine mixed with 1/2 pound of sugar

title: Baked Apples
body:
## Ingredients

- equal sized apples
- sugar
- water

## Directions

1. Take some equal sized apples, wash and wipe them.
2. Core.
3. Butter a baking pan, lay the apples in it.
4. Fill the cores with sugar, pour a little water into the pan so as not to burn the apples.
5. Bake in oven, until tender.
6. Serve with whipped cream or vanilla sauce.

title: Baked Bananas
body:
## Ingredients

- bananas
- sugar
- lemon juice
- butter

## Directions

1. Peel bananas, lay in a fryingpan, sprinkle with a little sugar, squeeze lemon juice on it and dot with butter.
2. Bake in oven about 20 minutes.

title: Baked Bean Keitto (Baked Bean Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups baked beans
- 2 quarts water or meat stock
- 1 onion
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- ¾ cup tomato

## Directions

1. Cook the beans with onion and tomato until tender.
2. Press through a strainer.
3. Cook the butter and the flour in a saucepan, add gradually the soup, bring to boil.
4. Season with salt and pepper.

title: Baked Macaroni
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 lb. of macaroni
- 1 quart of milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1/2 tablesp. of powdered sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 1 egg

## Directions

1. Break the macaroni into 2 inch pieces, wash and cook in salted water 15 minutes.
2. Drain off the water and put the macaroni in boiling milk and cook them 20-30 minutes.
3. Mix with sugar, butter and salt and let cool.
4. Whip the egg and stir into the mixture.
5. Pour in a buttered mold and bake to a light brown, 20-30 minutes.

title: Baked Macaroni with Cheese
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled macaroni
- cheese crumbs
- milk sauce
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Put the boiled macaroni in a buttered mold.
2. Sprinkle with cheese crumbs and pour milk sauce over.
3. Cover with bread crumbs and dot here and there with bits of butter.
4. If more cheese is wanted, put two layers of macaroni into the mold and sprinkle the layers with cheese crumbs.

title: Baked Mutton
body:
## Ingredients

- Mutton
- Bone
- Hot water
- Carrots
- Onions
- Salt
- 1 cupful water
- 3 tablespoonfuls flour
- Boiling water
- 1 tablespoonful tomato
- Mustard

## Directions

1. Cut off the bone and wipe the meat with a cloth wrung out from hot water.
2. Put in a dripping pan skin side down.
3. Lay carrots and onions around it.
4. Bake in hot oven until it browns.
5. Sprinkle with salt and pour 1 cupful of water into the pan.
6. Mix the drippings with 3 tablespoonfuls of flour and add boiling water until moderately thick.
7. Add 1 tablespoonful of tomato and a little mustard.
8. Strain the sauce.

title: Baked Onions
body:
## Ingredients

- onions
- salted water
- salt
- sugar
- butter
- meat stock
- flour

## Directions

1. Parboil onions in salted water, drain off the water and lay in a pan.
2. Sprinkle with salt and sugar.
3. Melt 1 tablespoonfuls of butter in 1 cupful of meat stock and pour over the onions.
4. Bake in oven until brown.
5. Thicken the gravy with flour and pour over the onions.

title: Baked Oysters (Uunissa paistettu oisteri)
body:
## Ingredients

- oyster shells
- oysters
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Clean and wash the shells carefully changing the water several times
2. Keep in oven until the shells open
3. Remove carefully the upper shells
4. Put three oysters in each deep half of the shells
5. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
6. Put a little dot of butter on each
7. Dredge with bread crumbs
8. Bake in oven until bread crumbs are brown

title: Baked Pears
body:
## Ingredients

- small pears
- sugar
- syrup
- water

## Directions

1. Pare small pears, put in a mold, sprinkle with sugar and pour syrup and a little water on them.
2. Bake in oven, covered, about 2 hours.

title: Baked Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 potatoes of uniform size
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- cream or milk
- eggs

## Directions

1. Wash well 6 potatoes of uniform size.
2. Bake in oven 1 hour or until tender.
3. Serve on a folded napkin.
4. Or split the potatoes lengthwise in halves.
5. Scoop out the insides and mix this with 2 tablespoonfuls of butter, a pinch of salt and pepper and 2 tablespoonfuls of cream or milk.
6. Fill the potatoes with the mixture and bake in a quick oven.
7. Beaten whites of 2 eggs may be added into the mixture to make it smooth.
8. For paprika potatoes, the filling may be mixed with paprika.

title: Baked Saddle of Mutton
body:
## Ingredients

- saddle of mutton
- cord

## Directions

1. Separate the back part before splitting the mutton in two
2. Remove the skin, the fat and the kidneys
3. Crack the ribs, trim into a nice shape
4. Fasten with cord
5. Bake in a hot oven same as baked mutton basting often
6. Allow about 9 minutes to a pound
7. Before serving, remove the meat from the backbone, cut crosswise into slices
8. Replace around the backbone
9. Arrange on a serving dish
10. Serve with thin brown sauce or with currant jelly
11. Garnish with parsley, radishes, etc.

title: Baked Slices of Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 quarts of potatoes
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 3 tablespoonfuls of grated cheese
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- pepper
- tomato slices (optional)

## Directions

1. Peel potatoes and cut in slices.
2. Butter a baking pan.
3. Lay the slices into the pan, sprinkle with salt, pepper, small pieces of butter and cheese between the layers.
4. Dot the surface with bits of butter.
5. Bake in oven until done.
6. Between the layers of potato slices tomato may be added.

title: Baked Sweet Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- baked sweet potatoes
- 3/4 cupful of syrup
- 1 tablespoonful of butter

## Directions

1. Take baked sweet potatoes, split in halves lengthwise.
2. Scoop out the insides and mash.
3. Return the mash into the empty potato skins.
4. Cook 3/4 cupful of syrup with 1 tablespoonful of butter.
5. Spread the tops with the syrup and bake in oven until brown.

title: Banaana-Kermajäätelö (Banana Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart cream
- 3/4 cup mashed banana
- 3 tablespoons lemon juice
- 1 cup sugar
- 3 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Place one-half of the cream on the fire.
2. Beat the yolks with the sugar.
3. Add gradually the scalded cream.
4. Stir in a double boiler until thick.
5. Let cool.
6. Add the lemon juice, banana and the rest of the cream.
7. Freeze.
8. May be made without eggs, if desired.

title: Banaana-sponge (Banana Sponge)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup mashed banana
- 3 tablespoons lemon juice
- 1 tablespoon (1/4 package) gelatine
- 1/2 cup water
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 2 or 3 egg whites

## Directions

1. Dissolve the gelatine in cold water.
2. Put into a saucepan with mashed banana, lemon juice and sugar.
3. Heat, let cool.
4. When it begins to set, beat to a froth and add the egg whites beaten stiff.
5. Pour into a mold dipped in water to set.
6. Serve garnished with whipped cream and banana.

title: Banaanikohokas (Banana Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 bananas
- 4 egg whites
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice

## Directions

1. Peel the bananas, cut in cubes, sprinkle with 2 tablespoons of sugar and with the juice of 1 lemon.
2. Let stand for a while.
3. Beat the egg whites to a firm froth, add slowly the rest of the sugar and the liquor of the fruit.
4. Combine with the fruit.
5. Bake in a well-buttered mold for 10-15 minutes.
6. Serve with lemon sauce.

title: Banaanikohokas (Banana Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 bananas
- whites of 4 eggs
- 4 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice

## Directions

1. Peel bananas and cut into cubes.
2. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar and juice of a lemon.
3. Let stand for a while.
4. Beat whites of eggs to a froth, add little by little the remaining sugar and fruit stirring gently.
5. Butter a mold, turn the mixture into it.
6. Bake 10—15 min.
7. Serve with lemon sauce.

title: Banana Kermajäätelö (Banana Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of cream
- 4 bananas
- 2 tablespoonfuls of lemon juice
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 3 yolks of eggs

## Directions

1. Put one half of the cream on the fire.
2. Beat yolks with sugar.
3. Pour boiling cream slowly in it and stir in double-boiler on the fire until thickened.
4. Let cool.
5. Add bananas forced through a sieve, lemon juice and the remaining cream.
6. Freeze as usually.

title: Bananasalaatti (Banana Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- bananas
- lemon juice
- grapes
- mayonnaise
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Peel the bananas
2. cut in cubes
3. moisten with lemon juice to keep their color
4. May be mixed with grapes
5. Serve in mayonnaise mixed with plenty of whipped cream

title: Bananasalaatti with Oranges and Apples (Banana Salad with Oranges and Apples)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 bananas
- 2 oranges
- 2 apples
- mayonnaise
- cream
- nuts

## Directions

1. Mix the bananas with oranges and apples equal parts of each
2. Add mayonnaise diluted with cream
3. Sprinkle with nuts

title: Bananatipat (Banana Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- Bananas
- Fritter batter
- Lard for frying
- Sugar
- Lemon sauce

## Directions

1. Peel and cut in pieces the bananas
2. Mix in the batter
3. Cook in lard to a light brown
4. Serve with lemon sauce or plain sprinkled with sugar

title: Banania kerman kanssa (Banana Whip)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 bananas
- 1 1/2 tablespoons sugar
- salt
- lemon juice
- 1 cup cream

## Directions

1. Rub the bananas through a sieve.
2. Add sugar, lemon juice and salt.
3. Heat.
4. Let cool, add cream and flavor with vanilla.

title: Bananitipat (Banana Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- bananas
- fritter batter

## Directions

1. Peel and slice bananas, mix with fritter batter and cook in boiling lard to a light brown.
2. Sprinkle with sugar or serve with lemon juice.

title: Bass Mayonnaise (Kylmää Kuhaa)
body:
## Ingredients

- bass fillets
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- butter
- fish stock
- tomatoes
- hard-boiled egg
- mayonnaise sauce
- lettuce
- crab-tails
- lemon slices
- aspic made of bass liquor

## Directions

1. Remove the fillets, skin and bone the fish.
2. Cut in pieces of equal size.
3. Sprinkle with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
4. Let stand 10 min.
5. Put the fish in a pan, dot a little bit of butter on each piece, pour a little fish stock over.
6. Bake in oven, covered with buttered paper, about 15 min.
7. Remove, place to cool.
8. Arrange the fish on slices of tomatoes on a platter.
9. Place a slice of egg on each piece.
10. Cover with thick mayonnaise sauce.
11. Garnish with leaves of lettuce, crab-tails, slices of lemon and aspic made of liquor of bass.

title: Bearnaise Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of olive oil
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice
- 1/2 tablespoonful of caper
- 1/2 tablespoonful of sour pickle
- 1 teaspoonful of parsley
- yolks of 2 eggs
- a pinch of white pepper
- a pinch of salt
- 2 tablespoonfuls of hot water
- butter

## Directions

1. Whip the yolks in a saucepan, add gradually the oil, hot water and lemon juice.
2. Whip in a saucepan set in boiling water until it thickens, add seasonings and butter.
3. Serve with fish, chops, roasted meat and cutlets.

title: Bearnaise Sauce (hot)
body:
## Ingredients

- yolks of 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of salad oil
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice or vinegar
- 1 tablespoonful of hot water
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Whip the yolks; add gradually the oil, water and lemon juice.
2. Put the saucepan in boiling water, stir until thick.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Serve with fish, chops and broiled meat.

title: Bearnaise-kastike (kuuma) (Hot Bearnaise Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 yolks of egg
- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice or vinegar
- 1 tablespoon hot water
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Beat the yolks of egg
2. Add gradually the oil, the water and the lemon juice
3. Put the bowl into boiling water and continue beating the sauce until it thickens
4. Season with salt and pepper
5. Serve with fish, chops or broiled meats

title: Bearnaise-kastike (kylmä) (Cold Bearnaise Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- 1 tablespoon caper
- 1/4 tablespoon sour pickle
- 1 teaspoon parsley
- 2 yolks of egg
- 2 tablespoons butter
- some white pepper

## Directions

1. Beat the yolks of egg in a saucepan
2. Add slowly the oil, 2 tablespoons of hot water and 1 tablespoon of lemon juice
3. Beat until thick having the pan in boiling water
4. Mix with the seasonings and the butter
5. Serve with fish, chops, roast and cutlets

title: Bechamel Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1 carrot
- 1 slice of onion
- 1 1/4 cupfuls of white stock
- 1/2 cupful of grated cheese
- 1 cupful of sweet cream
- a pinch of white pepper
- salt to taste

## Directions

1. Cook stock with onion and carrot 15 minutes
2. Strain
3. Prepare a sauce by adding butter and flour
4. Mix with cheese, cream and seasonings
5. Let boil

title: Bechamel-kastike (Bechamel Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 carrot
- 1 slice of onion
- 1 1/2 cups white stock
- 1/2 cup grated cheese
- 1 cup cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cook the stock with the onion and the carrot for 15 minutes
2. Strain and prepare a sauce of butter and flour by adding the stock
3. Mix with the cheese, cream and seasonings
4. Let boil quickly

title: Beef Hash
body:
## Ingredients

- onion
- butter
- 2 parts chopped cold roast or boiled corned beef
- 1 part chopped potatoes
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Fry onion with butter in frying pan.
2. To two parts of chopped cold roast or boiled corned beef allow one part of chopped potatoes and a little salt and pepper.
3. Turn all into the pan, stir over the fire until lightly browned.
4. Continue frying until a brown crust has formed on the under side.
5. Turn out whole into a serving dish the brown side uppermost.

title: Beef à la Mode
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 pounds of upper round of beef
- Pork for larding
- Salt
- Pepper
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 1/4 teaspoonful of pepper
- 1 onion
- 2 carrots
- 3/4 cupful of brandy
- 1 cupful of white wine
- 2 cupfuls of veal stock or water
- Lard

## Directions

1. Use about 7 pounds of the upper round of beef.
2. Trim the meat with pork, dipped in salt and pepper.
3. Fasten with cord and brown in lard.
4. When browned add 1 tablespoonful of salt, 1/4 teaspoonful of pepper, 1 onion, 2 carrots, 3/4 cupful of brandy, 1 cupful of white wine, and 2 cupfuls of veal stock or water.
5. Cover tightly and let simmer for a few hours, until the meat is tender, adding stock if necessary.
6. Lift the meat on a platter and cut the cords.
7. Prepare the sauce of drippings by skimming the fat off first.

title: Beef à la Mode (Beef à la Mode)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pound piece of beef chuck
- Pork for larding, seasoned with salt and pepper
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 1/4 teaspoon pepper
- 1 onion
- 2 carrots
- 3/4 cup brandy
- 1 cup white wine (or some lemon juice as substitute for brandy and wine)
- 2 cups veal stock or water

## Directions

1. Smear the beef with pork, dip in salt and pepper
2. Fasten with cord and brown in lard
3. When brown, add salt, pepper, onion, carrots, brandy, white wine, and veal stock or water
4. Cover tightly and let simmer for a few hours until tender, adding stock if necessary
5. Lift the meat onto a platter and remove the cord
6. Prepare a gravy from the drippings, skimming off the fat first

title: Beet Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 beets
- 3 quarts of vegetable stock
- 2 leeks
- 2 tablespoonfuls of lemon juice
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 egg yolks
- 1/2 cupful of cream

## Directions

1. Bake the beets in oven, peel and cut into thin strips.
2. Moisten with lemon juice.
3. Cook the leek in butter, add the flour and scalded vegetable stock and bring to a boil.
4. Add the yolks of eggs and cream beaten together, at the last add the slices of beet into it.
5. Raw grated beet will give it a better color.

title: Beets au Gratin
body:
## Ingredients

- Rice porridge
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 beaten eggs
- Or 1 cup bread crumbs
- Boiled or baked beets
- Mushrooms if desired

## Directions

1. Make a porridge of rice, add 2 tablespoons butter and 2 eggs, beaten
2. Instead of rice 1 cupful of bread crumbs may be used
3. Cut beets in slices or chop fine, and add boiled or baked mushrooms if desired
4. Fill a buttered mold with alternate layers of rice and beets or bread crumbs and beets, having rice on the bottom and on the top
5. When using bread crumbs, beat the eggs, mix with 2 cups milk and 2 tablespoons butter
6. Pour on top of the mold
7. Bake in oven in a pan of water

title: Berliinin Munkkeja (Berlin Puffs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 whole egg and yolk of 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- Juice and yellow rind of 1/2 lemon
- 2 cups flour
- 1/2 yeast cake
- Apple sauce or currant jelly

## Directions

1. Warm the milk, add butter, lemon juice and rind, eggs beaten with sugar and the risen sponge of the yeast.
2. Add flour, beat well and let rise.
3. Knead and roll into a sheet 1/8 inch thick.
4. Cut in cakes with a round cutter, have some apple sauce or currant jelly in the center of each cake.
5. Place two together by fastening the edges with egg white.
6. Cook in lard, turn in sugar.
7. Serve hot.

title: Berlin Puffs
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 3 ozs. of butter
- 1 1/2 eggs
- yolk of 1 egg
- 1 oz. of sugar
- juice and rind of 1/2 lemon
- 1 yeast cake
- 1 lb. of flour
- applesauce or currant jelly

## Directions

1. Warm milk, put butter into it.
2. Mix with the eggs beaten with sugar, lemon rind and juice, then risen sponge of yeast.
3. Add flour, beat well and let rise.
4. Knead and roll into a sheet.

title: Black Bean Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts of water
- 2 quarts of bouillon
- 1 celery
- 1 onion
- bone of a boiled ham
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Wash the beans and soak them over night in cold water
2. Put to boil in the same water with the bone of ham, celery and onion
3. Let cook until soft
4. Rub through a colander
5. Thicken with butter and flour
6. Add the boiling bouillon into it
7. Continue cooking for 10 minutes
8. Season with salt and pepper
9. Serve with rice, eggs boiled hard and cut into slices and fried bread dice

title: Black Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cupfuls of molasses
- 1/2 cupful of butter
- 1/2 cupful of cream
- 3 eggs
- 3 cupfuls of flour
- 1/2 teaspoonful of ginger
- 1/2 teaspoonful of soda

## Directions

1. Beat molasses, add butter, beaten eggs, cream, ginger, soda and flour.
2. Bake in a hot oven.

title: Bohemian Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups whipped cream
- Fruit jelly
- Macaroons

## Directions

1. Mix 2 cups of whipped cream with fruit jelly and macaroons.
2. Serve in glasses.

title: Boiled Calf's Head
body:
## Ingredients

- Calf's head
- Lemon
- Vinegar
- Peppercorns
- Bay leaf
- Onion
- Carrot
- Parsley
- Butter
- Bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Have the head split open and cleaned
2. Wash carefully and remove the tongue and brains
3. Boil the brains quickly and put aside with the tongue for later use
4. Soak the head in cold water, place to boil
5. Bring to boiling point, pour off the water, and let stand until cool
6. Rub the head with lemon, return into boiling water to cook slowly
7. Mix with 2 tablespoonfuls of vinegar, 10 peppercorns, 1 bay leaf, 1 onion, 1 carrot and a sprig of parsley
8. Cover, let cook covered until the meat is tender, taking care not to break it by boiling
9. Remove the bones carefully, place the meat in an equal-sized pan
10. Spread with butter, sprinkle with bread crumbs, dot with butter
11. Brown in oven
12. Serve with Poulette or Allemande Sauce

title: Boiled Cauliflower
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 head of cauliflower
- salted water
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Remove all leaves around head and cook in salted water about 20 minutes.
2. Pour off the water when cauliflower is tender.
3. Serve with melted butter.

title: Boiled Corn
body:
## Ingredients

- corn
- salted water or milk
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Remove leaves and cobs
2. Cook 10—20 minutes in salted water or milk
3. Set on a napkin, or remove corn from the cob
4. Season with salt and pepper

title: Boiled Corned Beef
body:
## Ingredients

- Corned beef
- Seasonings and vegetables to taste
- Cabbage or other vegetables (optional)

## Directions

1. Put the corned beef in deep cold water.
2. Place on the fire and let slowly come to boiling point.
3. Simmer steadily, allowing half an hour to a pound.
4. Use seasonings and vegetables to taste as required.
5. Cabbage and any other kind of vegetable may be served with corned beef.

title: Boiled Green Peas
body:
## Ingredients

- peas
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- sugar

## Directions

1. Put peas on fire in boiling water mixed with a little salt
2. Boil until tender, but not broken
3. Pour off the water and season with salt, pepper and butter
4. A little sugar may be used
5. Canned peas must be well washed in cold water before using

title: Boiled Ham
body:
## Ingredients

- ham
- mustard
- bread crumbs
- powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Soak the ham in cold water over night.
2. Wash carefully and put into cold water.
3. Place over the fire.
4. Let come to boil, simmer, allowing 20 minutes to each pound.
5. When done, lift it out of the liquor, remove the skin and spread the ham with mustard.
6. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and powdered sugar.
7. Bake in the oven until brown.

title: Boiled Icing
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of water
- 3/4 teaspoonful of cream of tartar
- white of an egg
- lemon or vanilla for flavoring

## Directions

1. Put sugar, water and cream of tartar in a sauce-pan
2. Let boil until syrup will thread when dropped from tip of spoon
3. Beat white of an egg to a stiff froth
4. Pour syrup gradually on it, whipping well
5. Flavor with lemon or vanilla
6. If using two whites of eggs in the syrup, the icing will be smoother

title: Boiled Icing
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of water
- 3/4 teaspoonful of cream of tartar
- white of an egg
- lemon or vanilla

## Directions

1. Put 1 cupful of sugar, 1/2 cupful of water and 3/4 teaspoonful of cream of tartar in a sauce-pan, let boil until syrup will thread when dropped from tip of spoon.
2. Beat white of an egg to a stiff froth, pour syrup gradually on it, whipping well.
3. Flavor with lemon or vanilla.

title: Boiled Leeks
body:
## Ingredients

- leeks
- salted water
- melted butter
- salt
- pepper
- toast

## Directions

1. Clean and wash the leeks.
2. Cook in salted water until tender.
3. Place on toast and pour melted butter over.
4. Season with salt and pepper.

title: Boiled Lentils
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound of lentils
- butter
- sugar
- salt
- lemon juice
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour

## Directions

1. Wash 1 pound of lentils, put in cold water to cook with a lump of butter and sugar.
2. Let simmer until tender.
3. Prepare a sauce of 1 tablespoonful of butter, 1 tablespoonful of flour mixed with liquor of lentils.
4. Add the boiled lentils into the sauce, let boil.
5. Season with salt and lemon juice.
6. Or drain off the water and season the lentils with salt, lemon juice and 1 tablespoonful of butter.

title: Boiled Macaroni
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound of macaroni
- 1 1/2 quarts of water
- salt
- pepper
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3-4 tablespoonfuls of cheese crumbs
- milk, tomato or Béchamel sauce (optional)

## Directions

1. Cut the macaroni in pieces 2 inches long.
2. Rinse and put to cook in boiling water with salt and a few grains of pepper.
3. Let boil 20 minutes or until soft.
4. Drain off the water carefully and mix the macaroni with 2 tablespoonfuls of butter.
5. Arrange on a dish and sprinkle with 3-4 tablespoonfuls of cheese crumbs.
6. May be served with milk, tomato or Béchamel sauce.

title: Boiled Mutton
body:
## Ingredients

- mutton
- boiling water
- vegetables
- pepper
- salt
- Caper sauce

## Directions

1. Wipe mutton, put into a kettle
2. Pour over it boiling water and let quickly boil
3. Add vegetables, pepper and salt
4. Let simmer covered, until tender
5. Arrange on a serving dish, having the vegetables around the meat
6. Serve with Caper sauce

title: Boiled Mutton
body:
## Ingredients

- Mutton
- Hot water
- Vegetables
- Salt
- Pepper
- Caper sauce

## Directions

1. Wipe mutton and put into a kettle.
2. Pour over it boiling water and let quickly boil.
3. Add vegetables, pepper and salt.
4. Let simmer covered until tender.
5. Arrange on a serving dish with the vegetables around the meat.
6. Serve with Caper sauce.

title: Boiled Onions
body:
## Ingredients

- onions
- cold water
- salted water
- butter
- salt
- sugar
- vinegar
- milk sauce
- Bechamel sauce
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Put onions in cold water and remove outer skins.
2. Place in a saucepan and pour boiling water over.
3. Let boil 10 minutes.
4. Drain off the water, and pour a little cold water on the onions.
5. Melt 2 tablespoonfuls of butter in a saucepan, place the onions in it, sprinkle with a little salt and sugar.
6. Pour 1 cupful of water mixed with vinegar on them, let simmer, covered, until tender.
7. Serve with milk sauce or Bechamel sauce or with melted butter.

title: Boiled Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- salt
- water

## Directions

1. Pare potatoes, form into balls of equal size
2. Wash thoroughly
3. Put over the fire in boiling water mixed with a dash of salt
4. Let simmer slowly until tender
5. Drain off the water and let stand on the side of the range, uncovered to evaporate all the water
6. Put old potatoes to cook in cold water

title: Boiled Potatoes with Parsley
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled potatoes
- parsley
- salt
- butter

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed for boiled potatoes
2. When thoroughly drained sprinkle with finely chopped parsley and salt
3. Dot over with butter

title: Boiled Rice
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- salt
- butter

## Directions

1. Wash the rice carefully in several waters
2. Put in salted boiling water on the fire to cook slowly 20 minutes or until the rice is tender but not mashed
3. Drain off the water and rinse well with hot water
4. Sprinkle with salt, dot with small bits of butter
5. Place on the range stirring now and then to evaporate the moisture
6. Or turn the rice into a strainer and put in oven to dry

title: Boiled Rice (Keitettyjä riisiä)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- salt
- water
- butter

## Directions

1. Wash the rice carefully in several waters
2. Put on the fire in plenty of boiling salted water
3. Cook slowly for 20 minutes or until the rice is tender but not mushy
4. Drain and rinse well with cold water
5. Sprinkle with salt and dot with butter
6. Put on the side of the range stirring now and then so as to evaporate the moisture, or place the rice in the strainer into an open oven to evaporate
7. Serve as a substitute for potatoes

title: Boiled String Beans
body:
## Ingredients

- string beans
- boiling water
- salt
- pepper
- melted butter
- parsley
- sour apples
- butter
- flour
- sugar
- vinegar or lemon juice
- milk sauce

## Directions

1. Remove all the strings, cut the beans into pieces.
2. Put on the fire in boiling water mixed with a little salt.
3. Let boil until soft.
4. Drain, season with salt, pepper and melted butter.
5. A tiny bunch of parsley added to the beans while boiling will give a good flavor.
6. String beans may be boiled with two sour apples cut in pieces.
7. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and of liquor of string beans.
8. Pour over the beans.
9. Season with salt, sugar and vinegar or lemon juice.
10. String beans may also be served with milk sauce.

title: Boiled Tongue
body:
## Ingredients

- Tongue
- Salt
- Water
- Tomato, horseradish, or Tartar sauce

## Directions

1. Wash tongue and scrape carefully.
2. Place on the fire in hot salted water.
3. Cook slowly until tender.
4. Skin immediately and cut in slices.
5. Pour tomato, horseradish or Tartar sauce upon the tongue.
6. Serve.

title: Boiled Tripe
body:
## Ingredients

- tripe
- celery
- water

## Directions

1. Soak tripe for a few minutes in water with 2 stalks of celery
2. Put in boiling water and cook until tender

title: Bone Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 lbs. of roast bones
- 3 quarts of water
- 1 tablespoon of pearl-barley or rice
- 1 carrot
- 1 onion
- a piece of turnip
- 2 cupfuls of potatoes
- 10 peppercorns
- salt
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Cut the bones and put them into cold water.
2. Place on the fire.
3. Cut the vegetables into small cubes and cook with the barley until tender in 1 quart of water.
4. Remains of the vegetables have to be cooked with the bones for a few hours.
5. Strain the soup.

title: Boston Baked Beans
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ quarts of beans
- cold water
- piece of pork
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar or molasses
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 1 chopped onion
- ½ cupful of chili sauce
- 3 cupfuls of water

## Directions

1. Rinse and soak 1½ quarts of beans in cold water
2. Cook in the same water slowly about 1 hour having a little piece of pork in the kettle
3. Drain off the water, put the beans with rind of pork into an earthen bowl
4. Prepare a sauce of 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar or molasses, 1 tablespoonful of salt, 1 chopped onion, ½ cupful of chili sauce and 3 cupfuls of water
5. Pour the sauce over the beans
6. Cover and bake in a slow oven 6—7 hours
7. Add a little boiling water if necessary

title: Boston Brown Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of rye flour
- 2 cupfuls of granulated corn meal
- 2 cupfuls of graham flour
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of molasses
- 3 1/2 cupfuls of milk, water or sour milk
- 1 1/2 teaspoonfuls of soda
- 1 1/2 teaspoonfuls of salt

## Directions

1. Mix dry ingredients, add molasses and milk.
2. Pour the mixture in a buttered mold with a closely-fitted cover, filling 3/4 of the mold.
3. Cook for 3 hours in a vessel of boiling water, taking care that the vessel is filled with water to half the height of the mold.

title: Boston papuja (Boston Baked Beans)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ quarts of beans
- pork
- 2 tablespoons sugar or syrup
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 1 onion
- ½ cup Chili sauce
- 3 cups water

## Directions

1. Rinse and soak 1½ quarts of beans in cold water over night.
2. Put on the fire in cold water.
3. Cook slowly with a piece of pork about an hour.
4. Drain.
5. Place the beans with a rind of pork into an earthen bowl.
6. Prepare a sauce of 2 tablespoons sugar or syrup, 1 tablespoon salt, 1 chopped onion, ½ cup Chili sauce and 3 cups water.
7. Pour the sauce over the beans.
8. Have plenty of water to cover the beans.
9. Bake in a slow oven for 6—7 hours adding water, if the beans are getting dry.

title: Boston riiskealeip (Boston Brown Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups rye flour
- 2 cups granulated cornmeal
- 2 cups graham flour
- 1 1/2 cups molasses
- 2 1/2 cups water or milk, fresh or sour
- 1 1/2 teaspoons soda
- 1 1/2 teaspoons salt

## Directions

1. Mix together all the dry ingredients, add molasses and milk.
2. Pour the mixture into a buttered tin with cover.
3. Fill about 3/4 of the tin's height.
4. Steam for 3 hours in a water bath, keeping the water level about halfway up the tin.
5. May be baked also and instead of soda yeast may be used.

title: Bran-muffensia (Bran Muffins)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups bran
- 1 cup white or graham flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 tablespoons molasses
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 1/2 cups milk
- 1 egg

## Directions

1. Mix together all the dry ingredients
2. Add the egg beaten to a froth with milk and the molasses
3. Mix well
4. Bake for 50 or 60 minutes in buttered muffin tins

title: Brandy Rings
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of butter
- 3/4 lb. of sugar
- 1 lb. of flour
- 1/4 cupful of brandy

## Directions

1. Work butter to a cream
2. Add sugar, brandy and flour
3. Form into small rings
4. Bake in a hot oven

title: Breakfast Rolls
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 1 teaspoonful of sugar
- 1/2 cake of yeast
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 3 cupfuls of flour

## Directions

1. Warm milk mixed with salt and sugar
2. Add yeast and a part of the flour into it
3. Let rise
4. Mix with melted butter and the rest of the flour, kneading well
5. Put to rise and form into rolls
6. Let rise again and bake about 15-20 minutes

title: Broiled Fish
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- melted butter
- salt
- pepper
- watercresses or lemon

## Directions

1. Split the fish to be broiled down the back, wash and wipe dry.
2. Spread with melted butter.
3. Make the broiler hot and butter it.
4. The fire must be clear and hot for small fish, more moderate for larger fish, because the outside should not be too scorched before the inside is done.
5. The fish should be first done on flesh side.
6. When there is danger of burning, the broiler may be laid on a pan in oven to finish the cooking.
7. Turn the fish onto a hot dish, spread with butter, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
8. Garnish with watercresses or lemon.

title: Broiled Mackerel
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- butter or salad oil
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Soak the fish, wipe and spread with butter or salad oil and lemon juice.
2. Let stand for a while.
3. Broil on a slow fire spreading often with butter.
4. Serve with tomato or milk sauce.

title: Broiled Oysters (Huulitele)
body:
## Ingredients

- oysters, equal-sized
- salt
- pepper
- melted butter
- buttered toast
- lemon juice
- lemon butter

## Directions

1. Wash and wipe equal-sized oysters
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
3. Dip in melted butter
4. Lay them on the broiler
5. Broil over a clear fire on both sides for a few minutes
6. Serve on buttered toast laying 3-4 oysters on each
7. Baste with a little melted butter and lemon juice
8. Serve with lemon butter

title: Broiled Squab
body:
## Ingredients

- squabs
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- butter

## Directions

1. Remove bones from squabs, sprinkle outside with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
2. Let stand for a little while.
3. Broil on a slow fire, dot with butter, push into the oven for a few minutes.
4. May be broiled leaving the bones in, same as directed for broiled chicken.

title: Brown Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 slices of carrot
- 1 slice of onion
- 8 grains of pepper
- 2 cupfuls of brown stock
- 1 bay leaf
- 1 sprig of parsley

## Directions

1. Brown carrot and onion in butter, add flour, brown stock and seasonings.
2. Let boil.
3. Strain and season.

title: Brown Stock (Ruskea Liemi)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 lbs. of marrowbones
- 7 quarts of cold water
- 1 pound of soupmeat
- 1 pound of veal
- fat from marrowbones
- carrot
- turnip
- onion
- celery
- parsley
- clove
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Cut 4 lbs. of marrowbones into pieces and put them in a soupkettle.
2. Pour 7 quarts of cold water on them and let it stand for an hour.
3. Cut 1 pound of soupmeat and 1 pound of veal into small squares and brown the meat in a pan using the fat from marrowbones for browning.
4. Add the browned meat into the soupkettle, place it on a slow fire.
5. When boiling add the cleaned and cut vegetables into it.
6. Season with cloves, salt and pepper.
7. Let simmer covered for 6 hours.
8. When ready, strain through a fine cloth into an earthen bowl.
9. Let it cool uncovered.

title: Burnt Almonds
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of almonds
- 1 lb. of sugar
- 1/2 teaspoonful of vanilla
- water

## Directions

1. Choose nice whole almonds, rub them between a cloth.
2. Moisten sugar with water and mix with 1/2 teaspoonful of vanilla.
3. Put almonds into it and let boil, stirring carefully until they begin to crack.
4. Remove the pan from the fire and stir the almonds until they are dry.
5. Place the pan again on slow fire, add a few drops of water stirring until almonds are covered with syrup.
6. Remove the pan from fire and let stand covered for 20 minutes.

title: Buttered Lobster
body:
## Ingredients

- lobster
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Remove the meat from the shells taking care not to break the shells.
2. Cut the meat into small dice.
3. Season with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
4. Fill the shells with the meat.
5. Pour a little melted butter over it.
6. Heat in oven.
7. Serve garnished with lobster claws.

title: Buttermilk Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cupfuls of flour
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 1 cupful of buttermilk
- 1 teaspoonful of soda
- 1 tablespoonful of butter

## Directions

1. Mix all the dry ingredients with butter in a bowl
2. Turn the batter on a floured board
3. Knead diligently
4. Divide the dough into two parts
5. Roll into cakes 1/3 inch thick
6. Flour them
7. Cut the cakes into six equal parts
8. Fry them or bake in oven about 10-15 minutes
9. When frying on the stove the cakes have to be turned over so as to be evenly done on both sides
10. Do not make the batter hard
11. Serve hot

title: Béarnaise-kastike (kuuma) (Béarnaise Sauce - Hot)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 yolks of egg
- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice or vinegar
- 1 tablespoon hot water
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Beat the yolks of egg
2. Add olive oil gradually, then water and lemon juice
3. Place the bowl in a pot of boiling water and whisk until thickened
4. Season with salt and pepper
5. Serve with all kinds of fish, cutlets and roasted meat

title: Calf's Head with Vinaigrette Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- Calf's head
- Seasonings
- Tomato
- Corn starch
- Salad oil
- Vinegar
- Onion
- Parsley
- Capers
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Boil calf's head with seasonings
2. Cut neatly in pieces
3. Pour over them a tomato sauce made of liquor of tomato and corn starch
4. Serve with Vinaigrette sauce made of 3 tablespoonfuls of salad oil, 1 tablespoonful of vinegar, 1 tablespoonful of grated onion, chopped parsley, caper, salt and pepper

title: Calf's Head ä la Terrapine
body:
## Ingredients

- Cooked calf's head
- Butter
- Flour
- White stock
- Salt and pepper
- Cream
- Eggs
- Madeira

## Directions

1. Cut cooked calf's head into small cubes
2. Mix 2 cupfuls of meat with 1 cupful of sauce made of 2 tablespoonfuls of butter, 2 tablespoonfuls of flour, 1 cupful of white stock
3. Season with salt and pepper
4. Add 2 cupfuls of cream
5. Add yolks of 2 eggs whipped
6. Flavor with 2 tablespoonfuls of Madeira

title: Canapes Lorenzo
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- 2 sliced onions
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 cups cream and milk mixture
- salt
- pepper
- ½ pound finely chopped lobster meat
- round toasted bread slices
- breadcrumbs
- cheese

## Directions

1. Fry 2 sliced onions in butter.
2. Add 2 tablespoons flour.
3. Add 2 cups cream and milk mixture to make a smooth sauce.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Mix in ½ pound finely chopped lobster meat.
6. Let cool.
7. Place on round toasted bread slices.
8. Spread on top a thin layer of mixture made of breadcrumbs, butter and cheese mixed in equal amounts.
9. Place in oven until browned.
10. Serve.

title: Canapes Lorenzo
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 thin slices of onion
- butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 cups rich milk
- salt
- pepper
- 1/2 pound lobster meat, chopped fine
- round shaped toast

## Directions

1. Brown 2 thin slices of onion in butter
2. Add 2 tablespoons flour and 2 cups rich milk, stirring the whole to a smooth gravy
3. Season with salt and pepper
4. Mix in 1/2 pound of lobster meat chopped fine
5. Let cool
6. Place on round shaped toast, cover with following mixture: bread crumbs, butter and grated cheese, equal amounts of each
7. Brown in oven
8. Serve hot

title: Canapes Lorenzo
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 slices of onion, chopped
- butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 cupfuls of rich milk
- salt and pepper
- ½ pound of chopped crab meat
- toast
- bread crumbs
- grated cheese

## Directions

1. Fry two chopped slices of onion in butter.
2. Add 2 tablespoonfuls of flour and 2 cupfuls of rich milk into it.
3. Stir thoroughly; season with salt and pepper.
4. Mix with ½ pound of chopped crab meat; put aside to get cool.
5. Heap the mixture on toast.
6. Spread thinly with a mixture of bread crumbs, butter and grated cheese mixed together in equal parts.
7. Bake until brown.
8. Serve hot.

title: Cantaloupe-salaatti (Cantaloupe Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- Melon
- Lettuce
- Mayonnaise
- Cream

## Directions

1. Cut the melon in small parts, remove the seeds and the peels, cut in pieces
2. Serve on a bed of lettuce mixed in mayonnaise diluted with cream

title: Caper Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 pint of beef or fish stock
- 1 to 2 tablespoonfuls of capers
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice
- salt
- pepper
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cook the sauce from butter, flour and stock
2. Season with pepper, salt, sugar, lemon juice and capers
3. You can also add a couple of egg yolks and a little cream at the end
4. Serve with boiled fish and meat

title: Caramel Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of granulated sugar
- ½ cupful of water

## Directions

1. Brown 1 cupful of granulated sugar in a pan.
2. Mix with ½ cupful of water stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Take care not to burn the sugar only let it get delicate brown.
4. Use this caramel instead of vanilla and sugar in vanilla ice cream base.

title: Casserole kana (Casseroled Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken
- yellow turnips
- potatoes
- green beans
- onions
- bouillon from cooking the chicken
- Kitchen Bouquet
- 1 cup tomato

## Directions

1. Clean the chicken and cook whole until half done.
2. Cut in nice pieces and place into a casserole, arranging it in form of a whole.
3. Cut yellow turnips and potatoes into cubes.
4. Cut green beans and onions into pieces and cook until tender.
5. Mix these vegetables with sauce and fill inside and around the chicken as much as will fit.
6. Prepare sauce from the bouillon in which the chicken was cooked.
7. Color brown with Kitchen Bouquet.
8. Add 1 cup tomato and pour over the chicken.
9. Roast in the oven for 1 hour without a lid and the rest of the time with lid on until tender.

title: Cauliflower Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- cauliflower
- salted water
- lettuce leaves
- mayonnaise sauce

## Directions

1. Cook cauliflower in salted water until tender.
2. Arrange on a serving dish in its original shape.
3. Garnish around with lettuce leaves.
4. Pour mayonnaise sauce over.

title: Cauliflower à la Hollandaise
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 head of cauliflower
- salted water
- Hollandaise sauce

## Directions

1. Cook as directed for Boiled Cauliflower.
2. Serve with Hollandaise sauce.

title: Caviare Roll
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- caviare cream
- red pepper

## Directions

1. Cut the bread into thin slices, lay caviare cream on.
2. Roll together.
3. Put caviare on, garnish with cream and red pepper.

title: Caviare à la Aspic
body:
## Ingredients

- small molds with a hole in center
- red pepper
- string-beans
- fish jelly
- caviare
- round thin toast
- minced lettuce

## Directions

1. Garnish small molds, having a hole in center, with red pepper and string-beans.
2. Fill with fish jelly.
3. Lay caviare between round thin toast, turn the fish jelly on them and fill the hole with caviare.
4. Serve on minced lettuce before soup.

title: Caviare à la Charlotte
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of whipped cream
- 2 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- 2 tablespoonfuls of caviare
- red pepper
- buttered slices of bread

## Directions

1. Stir cream, gelatine and caviare all together.
2. Garnish small molds with red pepper.
3. Cover the bottom with creamed caviare, then put a layer of caviare in, and cover that with creamed caviare.
4. Serve on buttered slices of bread.

title: Celery Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- celery stalks
- Mayonnaise or French dressing
- lettuce leaves

## Directions

1. Clean and scrape celery stalks, cut in pieces 1/4 inch long.
2. Put in cold water for a few minutes.
3. Mix celery with Mayonnaise or French dressing.
4. Garnish with lettuce leaves.

title: Celery Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- celery stalks
- cold water
- Mayonnaise or French dressing
- lettuce leaves

## Directions

1. Clean and scrape celery stalks, cut in pieces 1/4 inch long.
2. Put in cold water for a few minutes.
3. Mix celery with Mayonnaise or French dressing.
4. Garnish with lettuce leaves.

title: Champagne Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of brown sauce
- 1/2 cupful of champagne
- few grains of pepper
- 1 bay leaf
- a little sugar

## Directions

1. Make a cupful of brown sauce.
2. Add 1/2 cupful of champagne, few grains of pepper, 1 bay leaf and a little sugar.
3. Cook 10 minutes and strain.

title: Charlote Mansikat (Strawberries à la Charlotte)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 cupful of thin cream
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1/2 teaspoonful of vanilla
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of cream
- 6 leaves or 4 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- a few macaroons
- strawberries cut in pieces
- big strawberries of equal size
- red-colored lemon juice

## Directions

1. Split lengthwise big strawberries of equal size
