2. Dip in red-colored lemon juice and cover the bottom and the sides of the mold with the strawberries, laying them with the flat side down
3. Dissolve gelatine with sugar in thin cream, add vanilla and let cool
4. Put whipped cream, vanilla and macaroons into it
5. Pour in a wet mold and set to stiffen
6. Instead of macaroons boiled rice may be used
7. Serve unmolded

title: Charlotte Ananas (Pineapple à la Charlotte)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pineapple
- 7 leaves of gelatine
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1 pint of whipped cream

## Directions

1. Remove skin and eyes from pineapple and chop
2. Dissolve 7 leaves of gelatine in pineapple juice by stirring on the fire
3. Add 1 cupful of sugar into it and mix it with the chopped pineapple
4. When cool, add 1 pint of whipped cream
5. Put in a wet mold to form

title: Charlotte Omenia (Apple à la Charlotte)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 teaspoonful of butter
- 3 big apples
- 2 tablespoonfuls of raisins
- 1 sliced orange
- a little grated lemon rind
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of sherry
- 1 tablespoonful of currant jelly
- bread
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Pare apples, cut into thin slices, put in a saucepan with butter, sugar, raisins and orange slices.
2. Keep on the fire until hot, add sherry and currant jelly.
3. Cover the bottom and the sides of a mold with small, round slices of bread, dipped in melted butter.
4. Pour the apple mixture into the mold, cover with a few slices of bread, so as not to burn the surface.
5. Bake in oven 1 hour.
6. Turn out of the mold; serve with whipped cream.

title: Charlotte Russe
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pints of thick cream
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 6-7 leaves of gelatine
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla or a little lemon

## Directions

1. Dissolve gelatine in 1/2 cupful of water
2. Whip cream to a froth
3. Add sugar and vanilla
4. Add gelatine when it has cooled slightly
5. Line the bottom and sides of a mold with long biscuits (lady fingers) or prepare a wrapper from pastry

title: Charlotte Russe
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pints of thick cream
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 6-7 leaves of gelatine
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla or a few drops of lemon juice
- 1/2 cupful of water
- lady fingers or puff paste

## Directions

1. Dissolve gelatine in 1/2 cupful of water
2. Whip cream to a froth, add sugar, vanilla and gelatine when the latter has cooled down a little
3. Cover the bottom and the sides of the mold with lady fingers, or roll puff paste into a sheet and cut slices in shape of the mold, laying them on the bottom and sides
4. Fill the mold with cream mixture and set to harden
5. Unmold, garnish with wine jelly and whipped cream
6. The mold may be filled also with fruit creams

title: Charlotte Russe (Charlotte Russe)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups whipping cream
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 3/4 teaspoon vanilla or some lemon juice
- 1/4 package gelatine
- 1/2 cup water
- Lady fingers or cake slices
- Wine jelly for decoration

## Directions

1. Dissolve the gelatine in 1/2 cup of water
2. Whip the cream to foam
3. Add sugar and vanilla, and gelatine when it is slightly cooled
4. Line the bottom and sides of the mold with long lady fingers or with slices cut from sponge cake, arranged according to the size of the mold
5. Fill the mold with the cream mixture
6. Let it set
7. Turn out of the mold
8. Decorate on top with wine jelly and whipped cream
9. The mold may be filled with various fruit jellies

title: Charlotte-mansikat (Strawberries à la Charlotte)
body:
## Ingredients

- Large strawberries of equal size
- Red colored liquid lemon jelly
- 1/4 cup thin cream
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 1/4 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 1/2 cups whipping cream
- 1/4 package gelatine
- Macaroons
- Strawberries cut in pieces

## Directions

1. Have large strawberries of equal size. Split lengthwise, dip in red colored liquid lemon jelly.
2. Line the bottom and the sides of a mold with the strawberries laying them flat side out.
3. Dissolve the gelatine with the sugar in the thin cream, add vanilla, let cool.
4. Mix with the whipped cream, macaroons and strawberries.
5. Pour into a wet mold, let set.
6. Instead of macaroons boiled rice may be used.
7. Serve unmolded.

title: Charlotte-omena (kylmä) (Apple à la Charlotte, Cold)
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- sugar
- lemon juice
- carmine coloring
- cornstarch
- 1 cup cream
- 4 tablespoons dissolved gelatine
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 2 tablespoons lemon juice
- 1/2 cup whipped cream
- vanilla
- sponge cake

## Directions

1. Pare and core the apples, cut crosswise in slices
2. Cook with sugar and some lemon juice
3. When tender, place to cool
4. Baste with a sauce made of the juice of the apples colored with carmine and thickened with cornstarch
5. Scald the cream with sugar and gelatine
6. When cool, add lemon juice, vanilla and whipped cream
7. Dip small molds into cold water, fill with this mixture and let set
8. Cut foundations from sponge cake
9. First place basted apple slices on the foundations
10. Pour the cream mixture from the molds over the apple slices
11. Arrange in a circle on a platter
12. Place whipped cream in the center

title: Charlotte-omenia (Apple à la Charlotte)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 large apples
- 1/2 teaspoon butter
- 2 tablespoons raisins
- 1 orange cut in slices
- 1 cup sugar
- Lemon juice and grated rind
- 1 tablespoon currant jelly
- Small round slices of bread
- Whipped cream

## Directions

1. Peel the apples and cut in thin slices.
2. Put into a saucepan with sugar, butter, raisins and slices of orange.
3. Keep on the fire until hot.
4. Add lemon juice, rind and currant jelly.
5. Cover the bottom and the edges of a mold with small round slices of bread dipped in butter.
6. Fill with the apples.
7. Cover the top with a few slices of bread so as to prevent from burning.
8. Bake for 1 hour.
9. Serve unmoulded with whipped cream.

title: Chateaubriand
body:
## Ingredients

- center of the fillet
- melted butter or salad oil
- salt and pepper
- parsley butter

## Directions

1. Cut the center of the fillet in pieces 1½ inch thick
2. Pound lightly
3. Dip in melted butter or salad oil
4. Fry the pieces quickly in a pan on both sides
5. Sprinkle salt and pepper on top
6. Place on a heated serving platter with a small piece of parsley butter for each piece
7. Add a little meat stock to the pan and pour this sauce on the platter

title: Chauteaubriand (Chauteaubriand)
body:
## Ingredients

- center of fillets, cut 1½ inches thick
- melted butter or olive oil
- salt
- pepper
- parsley butter
- bouillon

## Directions

1. Cut the center of fillets in pieces 1½ inches thick and pound lightly.
2. Dip in melted butter or olive oil.
3. Fry quickly on both sides in a pan.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and place on a hot platter with a little dot of parsley butter on top of each piece.
5. Add a little bouillon to the drippings in the pan and pour this over the meat.

title: Cheese Balls
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1½ cupfuls of milk
- 9 tablespoonfuls of grated cheese
- 3-6 tablespoonfuls of bread crumbs
- 3 yolks

## Directions

1. Cook butter and flour in a saucepan, mix with milk and cheese, stir until a smooth paste.
2. Let boil a few minutes.
3. Set to cool, and thicken with yolks and bread crumbs so as to make a batter thick enough to be formed into small balls.
4. Roll the balls in flour.
5. Cook in milk or in deep lard, or fry in butter.

title: Cheese Canapes (Juustovoileipiä)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread slices
- grated cheese
- pepper

## Directions

1. Brown slices of bread on one side.
2. Cover the browned side with grated cheese.
3. Sprinkle with pepper.
4. Put in a baking pan in a quick oven.
5. When the cheese begins to melt, place the toast on a napkin and serve hot.

title: Cheese Omelet
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 cupful of cream or milk
- 3 tablespoonfuls of grated cheese
- salt

## Directions

1. Beat yolks and whites separately
2. Mix the cheese, salt and cream beaten to a froth with the yolks
3. At the last mix in the beaten whites
4. Pour the mixture into a buttered omelet mold and bake in the oven
5. Serve hot

title: Cheese Soufflé I
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 big spoonful of butter
- whites of 2 eggs
- yolks of 2 eggs
- 3 big spoonfuls of American cheese
- 2 tablespoonfuls of whipped cream
- paprika
- mustard

## Directions

1. Mix the butter and the yolks on the fire until thick
2. Add the cheese and seasonings
3. Lastly fold in the whites beaten stiff

title: Cheese Soufflé II
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of thick milk sauce
- 1 cupful of grated American cheese
- 3 eggs
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Mix milk sauce and cheese well together
2. Add gradually yolks, pepper and salt
3. Fold in whites, beaten stiff, lastly
4. Butter small molds and fill with this mixture
5. Bake in oven in a pan of water for 15 minutes
6. Serve on a folded napkin

title: Cheese Straws
body:
## Ingredients

- puff paste
- grated cheese
- cayenne

## Directions

1. Roll puff paste into a sheet, 3/8 inch thick.
2. Sprinkle one half with grated cheese and a little cayenne.
3. Double in half and press lightly together.
4. Cut with knife into straws, 4 inches long and 1/2 inch wide.
5. Bake in hot oven 10 minutes.
6. Serve with salad.

title: Chestnut Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- chestnuts
- sugar
- vanilla
- salt
- cream
- whipped cream
- cooked apples

## Directions

1. Cook chestnuts, skin and press through a sieve.
2. Season with sugar, vanilla and salt, moisten with cream.
3. Heat the mixture, arrange on a serving dish in form of a ring or pyramid.
4. Let cool.
5. Garnish with whipped cream and cooked apples.

title: Chestnut Puree
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of chestnuts
- 3 quarts of vegetable stock
- 1 leek
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- yolks of 2 eggs
- 1 cupful of cream

## Directions

1. Soak the chestnuts in boiling water.
2. Remove the shells and cook in vegetable stock until tender.
3. Cook the onion in butter, add the flour and put it into the soup.
4. Strain and lastly add the yolks of eggs and cream.
5. Mushrooms cut in pieces and cooked in a small quantity of water for 10 minutes, may be served in the soup.

title: Chestnut Puree
body:
## Ingredients

- chestnuts
- salt
- water
- cream or milk
- pepper

## Directions

1. Skin the chestnuts
2. Cook in salted water until tender
3. Drain
4. Chop
5. Moisten with cream or milk
6. Season with salt and pepper
7. Stir until smooth

title: Chestnuts
body:
## Ingredients

- chestnuts
- salt

## Directions

1. Cut with knife a cross or a little hole in the top
2. Put the chestnuts with salt in a saucepan on a quick fire to cook without water
3. Stir carefully
4. After 30 minutes boiling they are easy to skin
5. May be served unsinned on a folded napkin with cold butter
6. Alternatively bake the chestnuts in oven covered with a thick layer of salt on them
7. In moderate oven they will be done in 30 minutes
8. Or boil the chestnuts in salted water, covered, 30 minutes to remove the skins easily

title: Chicken Broth
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 lbs. of chicken cut into pieces
- 4 quarts of water
- 1 onion
- 2 stalks or 1 root of celery
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Remove the fat, put the meat in cold water on a slow fire.
2. When boiled 5 minutes add salt and vegetables cut into pieces, and let cook until the meat is tender.
3. Remove the breast and when boiled a few hours more strain the soup.
4. Remove the fat carefully.
5. Serve with the breastmeat cut into cubes and boiled rice.

title: Chicken Liver with Apples
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- butter
- sugar
- chicken livers
- salt
- pepper
- beef stock
- toast points
- Madeira sauce

## Directions

1. Pare the apples and cut lengthwise in six pieces
2. Cook in butter with a little sugar until softened
3. Fry the livers in butter
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
5. Add a little beef stock and let come to boiling point
6. Arrange the apples on a serving dish
7. Lay the livers on them
8. Line the dish with toast points
9. Serve with Madeira sauce

title: Chicken Liver with Mousse
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken livers
- butter
- tomato slices
- salt
- pepper
- chicken mousse
- brown paper
- truffle sauce

## Directions

1. Fry the livers with butter in a pan
2. Place slices of tomatoes, sprinkled first with salt and pepper
3. Cover with chicken mousse
4. Bake in oven with brown paper on for 10-12 minutes
5. Serve with truffle sauce

title: Chicken Mousse (Kana-muusi)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of chicken fillet
- white of 1 egg
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of cream

## Directions

1. Remove the fibres and pound the fillet to a paste.
2. Add the white of egg and pound again.
3. Rub through a sieve.
4. Add the cream gradually.

title: Chicken Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled chicken
- celery
- salt
- pepper
- mayonnaise sauce
- lettuce leaves
- hard-boiled eggs
- pickles
- capers
- olives

## Directions

1. Cut boiled chicken in small pieces.
2. Add half as much small pieces of celery; sprinkle with salt and pepper, mix with mayonnaise sauce.
3. Put into a salad bowl and cover with mayonnaise sauce.
4. Garnish around with lettuce leaves, line the surface with hard-boiled eggs, pickles, capers and olives, finely chopped.

title: Chicken Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- remains of 2 chickens
- 2 1/2 quarts of water
- 1 leek
- 2 stalks or 1/2 root of celery
- 2 sprigs of parsley
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- pepper and salt
- 2 tablespoonfuls of wine or 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice

## Directions

1. Remove the meat from the bones and cut it nicely into pieces.
2. Place the bones into boiling water to boil together with the vegetables washed and cut into pieces.
3. Let boil slowly for a few hours.
4. Thicken with butter and flour.
5. Season with salt and pepper, flavor with wine or lemon.
6. Strain and serve with the meat cut into pieces and fried bread dice.

title: Chicken à la Aspic with Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of chicken
- ½ tablespoonful or 5 leaves of gelatine
- milk or white beef stock
- 2 cupfuls of whipped cream

## Directions

1. Cut 1 cupful of chicken, pound it well and force through a sieve.
2. Dissolve ½ tablespoonful or 5 leaves of gelatine in milk or white beef stock, stir gradually into the chicken.
3. Add lastly 2 cupfuls of whipped cream.
4. Line the mold inside with aspic, as that will make it easier to remove from the mold.
5. When the aspic is firm fill the mold with chicken cream.
6. Turn onto a serving dish when firm, and serve with salad.

title: Chicken à la King (Kuningas kana)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of chopped onion
- breast meat of fried chicken, cut in pieces
- 1/2 cupful of tomato
- 1 tablespoonful of chopped mushrooms
- 2 tablespoonfuls of mushroom liquor
- 1/4 cupful of sherry
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- a little paprika
- 1/2 teaspoonful of chopped green pepper
- a little minced truffle
- 1/2 teaspoonful of meat extract
- a few scallops

## Directions

1. Cook the butter and the onion a few minutes.
2. Add the chicken cut in cubes, tomato and mushrooms.
3. Let boil 10 minutes.
4. Add the scallops, sherry and seasonings.
5. Let boil.
6. Serve instead of fish or as entrée.

title: Chicken à la Neva
body:
## Ingredients

- Chickens
- Vegetables or chicken salad
- Goose liver pie or chopped sweetbreads
- White Chaudfroid Sauce
- Lettuce
- Chicken jelly

## Directions

1. Cook the chickens whole.
2. Remove carefully the fillets, the breastbone and the legs.
3. Stuff with vegetables or chicken salad.
4. Fill the breast hole with goose liver pie or chopped sweetbreads.
5. Pour upon the fillets white Chaudfroid Sauce.
6. Place nicely on the chicken and around it upon a serving dish.
7. Garnish with lettuce and chicken jelly.

title: Chili Sauce (Chili kastike)
body:
## Ingredients

- two dozen ripe tomatoes, skinned and cut in pieces
- three onions, peeled and chopped
- two green peppers, seeded and chopped
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls of salt
- cinnamon, 2 tablespoonfuls
- cloves, 2 tablespoonfuls
- nutmeg, 2 tablespoonfuls
- allspice, 2 tablespoonfuls
- 1 quart of vinegar

## Directions

1. Put the vegetables in boiler, add 1 cupful of sugar, 2 tablespoonfuls of salt, cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg and allspice, 2 tablespoonfuls of each, and 1 quart of vinegar
2. Cook for 2 1/2 hours
3. Let cool down and bottle

title: Chili-kastike (Chili Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 dozen ripe tomatoes
- 4 medium-sized onions
- 2 green peppers
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 tablespoons salt
- cinnamon, 2 teaspoons
- cloves, 2 teaspoons
- nutmeg, 2 teaspoons
- allspice, 2 teaspoons
- 1 quart vinegar

## Directions

1. Peel and cut in pieces 2 dozen ripe tomatoes and 4 medium-sized onions
2. Remove the seeds from 2 green peppers and chop the peppers
3. Put the vegetables into a kettle, add 1 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons salt, cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg and allspice, 2 teaspoons each, 1 quart vinegar
4. Simmer for 3 hours or until moderately thick

title: Chocolate Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 cupfuls of sugar
- 4 tablespoonfuls of cream
- 2 tablespoonfuls of grated chocolate
- 2½ cupfuls of flour
- ¼ cupful of almonds
- ½ teaspoonful of baking soda
- whites of 6 eggs

## Directions

1. Cream butter with sugar
2. Add soda dissolved in cream
3. Add blanched and chopped almonds
4. Add chocolate and flour
5. Fold in whites beaten to a froth
6. Turn in a buttered mold and bake in a moderate oven

title: Chocolate Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- whites of 3 eggs
- 6 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1 1/2 tablesp. of grated chocolate

## Directions

1. Whip whites of eggs to a firm froth, continue whipping about 15 minutes.
2. Sift powdered sugar little by little into the whites.
3. Form into small cakes on a buttered sheet, dry in a slow oven.

title: Chocolate Cream (Suklaa kermahyydyke)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of rich cream
- 2 ounces of chocolate
- 2 tablespoonfuls of powdered sugar
- 6 leaves or 4 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- 1/2 cupful of water
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla

## Directions

1. Melt chocolate in a saucepan
2. Add sugar, water, gelatine and vanilla into it
3. Set the mixture to cool when gelatine is all dissolved
4. Beat cream to a froth
5. Pass the cold chocolate mixture through a sieve into it
6. Put in a wet mold to stiffen

title: Chocolate Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of milk
- 1 pint of cream
- 3 ozs. of chocolate
- 6 yolks
- 1½ cupfuls of sugar

## Directions

1. Melt chocolate and pour boiling milk on it.
2. Beat yolks with sugar.
3. Cook one half of cream.
4. Pour the boiling cream and chocolate mixture slowly into the yolks, whipping well.
5. Put in double-boiler on the fire and beat until thick.
6. When cool, add the rest of the cream and freeze.

title: Chow-Chow (Mixed Vegetable Pickle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 pints of cucumbers
- 1 quart of green tomatoes
- 1 red pepper
- 1 cauliflower
- 1 pint of small white onions
- 1 quart of string beans
- 1 quart of peas
- 1 pint of carrots, cut in pieces
- 2 quarts of vinegar
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of pepper
- few bay leaves
- mace
- 2 ozs. of mustard seed
- a little salt
- 1/2 oz. of allspice
- different kinds of mushrooms

## Directions

1. Clean vegetables and cut in pieces
2. Let stand in salted water for 24 hours
3. Boil up vinegar with sugar and seasonings, put the vegetables into it and cook until soft
4. Arrange the vegetables nicely into jars, sprinkle with white pepper, mace and bay leaf between the layers
5. Fill the jars with drained vinegar mixture
6. Sprinkle the top with mustard seeds
7. Cover and keep in a cool place

title: Clam Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of clams
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 cupful of cream
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- yolks of 2 eggs
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Chop the clams fine and put on a slow fire to cook in their own liquor
2. Add a little water or fish stock and let simmer about an hour
3. Thicken with butter and flour
4. Beat the yolks and add gradually into it the scalded milk mixed with a pinch of soda
5. Remove from the fire and stir the milk mixed with eggs into it

title: Cocoa (Kaakao)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 cupfuls of milk
- 3½ tablespoonfuls of cocoa
- ¾ cupful of sugar
- a pinch of salt
- 1 cupful of boiling water
- whipped cream (optional)

## Directions

1. Heat 5 cupfuls of milk
2. Mix 3½ tablespoonfuls of cocoa, ¾ cupful of sugar and a pinch of salt
3. Pour 1 cupful of boiling water into the mixture and let boil
4. Add the boiling milk and let boil 1 minute
5. If desired, it may be whisked over hot water for 5 minutes
6. Serve with whipped cream or without

title: Coffee (Kahvi)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of coffee
- 6 cupfuls of water
- 1 white of egg
- egg shells

## Directions

1. Wash egg and put the white in a cup, beat it and add cold water to fill the cup
2. Pour this onto the coffee grounds in a pot with the egg shells and stir well
3. Pour boiling water on, stir and let boil 3—5 minutes
4. Add a little cold water and let settle

title: Coffee Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of cream
- ½ cupful of black coffee
- 1½ cupfuls of sugar
- 6 yolks
- 1 cupful of ground coffee
- 2 cupfuls of water

## Directions

1. Cook 1 cupful of ground coffee with 2 cupfuls of water ten minutes.
2. Strain through a tight cloth and let cool down.
3. Prepare cream mixture as usually of one half of the cream and yolks.
4. When cool, add the rest of the cream and the black coffee.
5. Then freeze.

title: Cola Candy
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 cupfuls of cream
- 3/4 cupful of brown sugar
- 8 tablespoonfuls of brown sugar
- 7 tablespoonfuls of cocoa
- 3/4 cupful of molasses
- a little vanilla

## Directions

1. Mix all the ingredients together in a saucepan and cook until the mixture becomes firm when cooled.
2. Pour on a buttered paper and cut into squares.

title: Cold Chocolate Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 ozs. of chocolate
- 4 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- yolks of 5 eggs
- 7 leaves or 5 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 2 cupfuls of cream

## Directions

1. Boil up milk and chocolate.
2. Whip yolk with sugar and pour the boiling milk gradually into it.
3. Stir well on the fire until it thickens.
4. Mix with gelatine and set to cool.
5. When the mixture begins to harden it must be free from lumps.
6. Add the whipped cream and pour in a mold to stiffen.
7. Unmold and serve with whipped cream.

title: Cold Duck
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 duck
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sherry
- 3 tablespoonfuls of gelatine soaked in water
- 1 cupful of whipped cream
- 1 cupful of chicken stock
- 3 tablespoonfuls of dissolved gelatine
- Corn starch
- Kitchen Bouquet
- Whipped cream
- Truffles
- Whites of hard-boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Clean a duck and roast in oven as directed.
2. When cold remove the fillets and grind several times.
3. Mix with 2 tablespoonfuls of sherry, 3 tablespoonfuls of gelatine soaked in water and 1 cupful of whipped cream.
4. Fill the breast hole with this mixture.
5. Mask the whole duck with jelly prepared of 1 cupful of chicken stock, 3 tablespoonfuls of dissolved gelatine and a little corn starch.
6. Color with Kitchen Bouquet and garnish with whipped cream, truffles and whites of hard-boiled eggs.

title: Cold Plum Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of plums
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of cream
- 5 leaves or 4 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- 1/4 lb. of sugar

## Directions

1. Cook plums until tender in a small quantity of water.
2. Stone and press through a sieve.
3. Add sugar and gelatine dissolved in 1/2 cupful of plum liquor.
4. Add cream whipped to a froth.
5. Set to firm in a mold.
6. Turn on a serving dish and garnish with whipped cream.

title: Cold Tongue with Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 beef tongue
- Cold water
- Hot salted water
- 1 quart of tongue liquor
- 8 tablespoonfuls of dissolved gelatine or 10 leaves of gelatine
- 1/2 cupful of tomato
- Whites of 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Soak a beef tongue in cold water.
2. Put it into hot water and scrape well.
3. Put in hot salted water, let simmer until tender; allow 2-3 hours for boiling.
4. Skin the tongue.
5. Strain the liquor, skim, and prepare an aspic jelly by allowing 8 tablespoonfuls of dissolved gelatine (or 10 leaves of gelatine), 1/2 cupful of tomato and whites of 2 eggs to 1 quart of liquor of tongue.
6. Boil stirring well.
7. Let simmer 5 minutes.
8. Strain through a fine cloth.
9. Cover bottom of a mold with clarified aspic jelly.
10. Cut the tongue in slices.
11. Arrange the slices into the mold so as to give the appearance of a whole tongue.
12. Pour gradually the aspic jelly over it and put aside to set.

title: Consomme (Beef Consomme)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 pounds soup meat
- 3 pounds bone
- 3 pounds chicken or some other fowl
- 6 quarts water
- 1/4 cup carrot
- 1/4 cup onion
- 1/4 cup celery
- 2 tablespoons salt
- 1 tablespoon butter

## Directions

1. Cut the meat in cubes, brown in a soup kettle with 1 tablespoonful of butter
2. Add the bones and the fowl
3. Cover with cold water, let stand covered on the side of the range for 1/2 hour
4. Cook on a slow fire for 3 hours or longer
5. Brown the vegetables, add to the soup, continue to boil for 1 hour
6. Strain the soup
7. If keeping for a long time, do not remove the cover of fat

title: Consomme (Consommé)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 lbs. of soupmeat
- 2 lbs. of veal
- 1 chicken
- 7 quarts of cold water
- 1 parsnip
- 1 root or 4 stalks of celery
- 1 beet
- 1 carrot
- 1 turnip
- 1 leek
- 2 sprigs of parsley
- 12 peppercorns
- 5 cloves
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter

## Directions

1. Cut the meat into cubes.
2. Put the butter into kettle and brown the meat in it.
3. Add the chicken and the bones into the kettle, pour cold water in and let it stand covered on side of range about half an hour.
4. Place it on a slow fire to heat it.
5. When boiled 5 minutes add salt, seasonings and vegetables cut and browned with a tablespoonful of butter.
6. Let simmer for 5-6 hours.
7. Strain the bouillon.
8. It will keep well by leaving the cover of fat on.

title: Corn Cake (Maissi kakku)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cupfuls of corn meal
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 3/4 cupful of sugar
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of milk
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cupful of butter
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 4 teaspoonfuls of baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix flour and corn meal with salt and baking powder.
2. Whip eggs with sugar, add milk and melted butter to it.
3. Mix with flour, stirring thoroughly together.
4. Bake in a shallow pan in hot oven.

title: Corn Fritters
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of fresh corn, grated from ears, or canned corn pressed through a colander
- 1/2 cupful of cracker crumbs
- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 2 eggs, yolks and whites beaten separately
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Mix corn with cracker crumbs soaked in milk
2. Add eggs (yolks and whites beaten separately), salt and pepper
3. Fry in a fryingpan, dropping the batter by spoonfuls into the lard
4. Brown on both sides
5. Or cook the fritters in deep lard

title: Corn Fritters (Corn Mykyjä)
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ cupful of corn
- 4 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 2 eggs
- ¼ teaspoonful of baking powder

## Directions

1. Rub corn through a strainer
2. Add salt, flour, baking powder, egg yolks and lastly egg whites
3. Place by spoonfuls into boiling fat and fry brown

title: Corn Griddle Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 1 cupful of cold corn meal
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 1 teaspoonful of baking powder

## Directions

1. Sift flour with salt, sugar and baking powder.
2. Stir milk into cold cornmeal.
3. Mix with flour and butter.
4. Fry as griddle cakes.

title: Corn Puffs
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 can of corn
- 4 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoonful of baking powder

## Directions

1. Force the corn through a sieve
2. Add salt, flour, baking powder, yolks and finally whites
3. Drop the mixture with spoon into boiling lard and cook until brown
4. When green corn is used, grate the corns fine; then prepare the puffs as of canned corn

title: Corn Timbale (Maissitimbali)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup canned or fresh corn grated
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 tablespoon butter
- salt
- pepper
- some sugar
- 2 egg whites
- some flour or bread crumbs (if canned corn is used)
- onion or chopped green pepper (optional for flavoring)

## Directions

1. Mix grated corn with 2 egg yolks, 1 tablespoon butter, salt, pepper and some sugar
2. Beat 2 egg whites firm and add last of all
3. If canned corn is used, add some flour or bread crumbs
4. Bake in buttered timbale molds in a pan of water covered for 20 minutes or until firm
5. Serve with milk sauce
6. Flavor with onion or chopped green pepper according to taste

title: Corn with Beans
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled corn
- boiled beans
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Remove boiled corn from the cob
2. Mix with the same quantity of boiled beans
3. Season with salt and pepper

title: Cornstarch putinki (Corn Starch Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of milk
- 3/4 cupful of corn starch
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- yolks of 2 eggs
- a little vanilla

## Directions

1. Boil milk
2. Stir in a part of sugar, vanilla and corn starch which has been mixed with cold milk
3. Let boil up
4. Add yolks whipped with sugar until light
5. Serve cold with fruit sauce, whipped cream or jam, or mixed with fruit or chocolate

title: Cornstarch-putinki (Cornstarch Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups milk
- 3 tablespoons cornstarch
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- Some vanilla
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Scald the milk
2. Add part of the sugar, vanilla and cornstarch dissolved in cold milk
3. Bring to boil
4. Remove from fire
5. Add egg yolks beaten with remaining sugar
6. Reheat over fire, not allowing to come to boiling point
7. Serve cold with vanilla or fruit sauce
8. May be served with whipped cream mixed with jam
9. Optional: use egg whites instead of yolks if white color is preferred
10. Optional: melt chocolate with milk and prepare as cornstarch pudding using 2 cups milk to 5-6 tablespoons finely chopped chocolate
11. Optional: mix in various canned fruits or berries

title: Cottage Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of sugar
- 2 eggs
- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 1 1/2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- a pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Cream butter with sugar
2. add yolks of eggs rubbing well
3. Add little by little milk and flour mixed with soda
4. Last whites beaten to a froth
5. Bake in a buttered dome-shaped mold, covered, about 25 minutes
6. Turn out upon a serving dish and serve with hard, chocolate or fruit sauce

title: Cottage-Juustoa (Cottage Cheese)
body:
## Ingredients

- sour skimmed milk
- boiling water
- salt
- pepper
- cream
- chopped green pepper (optional)

## Directions

1. Have some sour skimmed milk in a bowl.
2. Pour boiling water carefully around the edges having the water come over the top of the milk.
3. Let stand for an hour.
4. Strain through a cloth, drain carefully.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Dilute with cream.
7. May be mixed with chopped green pepper according to taste.

title: Cottage-putinki (Cottage Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 2 eggs
- 2 cups flour
- 1 1/2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 cup milk
- 1/4 cup sugar
- Salt

## Directions

1. Rub the butter with the sugar until creamy
2. Add the yolks stirring briskly
3. Mix gradually with milk and flour sifted with baking powder
4. Last of all add the egg whites beaten firm
5. Bake for 1/2 hour in a buttered dome-shaped mold covered
6. Unmold, serve with hard, chocolate or fruit sauce

title: Country Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of sugar
- 1/4 cupful of melted butter
- 3 cupfuls of cream
- 4 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 1 teaspoonful of baking soda
- 1 teaspoonful of cardamom
- 1 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- 1 teaspoonful of ginger
- 1 teaspoonful of orange rind

## Directions

1. Whip eggs with sugar
2. Mix with butter, flavoring, cream and flour mixed with baking soda
3. Bake in a buttered mold 1 hour

title: Crab Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- Boiled crab
- Mayonnaise sauce
- Lettuce leaves

## Directions

1. Prepare as lobster salad
2. Do not use eggs for garnishing

title: Crab-apple Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- crab apples
- cold water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Crab apples may be cooked whole if desired or cored and cut in pieces.
2. Proceed as for apple jelly.

title: Cranberry Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of cranberries
- 2 cupfuls of sugar
- water enough to cover the cranberries

## Directions

1. Rinse 1 quart of cranberries.
2. Put on the fire to boil with 2 cupfuls of sugar and water enough to cover them.
3. Cook slowly until a smooth pulp.
4. Pour in a mold to get firm, strain or leave unstrained.

title: Cream Cake I
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3 cupfuls of rich cream
- 10 ozs. of sugar
- 10 ozs. of flour
- 1/2 cupful of flour
- grated yellow lemon rind

## Directions

1. Beat yolks of eggs with sugar to a froth
2. Add beaten cream, flour and lemon rind
3. Turn on a buttered mold and bake 1/2-1 hour

title: Cream Cake II
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 3/4 cupfuls of thick cream
- 6 eggs
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 10 ozs. of flour
- a little grated lemon rind

## Directions

1. Beat cream and half of the sugar to a froth
2. Whip yolks of eggs and the rest of the sugar until light
3. Combine both mixtures
4. Stir grated lemon rind, flour and lastly the whites, beaten to a stiff froth, into it
5. Pour the batter in a carefully buttered mold and bake in a slow oven about 3/4 hour

title: Cream of Tomato Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. of fresh tomatoes or 2 cupfuls of canned tomatoes
- 1 quart of water or bouillon
- 1 quart of milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 slice of onion
- salt
- pepper
- a little sugar
- parsley
- 1 stalk of celery
- bit of bay leaf

## Directions

1. Cook the onion in butter
2. Add flour, tomatoes and the boiling bouillon into it, stirring thoroughly
3. Put parsley, celery and bay leaf into it
4. Let boil until the tomatoes are tender
5. Remove from the fire
6. Mix with teaspoonful of baking soda
7. Pour the scalded milk slowly into it, whipping well
8. Strain and season

title: Cream Puffs
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 1 scant tablespoonful of butter
- 1/2 cupful of flour
- yolks of 3 eggs
- beaten white of 1 egg
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- 1 square of chocolate
- 2 tablespoonfuls of milk
- 1/2 teaspoonful of vanilla
- yolks of 2 eggs
- Fondant icing

## Directions

1. Put milk and butter in a saucepan; when it boils, add flour and stir well until it begins to brown on the bottom.
2. Mix with yolks when cool and lastly stir whites, beaten stiff, into it.
3. Force through a pastry bag on a baking dish.
4. Spread with egg and bake in oven.
5. Melt chocolate, add one half of the sugar and milk.
6. Beat the remaining sugar and yolks, stir on the fire until it thickens.
7. Flavor and let cool.
8. When the puffs are done and filled, cover them with Fondant icing.

title: Cream Salad Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- yolks of 2 hard-boiled eggs
- 1/2 teaspoonful of mustard
- 2 tablespoonfuls of vinegar
- 1 cupful of cream
- a little salt, pepper and sugar

## Directions

1. Mix powdered yolks well with mustard and seasonings, add vinegar.
2. Rub to a smooth paste.
3. Add the cream gradually.

title: Creamed Cauliflower
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 head of cauliflower
- salted water
- milk sauce

## Directions

1. Remove leaves and cook cauliflower in salted water about 20 minutes.
2. Drain and place on a serving dish.
3. Pour milk sauce over.

title: Creamed Celery
body:
## Ingredients

- celery
- salted water
- milk sauce

## Directions

1. Scrape and wash celery, cut in pieces 1 inch long.
2. Cook in salted water until tender.
3. Drain, mix with milk sauce.

title: Creamed Peas
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled peas
- thin milk sauce
- minced parsley

## Directions

1. Mix boiled peas with thin milk sauce
2. Sprinkle minced parsley on top

title: Creamed Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- new potatoes
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 pint of boiling milk
- salt
- pepper
- minced parsley

## Directions

1. Cut new potatoes into dice, cook in salted water until tender.
2. Drain, pour milk sauce over.
3. Put 2 tablespoonfuls of butter in a saucepan, melt, add 2 tablespoonfuls of flour.
4. Add 1 pint of boiling milk, season with salt and pepper.
5. Lastly sprinkle with minced parsley.
6. If cold potatoes are used, cut them first in pieces, parboil in milk or cream.
7. Add 1 tablespoonful of butter, salt, pepper and just before serving sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoonful of minced parsley.
8. May be baked in oven in buttered mold, sprinkled with bread crumbs and cheese.

title: Creamed Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- butter
- thin milk sauce

## Directions

1. Cut tomatoes into slices
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
3. Dip in flour
4. Fry in butter
5. Place in a hot serving dish
6. Pour thin milk sauce on them

title: Cucumber Pickle
body:
## Ingredients

- small cucumbers
- water
- salt
- grape leaves, cherry leaves, or oak leaves
- dill
- cloves
- white pepper
- horse-radish
- 1 1/2 quarts of vinegar
- 1 cupful of salt

## Directions

1. Mix water with salt and put small cucumbers into it to soak for one day.
2. Lay them in glass jar alternately with layers of grape-, cherry and oak leaves so as not to touch each other.
3. Put seasonings, such as dill, cloves, white pepper and horse-radish between the layers.
4. Cook 1 1/2 quarts of vinegar with 1 cupful of salt and pour it boiling on the cucumbers.
5. Boil up once more and pour again over the pickles.

title: Cucumber Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- cucumber
- cold water
- lettuce leaves
- French dressing

## Directions

1. Peel cucumber, put in cold water.
2. Cut in thin slices, place on lettuce leaves and pour French dressing on.
3. Serve with fish.

title: Cumberland Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- currant jelly
- slices of lemon and orange
- mustard
- orange juice
- cayenne

## Directions

1. Dissolve currant jelly.
2. Add cooked slices of lemon and orange.
3. Mix with a dash of mustard and orange juice.
4. Season with cayenne.

title: Cumberland-Kastike (Cumberland Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- Currant jelly
- Lemon slices, boiled
- Orange slices, boiled
- Mustard
- Orange juice
- Cayenne pepper

## Directions

1. Melt currant jelly.
2. Mix with boiled slices of lemon and orange.
3. Add some mustard, orange juice and cayenne pepper.

title: Currant Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- currants
- granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Wash currants.
2. Mash few berries on the bottom of kettle to moisten it so as not to burn the berries.
3. Let simmer until tender.
4. Drain through a cloth, weigh and place into kettle, let simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Put an equal amount of sugar in oven to heat, but take care not to burn it.
6. Place sugar in kettle to simmer with currant juice until it has dissolved and the mixture gets clear.
7. Pour it in jelly glasses, cover and keep in a cold place.

title: Custard Filling
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup boiling milk
- 1 tablespoon cornstarch
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- ½ teaspoon vanilla
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Add to 1 cup boiling milk 1 tablespoon cornstarch mixed with 4 tablespoons sugar
2. Boil up
3. Flavor with vanilla and thicken with 2 egg yolks
4. Reheat, not allowing it to boil
5. Let cool
6. May be flavored with lemon, orange or any fruit juice preferred, dissolved chocolate, chopped almonds, or black coffee

title: Custard-kastike (Custard Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1/2 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 or 2 eggs
- salt

## Directions

1. Scald the milk
2. Beat the egg yolks with the sugar
3. Pour gradually the milk into the egg yolks
4. Beat over the fire until thick
5. Season with salt, flavor with vanilla
6. Last of all fold in the beaten egg whites

title: Dark Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of butter
- 1 cupful of brown sugar
- 3/4 cupful of molasses
- 3 eggs
- 1/4 cupful of milk
- 2 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 1/2 cupful of seeded raisins, cut in pieces
- 1/2 cupful of currants
- 3/4 cupful of chopped lemon rind
- 1/2 teaspoonful of soda
- 1/4 cupful of chopped almonds
- 1/2 cupful of chopped walnuts
- 1/4 teaspoonful of cream of tartar
- 1/2 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- 1/2 teaspoonful of nutmeg
- 1/2 teaspoonful of mace
- 1/8 teaspoonful of cloves
- corn starch

## Directions

1. Work butter and sugar to a froth, add molasses rubbing a little while.
2. Mix with well-beaten yolks of eggs, milk, spices, fruit, dipped in flour, soda and cream of tartar, mixed and sifted with flour.
3. Lastly whites of eggs, whipped to a froth.
4. Bake in a deep mold 1 1/4 hours.

title: Dark Fruit Cake (Dark Fruit Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 4 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 3 cups flour
- 1 cup each raisins, currants, walnuts and almonds cut in pieces
- 1 cup yellow rind of lemon cut in pieces
- 1/2 teaspoon each cinnamon, cloves and nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon cream of tartar

## Directions

1. Rub until creamy the butter with the sugar, add molasses, continue rubbing the mixture for a while.
2. Mix in the egg yolks beaten well, milk, spices, currants and raisins rolled in flour, cream of tartar and soda sifted with flour.
3. Last of all fold in the egg whites beaten until firm.
4. Bake 1 1/2 hours.

title: Deviled Crabs
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 crabs
- 1 cupful of cream or milk
- 1½ tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1 tablespoonful of chopped parsley
- ½ teaspoonful of lemon juice
- ¼ cupful of finely chopped mushrooms
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 2 hard-boiled eggs
- mustard

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and cream.
2. Add the yolks and the chopped crab meat to it.
3. Flavor with a dash of mustard.
4. Mix well.
5. Wash the shells, fill with the above mixture.
6. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and dot with butter.
7. Brown in oven.
8. Serve on a folded napkin.

title: Devilled Oysters (Devilled oisteria)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of oysters
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 3/4 cupful of milk
- lemon juice
- parsley
- salt
- pepper
- mustard
- yolk of 1 egg
- cleaned oyster shells

## Directions

1. Strain and mince oysters
2. Prepare sauce with butter, flour and milk
3. Add the beaten egg yolk to the sauce
4. Add oysters, lemon juice, parsley and seasonings
5. Put mixture into cleaned buttered oyster shells
6. Dredge with bread crumbs
7. Bake in a hot oven 15 minutes
8. Serve on plates about 3 on each
9. Garnish with lemon slices and parsley

title: Diili Kastike (Dill Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 cupfuls of beef stock
- 1 tablespoonful of vinegar or lemon juice
- 1-2 tablespoonfuls of minced dill
- a little salt and sugar

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and beef stock
2. Season with sugar, vinegar and dill
3. One egg yolk may be added to it
4. Serve hot with boiled mutton

title: Dilli-kastike (Dill Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 cups bouillon
- 1 tablespoon vinegar or lemon juice
- 1 or 2 tablespoons chopped dill
- Salt and sugar

## Directions

1. Make a gravy of butter, flour and bouillon, add dill, vinegar and sugar.
2. Last of all mix with the yolk of an egg, if desired.
3. Serve with boiled mutton.

title: Dinner Rolls
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 3/8 teaspoonful of salt
- 1/2 cake of yeast
- 1/4 cupful of butter
- 2 eggs
- flour

## Directions

1. Scald milk with salt and sugar
2. Add yeast and 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour to it
3. Cover and let rise
4. Mix with well beaten eggs, melted butter and flour enough to make a moderately thick dough
5. Let rise again
6. Roll into a sheet 1/2 inch thick
7. Shape with a round cutter
8. Place tightly on a buttered baking sheet
9. Let rise
10. Bake for 15 minutes

title: Doughnuts (Taikina Pyörylät)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1/4 cupful of butter
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 1 teaspoonful of cream of tartar
- 1/2 teaspoonful of soda
- 3/4 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- flour

## Directions

1. Beat eggs with sugar to a froth.
2. Add creamed butter, milk, salt, cinnamon, cream of tartar and soda mixed with flour.
3. Work in flour enough to make the batter tolerable to handle.
4. Roll out to 1/2 inch thickness, shape into rings.
5. Cook in fat on both sides until light brown.
6. Put on brown paper to drain.
7. Dip in powdered sugar.
8. Ensure fat is moderately hot - if not hot enough, doughnuts will absorb it; if too hot, they will brown before sufficiently risen.
9. Avoid turning too often. Brown on one side before turning.

title: Dried Beans
body:
## Ingredients

- beans
- cold water
- pieces of pork
- bay leaf
- small onion

## Directions

1. Wash the beans, soak over night in cold water
2. Put on the fire in cold water, let simmer, changing the water once when the beans are half done
3. Add a few pieces of pork, 1 bay leaf and 1 small onion
4. If the beans are to be baked, they have to be removed from the fire immediately when they begin to boil

title: Duchesse Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- butter
- egg

## Directions

1. Prepare potatoes same as for potato croquettes.
2. Force through a pastry bag in a buttered pan forming it into roses, leaves, pyramids or baskets.
3. Spread with egg.
4. Bake in oven to a light brown.

title: Duchesse-perunoita (Duchesse Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- mashed potatoes
- butter
- egg yolks
- salt
- pepper
- egg for brushing

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed for potato croquettes.
2. Force through a pastry bag forming roses, leaves, pyramids or baskets into a buttered pan.
3. Brush with egg and bake until light brown.

title: Dumplings
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 2 teaspoonfuls of butter
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 3 teaspoonfuls of baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix all dry ingredients and rub butter with fingers into it.
2. Add milk gradually.
3. Roll into a sheet 1/2 inch thick.
4. Cut it into small circles with a round cutter.
5. Place into the kettle to boil on the meat so as not to break them.
6. Serve immediately because the dumplings will fall quickly.
7. Instead of butter, 1/2 cupful of chopped suet may be used, and water instead of milk.

title: Easter Doughnuts
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 cake of yeast
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 whole egg
- 1 yolk of egg
- 1/2 teaspoonful of grated lemon rind
- a dash of nutmeg
- 1/2 cupful of currants, washed and dried

## Directions

1. Warm milk, mix with yeast, salt and cupful of flour, set to rise
2. Beat eggs with sugar and mix with risen sponge
3. Add creamed butter, spices, currants and the rest of the flour
4. Set to rise again
5. Drop with spoon in boiling lard and cook until quite done and delicate brown
6. Drain on paper
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar

title: Easter Nuts (Pääsiäis Pähkinöitä)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 1 yeast cake
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 1 whole egg
- 1 egg yolk
- 1/2 teaspoonful of grated lemon rind
- a dash of nutmeg
- 1/2 cupful of currants, washed and dried

## Directions

1. Heat milk and mix in yeast, salt and half a cupful of flour.
2. Let rise.
3. Beat eggs with sugar and add to the mixture.
4. Add creamed butter, seasonings, currants and remaining flour.
5. Let rise.
6. Drop by spoonful into hot fat and cook through until golden brown.
7. Place on paper to drain.
8. Sprinkle with fine sugar.

title: Eel Aspic (Ankerias-hyytelö)
body:
## Ingredients

- eel
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- boiling water
- onion
- fish stock
- gelatine
- hard-boiled egg whites
- tomato
- lemon
- lettuce

## Directions

1. Clean the eel, remove the backbone.
2. Cut larger fish into pieces 3 inches long.
3. Sprinkle with salt, pepper and lemon juice and let stand 10 min.
4. Roll in a roll and tie tightly with string.
5. Put on fire in boiling water with salt, pepper and onion and let simmer gently until soft.
6. Remove to cool.
7. Prepare the jelly from the stock in the same way as for salmon aspic.
8. Cut the eel rolls with a knife crosswise into slices and arrange either in a mold to set, like salmon aspic, or pour a little jelly onto a platter, place the fish pieces on top and coat with jelly.
9. Arrange the jellied pieces in a circle on a platter, place pieces of jelly in the center and garnish around with tomato, lemon and lettuce leaves.
10. When boiled in a small amount of broth on a low fire, not much gelatine need be used, as eel contains a large amount of natural gelatine.

title: Eel à la Aspic
body:
## Ingredients

- eel
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- onion
- water

## Directions

1. Clean the eel, remove the backbone.
2. Cut the larger eels in 3 inch pieces.
3. Sprinkle with salt, pepper and lemon juice, let stand 10 min.
4. Roll and fasten tightly with string.
5. Put into boiling water, place on the range, add salt, pepper and onion; let simmer until tender.
6. Lift to cool.
7. Make jelly of the liquor as directed in last recipe.
8. Cut the rolls crosswise into slices and lay into an individual mold to get firm, or cover the bottom of a platter with jelly, lay the fish on it, pour jelly over it.
9. Arrange the jellied pieces on a serving dish, lay bits of jelly in center of them, garnish around with tomato, lemon and lettuce leaves.

title: Egg Balls
body:
## Ingredients

- hard-boiled eggs
- fried chopped mushrooms
- thick milksauce
- salt
- pepper
- breadcrumbs
- egg
- lard

## Directions

1. Chop hard-boiled eggs fine.
2. Add a little fried chopped mushrooms and thick milksauce.
3. Mix with a little salt and pepper.
4. When cold form into balls.
5. Dip in breadcrumbs and egg and again in breadcrumbs.
6. Cook in lard.

title: Egg Balls (Munapullia)
body:
## Ingredients

- yolks of 2 hard-boiled eggs
- 1 raw yolk
- 1/2 teaspoonful butter
- salt and pepper
- flour

## Directions

1. Rub the yolks through a strainer.
2. Add seasonings and the raw yolk.
3. Form into balls.
4. Dip in flour.
5. Cook in salted water or in butter.
6. Serve with soups.

title: Egg Souffle
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 cupfuls of rich milk
- salt
- pepper
- 2 tablespoonfuls of chopped parsley
- a little onion juice
- milksauce for serving
- vegetable balls for serving

## Directions

1. Cook a sauce of butter, flour and milk.
2. Add well beaten yolks and seasonings.
3. At the last mix with the whites beaten to a firm froth.
4. Bake in a souffié dish until set.
5. Serve with milksauce and vegetable balls.

title: Egg Souffle
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 cupfuls of rich milk
- salt and pepper
- 2 tablespoonfuls of chopped parsley
- a little onion juice

## Directions

1. Cook a sauce of butter, flour and milk
2. Add well beaten yolks and seasonings
3. At the last mix with the whites beaten to a firm froth
4. Bake in a souffle dish until set
5. Serve with milk sauce and vegetable balls

title: Egg Timbales I
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1/2 cupful of milk or cream
- 3 eggs
- chopped parsley or chives
- pepper
- salt

## Directions

1. Prepare sauce of butter, flour and milk.
2. Mix with whipped yolks and seasonings.
3. Last of all mix with the hard beaten whites.
4. Put in buttered timbale molds and bake in a pan of water until firm.
5. Serve with Hollandaise or tomato sauce.
6. Garnish the molds with parsley or mix parsley with the mixture of eggs.

title: Egg Timbales II
body:
## Ingredients

- timbale molds
- butter
- chopped parsley or truffle
- eggs
- salt
- tomato sauce, bechamel sauce, or rich milk-sauce for serving

## Directions

1. Butter carefully timbale molds.
2. Sprinkle with chopped parsley or truffle on the sides and bottom.
3. Break one egg into each mold.
4. Sprinkle with a little salt and put a little dot of butter on top.
5. Bake in a pan of water until moderately firm.
6. Turn out upon a platter.
7. Serve with tomato, bechamel or rich milk-sauce.

title: Eggs au Gratin
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 hard-boiled eggs
- grated cheese
- anchovy essence
- melted butter
- butter for dish
- milksauce
- cheese and breadcrumbs for topping

## Directions

1. Shell 4 hard-boiled eggs and cut lengthwise into halves.
2. Take out the yolks and rub to a paste with a little grated cheese, anchovy essence and melted butter.
3. Fill the halved whites with this mixture.
4. Butter a dish, put a layer of the mixture on the bottom of it, line with the filled eggs and pour over it a rich milksauce.
5. Dredge with cheese and breadcrumbs.
6. Bake in oven until the surface is browned.

title: Eggs filled with Caviare
body:
## Ingredients

- hard-boiled eggs
- caviare
- anchovy slices
- mayonnaise sauce
- toast

## Directions

1. Remove a slice from the side of hard-boiled eggs.
2. Scoop out the yolks and fill the eggs with caviare.
3. Score both ends near the top, fill the scores with a slice of anchovy.
4. Make a hole in center of the surface, put a piece of anchovy into it.
5. Place the eggs on toast the hollowed side down so as to resemble barrels.
6. Garnish the toast around the barrel with mayonnaise sauce.

title: Eggs in a Nest
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- butter
- toast
- salt
- pepper
- red pepper

## Directions

1. Separate whites from yolks.
2. Put the yolks aside leaving them in the shells.
3. Beat the whites to a firm froth.
4. Press through a pastry bag upon buttered toast close to the edge.
5. In centre of these put the yolks, one on each.
6. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
7. Garnish with pieces of red pepper.
8. Bake in oven until lightly brown.

title: Eggs with Meat Filling (Munia lihatäytteen kanssa)
body:
## Ingredients

- hard-boiled eggs
- warm ground meat
- spinach or potato puree

## Directions

1. Cut a piece from the top of hard-boiled eggs and remove the yolk.
2. Fill the eggs with warm ground meat.
3. Place the caps on top and serve set into spinach or potato puree.

title: Eggs with Spinach
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 hard-boiled eggs
- cooked spinach
- melted butter
- cream
- salt
- pepper
- milksauce

## Directions

1. Cut 4 hard-boiled eggs lengthwise into halves and rub the yolks through a sieve.
2. Mix cooked chopped spinach with a little melted butter and cream, season with salt and pepper.
3. Fill the halved whites with this mixture.
4. Place on a dish, pour over them a rich milksauce.
5. Sprinkle with the yolks and place in oven to brown slightly.

title: Eggs with Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 onion
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 lb. of fresh or 1 cupful of canned tomatoes
- salt
- paprika
- a little sugar
- 6 eggs
- a little cream

## Directions

1. Cook 1/2 onion with 2 tablespoonfuls of butter.
2. Mix with 1 lb. of fresh or 1 cupful of canned tomatoes, salt, paprika and a little sugar.
3. Let boil 10 min.
4. Whip 6 eggs, add a little cream, pour slowly into it the mixture of tomatoes strained or as it is, and stir until firm.

title: Elk Cutlets
body:
## Ingredients

- elk loin
- salt
- pepper
- melted butter
- bread crumbs
- fried slices of onion
- meat stock
- cream
- wine sauce

## Directions

1. Prepare in the same way as directed for Venison Cutlets.

title: Englantilainen Luumuputinki No. 1 (English Plum Pudding No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 pound bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 pound chopped suet
- 3/4 pound seeded raisins
- 1/2 pound currants
- 1/4 pound sifted sugar
- 2 ounces candied orange peel
- 2 ounces chopped almonds
- 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1/4 teaspoon mace
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- Yellow rind of 2 lemons
- Juice of 4 lemons
- 6 or 8 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup brandy

## Directions

1. Soak the bread crumbs in milk, add the yolks beaten with sugar.
2. Rub the suet with fingers until creamy, add the dry ingredients, raisins rolled in flour and currants.
3. Combine the mixtures, add brandy or lemon juice.
4. Last of all mix in the whites beaten until firm.
5. Pour into a buttered mold, cover tightly.
6. Steam for 6 hours.

title: Englantilainen Luumuputinki No. 2 (English Plum Pudding No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 pound flour
- 3/4 pound bread crumbs
- 1 pound suet
- 3/4 pound seeded raisins
- 3/4 pound currants
- 1/4 pound sugar
- 1 cup syrup
- 1/4 pound candied orange peel
- 1/2 grated nutmeg
- Yellow rind of 2 lemons
- 1 teaspoon mixed spices
- 1 cup brandy

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed in the previous plum pudding recipe.
2. Steam 6 hours in a napkin.
3. Place aside.
4. Steam 2 hours more before serving.
5. Serve with wine or lemon sauce.

title: Englantilaisia Piparkakkuja (English Gingerbread Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cupfuls of molasses
- 1 lb. of sugar
- 7 ozs. of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of ginger
- 1/2 grated lemon rind
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of thick cream
- 1 teaspoonful of soda
- 3 1/2 lbs. of flour

## Directions

1. Work molasses, butter and spices together to a smooth paste.
2. Whip cream to a froth and mix with the above paste.
3. Sift flour with soda and stir into the molasses paste.
4. Let stand over night.
5. Roll out and shape into small round cookies.
6. Wet with cold water and bake to a delicate brown.

title: English Omelet
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of milk or cream
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Separate the yolks from the whites
2. Beat the whites to firm froth and put aside until the yolks are beaten
3. Mix the yolks with milk and seasonings, and at the last with the beaten whites lightly stirring
4. Melt butter in an omelet pan, pour the mixture onto it and cook slowly, turning the pan now and then to make the omelet evenly brown
5. If the surface is too soft, place the pan on the shelf of the oven for a little while
6. Fold once and turn on a hot platter
7. Serve with sauce

title: English Plum Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of chopped suet
- 1/2 lb. of seeded raisins
- 1/2 lb. of chopped currants
- 1/4 lb. of sifted sugar
- 2 ozs. of candied orange rind
- 2 ozs. blanched, chopped almonds
- 1/2 teaspoonful of nutmeg
- 1/2 teaspoonful of mace
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 1 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- yellow rind of 2 lemons
- juice of 4 lemons
- 6-8 eggs
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 glassful of brandy

## Directions

1. Mix all the dry ingredients thoroughly with suet.
2. Soak bread crumbs in milk, add yolks, beaten with sugar.
3. Combine mixtures with hands and add brandy into it.
4. At the last mix with stiffly beaten whites.
5. Pour the mixture in a buttered mold, cover, steam 6 hours.

title: English Plum Pudding II
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 lb. of flour
- 3/4 lb. of bread crumbs
- 1 lb. of suet
- 3/4 lb. of raisins
- 3/4 lb. of currants
- 1/4 lb. of sugar
- 1 cupful of molasses
- 1/4 lb. of candied orange rind
- yellow rind of 2 lemons
- 1/2 grated nutmeg
- 1 teaspoonful of allspice
- 1 cupful of brandy

## Directions

1. Prepare the mixture as above, cook 6 hours in a napkin.
2. Set aside.
3. Cook 2 hours more just before serving.
4. Serve with wine sauce.

title: Enkelikakku (Angel Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 9 egg whites
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 7/8 cup flour
- 3/4 teaspoon cream of tartar
- 1/2 teaspoon vanilla and lemon juice

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites until stiff.
2. Sift sugar several times, add gradually to egg whites.
3. Add flour gradually sifted six times with cream of tartar and flavorings.
4. Pour mixture into an unbuttered tube tin and bake in a moderate oven for 40 to 50 minutes.

title: Espanjalainen makrelli (Spanish Mackerel)
body:
## Ingredients

- mackerel
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- onion
- green pepper
- mushrooms
- tomato sauce
- lemon juice
- parsley

## Directions

1. Split the fish in back and remove the backbone
2. Wipe and spread with butter
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
4. Bake covered about 15 minutes
5. Chop onion and green pepper, cook in butter
6. Add 1 cup of chopped mushrooms and cover the fish with the mixture
7. Continue baking for 10 minutes
8. Remove the fish on a platter
9. Add tomato sauce and lemon juice to the drippings in the pan
10. Pour on the platter around the fish
11. Strew with chopped parsley

title: Espanjalainen makrelli (Spanish Mackerel)
body:
## Ingredients

- mackerel
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- onion
- green pepper
- mushrooms
- tomato sauce
- wine
- parsley

## Directions

1. Split the fish and remove the backbone
2. Wipe and spread with butter
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
4. Bake in oven covered for about 15 minutes
5. Chop onion and green pepper and cook in butter
6. Add 1 cupful of chopped mushrooms to the mixture
7. Lay the mixture over the fish
8. Continue baking for 10 minutes
9. Remove the fish to a platter
10. Add tomato sauce and wine to the pan
11. Strain the sauce and pour around the fish
12. Strew with chopped parsley

title: Espanjalainen omeletti (Spanish Omelet)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon chopped onion
- 1 tablespoon red and green pepper skinned and cut in pieces
- 1½ cups tomato
- 2 tablespoons chopped mushrooms
- 1 tablespoon caper
- 1 tablespoon chopped olives
- 2 tablespoons butter

## Directions

1. Cook slowly in butter the onion, olives, pepper and tomato for 15 minutes covered.
2. Add the mushrooms and caper.
3. Prepare a plain or a French omelet.
4. Turn the gravy over it and serve.

title: Etikkasilliä (Pickled Herring)
body:
## Ingredients

- herrings
- sliced onion
- whole peppercorns
- cloves
- bay leaves
- sugar
- vinegar
- water
- chives

## Directions

1. Soak the herring over night
2. Remove the skin and bones
3. Lay into an earthen jar having sliced onions, peppercorns, cloves, bay leaves and some sugar between the layers
4. Pour strong vinegar over (the vinegar may be diluted with an equal amount of water)
5. Let stand in a cold place for 24 hours
6. Serve in pieces with a little liquid, garnished with chopped chives

title: Farina Balls
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of farina
- 4 cupfuls of milk
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 1/2 teaspoonful of pepper
- yolks of 3 eggs
- bread crumbs
- egg
- lard

## Directions

1. Cook a porridge of farina and milk.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Add yolks of eggs and cool.
4. Form into balls.
5. Dip in bread crumbs, in egg and bread crumbs again.
6. Fry in lard.

title: Farinapullia (Farina Balls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- ⅓ cupful of farina
- Salt and pepper
- 2 egg yolks
- Egg whites

## Directions

1. Cook a porridge of milk, butter and farina.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. When cool mix with 2 yolks and whites of eggs beaten firm.
4. Form into tiny balls or roll flat and cut in cubes.
5. Roll in flour and cook in salt water.

title: Farinapullia (Farina Balls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup farina
- 3 cups milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 3 egg yolks
- salt
- pepper
- bread crumbs
- lard for frying

## Directions

1. Cook a porridge of farina and milk
2. Add butter and season with salt and pepper
3. Mix in the egg yolks
4. Let cool
5. Form into balls
6. Roll in bread crumbs
7. Fry in lard

title: Farinaputinki (Farina Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 1/2 cup farina
- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- Raisins
- Salt

## Directions

1. Cook a porridge of milk and farina
2. Add the egg yolks beaten with sugar, salt and raisins
3. Beat the egg whites until firm
4. Mix the beaten egg whites with the porridge or place on top as meringue
5. Bake in a buttered mold until brown

title: Farinaputinki (Farina Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 1/2 cup farina
- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- raisins
- salt
- butter

## Directions

1. Cook a porridge of milk and farina
2. Add the yolks beaten with the sugar, salt and raisins
3. Place in a buttered mold
4. Beat the whites stiff with some sugar, place on top of the mold or mix into the porridge
5. Bake in the oven until brown

title: Farinaputinki (Farina Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of milk
- 1/2 cupful of farina
- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- some raisins
- a little salt

## Directions

1. Cook milk and farina to a paste
2. Add yolks, beaten with sugar, a little salt and raisins
3. Pour in a buttered mold
4. Cover with whites, beaten with sugar until stiff
5. Brown in oven

title: Farinaputinki (Farina Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of milk
- 1/2 cupful of farina
- 3 eggs
- 3 ruokalus. of sugar
- raisins

## Directions

1. Cook milk and farina to a porridge, add egg yolks beaten with sugar, a little salt and raisins.
2. Put in a buttered mold.
3. Lastly place stiffly beaten whites with a little sugar mixed in on top of the mold.
4. Bake in oven until brown.

title: Farmer's Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 1/2 lb. of sugar
- 1/4 lb. of melted butter
- 4 tablespoonfuls of cream
- 1 cupful of currants
- 1 teaspoonful of cardamom
- 1/2 lb. of flour

## Directions

1. Whip yolks of eggs with sugar to a froth
2. Mix with melted butter, cream, flavoring and flour
3. Add last beaten whites
4. Bake in a buttered mold

title: Filled Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 hard-boiled eggs
- 1 chicken liver, cooked and minced
- 1 tablespoonful of milksauce
- a few drops of sherry
- salt
- pepper
- egg
- bread crumbs
- lard
- Hollandaise sauce, tomato sauce, or milksauce for serving

## Directions

1. Cut 3 hard-boiled eggs neatly in half.
2. Separate the yolks and mix with them one chicken liver cooked and minced, 1 tablespoonful of milksauce, a few drops of sherry, salt and pepper.
3. Fill the halves with this mixture, put together to give the appearance of a whole egg.
4. Dip in egg, roll in bread crumbs, dip in egg again and once more roll in bread crumbs.
5. Cook quickly in hot lard.
6. Serve with Hollandaise, tomato or milksauce.

title: Filled Green Pepper
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful of rice
- 1/2 tablespoonful of butter
- 1/2 tablespoonful of onion
- 1/2 tablespoonful of minced green pepper
- 1/2 tablespoonful of mushrooms
- 1 tablespoonful of tomatoes
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- a little pepper
- bread crumbs
- melted butter for basting

## Directions

1. Cook rice until tender
2. Mix rice with other ingredients
3. Fill scooped green peppers with this mixture
4. Bake in a buttered pan
5. Sprinkle with bread crumbs
6. Baste with a little melted butter

title: Filled Mushrooms
body:
## Ingredients

- big mushrooms of equal size
- boiled chicken
- chopped mushrooms
- cream
- Chaufroid sauce
- bread crumbs
- egg
- bacon
- fat

## Directions

1. Peel big mushrooms of equal size and cut off the stems
2. Prepare a filling of boiled chicken and chopped mushrooms, mixed with a little cream
3. Lay this mixture between the mushrooms
4. Baste with Chaufroid sauce
5. Let cool, dredge with bread crumbs, dip in egg and lastly dredge with bread crumbs
6. Fry in fat or bake in oven, having a little slice of bacon on each
7. Bake covered 15 minutes

title: Fillet of Beef with Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- Fillet of beef
- Ham
- Eggs
- Hollandaise sauce or milk sauce

## Directions

1. Prepare as mignon fillets
2. Place a slice of fried ham on each piece
3. Place a poached egg on top
4. Cover with a rich milk or Hollandaise sauce

title: Fillets of Chestnuts without Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ cupfuls of mashed chestnuts
- 4 eggs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Mix chestnuts with eggs, butter, and cream
2. Season with salt and pepper
3. Form into fillets and prepare as directed for Fillets of Potatoes with Chestnuts

title: Fillets of Potatoes with Chestnuts
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of mashed potatoes
- 1½ cupfuls of mashed chestnuts
- 2 tablespoonfuls of bread crumbs
- 3 eggs
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- salt and pepper to taste
- cream if needed

## Directions

1. Mix together all ingredients
2. If too thick, add cream
3. Form into round cakes, fry in butter; or dip in egg and bread crumbs, cook in lard

title: Fillets of Potatoes with Chestnuts
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of mashed potatoes
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of mashed chestnuts
- 2 tablespoonfuls of bread crumbs
- 3 eggs
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Mix all ingredients together
2. If the mixture seems too thick, add cream
3. Form round cakes from the mixture
4. Fry in butter, or dip in egg and bread crumbs and cook in fat

title: Fillets of Venison
body:
## Ingredients

- venison loin
- slices of pork

## Directions

1. Line with slices of pork and fry the same as saddle of mutton.

title: Finnish Cookies (Tippaleipiä)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 1 lb. of flour
- 1 yeast cake

## Directions

1. Whip eggs with sugar
2. Mix with warmed milk
3. Add yeast and flour
4. Let rise
5. Force through a pastry bag with a very narrow socket into boiling lard forming into half an inch thick and two inches wide zig-zags
6. Turn with a perforated spoon
7. When lightly browned remove from the fat
8. Place on brown paper to drain
9. Sprinkle with sugar

title: Finnish Sponge Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 eggs
- 8 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 8 tablespoonfuls of flour

## Directions

1. Beat yolks of eggs and sugar to a thick froth
2. Add flour slowly into it
3. Lastly mix with stiffly beaten whites of eggs
4. Bake in a buttered mold in a moderate oven nearly 3/4-1 hour
5. Garnish, when cold, with white icing

title: Fish Balls of Dried Fish Flakes
body:
## Ingredients

- dried fish flakes
- boiled potatoes
- butter
- eggs
- flour
- lard or butter for frying
- breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Soak the fish in water if it is too salty.
2. Cook and let cool.
3. Make a mixture of equal quantities of boiled fish and hot mashed potatoes.
4. Mix with 2 tablespoonfuls of butter.
5. Add 1-2 eggs to it.
6. Form into balls or cakes.
7. Roll in flour, put in the icebox until the next morning.
8. Fry in lard or in butter.
9. For nicer appearance, first dip in egg and roll in breadcrumbs.

title: Fish Farcie (Kala-mureketta)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 lbs of fish boned and skinned
- 3 cupfuls of cream
- 5 eggs
- 1/2 lb of butter
- 1/4 lb of white bread
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Bone and skin the fish.
2. Chop several times with the meat chopper.
3. Put into a wooden bowl, rub well, add gradually the butter rubbed to a froth and the yolks one by one.
4. Soak the bread in cream, add slowly to the mixture of fish, continuing rubbing until frothy.
5. At the last mix with beaten whites of eggs and seasonings.
6. Pour into a buttered mold, cover, bake in a pan of water 1 to 1 1/4 hours.
7. Serve with mushroom-, crab-, caper- or lemon sauce.

title: Fish Hash
body:
## Ingredients

- remains of fish bone
- cold chopped potatoes
- salt
- pepper
- pork or butter
- onion

## Directions

1. Take remains of fish bone and chop them.
2. Mix with equal quantity of cold chopped potatoes.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Melt a slice of pork or a bit of butter in a frying pan, cook one chopped onion in it.
5. Put the mixture of fish and potatoes in the pan and stir until hot.
6. Fry until brown underneath.
7. Fold as omelet and turn on a platter.

title: Fish Quenelles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 lb. of boned fish
- 2 ozs. of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of cream
- 1 egg
- a little flour

## Directions

1. Grind boned fish, pound well with butter, rub through a sieve.
2. Mix with other ingredients and work to a smooth paste.
3. Finally add enough flour to make a batter.
4. Form into quenelles, cook in salted water or fish stock.
5. Serve in fish or crab soup.

title: Fish Timbales (Kala-timboleja)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb of boned fish
- 6 ozs of butter
- 2 ozs of bread
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of cream
- 4 eggs
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Chop the boned fish with meat chopper several times.
2. Rub well in a wooden bowl, add gradually the butter rubbed to a froth and the yolks one by one.
3. Mix with the bread soaked in cream.
4. Continue rubbing until frothy.
5. Add the beaten whites of eggs to it.
6. Put in timbale molds, cover with buttered paper.
7. Bake in a pan of water.
8. Turn on a serving dish.
9. Serve with sauce.

title: Floating Island (Floating Island)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups milk
- 3 or 4 eggs
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 1/4 teaspoon vanilla or chopped almonds
- Salt

## Directions

1. Separate egg yolks from whites
2. Beat the whites until firm
3. Add gradually 2 tablespoons of powdered sugar to the whites
4. Drop the meringue by spoonfuls into boiling milk
5. Cook for 2 minutes until firm
6. Remove from milk with a perforated spoon and place on a plate
7. Beat the egg yolks and add milk gradually
8. Beat the mixture in a pan of water until firm
9. Add vanilla or chopped almonds and salt
10. Let cool
11. Place the cooked egg whites on top
12. Garnish with bits of jelly or berries
13. Optional: while custard is still warm, add 1 1/2 cups cream and whip until cold and firm before serving

title: Fondant laserrus (Fondant Icing)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of granulated sugar
- 1/2 cupful of water
- 1/4 teaspoonful of cream of tartar
- oil for coating

## Directions

1. Put sugar with water and cream of tartar in a saucepan
2. Stir until sugar is dissolved, no longer
3. Let boil until it threads when dropped from spoon
4. Oil a marble table or large baking pan
5. Pour sugar mixture on it
6. Let cool a few minutes
7. Stir with a knife or wooden spoon, keeping the mixture in the center as much as possible, until it is a smooth white mass
8. Store in a container for long keeping and use as needed for small cakes

title: Fondant-laserrus (Fondant Icing)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 1/2 cup water
- 1/4 teaspoon cream of tartar
- lemon juice for flavoring
- oil for brushing

## Directions

1. Put into a saucepan 1 cup granulated sugar, 1/2 cup water and 1/4 teaspoon cream of tartar
2. Place over the fire
3. Cook stirring constantly until the sugar is dissolved
4. Continue to cook without stirring until it threads when dropped from a spoon
5. Brush with oil a marble slab or a big platter
6. Pour the mixture on and let cool for a few minutes
7. Stir with a knife or a wooden spoon until white and smooth, keeping the mixture as much as possible in the center of the slab
8. This icing may be kept for a long time in an earthen jar and used when needed for cookies
9. Put the icing into a double boiler, flavor with lemon juice, stir until dissolved
10. Coat the cookies with it
11. By adding some sugar and 1 egg white the icing may be used for garnishing

title: Foundation of Hominy
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of hominy
- 3 cupfuls of water
- 1 teaspoonful of salt

## Directions

1. Cook 1 cupful of hominy, 3 cupfuls of water, 1 teaspoonful of salt, about 5-10 minutes.
2. Pour in greased shallow baking pan.
3. Turn on a suitable platter and use as foundation for various dishes.

title: Foundation of Rice
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled rice
- butter
- egg yolk (optional)

## Directions

1. Put the boiled rice in well buttered shallow pan and bake a few minutes in a hot oven.
2. Turn on a serving platter.
3. Mix with a lump of butter and yolk of egg, if desired.
4. Used as foundation for several dishes.

title: French Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 tablespoonfuls of salad oil
- 1 tablespoonful of vinegar
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 3/4 teaspoonful of pepper

## Directions

1. Stir salt and pepper in oil, pour oil gradually into vinegar.

title: French Omelet
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 4 tablespoonfuls of milk or cream
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs to a froth; add milk and seasonings
2. Put butter in hot omelet pan and pour the mixture in it
3. Shake the pan over the fire until the omelet forms a creamy mass
4. Brown quickly on the bottom, fold once and serve hot with any kind of sauce

title: French Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- lard
- salt

## Directions

1. Pare potatoes, wash and wipe dry
2. Cut in pieces of uniform size to any shape you want
3. Cook in lard until lightly browned
4. Sprinkle with salt
5. Serve on a folded napkin

title: French Puffs
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1/2 cupful of flour
- 2 eggs
- powdered sugar
- whipped cream
- fruit juice

## Directions

1. Put butter and milk into a saucepan, place on the fire; when boiling add flour stirring well to an even paste.
2. When it begins to brown underneath remove the saucepan from the fire and set to cool.
3. Add first into the paste the beaten yolks, then whites, beaten stiff.
4. Form into balls by forcing through a pastry bag on a buttered paper.
5. Cook in lard.
6. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
7. Serve with whipped cream, mixed with fruit juice.

title: French Rolls
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 2 eggs
- 4 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 1 cake of yeast
- flour

## Directions

1. Scald milk
2. Dissolve yeast in lukewarm milk and mix with 1 cupful of flour
3. Cover, set to rise
4. Add eggs beaten with sugar, salt, butter and flour enough to make a moderately thick dough
5. Knead well, set to rise
6. Form into rolls
7. Let rise again and bake in oven

title: Fricassee (Veal Fricassee)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds veal fillet
- boiling water
- 2 stalks celery
- 1 small carrot
- salt
- 1 slice onion
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- strained veal bouillon
- pepper
- lemon juice
- 2 egg yolks
- cream
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Wipe and cut the veal fillet into pieces, place in a kettle and pour boiling water over.
2. Add the celery stalks, carrot, salt and onion slice.
3. Cook slowly covered until the meat is tender.
4. Make a gravy of 3 tablespoons butter, 2 tablespoons flour, strained veal bouillon, salt, pepper and lemon juice.
5. Beat 2 egg yolks with a little cream and add to the gravy.
6. Pour the gravy over the meat and strew with chopped parsley.

title: Fricassee lampaanlihasta (Mutton Fricassee)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds mutton
- Water
- Vegetables
- Salt
- Pepper
- Flour
- Butter
- Brown gravy

## Directions

1. Cut mutton into pieces and wipe.
2. Place in a saucepan and cover with boiling water.
3. Cook slowly with vegetables until tender.
4. Drain and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Roll in flour and brown in butter.
6. Arrange on the platter.
7. Cover with brown gravy made of the bouillon, removing the fat carefully.

title: Fricassee Vasikan Lihasta (Fricasseed Veal)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds of veal fillet
- 2 stalks of celery
- 1 small carrot
- salt
- 1 slice of onion
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- strained veal stock
- pepper
- lemon juice
- yolks of two eggs
- a little cream
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Wipe and cut veal.
2. Put in a pan, pour boiling water over.
3. Add celery, carrot, salt and onion slice.
4. Cover, cook slowly until the meat is tender.
5. Make sauce of butter, flour, strained veal stock, salt, pepper and lemon juice.
