9. Prepare a gravy from the drippings by adding flour, stock and cream

title: Kääretorttu (Jelly Roll)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 1 cup flour
- yellow rind of 1 lemon
- butter
- jelly

## Directions

1. Beat the yolks with the sugar until frothy.
2. Add the yellow rind and the flour.
3. Last of all mix with the whites beaten until firm.
4. Cover the inside of a baking pan with buttered paper.
5. Pour the paste evenly on the paper, bake for 15-20 minutes.
6. Unmold on paper sprinkled with sugar.
7. Spread with jelly, roll up.

title: Kääretorttu (Roll Tart)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 1/4 lb. of sugar
- 1/4 lb. of flour
- yellow rind of lemon

## Directions

1. Beat yolks and sugar until light.
2. Mix with lemon rind, flour and lastly whites, beaten stiff.
3. Butter a paper and cover a baking pan inside with it.
4. Pour the paste evenly on the paper and bake in oven 15-20 minutes.
5. Turn on a paper sprinkled with sugar, spread with jelly, roll together.

title: Lady Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 8 whites of eggs
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of butter
- 2 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 3 teaspoonfuls of baking powder
- vanilla or almond extract to taste

## Directions

1. Work butter and sugar to a cream
2. Add milk, spices, baking powder mixed with flour and whites of eggs beaten until stiff and dry

title: Lady Fingers (Sokuri Pytkyjä)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of flour
- 1/4 teaspoonful of vanilla
- a pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Whip yolks of eggs with sugar
2. Add spices and flour into it
3. At the last mix with whites, beaten to a stiff froth
4. Put the mixture in a pastry bag with tube
5. Lay paper on a baking sheet
6. Force the mixture through the pastry bag on paper into cookies four inches long
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar
8. Bake in a moderate oven to a light brown
9. If preferred, stick two together with white of egg

title: Lady-kakku (Lady Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup butter
- 1/2 cup milk or water
- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 8 egg whites
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Rub butter and sugar together until creamy.
2. Add water without stirring.
3. Add spices and the stiffly beaten egg whites.
4. Sift flour with baking powder several times.
5. Add to the mixture and beat until smooth.
6. Bake in an unbuffered tin in a slow oven, increasing the heat after a while.
7. Let cool in the tin, upside down.

title: Lamb's Tongue à la Chaufroid
body:
## Ingredients

- lamb tongues
- seasonings
- Chaufroid sauce
- white of an egg
- salad

## Directions

1. Cook the lamb tongues with seasonings until tender
2. When cool, cover with Chaufroid
3. Garnish the surface with white of an egg
4. Serve with salad

title: Lammaskeitto (Mutton Broth)
body:
## Ingredients

- Remains of mutton
- 1 onion, 1 parsnip
- 2 stalks celery
- 2 sprigs parsley
- 2 egg yolks
- Salt and pepper
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1/2 cup cream

## Directions

1. Crush the bones, put on the fire in cold water.
2. When coming to boil, add the vegetables browned and the spices, let simmer for a few hours.
3. Thicken with butter and flour, strain and season.
4. Whip the yolks with the cream, add the soup slowly, heat.
5. Serve with rice.
6. May be made without yolks and cream also.

title: Lampaan Kieli (Lamb's Tongue)
body:
## Ingredients

- Lamb tongue
- Seasonings
- Hard boiled egg white for garnish
- 4 egg yolks
- 1/2 teaspoon mustard
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- Pepper
- 1/4 cup butter
- 2 tablespoons lemon juice
- Cream
- Soya (optional)

## Directions

1. Cook the tongue with seasonings until tender
2. When cool, cover with sauce and garnish with hard boiled egg white
3. For the sauce: Mix 4 beaten egg yolks with 1/2 teaspoon mustard, 1/4 teaspoon salt and pepper
4. Add 1/4 cup butter and 2 tablespoons lemon juice
5. Stir on the fire until it becomes thick
6. Dilute with cream
7. Add some soya if brown sauce is preferred

title: Lampaankyljyksiä Paahdettuna (Mutton Chops Broiled)
body:
## Ingredients

- mutton chops
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- parsley

## Directions

1. Trim off the fat and scrape the bones.
2. Broil on both sides. Allow 8 to 10 minutes to chops 1 inch thick.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and dot with butter.
4. Place on a hot platter having mashed potatoes or string-beans in the center of the dish, or arrange the chops nicely on the platter and garnish with parsley.

title: Lampaankyljyksiä paahdettuna (Mutton Chops Broiled)
body:
## Ingredients

- Mutton chops
- Salt
- Pepper
- Butter
- Potatoes or peas
- Parsley

## Directions

1. Remove the fat and scrape the meat from the bone.
2. Broil carefully on both sides.
3. Chops one inch thick take 8-10 minutes.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and place small pieces of butter on top.
5. Arrange on hot platter either around potato puree or peas.
6. Garnish with parsley.

title: Lampaanlihaa Kaalin Kanssa (Mutton with Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 pounds breast of mutton
- 1 or 2 heads of cabbage
- 2 tablespoons salt
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 10 peppercorns
- 1 tablespoon flour

## Directions

1. Cut the meat and bones into pieces.
2. Chop the cabbage coarsely.
3. Place the meat into a kettle and sprinkle with salt.
4. Add the cabbage with a sprinkling of salt and pepper.
5. Put the butter on top in dots.
6. Cover the whole with boiling water.
7. Cook on a slow fire covered for 2 or 3 hours.

title: Lampaanpaisti (Roast Mutton)
body:
## Ingredients

- mutton
- onion
- carrots
- salt
- pepper
- 1 cup water
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 1 tablespoon tomato
- mustard

## Directions

1. Cut the bone short and wipe the meat with a cloth wrung out of hot water.
2. Place in a dripping pan, skin-side down.
3. Lay onion and carrots around.
4. Roast in a hot oven until brown.
5. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
6. Pour 1 cupful of hot water into the pan.
7. Lower the heat and let roast slowly, basting often.
8. Allow 10 minutes to a pound.
9. Remove some of the fat.
10. Mix the drippings with 3 tablespoons of flour.
11. Add boiling water until the gravy becomes moderately thick.
12. Flavor with a tablespoon of tomato and some mustard.
13. Strain.

title: Lampaansatulaa No. 1 (Roast Saddle of Mutton No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- Saddle of mutton
- Salt
- Pepper
- Thin brown gravy
- Currant jelly
- Parsley
- Radishes

## Directions

1. Separate the back part before splitting the mutton in two.
2. Remove the kidneys, the fat and the skin.
3. Crack the ribs and trim into a nice shape.
4. Tie with string.
5. Roast in a hot oven, basting often and allowing 9 minutes to each pound.
6. Before taking to the table, remove the meat from the backbone and slice crosswise.
7. Replace the slices around the backbone.
8. Serve with thin brown gravy and currant jelly, garnished with parsley and radishes.

title: Lampaansatulaa No. 2 (Roast Saddle of Mutton No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- Saddle of mutton
- Buttered paper
- Mashed potatoes
- Peas
- Stewed mushrooms
- Chestnut puree

## Directions

1. Split the saddle of mutton in the middle.
2. Remove the bones, scraping carefully.
3. Form into rolls leaving the bones outside and taking care that they are of equal length.
4. Sew up.
5. Wrap into buttered paper.
6. Roast for 1 hour or until done.
7. Place on a serving platter having the meat in a ring with mashed potatoes, peas, stewed mushrooms and chestnut puree inside the ring.

title: Lanttulaatikko (Turnip Pudding - Plain)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups mashed cooked turnips
- Salt
- Sugar
- Pepper
- 2 tablespoons butter or lard
- 1/2 cup rich milk
- 1 egg (if desired)

## Directions

1. Add to the 3 cups of mashed turnips some salt, sugar, pepper.
2. Add 2 tablespoons butter or lard and 1/2 cup rich milk (and 1 egg, if desired).
3. Turn into a buttered mold.
4. Bake slowly for 1.5 to 2 hours.

title: Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 cupful of butter
- 2 cupfuls of sugar
- 2 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 4 eggs
- 1 cupful of milk
- 2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder

## Directions

1. Work butter and sugar to a froth, add yolks, one at a time, rubbing well.
2. Stir milk, baking powder, mixed and sifted with flour, into it.
3. Lastly mix with stiffly beaten eggs.
4. Butter three shallow baking pans, put a thin layer of the batter in each one and bake in a moderate oven about 20 minutes.
5. Place filling on two layers, pile the cakes nicely.
6. Cover with Royal or chocolate icing.

title: Leipä Griddle-kakkuja (Bread Griddle Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ cups bread crumbs
- 1½ cups hot milk
- ½ cup flour
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoons butter
- ½ teaspoon salt
- 3 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Dissolve the butter in the hot milk, pour over the bread crumbs, let stand until the bread crumbs are thoroughly soaked.
2. Add the beaten eggs, and the flour sifted with baking powder.
3. Fry.

title: Leipä Kastike (Bread Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 slice of onion
- 1/2 cupful of sifted bread crumbs
- salt
- pepper
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Cook milk with butter, slice of onion and sifted bread crumbs
2. Season with salt, pepper and nutmeg
3. Remove the onion
4. Bake in oven in a pan of water for 30 minutes
5. Brown bread crumbs in butter
6. Sprinkle the sauce with it
7. Serve with boiled chicken, the sauce poured around the meat

title: Leipä putinki (Bread Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of bread, cut in pieces
- 2 1/2 cupfuls of milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 teaspoonful of vanilla
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter

## Directions

1. Soak bread in milk
2. Lay the pieces of bread on bottom of a buttered mold
3. Mix milk with egg, whipped with sugar, vanilla, butter and salt
4. Pour the mixture on the bread
5. Steam in oven until firm

title: Leipä-kvenellejä (Bread Quenelles)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of cream
- 1 teaspoonful of chopped parsley
- Salt
- Pepper
- Nutmeg
- Bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Beat 2 eggs, mix with butter, cream, chopped parsley, salt, pepper and nutmeg.
2. Add bread crumbs until thick enough to be formed into small rolls.
3. Turn in flour and cook in salted water.
4. May be mixed with chopped almonds, if desired.

title: Leipäkastike (Bread Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups milk
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 slice onion
- 1/2 cup sifted bread crumbs
- Salt, pepper and nutmeg

## Directions

1. Cook milk with butter, slice of onion and sifted bread crumbs.
2. Season with salt, pepper and nutmeg.
3. Remove the onion, bake the mixture in oven in a pan of water for 30 minutes.
4. Fry bread crumbs in butter, sprinkle on top of the sauce.
5. Serve with boiled chicken having the sauce around the chicken on the platter.

title: Leipälä kuorinensa jauhetusta vehnästä (Whole Wheat Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup boiling water
- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 2 teaspoons salt
- 1 yeast cake
- 3 cups whole wheat flour
- white flour

## Directions

1. Mix together milk, water, salt and sugar, when lukewarm add the risen sponge of yeast and flour.
2. Let rise in a warm place for 3 hours.
3. Work in white flour enough to make a moderately thick dough, form into a loaf, place in a baking tin to rise for an hour.
4. Bake in a moderate oven for 1 1/2 hours.
5. May be made by using whole wheat flour only.

title: Leipäputinki No. 1 (Bread Pudding No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup bread cut in cubes
- 2 cups milk
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 teaspoon vanilla
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons melted butter

## Directions

1. Soak the bread in milk
2. Lay the pieces of bread in a buttered mold
3. Beat the eggs with the sugar, add milk, vanilla, butter and salt
4. Pour over the bread
5. Bake in oven in a pan of water until firm
6. Optional: add raisins and grated rind of lemon, or when nearly done cover the top with jelly, apple sauce or stewed fruit
7. Beat the egg whites with sugar, spread over the fruit, and brown in oven

title: Leipäputinki No. 2 (Bread Pudding No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups bread crumbs
- 2 1/2 cups milk
- 3/4 cup currants
- 1/2 lemon juice and rind
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Scald the milk with the butter and add the bread crumbs
2. When cool, mix with the washed currants, the lemon juice and rind
3. Add the egg yolks beaten with sugar
4. Last of all add the egg whites beaten firm
5. Pour the mixture into a buttered mold
6. Bake in a pan of water
7. Serve with fruit sauce

title: Leipätäyte Kanalle No. 1 (Stuffing No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup bread crumbs
- ¾ cup bouillon or water
- 1 tablespoon chopped parsley
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon salt
- Chicken liver and heart
- Some nutmeg and pepper

## Directions

1. Soak the bread crumbs, squeeze dry, add the egg, liver and heart chopped fine and spices.

title: Leipätäyte Kanalle No. 2 (Stuffing No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 onion
- 1 tablespoon chopped parsley
- ½ cup bouillon
- 1 egg
- Salt
- Pepper
- Chicken liver and heart

## Directions

1. Soak the bread, squeeze dry.
2. Fry in a pan with onion, add parsley and bread crumbs, continue frying for a while, dilute with bouillon, add 1 egg, salt, pepper and the chicken liver and heart chopped.
3. The same stuffing may be used for duck and goose. Add ½ cup of strained tomato instead of bouillon and some grated celery. May be mixed with mashed sweet potatoes also.

title: Leipävanukas (Bread Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 cupfuls of milk
- 1/2 lb. of grated bread
- 1/2 cupful of currants
- 1 lemon
- 6 ozs. of butter
- 6 eggs
- a little sugar

## Directions

1. Cook butter with milk until boiling
2. Mix with grated bread
3. When cool mix with rinsed currants, lemon rind and juice and yolks of eggs beaten with sugar
4. At the last add beaten whites into the mixture
5. Turn on a buttered mold and bake in a pan of water
6. Serve with fruit sauce

title: Lemon Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of butter
- 1/4 lb. of sugar
- 1/2 teaspoonful of baking powder
- 1/4 lb. of flour
- 1/4 lb. of corn starch
- juice of 1 lemon or 10 drops of lemon extract

## Directions

1. Beat yolks with sugar until light
2. Add corn starch mixed with flour, lemon, butter washed and rubbed to a cream
3. Stir lastly the whites beaten stiff and dry into it
4. Half fill small molds with the above mixture
5. Bake in a moderate oven

title: Lemon Cream (Sitruuna kräämi)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 egg yolks
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1 orange rind
- juice of 1 lemon
- 1 cupful of sherry
- 5 leaves or 3 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- 1 pint of cream

## Directions

1. Whip the yolks and sugar in a saucepan
2. Add all other ingredients except cream, which has to be whipped to a froth separately
3. Place the saucepan on the fire stirring mixture until it thickens
4. Set to cool whipping continually
5. Pour the beaten cream into it
6. Put the mixture in a mold to harden
7. Serve with fruit sauce or cream

title: Lemon Ice
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cupfuls of water
- 2 1/2 cupfuls of sugar
- 4-5 lemons

## Directions

1. Cook sugar with water 15 minutes
2. Let cool and squeeze juice of the lemons in it
3. Let chill, strain and freeze

title: Lemon Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of water
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 3 eggs
- juice and grated rind of 3/4 lemon
- 1/2 teaspoonful of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of corn starch

## Directions

1. Put water, lemon juice and rind and butter on the fire
2. Add sugar and corn starch
3. Pour the boiling water slowly into the corn starch
4. Cook few minutes
5. Stir yolks into it
6. Turn the mixture on the open baked pie crust
7. Bake in oven until firm
8. Cover with meringue
9. Let stand in oven until light brown

title: Lemon Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cupfuls of cream
- 6 eggs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1 lemon
- 2 tablespoonfuls of corn starch
- 1/2 lb. of sugar for caramel
- 1/2 cupful of hot water
- a little brandy

## Directions

1. Whip well yolks and sugar in a saucepan, add grated yellow lemon rind and juice, cream and flour.
2. Put on the fire and whip well, until the mixture is thick.
3. Let cool, stirring now and then.
4. Beat whites until stiff, stir into the pudding, put in a mold, covered inside with caramel.
5. Steam in oven 3/4 hour.
6. Serve hot with wine sauce or cold with whipped cream.

title: Lemon Rings
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 yolks of eggs
- 3 ozs. of sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of cream
- grated lemon rind
- enough flour to make a paste

## Directions

1. Work yolks of eggs with sugar to a froth
2. Mix with cream, butter, lemon rind and flour to make a paste thick enough to handle
3. Form into small rings
4. Bake on greased baking sheet until lightly browned

title: Lemon Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 egg yolks
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 cupfuls of milk or cream
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- minced parsley

## Directions

1. Beat yolks of 3 eggs in a saucepan
2. Add butter
3. Add milk or cream
4. Place in a pan of hot water and whip until thick
5. Season with salt, pepper, lemon juice and minced parsley
6. Serve with fish

title: Lemon Sauce I
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cupful of sugar
- 1/4 cupful of lemon juice
- 1 teaspoonful of butter
- 3/4 cupful of water
- 1 tablespoonful of corn starch
- 3/4 cupful of white wine

## Directions

1. Mix sugar with corn starch.
2. Pour slowly boiling water into it, stirring well.
3. Cook until corn starch is clear.
4. Remove from the fire and add lemon juice, butter and white wine.

title: Lemon Sauce II
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- juice and rind of 1 lemon
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of white wine or water
- yolks of 4 eggs
- 2 cupfuls of cream

## Directions

1. Rub butter and sugar to a cream, add beaten yolks and water.
2. Stir it in a saucepan on the fire until thick.
3. Remove from the fire, add lemon juice, grated rind and wine.
4. When cool mix with the whipped cream.

title: Lemonade (Limonaati)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of water
- 2 cupfuls of sugar
- 1 cupful of lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cook 1 quart of water and 2 cupfuls of sugar for 10 minutes
2. Mix with 1 cupful of lemon juice
3. Let it get cold, bottle up or serve immediately

title: Lemonade Powder (Sitruunapulveri limonaatia)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 lemons
- 2½ pounds of powdered sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of wine acid powder

## Directions

1. Grate yellow rind of three lemons
2. Rub together with 2½ pounds of powdered sugar
3. Press juice of the lemons, drain and mix with the above sugar
4. Stir 1 teaspoonful of wine acid powder into it
5. Mix thoroughly together, lay on paper to get dry and keep in a covered glass jar
6. When serving allow 2 teaspoonfuls of powder to 1 glassful of ice water

title: Lentil Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of lentils
- 1/2 cupful of brown beans
- 1/2 onion
- a branch of celery
- a sprig of parsley
- 1 carrot
- 1 cupful of bread crumbs
- 1 egg
- pepper and salt
- 1/2 cupful of milk sauce

## Directions

1. Wash 1 cupful of lentils and 1/2 cupful of brown beans.
2. Put on the fire in cold water with 1/2 onion, a branch of celery, a sprig of parsley and 1 carrot until soft and all the water has evaporated.
3. Mash through a sieve, add 1 cupful of bread crumbs, 1 egg, pepper and salt and 1/2 cupful of milk sauce.
4. Work to a smooth paste.
5. Form into balls or croquettes.
6. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
7. Cook in deep fat.

title: Leseleipää (Bran Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups milk
- 2 cups bran
- 2 cups white flour
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 2 teaspoons soda

## Directions

1. Mix together bran, white flour, soda and salt
2. Add milk and molasses
3. Pour the mixture into a buttered pan having the pan filled 4 inches high
4. Bake for 1 hour

title: Lettuce Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- light colored, fresh, crisp lettuce
- French dressing
- minced parsley

## Directions

1. Let stand in cold water for a while.
2. Remove leaves from the stalk, wash quickly one by one in cold water.
3. Place them on a clean towel, so the water may drip from the leaves.
4. Arrange the lettuce in circle into a salad bowl, having the hearts in middle.
5. Pour French dressing on, sprinkle with minced parsley.

title: Light Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of butter
- 3 cupfuls of flour
- 9 whites of eggs
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of sugar
- 1/2 teaspoonful of soda
- 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice

## Directions

1. Work butter to a froth
2. Add soda sifted many times with flour and continue rubbing a little while
3. Whip whites to a stiff froth and add sugar slowly into it
4. Combine with the above mixture
5. Bake in small forms or thin cakes in layer cake molds
6. Shape into small cakes and cover with Royal icing

title: Liha Kvenellejä (Meat Quenelles)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of chicken or veal
- 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of milk or meat stock
- 1/2 onion
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Grind the meat very fine
2. Cook the chopped onion in butter
3. Add to the meat the egg, bread crumbs soaked in meat stock, salt, pepper, and the cooked onion
4. Knead thoroughly to combine
5. Form into small balls
6. Dip in flour
7. Cook in salted water

title: Liha-kvenelliä (Meat Quenelles)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound of chicken or veal
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoons bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoons milk or bouillon
- 1/2 onion
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Grind the meat finely.
2. Cook the chopped onion in butter.
3. Add eggs, bread crumbs soaked in bouillon, salt and pepper.
4. Knead thoroughly.
5. Form into small balls and roll in flour.
6. Boil in salt water.

title: Liha-kääryjä (Meat Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. of meat removed from bone
- 3/4 lbs. of pork
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablesp. of chopped parsley
- 1 onion
- salt and pepper
- boiling water or bouillon

## Directions

1. Cut beef into thin slices and pound it taking care not to break it.
2. Spread with onion juice and chopped parsley.
3. Lay slices of pork on it.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Roll tightly together and fasten with cord.
6. Fry until all browned.
7. Pour boiling water or bouillon over and let boil 1—1 1/2 hours.
8. Prepare sauce of the same liquor.

title: Liha-muhennus (Beef Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef, cut in 1-1 1/2 inch pieces
- butter
- chopped onion
- 2 carrots
- 1 turnip
- salt and pepper
- water or bouillon
- 2 potatoes
- 2 stalks of celery
- flour

## Directions

1. Cut beef in 1-1 1/2 inch pieces, brown with butter and chopped onion.
2. Place in kettle with 2 carrots, 1 turnip cut in pieces, salt and pepper.
3. Put a little water or bouillon in the frying pan in which the onions were browned, pour over the meat.
4. Let simmer covered.
5. About 1/2 hour before the meat is done, add 2 potatoes cut in pieces and 2 stalks of celery.
6. Thicken with flour mixed with cold water.
7. Place on a serving dish, arrange the vegetables around the meat.

title: Liha-mureke (Meat Loaf)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound of beef
- 1/2 pound of pork
- 1/2 pound of veal
- 1 cupful of cream
- 2 cupfuls of meat stock or water
- 1 cupful of breadcrumbs
- 2 eggs
- 1 onion
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 1/2 teaspoonful of pepper
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter

## Directions

1. Grind the meat twice.
2. Soak the breadcrumbs in meat stock and cream.
3. Add beaten eggs to the mixture and combine with the meat, which is beaten until light.
4. Finely chop the onion, cook it in butter and strain the butter into the mixture.
5. Add the seasoning last.
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered pan and shape into a long loaf, smooth the surface well and brush with beaten egg.
7. Sprinkle with breadcrumbs and bake in a moderate oven until brown.

title: Liha-pai (Meat Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked slices of onion
- carrots
- turnip
- celery cut in dice
- layer of meat cut in cubes, either fried or boiled
- salt
- pepper
- brown sauce
- paste for cover or slices of tomato
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Line pie plate with cooked slices of onion, carrots, turnip, and celery cut in dice.
2. Place a layer of the meat cut in cubes on the vegetables.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Fill the plate alternating the layers.
5. Pour brown sauce over.
6. Cover with paste or lay slices of tomato on and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
7. Bake in oven about 1 hour.

title: Liha-putinki makaroonin kera (Meat Pudding with Macaroni)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of macaroni
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1/2 onion
- 2 cupfuls of meat stock or sauce
- 1 lb. of cooked chopped meat
- 3—4 tablespoonfuls of grated cheese
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Cook macaroni until tender in salted water; drain the water off.
2. Fry onion in butter.
3. Add meat and fry a little while.
4. Pour meat stock or sauce over.
5. Add cheese.
6. Layer in baking dish alternating macaroni and meat mixture, or mix macaroni with meat.
7. Brown in oven. Bread crumbs may be used instead of macaroni.

title: Lihahakkelus (Beef Hash)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 parts chopped cold steak or boiled corned beef
- 1 part boiled chopped potatoes
- Salt and pepper
- Onion
- Butter
- Egg
- Flour
- Lard

## Directions

1. Fry onion in butter.
2. To two parts of chopped cold steak or boiled corned beef allow one part of boiled chopped potatoes, some salt and pepper.
3. Turn all into a pan, stir over a fire until light brown.
4. Continue frying until a brown crust has formed underneath.
5. Turn onto a platter having the brown side uppermost.
6. Or form into patties, dip in egg and flour, fry in lard.
7. May be made without potatoes. Chop the meat, cook a few slices of onion in butter, remove the onion, add 1 tablespoon of flour, 1 cup of bouillon, 1 1/2 cups of chopped meat, salt and pepper.
8. If veal or poultry are used for hash, use milk instead of bouillon.
9. Serve on buttered toast having poached egg on top.

title: Lihakääryjä (Meat Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds beef removed from bone
- 1.5 pounds pork
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons chopped parsley
- 1 onion
- Salt and pepper
- Boiling water or meat stock

## Directions

1. Cut beef into thin slices and pound, taking care not to break the slices.
2. Put onion juice and chopped parsley on the meat and add the pork cut in slices.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Roll the slices tightly together and tie with string.
5. Fry until all sides are browned.
6. Pour boiling water or meat stock over.
7. Let boil from 1 to 1.5 hours.
8. Make a gravy of the bouillon in the pan.

title: Lihaliemi (Bouillon)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 lbs. of lean beef
- 3 lbs. of marrow bones
- 5 quarts of cold water
- 2 leeks or 1 onion
- 1 carrot
- 10 peppercorns
- 1 root or 4 stalks of celery
- 2 tablespoonfuls of salt
- 2 sprigs of parsley

## Directions

1. Remove all the fat and cut the meat in cubes.
2. Place the meat, bones and salt in a soupkettle and pour cold water on them; cover and let stand on side of range about half an hour.
3. Place the kettle on the fire to heat slowly.
4. Let simmer for 5 minutes before adding cut and browned seasonings.
5. Let simmer for 5-6 hours, strain and let stand until cool.
6. Remove fat and let the soup stand for a while to clear.
7. Put it into the soupkettle with 1 pound of chopped lean meat, beaten whites and chopped shells of two eggs.
8. Stir until boiling.
9. Let simmer about 10 minutes, place aside and let stand 5 minutes.
10. Strain through a fine cloth and serve in bouillon cups.

title: Lihamuhennus (Beef Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- Meat, cut in 1 to 1.5 inch pieces
- Butter
- Onion, chopped
- 2 carrots, cut in pieces
- 1 turnip, cut in pieces
- 1 tomato, cut in pieces
- Salt and pepper
- Water or bouillon
- 2 potatoes, cut in pieces
- 2 celery stalks
- Flour

## Directions

1. Brown the meat in butter with chopped onion.
2. Place into a kettle with carrots, turnip, tomato, salt and pepper.
3. Rinse the frying pan with water or bouillon and pour over the meat.
4. Let simmer slowly, covered.
5. About 0.5 hour before the meat is done, add the potatoes cut in pieces and celery stalks.
6. Thicken with flour mixed with cold water if desired.
7. Arrange vegetables around the meat when serving.

title: Lihamureke (Meat Farce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound beef
- 1/4 pound pork
- 1/2 pound veal
- 1 cup cream or milk
- 2 cups bouillon or water
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 2 eggs
- 1 onion
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 1/4 teaspoon pepper
- 4 tablespoons butter

## Directions

1. Force the meat twice through a meat chopper.
2. Soak the bread crumbs in bouillon and cream.
3. Add the beaten eggs and mix with meat, pounding well.
4. Chop the onion, fry in butter, and strain the butter into the mixture.
5. Add seasonings last of all.
6. Put in a buttered pan, forming into a nice loaf.
7. Add a sprinkling of bread crumbs on top.
8. Bake from 1 to 1 1/2 hours, basting often and adding bouillon or water as needed.
9. Serve with a brown gravy.

title: Lihanliemi (Bouillon)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 pounds lean beef with bones
- 2 pounds veal and bones
- 1 pound chicken or some other fowl
- 8 quarts water
- 1/2 cup each: carrot, onion, and celery
- 1 parsnip, beet and turnip
- 2 tablespoons salt
- 12 peppercorns
- 5 cloves
- 2 sprigs parsley
- 1 pound lean beef, chopped
- 2 egg whites, beaten
- egg shells

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed for soup stock.
2. To clarify the stock, pour it into the kettle after skimming the fat.
3. Add 1 pound of chopped lean beef, 2 beaten egg whites and the shells of the eggs.
4. Stir until it starts to boil.
5. Let simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Place aside, let stand for 5 minutes.
7. Strain through a fine cloth.
8. Serve.

title: Lihanlientä (Soup Stock)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 pounds lean meat with bones
- 6 quarts cold water
- 2 tablespoons salt
- 1 cup each: onions, carrots and celery
- 10 peppercorns
- 1/2 cup tomato, fresh or canned
- 2 sprigs parsley

## Directions

1. Remove the fat and cut the meat in pieces.
2. Put the meat and the bones with the salt and cold water into a soup kettle; cover, let stand for about half an hour.
3. Place on a slow fire.
4. When coming to boil, skim.
5. Continue to cook for 3 hours or more.
6. Add the vegetables and spices to the soup.
7. Continue to boil for 1 hour or longer, adding boiling water when necessary.
8. Strain, let cool and skim the fat.
9. If the vegetables are browned before added to the soup, it will improve the color of the soup.
10. If the meat is to be eaten, remove it from the soup immediately when it is done and serve with a sauce such as horseradish, sweet sour, mustard, etc.

title: Lihanlientä riisiryynien kera (Rice in Bouillon)
body:
## Ingredients

- Rice
- Salted water

## Directions

1. Boil rice in plenty of salted water until tender but not mushy.
2. Drain, run cold water through.
3. Serve in bouillon or other soups.

title: Lihanlientä rikottujen munien kera (Poached Eggs in Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggs
- Salted water

## Directions

1. Poach eggs carefully into boiling salt water.
2. Let stand until the white is firm.
3. Put carefully into soup.

title: Lihapiirakka (Meat Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- Boiled slices of onion
- Carrots
- Turnip
- Celery
- Cold meat, fried or boiled
- Salt
- Pepper
- Brown gravy
- Pie crust or tomato slices
- Bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Line a pie plate with boiled slices of onion, carrots, turnip and celery cut in pieces
2. Place a layer of cold meat fried or boiled cut in cubes on the vegetables
3. Fill the dish with alternate layers of vegetables and meat
4. Pour a brown gravy over
5. Cover with pie crust or lay slices of tomato on top
6. Sprinkle with bread crumbs
7. Bake for 1 hour

title: Lihapullia (Meat Balls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound ground beef
- 1/2 cup bread crumbs
- 1 egg
- 1/2 or 3/4 cup water or cream
- 1/2 onion, fried
- 2 tablespoons butter or lard
- 1 tomato, cut in pieces
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Soak the bread crumbs in water or cream.
2. Add egg, tomato, meat, salt, pepper and onion.
3. Stir until smooth.
4. Roll into round balls.
5. Fry in butter or lard.
6. Make a gravy of the drippings in the pan by adding some butter, flour and water until moderately thick.
7. May be made without tomato if preferred.

title: Lihaputinki makaroonien kera (Meat Pudding with Macaroni)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound macaroni
- 4 tablespoons butter
- 0.5 onion
- 2 cups bouillon or sauce
- 1 pound boiled meat, ground
- 3 or 4 tablespoons grated cheese
- Bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Break the macaroni in pieces and boil until tender in salted water; drain.
2. Fry the onion in butter and add the meat to it; fry for awhile.
3. Pour the bouillon or sauce into the pan and add the cheese.
4. Fill a mold with layers of meat and macaroni or with macaroni and meat mixed together.
5. Bake until browned.
6. Instead of macaroni, mashed potatoes may be used.

title: Lima Beans
body:
## Ingredients

- lima beans
- salted water
- butter
- salt
- cream or thin milk sauce (optional)

## Directions

1. Put lima beans into boiling salted water
2. Cook until tender
3. Drain
4. Season with salt and add butter
5. Add some cream or thin milk sauce according to taste

title: Lima Beans
body:
## Ingredients

- beans
- salted boiling water
- butter
- salt and pepper
- hot cream or white sauce

## Directions

1. Put beans into salted boiling water and boil until tender.
2. Drain off the water.
3. Moisten them with butter, season with salt and pepper.
4. If wanted, add a little hot cream or cover with white sauce.

title: Limonaati (Lemonade)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart water
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cook water with sugar for 10 minutes
2. Add lemon juice
3. Cool
4. Bottle up or serve immediately

title: Lobster Chowder
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of lobster cut in cubes
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1 small onion
- 1 cupful of milk
- 2 tablesp. of chopped crackers
- salt and paprika

## Directions

1. Put butter and chopped onion into the kettle.
2. Cook 5 min.
3. Drain off the onion, and add flour crackers, milk, lobster and seasonings into the kettle.
4. Heat to scalding and serve.

title: Lobster cocktail (Lobster Cocktail)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lobsters
- 2 tablespoons vinegar
- 1 tablespoon grated horseradish
- 4 tablespoons lemon juice
- 3 tablespoons tomato catsup
- A few drops of tobasco
- Salt
- Paprika

## Directions

1. Prepare the dressing as for oyster cocktail: mix vinegar, grated horseradish, lemon juice, tomato catsup, a few drops of tobasco, salt and paprika.
2. Boil two lobsters.
3. Cut in fine pieces.
4. Serve in glasses same as oysters.

title: Lobster Cutlets
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of boiled chopped lobster
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- chopped parsley
- 1 cupful of milk sauce
- 2 hard-boiled egg yolks or 1 raw yolk
- breadcrumbs
- egg
- lard

## Directions

1. Season lobster with salt, pepper, lemon juice and chopped parsley.
2. Mix with 1 cupful of milk sauce to make it thick enough.
3. Add 2 hard-boiled or 1 raw yolk.
4. Let it stand on ice for a while.
5. Form into cutlets.
6. Roll in breadcrumbs, egg and again in breadcrumbs.
7. Cook in lard.
8. Serve with Tartar or tomato sauce.

title: Lobster Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- Boiled lobster
- Mayonnaise sauce
- Lettuce leaves
- Hard-boiled eggs
- Celery (optional)

## Directions

1. Cut boiled lobster in small pieces
2. Set in cold place until ready to serve
3. Mix with a small quantity of mayonnaise sauce
4. Garnish around with lettuce leaves, lobster claws and hard-boiled eggs
5. The lobster may be mixed also with celery cut in small dice

title: Lobster with Mushrooms
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of boiled lobster
- 2 cupfuls of fried mushrooms
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1 slice of onion
- 1 cupful of milk or cream
- sherry or lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cook finely chopped onion in butter.
2. Add flour, mushrooms, lobster and seasonings.
3. Add scalded milk or cream and heat the mixture.
4. Add 2 tablespoonfuls of sherry or lemon juice.
5. Serve having toast laid around it, or put the mixture in lobster shells, sprinkle with bread crumbs, dot with butter and bake in oven until brown.

title: Lobster à la Newburg (Lobster à la Newburg)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of boiled lobster
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- salt and pepper
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sherry
- yolks of 2 eggs
- 1 cupful of cream

## Directions

1. Cut lobster into one-inch cubes.
2. Put butter with pieces of lobster into a kettle; season with salt and pepper.
3. Cover and let simmer about 5 min.
4. Add sherry, beaten yolks of 2 eggs mixed with 1 cupful of cream into it.
5. Shake the kettle on the fire until the mixture is firm.
6. Instead of raw eggs boiled yolks of eggs rubbed through a sieve may be used.

title: Lohi- ja appelsiini salaatti (Salmon Salad with Oranges)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can of salmon
- 1 sour orange
- 1 cupful of lobster
- 1 cupful of minced lettuce leaves
- 1 orange
- 1 hard-boiled egg
- Salt
- Pepper
- 3 tablespoonfuls of mayonnaise sauce

## Directions

1. Rinse the salmon well
2. Cut in dice
3. Squeeze juice of one sour orange over the salmon
4. Allow 1 cupful of minced lettuce leaves, 1 orange cut in pieces and 1 hard-boiled chopped egg to one cupful of lobster
5. Season with salt and pepper
6. Mix with 3 tablespoonfuls of mayonnaise sauce

title: Lohi- ja appelsiinisalaatti (Salmon and Orange Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can of salmon
- 1 sour orange
- 1 cup minced lettuce leaves
- 1 orange
- 1 hard boiled egg
- salt
- pepper
- 3 tablespoons mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Rinse the salmon well
2. Cut in cubes and squeeze the juice of a sour orange over the salmon
3. To 1 cup of salmon, add 1 cup of minced lettuce leaves
4. Add 1 orange cut in pieces and 1 hard boiled egg chopped
5. Season with salt and pepper
6. Mix in 3 tablespoons of mayonnaise

title: Lohi-keitto (Salmon Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts of salmon- or fish stock
- 2½ lbs. of fresh salmon or ½ can of canned salmon
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter or crab-butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- salt and pepper
- yolks of 2 eggs
- 1 cupful of cream

## Directions

1. Cook the salmon in a small quantity of salted water until tender.
2. Remove the skin and the bones, and cut from the fish nice pieces to be served in the soup.
3. Chop the rest of the fish finely, cook it in fish stock and force through a sieve.
4. Thicken the soup with butter and flour.
5. Beat the yolks, add the cream to it, pour the soup slowly in.
6. Serve with pieces of fish, hard boiled yolks or fish balls.
7. Remains of crab meat may be served in salmon soup, giving it a good taste.

title: Lohi-mousse (Salmon Mousse)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound salmon
- 2 egg whites
- 2 cups whipping cream
- Salt and pepper
- Truffles
- Parsley

## Directions

1. Scrape the fish off the skin and remove the bones.
2. Grind several times and pound well in a wooden bowl.
3. Add the whites of egg slowly and rub the mixture through a sieve.
4. Place the fish into a saucepan or a jar and set the jar in ice water.
5. Add gradually the cream to the fish and beat well.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Garnish a souffle mold with truffles and chopped parsley and fill with the mixture.
8. Bake in a pan of water covered with buttered paper about 15 minutes or until firm when touched with finger tips.
9. Unmold onto a platter and serve with Hollandaise or lobster sauce.
10. Test the mixture before baking by dropping some of it with a spoon into boiling water. If it feels hard, add a little cream or if too soft, harden with a white of egg.
11. May be prepared earlier and kept in icebox until baking time.

title: Lohi-putinki (Salmon Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of rice
- 1 quart of milk
- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- ½ onion
- salt
- pepper
- sugar
- ½ lb. of salmon

## Directions

1. Boil the rice in water until half-cooked.
2. Drain the water off and mix the rice with boiled milk.
3. Cook until thin batter.
4. Let cool for a while.
5. Mix with butter and whipped eggs.
6. Season.
7. Add the salmon flaked into bits.
8. When too salty the salmon has to be soaked.
9. Bake in a buttered mold.
10. Serve with melted butter.

title: Lohihyytelo (Salmon à la Aspic)
body:
## Ingredients

- Salmon
- Salt
- Pepper
- Bay leaf
- 2 cups fish stock, cold
- 1 cup tomato
- 0.5 lemon, juice of
- 2 tablespoons gelatine
- 2 egg whites, lightly beaten
- Hard boiled eggs
- Parsley
- Lettuce leaves
- Tomato slices
- Lemon slices
- Mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Boil the fish with salt, pepper and a bay leaf.
2. When done lift off to cool.
3. Prepare a jelly of 2 cups of fish stock, 1 cup of tomato, juice of 0.5 lemon, 2 tablespoons of gelatine and 2 whites of egg lightly beaten.
4. Put all the ingredients mentioned above into a saucepan, stir over the fire until boiling.
5. Lift aside, let simmer 5 minutes or until clear.
6. Strain through a fine cloth.
7. Pour some of the jelly into a mold, garnish with hard boiled egg and parsley.
8. Lay the fish nicely on top of it in the mold and fill the mold slowly with the jelly.
9. Place in cold place for a few hours.
10. Unmold onto a platter, garnish with lettuce, slices of tomato, lemon and parsley.
11. Serve with mayonnaise.

title: Lohikeitto (Salmon Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts salmon or fish stock
- 2.5 pounds fresh salmon or 0.5 can of salmon
- 2 tablespoons butter or lobster butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 cup cream
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cook the salmon in a small quantity of salt water until tender.
2. Remove the skin and the bones and cut some nice pieces from the fish to be served in the soup.
3. Chop finely the rest of the fish, cook in fish stock, force through a sieve.
4. Thicken the soup with butter and flour.
5. Beat the yolks, add to the cream and pour the soup gradually into the cream.
6. Serve with pieces of salmon, hard boiled yolks or fish quenelles.
7. Remains of lobster or crab may be served in the soup.

title: Lohiputinki (Salmon Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup rice
- 1 quart milk
- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoons butter
- ½ onion
- ½ pound salmon
- Salt, pepper and dash of sugar

## Directions

1. Boil the rice until half done
2. Strain
3. Mix with boiled milk and seasonings
4. Add the salmon cut in fine pieces (if salmon is salty, it should be soaked first)
5. Bake in a buttered mold
6. Serve with melted butter

title: Lohitöttcröitä (Salmon Cones)
body:
## Ingredients

- thin slices of smoked salmon
- 1 cup fish aspic
- 1/2 pound caviare
- whipped cream
- gelatine

## Directions

1. Roll into cones thin slices of smoked salmon
2. Work 1 cup of fish aspic to a froth
3. Mix with 1/2 pound of caviare
4. Fill the cones with the caviare mixture
5. Lay on ice to thicken
6. Arrange on a platter
7. Decorate the top with whipped cream mixed with gelatine and caviare

title: Lohitötteröitä (Salmon Cones)
body:
## Ingredients

- thinly sliced smoked salmon
- 1 cupful of fish jelly
- 1/2 pound of caviare
- whipped cream
- gelatine

## Directions

1. Roll thinly sliced smoked salmon into cones.
2. Beat 1 cupful of fish jelly to a froth, mix with 1/2 pound of caviare.
3. Fill the cones with the mixture of jelly and caviare.
4. Set on ice to get firm.
5. Dish, garnish the top with whipped cream mixed with gelatine and caviare.

title: Lumi Putinki (Snow Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of thin cream
- 2 ounces of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla
- yolks of 2 eggs
- 2 cupfuls of rich cream
- 2 ounces of macaroons

## Directions

1. Boil up the thin cream.
2. Beat yolks with sugar and pour the boiling cream gradually into it.
3. Stir on the fire until it thickens.
4. Remove the saucepan from the fire and let cool.
5. Add the rich cream, beaten to a froth, into the mixture.
6. Rinse a mold with cold water.
7. Put in it layers of macaroons and cream alternately.
8. Cover closely.
9. Place the mold in a pail of cracked ice and salt.
10. Let stand 6 to 7 hours.
11. Turn on a serving dish and garnish with macaroons.

title: Lumiputinki No. 1 (Snow Pudding No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup thin cream
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 2 yolks of egg
- 2 cups whipping cream
- 2 ounces macaroons

## Directions

1. Scald the thin cream.
2. Beat the yolks with the sugar.
3. Add gradually the scalded cream.
4. Stir over the fire in a double boiler until thick.
5. Remove from the fire, let cool.
6. Add the whipped cream.
7. Dip a mold into cold water.
8. Fill with alternate layers of macaroons and cream mixture.
9. Cover tightly.
10. Place the mold into a pail of cracked ice and salt.
11. Let stand for 6 or 7 hours.
12. Unmold and garnish with macaroons.

title: Lumiputinki No. 2 (Snow Pudding No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups lemon or wine jelly
- 3 egg whites

## Directions

1. Prepare 2 cups of lemon or wine jelly and let cool.
2. Before it is firm, beat to a froth.
3. Beat 3 egg whites until firm.
4. Combine the mixtures and continue to beat until it is stiff enough to hold its shape.
5. Mold or drop with a spoon into a glass dish.
6. Serve with whipped cream, vanilla sauce or custard.

title: Lumivuori (Snow Pyramid)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 egg whites
- 1/2 pound powdered sugar
- vanilla ice cream or blanc mange for filling
- whipped cream for garnish

## Directions

1. Beat 6 egg whites until firm for about 20-30 minutes.
2. Sift 1/2 pound of powdered sugar several times and mix carefully with the egg whites.
3. Force through a pastry bag on a floured baking sheet forming larger and smaller rings.
4. Dry in a slow oven.
5. Pile on a serving dish so as to give the appearance of a pyramid.
6. Fill the center with vanilla ice cream or blanc mange.
7. Garnish the sides and the top with whipped cream.

title: Lumivuori (Snow Pyramid)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 whites of eggs
- 1/2 pound of powdered sugar
- vanilla ice cream or cream jelly for filling
- whipped cream for garnish

## Directions

1. Beat 6 whites to a firm froth, about 20 minutes.
2. Sift 1/2 pound of powdered sugar several times and mix carefully with the froth of eggs.
3. Force through a pastry bag upon a floured baking sheet, forming into larger and smaller rings.
4. Dry in a slow oven.
5. Pile on a serving dish so as to give the appearance of a pyramid.
6. Fill with vanilla ice cream or cream jelly.
7. Garnish the sides and the top with whipped cream.

title: Luukeitto (Bone Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- Bones and remains of roast
- 1 tablespoon pearl barley or rice
- 1 carrot and 1 onion
- Some turnip, salt and a few peppercorns
- 2 cups potatoes diced
- Chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Crush the bones and put on the fire with a part of the vegetables and let boil for a few hours.
2. Cut the potatoes and remains of vegetables in small cubes and cook with the barley or rice in 1 quart of water until tender.
3. Strain the stock and combine with the vegetables and barley and their liquor.
4. Season and add parsley.
5. If the bones are browned in the oven before cooking the soup, it will improve the color and the taste of the soup.

title: Luumu hilloa (Plum Compote)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 pounds of plums (not too ripe)
- 4 pounds of sugar
- 3 cupfuls of water

## Directions

1. Halve the plums enough to remove the pits.
2. Cook sugar and water to a thick syrup, into which put the plums and cook until they have become clear.
3. Put plums in jar and pour the syrup over the fruit.
4. If the syrup seems loose, cook it a little while longer and pour it hot over the plums.
5. Seal the jar when cooled.
6. If the plums are hard-skinned, pour boiling water over them so the skins will separate more easily.

title: Luumuhyytelö (Plum Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- plums
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Wash plums, remove the stems, put into a saucepan
2. Add a little water and simmer on a slow fire until the plums have broken apart
3. Strain the liquid
4. Weigh the strained liquid and take an equal amount of sugar
5. Prepare as given for other jellies

title: Luumukohokas (Prune Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound prunes
- 1/4 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice
- 5 egg whites

## Directions

1. Cook the prunes until tender, stone and grind or force through a sieve.
2. Add the lemon, sugar and the egg whites beaten until firm.
3. Bake in a well-buttered mold for 20-30 minutes, having the mold in a pan of water.
4. Serve immediately with whipped cream.

title: Luumukohokasta (Plum Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of plums
- 1/4 lb. of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice
- whites of 5 eggs

## Directions

1. Cook plums until soft, stone and press through a sieve.
2. Mix with sugar and lastly with stiff beaten whites.
3. Bake in oven 20-30 minutes.
4. Serve hot with whipped cream.

title: Luumuputinki (Plum Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 ozs. of cracker dust
- 2 ozs. of flour
- 18 ozs. of suet
- 1/2 lb. of currants
- 3/4 lb. of sugar
- 2 ozs. of chopped almonds
- 1 teaspoonful of nutmeg
- 2 leaves of mace chopped
- 1 small spoonful of salt
- a dash of cinnamon
- yellow rind of 2 lemons
- juice of 4 lemons
- 8 eggs
- 1 glassful of brandy

## Directions

1. Prepare same as directed for last recipe.

title: Maalais Kakku (Country Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of sugar
- 1/4 cupful of melted butter
- 3 cupfuls of cream
- 4 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 1 teaspoonful of soda
- 1 teaspoonful each of cardamom, cinnamon, ginger, and orange rind

## Directions

1. Whip eggs and sugar
2. Add butter, spices, cream, and wheat flour mixed with soda
3. Bake in a buttered mold for 1 hour

title: Maamuurain- ja vadelmamarmelaatia (Bilberry and Raspberry Marmalade)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2.5 quarts of bilberries
- 2 quarts of raspberries
- 2.5 lbs. of crystal sugar

## Directions

1. Put all berries into a kettle on the fire and cook so long that a little tested on a plate becomes firm.
2. Put marmalade into jars and preserve as usual.

title: Maamuurain- ja vadelmamarmelaatia (Blackberry and Raspberry Marmalade)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 quarts of blackberries
- 2 quarts of raspberries
- 2 1/2 lbs. of granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Place all the berries in kettle on fire.
2. Cook until it gets firm when tested by dropping on plate.
3. Pour in jars and preserve as usually.

title: Maamuurain- ja vadelmamarmeladia (Blackberry and Raspberry Marmalade)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2½ quarts blackberries
- 2 quarts raspberries
- 2½ pounds granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Put the berries with the sugar into a kettle.
2. Place over the fire and simmer until it becomes firm when dropped from a spoon on a plate.
3. Put into jelly glasses, cover as directed.

title: Maapähkinä-paistia (Peanut Steak)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup shelled peanuts
- 1 cup boiled lentils
- 1 cup lima beans or brown beans
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- milk or tomato liquor
- 4 tablespoons butter
- 2 eggs
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Have 1 cup of shelled peanuts, 1 cup of boiled lentils, 1 cup of lima beans or brown beans.
2. Boil and force through a meat grinder.
3. Add 1 cup of bread crumbs soaked in milk or liquor of tomato.
4. Add 4 tablespoons butter and 2 beaten eggs.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Form into a loaf.
7. Bake, basting often.

title: Macaroni Timbale Farcie (Spinach-Filled Macaroni Timbale)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1/2 teaspoonful of onion
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1 tablespoonful of mushrooms, chopped
- 1/2 cupful of beef stock
- salt
- nutmeg
- 1 cupful of chopped spinach
- 1 egg yolk
- boiled macaroni
- tomato sauce

## Directions

1. Cook and chop the spinach.
2. Cook 1 tablespoonful of butter and 1/2 teaspoonful of onion together.
3. Add 1 tablespoonful of flour, 1 tablespoonful of mushrooms chopped, and 1/2 cupful of beef stock.
4. Season with salt and nutmeg.
5. Add 1 cupful of chopped spinach and let come to boiling point.
6. Add one yolk.
7. Butter small timbales or a big mold.
8. Cut the boiled macaroni into rings, 3/8 inch long, and line the mold with them.
9. Fill with mixture of spinach.
10. Bake in oven in a pan of water until firm.
11. Turn on a serving dish and serve with tomato sauce.

title: Macaroni with Meat
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1 pint of chicken or beef stock
- 1 cupful of boiled chopped meat
- 1/2 pkg. of boiled spaghetti
- 1 beaten egg
- salt and pepper
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of 1 tablespoonful of butter, 1 tablespoonful of flour and 1 pint of chicken or beef stock.
2. Stir into the sauce 1 cupful of boiled chopped meat and 1/2 pkg. of boiled spaghetti cut in pieces.
3. Add 1 beaten egg and season with salt and pepper.
4. Pour the mixture into a buttered mould, sprinkle with bread crumbs and bake in oven 1/2 hour.

title: Macaroni with Tomato Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled macaroni
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- cheese crumbs
- strained tomato sauce
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Put a layer of boiled macaroni in a buttered mold.
2. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, onion juice and cheese crumbs.
3. Pour strained tomato sauce over.
4. Lay macaroni on tomato and fill the dish in this way having tomato on top.
5. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and dot with butter.
6. Bake in oven until the surface is browned.

title: Macaroni-soppa (Macaroni Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 ounce of macaroni
- 5 cupfuls of bouillon
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cook 1 ounce of macaroni for 20 minutes.
2. Drain, cut into small rings.
3. Heat 5 cupfuls of bouillon to the boiling-point.
4. Add the macaroni into it and let boil slowly for a few minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper.

title: Macaroons (Almond Pastries)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound of almond-paste
- 1/2 pound of sugar
- 3 whites of eggs

## Directions

1. Work almond-paste and sugar together on board.
2. Add 3 whites of eggs slowly and rub until smooth and even.
3. Drop with spoon on paper small cookies.
4. Put paper in a slow oven.
5. If not thick enough to hold together, the batter may be mixed with 1 tablespoonful of flour.

title: Maha-muhennus (Stomach Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1 cupful of milk
- salt
- pepper
- 1 teaspoonful of onion juice
- 1 cupful of cooked, cut stomach

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce with butter, flour and milk.
2. Season with salt, pepper and 1 teaspoonful of onion juice.
3. Add 1 cupful of cooked, cut stomach.
4. Heat over fire until the stomach pieces are warmed through.

title: Mahamuhennus (Stewed Tripe)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup milk
- salt
- pepper
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice
- 1 cup boiled tripe, cut in cubes

## Directions

1. Prepare a gravy of 1 tablespoon of butter, 1 tablespoon of flour and 1 cup of milk.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Flavor with 1 teaspoon of lemon juice.
4. Mix with 1 cup of boiled tripe cut in cubes.
5. Stir over the fire until thoroughly hot.
6. Serve immediately.

title: Mahasylkiraiihas-voileipiä (Sweetbread Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled cold sweetbreads
- mayonnaise
- buttered bread slices

## Directions

1. Chop boiled cold sweetbreads.
2. Add mayonnaise until of desired consistency.
3. Use for double sandwiches.

title: Mahasylkirauhanen (Sweetbreads)
body:
## Ingredients

- Sweetbreads
- Cold water

## Directions

1. Soak the sweetbreads in cold water for an hour, changing the water several times so as to draw the blood.
2. Put on the fire in cold water, cook for 20 minutes.
3. Return to cold water, remove the fiber and the skin.
4. When half cold, place under a light weight to make them even.

title: Mahasylkirauhanen maitosoosin kanssa (Sweetbreads with Milk Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 pint rich milk
- 2 boiled sweetbreads
- Salt and pepper
- Parsley

## Directions

1. Make a milk sauce of flour, butter and rich milk.
2. Cut boiled sweetbreads in pieces, mix with milk sauce.
3. Season with salt and pepper, add chopped parsley.
4. Serve.

title: Mahasylkirauhanen maitosoosin kera (Sweetbreads with Cream Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 pint of cream or milk
- two pairs of boiled sweetbreads
- salt
- pepper
- parsley

## Directions

1. Make a cream sauce with butter, flour and cream or milk
2. Cut the boiled sweetbreads into nice pieces
3. Add sweetbreads to the sauce
4. Season with salt and pepper and fine parsley
5. May also be prepared with chicken, using half boiled chicken and half sweetbreads
6. Mushrooms may be used with sweetbreads instead of chicken

title: Mahasylkirauhanen tomaattisoosin kanssa (Sweetbreads with Tomato Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- Sweetbreads
- Bacon
- Vegetables
- Bouillon
- Tomato or allemande sauce
- Boiled artichokes
- Rice
- Mushroom sauce
- Green peas

## Directions

1. Boil sweetbreads, put under a weight for awhile.
2. Cut lengthwise in two, place in a pan having a slice of bacon on each.
3. Cut some vegetables in pieces, add to the sweetbreads, pour some bouillon over.
4. Bake slowly basting often about 15 minutes.
5. Remove from the pan, cover with tomato or allemande sauce.
6. Arrange boiled artichokes on a foundation of rice.
7. Place the sweetbreads on the top.
8. Serve with mushroom sauce having the sauce in the center of the ring of rice and green peas around on the platter.

title: Mahasylkirauhanen tomaattisoosin kera (Sweetbreads with Tomato Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- sweetbreads
- pork
- vegetables
- meat stock
- tomato or allemande sauce
- rice
- artichokes

## Directions

1. Cook sweetbreads and put under weight for a short time
2. Cut in half lengthwise
3. Place a small slice of pork on each piece
4. Mince some vegetables and place in a pan
5. Pour meat stock over to cover the bottom
6. Let braise slowly in the oven, basting often, about 15 minutes
7. Pour tomato or allemande sauce over the top
8. Arrange on a rice base with boiled artichokes

title: Mahasylkirauhas-hyytelö (Sweetbread à la Gelatine)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups chopped sweetbreads
- 3 tablespoons dissolved gelatine
- 5 tablespoons whipped cream
- Salt
- Pepper
- Lemon juice

## Directions

1. Garnish small molds or a jelly mold.
2. Mix together the sweetbreads, gelatine, and lemon juice, adding the cream last of all.
3. Fill the molds with this mixture.
4. Serve unmolded with lettuce leaves.

title: Mahasylkirauhas-hyytelö (Sweetbread à la Gelatine)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cupfuls of chopped sweetbread
- 3 tablespoonfuls of dissolved gelatine
- 5 tablespoonfuls of whipped cream
- 1/2 cupful of sherry
- pepper and salt

## Directions

1. Garnish small molds or a big one
2. Mix all the above ingredients, adding cream last
3. Fill the molds with the mixture
4. Let thicken
5. Turn upon a serving dish
6. Serve with lettuce salad

title: Mahasylkirauhas-kotletti (Cutlets of Sweetbreads)
body:
## Ingredients

- Boiled sweetbreads
- Salt
- Pepper
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Butter
- Tomato sauce or creamed asparagus

## Directions

1. Cut boiled sweetbreads into round slices.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
4. Cook in butter not allowing to brown.
5. Serve with tomato sauce or creamed asparagus.

title: Mahasylkirauhas-mykyjä (Sweetbread Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- Boiled and fried sweetbreads
- Fritter batter
- Fat for frying
- Tomato sauce

## Directions

1. Cut boiled and fried sweetbreads into egg shaped pieces.
2. Dip in fritter batter.
3. Fry in deep fat.
4. Serve on a folded napkin with tomato sauce.

title: Mahasylkirauhas-palleroita (Croquettes of Sweetbreads)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound sweetbreads
- 2 ounces salted tongue
- 3 ounces mushrooms
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1/2 cup bouillon
- 1/2 cup cream
- 2 yolks of egg
- Salt
- Pepper

## Directions

1. Prepare boiled and butter-fried sweetbreads, tongue and mushrooms as indicated in the recipe.

title: Mahasylkirauhas-palleroita (Croquettes of Sweetbreads)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of sweetbreads
- 2 ozs. of salted tongue
- 3 ozs. of mushrooms
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1/2 cupful of meat stock
- 1/2 cupful of cream
- yolks of 2 eggs
- salt and pepper
- bread crumbs
- egg

## Directions

1. Chop boiled sweetbreads fried in butter, tongue and boiled mushrooms
2. Make a sauce of butter, flour and meat stock
3. Add cream and combine both mixtures
4. Mix with yolks of eggs and seasonings
5. Let cool and form into oblong croquettes
6. Dip in egg and bread crumbs, then in egg and bread crumbs again
7. Fry in fat

title: Mahasylkirauhas-timboli (Sweetbread Timbale)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cooked sweetbreads
- 1/2 cup chopped chicken breast
- 2 egg whites
- 1 1/2 cups whipping cream
- butter for molds
- butter
- flour
- chicken stock
- cream

## Directions

1. Rub the boiled sweetbreads through a sieve.
2. Have 1 cup of sweetbreads and 1/2 cup of chopped chicken breast, add the whites of 2 eggs and rub well.
3. Finally add 1 1/2 cups of whipping cream slowly to the mixture, stirring briskly.
4. Butter timbale molds and fill with the mousse.
5. Bake in oven in a pan of water covered with buttered paper until firm.
6. Serve with a sauce made of butter, flour, chicken stock and cream.

title: Mahasylkirauhas-Timboli (Sweetbread Timbales)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 kupillinen hienonnettua mahasylkirauhasta (1 cupful of minced sweetbread)
- ½ kupillista hienonnettua ja hakattua kanan rintalihaa (½ cupful of chopped chicken breast)
- 2 munanvalkuaista (2 whites of eggs)
- 1½ kupillista paksua kermaa (1½ cupfuls of rich cream)

## Directions

1. Rub the cooked sweetbreads through a sieve.
2. Mix well together the minced sweetbread and chopped chicken breast.
3. Rub the whites of eggs into the mixture.
4. Finally add the rich cream.
5. Butter the timbales and fill with this mixture.
6. Bake in oven in a pan of water, covered with a buttered paper, until firm.
7. Serve with a sauce made of butter, flour, chicken stock and cream.

title: Mahasylkirauhas-timboli Sienien kanssa (Sweetbread Timbale with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cooked sweetbreads
- 1/2 cup chopped mushrooms
- 1/2 cup bread crumbs soaked in cream
- 3 egg yolks
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- 3 egg whites
- butter for molds
- milk sauce

## Directions

1. Have 1/2 cup of chopped mushrooms to 1 cup of sweetbreads.
2. Add 1/2 cup of bread crumbs soaked in cream, 3 yolks of egg, salt, pepper and some onion juice.
3. Last of all add 3 whites of egg beaten firm.
4. Put into buttered timbale molds and bake in oven in a pan of water covered with buttered paper for 30 or 40 minutes.
5. Serve with milk sauce.

title: Mahasylkirauhassalaatti (Sweetbread Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- sweetbreads
- onion
- carrot
- celery
- French dressing
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Boil sweetbreads with onion, carrot and celery.
2. Let cool.
3. Cut in small pieces.
4. Mix with celery.
5. Mix with French dressing.
6. Garnish with mayonnaise.

title: Maissi Kakku (Corn Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 1 1/4 cupfuls of sugar
- 1 1/4 cupfuls of melted butter
- 1 lemon
- 2 tablespoonfuls of brandy
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 1 1/4 cupfuls of corn starch

## Directions

1. Beat yolks of eggs with sugar to a froth
2. Mix with melted creamed butter
3. Add lemon rind and juice, brandy and corn starch
4. Lastly add the beaten whites
5. Bake in a buttered mold

title: Maissi-putinki (Corn Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of corn
- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 3 eggs
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar

## Directions

1. Butter an individual mold
2. Mix corn with milk, eggs, butter, salt and sugar
3. Pour the mixture into the mold
4. Bake in a moderate oven until thick
5. Serve as a vegetable or dessert

title: Maissi-Timboli (Corn Timbale)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup fresh grated or canned corn
- 1/2 cup bread crumbs
- 2 or 3 egg yolks, beaten
- salt
- pepper
- some sugar
- 1 tablespoon melted butter
- egg whites, beaten firm
- milk or cream (if using fresh corn)

## Directions

1. Have 1 cup of fresh grated or canned corn, add 1/2 cup bread crumbs, 2 or 3 yolks of egg beaten, salt, pepper, some sugar and 1 tablespoon melted butter.
2. At the last add the whites of egg beaten firm.
3. When using fresh corn dilute with milk or cream or if necessary thicken with bread crumbs.
4. Bake in a pan of water covered with buttered paper until firm.
5. Serve unmolded.

title: Maissia papujen kanssa (Succotash)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled corn
- boiled lima beans in equal quantity
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Remove boiled corn from the cob, add an equal quantity of boiled lima beans.
2. Season with salt and pepper.

title: Maissikakku (Corn Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/4 cups cornmeal
- 1 1/2 cups white flour
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 1 1/2 cups milk
- 3 eggs
- 1/4 cup butter
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 4 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Sift together flour, salt and baking powder
2. Beat eggs with sugar, add milk and melted butter
3. Pour in the flour stirring well
4. Bake in a shallow tin in a hot oven

title: Maissikakkuja (Corn Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 10 ozs. of sugar
- 1/4 cupful of cream
- 3/4 teaspoonful of soda
- 3/4 lb. of butter
- 1/2 lb. of corn starch
- 1 1/4 lbs. of flour

## Directions

1. Beat eggs with sugar until light
2. Add cream, soda and corn starch
3. Wash butter, work to a cream and stir into the above mixture
4. Lastly mix with flour
5. Knead thoroughly
6. Roll into a thin sheet, perforate with fork and shape into round cookies
7. Bake on greased sheet in oven to a light brown

title: Maissileipää (Corn Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cornmeal
- 1 cup flour
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup milk
- 1 or 2 eggs
- 4 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix and sift together all the dry ingredients
2. Add the eggs beaten with sugar, milk and butter stirring well
3. Bake in a buttered shallow tin in a very hot oven for 20 or 30 minutes

title: Maissimykyjä No. 1 (Corn Fritters No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup grated fresh corn or canned corn rubbed through a sieve
- 2 tablespoons flour or 1 1/2 cup cracker crumbs diluted with milk
- 2 eggs, whites and yolks beaten separately
- salt
- pepper
- milk if needed

## Directions

1. Mix 1 cup of grated fresh corn or canned corn rubbed through a sieve with 2 tablespoons flour or 1 1/2 cup cracker crumbs diluted with milk, 2 eggs, whites and the yolks beaten separately, salt and pepper.
2. If too thick dilute with milk.
3. The whites of eggs added last of all.
4. Brown in a pan dropping the batter by the spoonful into the pan or cook in deep lard.

title: Maissimykyjä No. 2 (Corn Puffs No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup corn canned or fresh corn grated
- 4 tablespoons flour
- 1/4 teaspoon baking powder
- 2 eggs, whites and yolks beaten separately

## Directions

1. Take 1 cup of corn canned or fresh corn grated, add 4 tablespoons flour, 1/4 teaspoon baking powder, 2 eggs, the whites and yolks beaten separately.
2. Drop by the spoonful in boiling lard, cook until brown.
3. Or fry in a pan until brown on both sides.

title: Maissipannukakkuja (Corn Pancakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- ½ cup cornmeal
- 1 or 2 eggs
- 2½ cups milk
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- 1½ teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Scald the milk with the cornmeal, add melted butter, eggs beaten to a froth, salt and flour mixed with baking powder.
2. If the cornmeal is used without being scalded first, sift together all the dry ingredients, add eggs and milk.
3. Fry in a frying pan.

title: Maissiputinki (Corn Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups corn canned or fresh corn grated
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 cups milk
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 3 eggs beaten

## Directions

1. Mix 2 cups of corn canned or fresh corn grated, 1 tablespoon butter, 2 tablespoons flour, 2 cups milk, 1/4 teaspoon salt, 1 tablespoon sugar, and 3 eggs beaten in order given.
2. Bake in oven in a pan of water.
3. The flour can be left out of the mixture and less milk used, if less eggs are used.

title: Maito Toasti (Milk Toast)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- butter
- salt
- hot milk

## Directions

1. Toast bread, spread with butter, dust with salt.
2. Pile in a serving dish, pour a little hot milk over it.
3. Cover and let stand in a hot place or in oven for a few minutes.
4. Pour boiling milk on the soaked toast just before you send it to the table.

title: Maito-toasti (Milk Toast)
body:
## Ingredients

- Toast bread
- Butter
- Salt
- Hot milk

## Directions

1. Toast bread
2. Spread with butter and a dash of salt
3. Pile in a serving dish
4. Pour some scalded milk over
5. Let stand covered in a hot place or in oven for a few minutes
6. Pour boiling milk on the soaked toast just before serving

title: Maitoleipä (Milk Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- milk or equal parts of water and milk
- 1 tablespoon butter or lard
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1/2 cake of yeast
- 6 or 6 1/2 cups flour

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed for water bread. Instead of water use milk or equal parts of water and milk.

title: Majoneesi Kastike (Mayonnaise Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg yolk
- 3/4 cup salad oil
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- 1/2 tablespoon tarragon vinegar
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- a little cayenne
- 1/2 teaspoon mustard (dry)

## Directions

1. Put the mustard in a bowl and mix with the egg yolk
2. Add the oil very gradually at first
3. When it begins to thicken, add a little lemon juice and vinegar
4. Finally season with salt and pepper
5. If it curdles, take one egg yolk and gradually mix in the curdled mayonnaise
6. To make white mayonnaise, add 1/2 cup of well-whipped cream just before serving
7. To color green, pound spinach leaves, watercress, and parsley leaves with a little lemon juice in a mortar, press and add the juice to the mayonnaise

title: Majoneesikastike No. 1 (Mayonnaise Dressing No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg yolk
- 3/4 cup salad oil
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- 1/2 tablespoon Tarragon vinegar
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 teaspoon mustard powder
- cayenne pepper

## Directions

1. Put mustard in a bowl and mix with egg yolk.
2. Add oil very gradually at first, drop by drop.
3. When it begins to thicken, add lemon juice and vinegar.
4. Season with salt and pepper at the end.
5. If dressing curdles, add it slowly to an egg yolk.
6. For white mayonnaise, add 1/2 cup whipped cream shortly before serving.
7. For green mayonnaise, pound spinach leaves, parsley, watercress and lemon juice in a mortar, extract juice and add to dressing.
8. For red mayonnaise, add strained tomato puree.

title: Majoneesikastike No. 2 (Mayonnaise Dressing No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 yolk of a hard cooked egg
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 teaspoon mustard
- a dash of sugar
- 1 raw egg yolk
- 1 1/2 cups salad oil
- 4 tablespoons lemon juice

## Directions

1. Rub well the yolk of a hard cooked egg
2. Add 1 teaspoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon mustard and a dash of sugar
3. Mix with 1 raw egg yolk and stir well
4. Pour gradually into the mixture 1 1/2 cups of salad oil, drop by drop at first, stir thoroughly
5. Add 4 tablespoons of lemon juice
6. Mix with whipped cream when served

title: Majoneesikastike No. 2 (Mayonnaise Dressing No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 hard boiled egg yolk
- 1 raw egg yolk
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 teaspoon mustard
- sugar
- 1 1/2 cups salad oil
- 4 tablespoons lemon juice

## Directions

1. Rub hard boiled egg yolk well.
2. Add salt, mustard, and a little sugar.
3. Mix in raw egg yolk and beat well.
4. Pour salad oil gradually, at first drop by drop while stirring well, about 1 1/2 cups total.
5. Add lemon juice or to taste (4 tablespoons).

title: Makaaroonimuhennos (Stewed Macaroni)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound macaroni cut into pieces
- salted water
- 1/2 onion
- 1/2 green pepper
- 1 small carrot
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 quart fresh tomatoes or 2 cups canned tomatoes
- 1/2 cup water or bouillon
- salt
- 4 tablespoons chopped mushrooms
- cheese

## Directions

1. Boil macaroni in salted water for 20 minutes
2. Drain and rinse with cold water
3. Brown butter with onion, green pepper and carrot cut in pieces
4. Thicken with flour and stir well
5. Add fresh tomatoes and water or bouillon
6. Season with salt
7. Let simmer for 30 to 40 minutes
8. Strain the sauce
9. Add chopped mushrooms to the sauce and cook for 5 minutes
10. Mix with the macaroni
11. Sprinkle with cheese

title: Makarooni-Muhennus (Stewed Macaroni)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound of macaroni
- salted water
- 1/2 onion
- 1/2 green pepper
- 1 small carrot
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 quart of fresh tomatoes
- 1/2 cupful of water
- salt
- 4 tablespoonfuls of mushrooms
- 2 tablespoonfuls of grated cheese

## Directions

1. Cook 1/2 pound of macaroni cut in pieces in salted water and drain.
2. Fry 1/2 onion, 1/2 green pepper and 1 small carrot paloiteltuna in 2 tablespoonfuls of butter until brown.
3. Add 2 tablespoonfuls of flour and stir thoroughly.
4. Add 1 quart of fresh tomatoes paloiteltuna and 1/2 cupful of water.
5. Season with salt and let simmer slowly 30-40 minutes.
6. Strain and add 4 tablespoonfuls of chopped mushrooms and let boil five minutes.
7. Add 2 tablespoonfuls of grated cheese and pour over the macaroni.

title: Makarooni-Timboli Farcie (Macaroni Timbale Farce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1/2 teaspoon onion
- 3/4 tablespoon flour
- 1 tablespoon chopped mushrooms
- 1/2 cup bouillon
- salt
- nutmeg
- 1 cup chopped spinach
- 1 egg yolk
- boiled macaroni

## Directions

1. Cook and chop spinach.
2. Cook 1 tablespoon of butter with 1/2 teaspoon onion, add 3/4 tablespoon flour, 1 tablespoon chopped mushrooms, 1/2 cup bouillon, salt, nutmeg and 1 cup chopped spinach; bring quickly to boiling, add 1 yolk of egg.
3. Butter small molds or a large one, cut boiled macaroni in 1/4 inch long rings; line the mold with macaroni.
4. Fill with spinach mixture.
5. Bake in oven in a pan of water until firm.
6. Unmold onto a platter.
7. Serve with tomato sauce.

title: Makarooni-Timboli Farcie (Stuffed Macaroni Timbale)
body:
## Ingredients

- pinaatti (spinach)
- 1 ruokalusikallista voita (1 tablespoonful of butter)
- ½ teelusikas sipulia (½ teaspoonful of onion)
- ½ ruokalusikallista jauhoja (½ tablespoonful of flour)
- 1 ruokalusikallista sieniä hienonnettuna (1 tablespoonful of minced mushrooms)
- ½ kupillista lihalientä (½ cupful of meat stock)
- suolaa, muskottipähkinää (salt, nutmeg)
- 1 kupillista hienonnettua pinaattia (1 cupful of minced spinach)
- 1 munanruskuainen (1 egg yolk)
- keitetyt makaroonit (cooked macaroni)

## Directions

1. Cook the spinach and mince it.
2. Heat 1 tablespoonful of butter with ½ teaspoonful of onion.
3. Add ½ tablespoonful of flour and 1 tablespoonful of minced mushrooms.
4. Add ½ cupful of meat stock.
5. Season with salt and nutmeg.
6. Add 1 cupful of minced spinach and let it boil.
7. Add 1 egg yolk.
8. Butter small timbale molds or one large mold.
9. Cut cooked macaroni into ¾ inch pieces, shaped into rings to line the edge of the mold.
10. Fill the mold with the spinach mixture.
11. Bake in oven in a pan of water until it feels firm.
12. Turn out onto a plate and serve with tomato sauce.

title: Makaroonia lihan kanssa (Macaroni with Meat)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 2 cups chicken or meat stock
- 1 cup cooked ground meat
- 3/4 pound boiled macaroni
- 1 egg
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and stock
2. Add to the sauce the cooked ground meat and boiled macaroni
3. Mix in the beaten egg
4. Pour the mixture into a buttered mold
5. Sprinkle with bread crumbs
6. Bake in the oven for about 3/4 hour

title: Makaroonia munien kanssa (Eggs with Macaroni)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 ozs. macaroni
- 4 eggs
- 1/2 onion or some grated cheese
- 1 cup milk
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Break the macaroni in pieces, boil with a dash of salt, drain.
2. Butter an omelet pan, lay the macaroni on the bottom.
3. Spread the chopped onion fried in butter or the grated cheese on the macaroni.
4. Beat the eggs, season and add the milk.
5. Pour over the macaroni.
6. Bake until set.
7. May be served with or without vegetables.

title: Makaroonia sienien kanssa (Macaroni with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled macaroni
- butter
- mushrooms
- tomato
- cream or milk
- 1 egg

## Directions

1. Line the bottom of a well buttered mold with a layer of cooked macaroni
2. Add a thick layer of boiled or raw mushrooms
3. Fill the mold with layers of macaroni and mushrooms
4. Have a layer of tomato on top
5. Pour over milk or cream mixed with an egg
6. Bake in a pan of water covered
7. Remove the cover to brown the top of the dish

title: Makaroonia tomaattikastikkeen kanssa (Macaroni with Tomato Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled macaroni
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- cheese
- strained tomato sauce
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Put a layer of boiled macaroni into a buttered mold
2. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, onion juice and cheese
3. Cover with strained tomato sauce
4. Add another layer of macaroni and continue until the mold is full
5. Have a layer of tomato on top
6. Sprinkle bread crumbs on top and dot with butter
7. Bake in the oven until the surface is brown

title: Makaroonia tomaattikastikkeen kanssa (Macaroni with Tomato)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled macaroni
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- grated cheese
- strained tomato sauce
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Put a layer of boiled macaroni into a buttered mold
2. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, onion juice and cheese
3. Cover with strained tomato sauce
4. Put another layer of macaroni and continue until the mold is full
5. The top layer should be tomato
6. Sprinkle bread crumbs and butter pieces on top
7. Bake in oven until the top is brown

title: Makeat pannukakut (Sweet Pancakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1/2 or 3/4 cup flour
- 1 tablespoon melted butter
- salt

## Directions

1. Beat egg yolks to a froth, add milk, salt, butter and flour
2. Last of all mix with the stiffly beaten egg whites
3. Fry thin pancakes in plenty of butter
4. Spread with jelly or jam, roll up
5. Serve immediately

title: Makeat pannukakut (Sweet Pancakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 1/2 to 2/3 cupful of flour
- a little salt

## Directions

1. Whip yolks and sugar until light, add flour, salt and melted butter.
2. Lastly add whites, beaten stiff.
3. Fry thin pancakes, cover with jelly or jam, roll together and serve hot.
4. The batter may be made thicker or thinner if preferred.
5. Pancakes may be made of cream without butter.

title: Makeita perunoita au Gratin (Sweet Potatoes au Gratin)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 cold boiled sweet potatoes
- Butter
- Salt
- Pepper
- 1 tablespoon brown sugar
- Bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Cut sweet potatoes in cubes
2. Place into a buttered mold
3. Sprinkle with salt, pepper and a tablespoon of brown sugar
4. Dot with butter, dredge with bread crumbs
