5. Bake covered for 20 minutes
6. Uncover and continue baking until brown on top

title: Makeita Rinkeliä (Sweet Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 glass of egg
- 1 glass of sugar
- 1 glass of milk
- 1 glass of melted butter
- 1 cake of yeast
- wheat flour to make a moderately thick mixture
- egg for brushing
- coarse sugar
- chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Prepare the dough as for ordinary tea-ring.
2. Let it rise and shape small rings from it.
3. When risen, brush them with egg.
4. Sprinkle coarse sugar and chopped almonds on top.
5. Bake in the oven for about 10 minutes.

title: Makeita S:iä (Sweet S's)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 pound butter
- 1/2 pound sugar
- 3 eggs
- 1 cup almonds
- 3/4 teaspoon soda
- 1 pound flour

## Directions

1. Prepare a batter from the ingredients in order given
2. Mix in blanched and chopped almonds
3. Mix soda with flour and combine with batter
4. Force through a pastry bag onto a buttered baking sheet, forming cookies in the shape of an S
5. Bake

title: Makeita S:iä (Sweet S:es)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 lb. of butter
- 1/2 lb. of sugar
- 3 eggs
- 1 cupful of almonds
- 1/2 teaspoonful of soda
- 1 lb. of flour

## Directions

1. Prepare batter
2. Mix the batter with peeled and chopped almonds and soda mixed with flour
3. Form into cookies and bake like the corn cookies

title: Maksa Savustetun Silavan Kera (Liver and Bacon)
body:
## Ingredients

- liver
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- bacon
- meat stock

## Directions

1. Cut liver in slices, sprinkle with salt and pepper and dip in flour.
2. Fry thin slices of bacon twice as many as you have slices of liver.
3. Remove the bacon from the pan.
4. Fry the liver slowly in drippings, turning often until done.
5. Pour meat stock into the pan and let boil.
6. Arrange with liver in the center and strain the gravy over the meat.

title: Maksa-Laatikko (Liver Casserole)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ cups rice groats
- 1 pint water
- 1 quart milk
- 1 pound liver
- 1 egg
- 3 tablespoonfuls butter
- 1½ tablespoonfuls sugar
- 1 tablespoonful salt
- ½ onion
- pepper

## Directions

1. Cook rice groats, water and milk into porridge and pour to cool.
2. Mix ground liver with the porridge.
3. Add beaten egg, finely chopped onion fried in butter, sugar, salt and pepper.
4. Pour the mixture into a buttered mold and bake 1 hour.
5. A few raisins added to the mixture gives good flavor.
6. Serve with melted butter sauce.

title: Maksaa savustetun silavan kanssa (Liver and Bacon)
body:
## Ingredients

- Liver
- Salt
- Pepper
- Flour
- Bacon
- Bouillon or water
- Onion (optional)

## Directions

1. Slice the liver, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Dip in flour.
3. Fry thin slices of bacon, twice as many as you have slices of liver.
4. Remove the bacon from the pan.
5. Fry the liver in drippings slowly and turning often until done.
6. Add some bouillon, bring to boiling.
7. Dish, having the liver in center and strain the gravy over.
8. Liver may be fried with onion; have the onion removed before serving.

title: Maksalaatikko (Liver Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups rice
- 1 pint water
- 1 quart milk
- 1 pound liver
- 1 or 2 eggs
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon sugar or raisins
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 1/4 onion
- Pepper

## Directions

1. Cook a porridge of rice, water and milk.
2. Put aside to cool.
3. Mix with ground liver, beaten eggs, onion fried in butter, sugar and spices.
4. If the mixture appears stiff, add more milk.
5. Pour into a buttered mold.
6. Bake for an hour.
7. The liver may be parboiled before grinding to make the grinding easier.
8. Add raisins according to taste for flavor.

title: Maksapuuro (Liver Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cupfuls of rice
- 1 pint of water
- 1 quart of milk
- 1 lb. of liver
- 1 egg
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 1/2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 3/4 onion
- a pinch of pepper

## Directions

1. Cook a batter of rice, water and milk.
2. Put aside to cool.
3. Mix ground liver with batter, add beaten egg, chopped onion fried in butter, sugar, salt and pepper.
4. Turn the mixture in a buttered mold.
5. Bake 1 hour.
6. Flavor with raisins if desired.
7. Serve with melted butter.

title: Malassi-kakku (Molasses Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup boiling water or milk
- 1/4 cup butter
- 3/4 cup lard
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- 2 eggs
- 1 heaping teaspoon soda
- Cinnamon, ginger and mace, 1/2 teaspoon each

## Directions

1. Beat well together molasses, sugar and water
2. Add butter and lard melted
3. Add eggs beaten to a froth
4. Add spices
5. Add soda dissolved in hot water and flour
6. Bake in a hot oven

title: Malassikakkuja No. 1 (Molasses Cookies No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 cups molasses
- 3/4 cup cream
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1/2 tablespoon cardamom
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- 4 eggs
- 2 1/2 pounds flour

## Directions

1. Boil up molasses with butter, sugar, cream and spices
2. Sift flour
3. Put one-half of flour into a bowl, add gradually to the flour the cooled molasses mixture
4. Beat eggs, add to the mixture above
5. Mix in stirring well lemon juice and soda mixed with the remaining flour
6. Let stand over night
7. Roll thin, cut with a round cutter in small cookies
8. Bake in a moderate oven

title: Malassikakkuja No. 2 (Molasses Cookies No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups molasses
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup lard
- 1 cup cold coffee
- 3 teaspoons ginger
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 10 cups flour
- Some salt

## Directions

1. Warm up molasses
2. Add lard, butter and sugar
3. Rub well
4. Mix in coffee, spices and flour
5. Roll thin, cut in cookies with a round cutter
6. Bake in a hot oven

title: Mansikat Riisien Kanssa (Strawberries with Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 pound of rice
- 1 lemon
- 1 orange
- sugar
- water
- small strawberries
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Wash 3/4 pound of rice and cook until soft in deep water, mixed with juice of 1 lemon
2. Turn in a dish and pour liquor, made of sugar and water, on them
3. Mix with lemon- and orange rinds
4. When cold, put layers of rice and small strawberries alternately in a mold
5. Pour syrup on them and set to harden
6. Serve garnished with whipped cream

title: Mansikka Kermajäätelö I (Strawberry Ice Cream I)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of cream
- 1 basket of strawberries
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice

## Directions

1. Wash strawberries and let stand in sugar 1 hour.
2. Mash and force through a cloth.
3. Add cream and lemon juice.
4. Freeze.

title: Mansikka Muusi (Strawberry Mousse)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cupfuls of cream
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of strawberries, juice and pulp
- 1 3/4 cupful of sugar
- juice of 1/2 lemon
- 7 leaves or 5 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- whole strawberries for garnish

## Directions

1. Mix strawberries with sugar, let stand 1/2 hour
2. Add lemon juice and gelatine, dissolved
3. When the mixture begins to thicken add whipped cream into it
4. Pour in a mold to get firm
5. Serve unmolded, garnished around with whole strawberries

title: Mansikka- ja ananasjämi (Strawberry and Pineapple Jam)
body:
## Ingredients

- Equal parts of strawberries and pineapples
- 8 cups sugar to 10 cups fruit

## Directions

1. Pare and core pineapples, grind coarse.
2. Have equal parts of strawberries and pineapples.
3. Put into a kettle in layers, let stand for a few hours.
4. Simmer until clear and thick.
5. Keep in glass jars.

title: Mansikka-Kermajäätelö (Strawberry Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart cream
- 1 box strawberries
- 1½ cups sugar
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- Juice of 1½ lemon
- 4 egg yolks
- Salt

## Directions

1. Scald 1½ pint of cream or milk.
2. Beat ¾ cup of sugar with the egg yolks, add slowly the scalded milk, stir in a double boiler until thick.
3. When cooled down, add the strawberries (that have to be washed, let stand in the rest of the sugar and rubbed through a sieve).
4. Mix with vanilla and lemon juice.
5. Freeze.
6. May be prepared without eggs.

title: Mansikka-muusi (Strawberry Mousse)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups cream
- 1 1/2 cups strawberries, juice and pulp
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- 1/2 package gelatine
- Vanilla

## Directions

1. Mix the sugar with the strawberries, let stand for 1/2 hour.
2. Add the lemon juice and the dissolved gelatine.
3. When the mixture begins to thicken, add the whipped cream.
4. Pour into a mold to set.
5. Serve unmolded garnished with cream and strawberries.

title: Mansikka-Vesihyytelö (Strawberry Ice)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups water
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 quart strawberries
- 2 tablespoons lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cook sugar and water for 15 minutes
2. Press strawberries through a cloth into the syrup
3. Flavor with lemon juice
4. Freeze

title: Mansikkahillo (Strawberry Compote)
body:
## Ingredients

- Strawberries
- Sugar equal in weight to strawberries

## Directions

1. Clean strawberries and weigh.
2. Have sugar and berries in equal parts.
3. Lay sugar and berries alternately into a jar.
4. Put aside until next day.
5. Place into a kettle.
6. Simmer on a slow fire skimming carefully and shaking the kettle.
7. When the berries are cleared and the scum no longer rises to the surface pour the compote into a dry jar.
8. Seal when cooled.

title: Mansikkahilloke (Strawberry Jam)
body:
## Ingredients

- strawberries
- sugar
- water

## Directions

1. Choose nice berries, wash and remove the stems.
2. Allow 1 pound sugar to 1 quart berries.
3. Lay into a kettle, crush lightly or let stand in the kettle over night.
4. Simmer until clear, skimming carefully.
5. Pour into glass jars while hot.
6. Seal as directed.

title: Mansikkakakku (Strawberry Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart strawberries
- 5 egg yolks
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- egg whites

## Directions

1. Mash 1 quart of strawberries.
2. Beat 5 egg yolks with 3/4 cup of sugar, add to the strawberries.
3. Mix in 1 cup of bread crumbs.
4. Last of all add the whites beaten stiff.
5. Bake in a crockery mold.
6. Serve cold with cream.

title: Mansikkakakku (Strawberry Shortcake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup milk
- 1 egg
- 1/4 cup butter

## Directions

1. Mix together all the dry ingredients in a bowl.
2. Work in the butter with finger tips; add milk.
3. Bake in 2 cake tins in oven for 20 minutes.
4. Wash the strawberries, sweeten with sugar.
5. Have a layer of strawberries between and on top of the cakes.
6. Cover with whipped cream.

title: Mansikkakakku kylmänä (Strawberry Layer Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 3 egg yolks
- 1/2 cup milk
- 1 1/2 to 2 cups flour
- 1/2 teaspoon cream of tartar
- 1/4 teaspoon soda
- 3 egg whites
- whipped cream
- sugar
- vanilla
- strawberries

## Directions

1. Rub 1 cup of sugar with 1/2 cup of butter until creamy.
2. Add 3 egg yolks one by one, stirring well.
3. Add 1/2 cup milk, 1 1/2 to 2 cups flour, 1/2 teaspoon cream of tartar, and 1/4 teaspoon soda (cream of tartar and soda dissolved in milk).
4. Last mix with 3 egg whites beaten until firm.
5. Butter 3 layer cake tins, pour the mixture into the tins and bake.
6. When cool, spread with whipped cream mixed with some sugar and vanilla.
7. Lay strawberries cut in halves on top and sprinkle with sugar.
8. Pile onto a platter.
9. Serve immediately.

title: Mansikkakastike (Strawberry Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup water
- 2 cups strawberries pressed through a sieve
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Cook for 10 minutes 1 cup sugar in 1/2 cup water
2. When cool, add 2 cups of strawberries pressed through a sieve
3. Flavor with vanilla
4. Whipped cream may be added, if desired

title: Mansikkakastike Jäätelölle (Strawberry Sauce for Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup water
- 2 cups crushed strawberries

## Directions

1. Cook sugar in water for 5-8 minutes
2. Let cool
3. Add 2 cups crushed strawberries
4. Serve with vanilla ice cream

title: Mansikkamehua (Strawberry Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 pounds strawberries
- 2 quarts water
- 2 ounces wine acid

## Directions

1. Dissolve 2 ounces wine acid in 1 quart water
2. Put the strawberries into a glass jar, pour the water mixed with wine acid over
3. Cover tight
4. Let stand in a cold place for 24 hours
5. Strain through a cloth without pressing the cloth
6. Weigh the juice, allow an equal amount of sugar, mix in the juice
7. Bottle up when the sugar is dissolved

title: Mansikkamehua (Strawberry Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 pounds strawberries
- 2 quarts water
- 2 ozs. wine-acid
- 1 quart water for dissolving wine-acid
- sugar equal in weight to juice

## Directions

1. Allow 6 pounds of strawberries to 2 quarts of water and 2 ozs. of wine-acid, dissolved in 1 quart of water
2. Pour water and dissolved wine-acid on strawberries in a glass jar and let stand well covered in a cold place 24 hours
3. Pour on a cloth and let drain without stirring
4. Weigh the juice, mix with equal part of sugar
5. Bottle, when the sugar has dissolved

title: Mansikkapiirakka (Strawberry Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- strawberries
- sugar
- lemon juice
- pastry for two crusts

## Directions

1. Cut strawberries in halves, let stand mixed with sugar and lemon juice for 1 hour.
2. Cover a pie plate with pastry, fill with the strawberries.
3. Lay the upper crust on.
4. Bake.

title: Mansikoita riisien kanssa (Strawberries with Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 pound rice
- 1 lemon juice
- Sugar
- Water
- Rind of 1 lemon
- Rind of 1 orange
- Small strawberries
- Whipped cream

## Directions

1. Cook 1/4 pound rice until tender in deep water mixed with the juice of 1 lemon.
2. Turn into a dish, pour syrup made of sugar and water over, add the rinds of a lemon and an orange.
3. When cool lay alternately rice and small strawberries into a mold.
4. Pour thick syrup over, let harden.
5. Garnish with whipped cream.

title: Manteli Kakku (Almond Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- ¾ cupful of butter
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 6 tablespoonfuls of cream
- 4 eggs
- 1 cupful of flour
- ¼ lb. of almonds
- 1 teaspoonful of baking powder

## Directions

1. Shell almonds and grind them finely.
2. Beat egg yolks and sugar to a froth.
3. Add cream, butter, flour, baking powder, almonds and finally the stiffly beaten egg whites.
4. Pour the mixture in a buttered mold or small molds and bake in a moderate oven.

title: Manteli-Kermajäätelö (Almond Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart cream
- 4 egg yolks
- ½ pound sugar
- ½ pound almonds
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Blanch and grate or pound the almonds.
2. Cook in 1 pint of cream.
3. Beat the egg yolks with the sugar, add gradually the scalded cream, beat in a double boiler over the fire until thick.
4. When cool add the remaining cream and freeze.
5. The almonds may be browned with sugar in a frying-pan and chopped, if brown colored ice cream is preferred.

title: Manteli-leivoksia (Macaroons)
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ pound almond paste
- ½ pound sugar
- 3 egg whites
- 1 tablespoon flour (if needed)

## Directions

1. Work almond paste and sugar together on the baking board.
2. Add slowly 3 egg whites.
3. Rub until the mixture is smooth.
4. Drop by the tiny spoonful on paper.
5. Place the paper on a baking sheet.
6. Bake in a slow oven.
7. If not thick enough to hold together, the batter may be mixed with 1 tablespoon flour.
8. Instead of almonds, chopped walnuts, hickory nuts, cocoanut, dates, raisins, figs and prunes may be used plain or mixed.

title: Manteli-marengeja (Almond Meringue)
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ pound almonds
- 8 tablespoons powdered sugar
- 1 egg white

## Directions

1. Blanch the almonds and cut in pieces.
2. Beat the egg white until firm.
3. Add the sugar and the almonds.
4. Drop by the spoonful on a baking sheet.
5. Bake in a slow oven until light brown and hard.
6. Chopped dates may be used in almond meringue.

title: Manteli-omeletti (Almond Omelet)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 4 tablespoons milk
- 1 tablespoon flour
- sugar
- vanilla
- chopped almonds
- fine sugar

## Directions

1. Beat separately whites and yolks of 4 eggs.
2. Mix the yolks with 2 tablespoons of butter, 4 tablespoons of milk, 1 tablespoon of flour, some sugar and vanilla.
3. Whisk together.
4. Last of all stir in the whites beaten stiff.
5. Fry on a slow fire or bake.
6. Lay chopped almonds on one half, fold once.
7. The chopped almonds will look nice if fried in butter.
8. Sprinkle with almonds and sugar.
9. Serve with fruit sauce hot or cold.

title: Marengeja (Meringue)
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 egg whites
- ½ pound granulated sugar
- ½ pound powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Beat the whites to a stiff froth.
2. Add gradually the sugar sifted several times.
3. May be flavored with vanilla, lemon or orange.
4. Drop by the spoonful or force through a pastry bag on paper.
5. Place the paper on a baking sheet.
6. Bake in a slow oven.
7. When light brown and hard, remove from the oven and let cool.
8. Remove from the paper with a knife.
9. Put two together filling them with whipped cream flavored with vanilla, lemon, chocolate, jam etc.

title: Marmori Kakku (Marble Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ cupful of butter
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 4 egg yolks
- ½ cupful of milk
- 2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder
- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla or lemon juice
- egg whites

## Directions

1. For white part: Rub ½ cupful of butter and 1 cupful of sugar to a cream, add 4 well-beaten yolks of eggs, ½ cupful of milk, 2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder mixed with 2 cupfuls of flour and 1 teaspoonful of vanilla or lemon juice. Lastly stir the stiffly beaten whites of eggs into the mixture. If white batter is preferred, leave out the yolks of eggs.
2. For dark part: Work ½ cupful of butter and 1 cupful of brown sugar to a cream, add well-beaten yolks of eggs, ½ cupfuls of molasses, ½ cupful of milk, 1 teaspoonful of soda, cinnamon, cloves and nutmeg, ½ teaspoonful of each, and 2 cupfuls of flour; lastly whites, beaten to a froth. Or use for the dark part the same mixture as for the white part mixed with 1½ ozs. of melted chocolate.
3. Butter a mold and lay a spoonful of both mixtures alternately in it to resemble marble.
4. Bake in a buttered mold in a moderate oven.

title: Marmorikakku (Marble Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- White part: 1/2 cup butter, 1 cup sugar, 4 egg yolks, 1/2 cup milk, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1 1/2 cups flour, 1 teaspoon vanilla or lemon juice
- Dark part: 1/2 cup butter, 1 cup brown sugar, 4 egg yolks, 1/2 cup molasses, 1/2 cup milk, 1 teaspoon soda, 1/2 teaspoon each cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg, 2 cups flour

## Directions

1. For the white part: Rub butter with sugar until creamy, add egg yolks beaten to a froth, milk, baking powder sifted with flour, and vanilla or lemon juice, then fold in beaten egg whites
2. For the dark part: Rub butter with brown sugar until creamy, add egg yolks beaten to a froth, molasses, milk, soda, and spices mixed with flour, then fold in beaten egg whites
3. Alternatively, the dark part may be made by adding 1 1/2 ounces melted chocolate to the white part
4. Butter a tin and lay in both mixtures by the spoonful alternately so as to resemble marble

title: Marrow Bone
body:
## Ingredients

- Marrow bones
- Cold water
- Thick batter
- Meat stock
- Parsley
- Lettuce
- Toast
- Butter

## Directions

1. Saw marrow bone into pieces 2-3 inches long.
2. Scrape the meat off carefully and put the bones into cold water for half an hour.
3. Cover both ends with a thick batter and tie a clean cloth around them.
4. Put in a kettle into boiling meat stock and let simmer 1½ hours.
5. Remove the cloth and the batter.
6. Place the marrowbones on buttered toast.
7. Garnish with parsley and lettuce and serve while very hot.

title: Marrow Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of bread crumbs
- 4 eggs
- 1 pint of rich milk
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 6 ozs. of marrow
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1/4 lb. of almonds
- 1 cupful of raisins
- 1/2 pint of cream

## Directions

1. Soak bread crumbs in a mixture of egg and milk.
2. Flavor.
3. Chop marrow fine, mix with flour, add into the bread mixture, then put raisins, almonds and sugar into it.
4. Pour the mixture in a buttered mold, sprinkle with bread.
5. Bake in oven about one hour.
6. Serve with wine sauce.

title: Marrow Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- marrow bones
- thick dough (flour and water)
- salt
- pepper
- toast

## Directions

1. Spread a thick dough (made of flour and water) on each end of marrow bone to keep the marrow in while cooking.
2. Put the marrow bones on the fire in boiling water; let boil 1-2 hours.
3. Spread the toast with the marrow, dust with salt and pepper.
4. Put the toast in oven for two minutes, to heat them.

title: Marrow Sandwiches (Another Way)
body:
## Ingredients

- marrow
- pickled onion
- parsley
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- toast

## Directions

1. Mix the marrow, before spreading it on the toast, with a little pickled onion and parsley, finely minced.
2. Season with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
3. Spread on toast and serve very hot.

title: Martha Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 9 ozs. of flour
- 2 ozs. of almonds
- 1/4 pound of butter
- 4 ozs. of seeded raisins
- 1 cake of yeast
- 1/4 pound of sugar
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 2 cupfuls of lukewarm milk
- 1/4 yellow lemon rind

## Directions

1. Peel and chop almonds.
2. Mix flour, salt, raisins and almonds thoroughly together in a bowl.
3. Add grated lemon rind.
4. Rub yeast to a powder, mix with sugar, stir into milk, then add mixture of the dry ingredients into it.
5. Beat eggs and sugar until light, work butter to a cream.
6. Combine all the above mixtures.
7. Knead the dough well and put in a buttered mold to rise to double its size.
8. Bake in the oven for about an hour.
9. Turn out from mold, brush with butter and sprinkle a little sugar on top.

title: Maryland kana (Maryland Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- two chickens
- salt
- pepper
- bread crumbs
- egg
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Clean and dissect two chickens.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Dip in bread crumbs, in egg and again in bread crumbs.
4. Fry in butter or bake in oven about half an hour.
5. Pour a cream sauce on a serving dish and arrange the chicken upon it.
6. Place thin slices of fried bacon on the chicken and garnish with corn fritters.

title: Maryland-kana (Maryland Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 chickens
- salt
- pepper
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter
- milk sauce
- smoked bacon slices
- corn fritters

## Directions

1. Clean 2 chickens and cut in pieces.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
4. Fry in butter or roast for 1/2 hour.
5. Pour milk sauce on a serving dish.
6. Arrange the pieces of chickens on the sauce.
7. Have slices of fried bacon on top of the meat and corn fritters around.

title: Mashed Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- pared boiled potatoes
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- milk
- cream

## Directions

1. Mash pared boiled potatoes
2. Add butter, salt, pepper, milk and cream
3. Rub to a smooth paste
4. Heap in a serving dish, trim nicely with knife

title: Mashed Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- milk
- cream

## Directions

1. Mash pared boiled potatoes.
2. Add butter, salt, pepper, milk and cream.
3. Rub to a smooth paste.
4. Heap in a serving dish, trim nicely with knife.
5. Or work through a potato press into a serving dish.

title: Mashed Sweet Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- sweet potatoes
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- salt
- pepper
- hot milk

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes, mash.
2. Add 3 tablespoonfuls of butter, salt, pepper and hot milk.
3. Stir until smooth dough.

title: Mauste Piparkakkuja (Spice Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 1/2 lb. of sugar
- 1 lb. of molasses
- 8 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 1 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- 1 teaspoonful of ginger
- 1 teaspoonful of cardamom
- 1/2 teaspoonful of cloves
- 1/2 teaspoonful of pepper
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon rind
- 2 lbs. of flour

## Directions

1. Whip eggs with sugar.
2. Mix with molasses, butter, spices and flour.
3. Roll thinly and shape into round cookies.
4. Bake in a moderate oven.
5. If allowed to stand in cold place a little while, the dough is better to handle.

title: Mauste-piparkakkuja No. 1 (Spice Cookies No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 2 cups brown sugar
- 8 tablespoons melted butter
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon cardamom
- 1/2 teaspoon cloves
- 1/2 teaspoon pepper
- 1/2 tablespoon lemon rind
- 8 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Beat eggs and sugar
2. Mix in butter, spices and flour
3. Roll dough thin
4. Cut in small cookies
5. Bake in a moderate oven
6. If allowed to stand in a cold place for a while, the dough is easier to handle

title: Mauste-piparkakkuja No. 2 (Spice Cookies No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup milk
- 1 or 2 eggs
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 1/4 teaspoon mace
- 1/4 teaspoon cloves
- 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1/2 or 1 cup raisins
- 1 1/2 cups flour

## Directions

1. Rub butter and sugar until creamy
2. Add beaten egg
3. Add spices, milk, and flour mixed with baking powder and raisins
4. Drop by the spoonful onto a buttered baking sheet
5. Bake in a hot oven

title: Mayonnaise Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- yolk of 1 egg
- 3/4 cupful of salad oil
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice
- 1/2 tablesp. of Tarragon vinegar
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- a little cayenne
- 1/2 teaspoonful of mustard powder

## Directions

1. Mix mustard with yolk, add gradually the oil, at first drop by drop, stirring constantly.
2. As mixture thickens, dilute it with a little lemon juice and vinegar.
3. Lastly season with salt and pepper.
4. If dressing curdles, take yolk of another egg and add curdled mixture slowly to it.

title: Meat Farcie (Chopped Meat Loaf)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of meat stock or water
- 1 cupful of bread crumbs
- 2 eggs
- 1 onion
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 1/4 teaspoonful of pepper
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 cupful of cream

## Directions

1. Soak the bread crumbs in meat stock mixed with cream and add the beaten eggs into it
2. Chop the onion, cook in butter and strain the butter into the mixture
3. Mix with chopped meat and work until smooth
4. At the last add seasonings
5. Turn in a buttered pan and trim into a nice loaf
6. Spread with beaten egg and sprinkle with bread crumbs
7. Bake in oven 1-1½ hours, basting often and adding water or meat stock
8. Serve with brown sauce

title: Meat Pudding with Macaroni
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of macaroni
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1/2 onion
- 2 cupfuls of meat stock or sauce
- 1 lb. of cooked chopped meat
- 3-4 tablespoonfuls of grated cheese
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Cook macaroni until tender in salted water; drain the water off.
2. Fry onion in butter, mix with meat and continue frying for a little while.
3. Stir meat stock or sauce and cheese into it.
4. Fill a mold with mixture of macaroni and meat, or put layers of macaroni and meat alternately in it.
5. Bake until brown.
6. In place of macaroni mashed potatoes may be used.

title: Meat Quenelles (Liha kvenelliä)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound chicken or veal meat
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter sauce
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls breadcrumb
- 2 tablespoonfuls milk or beef stock
- 1/2 onion
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Grind the meat very fine.
2. Cook the finely minced onion in butter.
3. Add to the mixture an egg, breadcrumb soaked in beef stock, salt and pepper.
4. Stir the mixture well until smooth.
5. Form into small balls.

title: Mehu hyytelö (Juice Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of sweetened berry- or fruit juice
- 1½ ozs. of gelatine
- water
- Berries and all kinds of fruit, skinned and cut in pieces

## Directions

1. Mix 1 quart of sweetened berry- or fruit juice with 1½ ozs. of gelatine, dissolved in water.
2. Mold to get firm.
3. Berries and all kinds of fruit, skinned and cut in pieces may be used in the mold alternately with layers of jelly.

title: Mehuhyytelö (Juice Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart berry or fruit juice
- 2 tablespoons or 1/2 package gelatine
- Water

## Directions

1. Dissolve gelatine in water.
2. Mix with berry or fruit juice.
3. Pour into mold to set.

title: Mehuhyytelö (Juice Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart fruit or berry juice
- 2 tablespoons or 1/2 package gelatine
- water
- berries and fruits, peeled and cut up (optional)

## Directions

1. Mix 1 quart of fruit juice with 2 tablespoons or 1/2 package gelatine dissolved in water
2. Pour into a mold to set
3. The mold may be filled with alternate layers of jelly and peeled and cut up fruit

title: Meranko-kana (Merango Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- Breast and leg pieces of chicken
- Salt
- Pepper
- Flour
- Butter
- Mushrooms

## Directions

1. Take breast and leg pieces of chicken, trim nicely leaving a bone in each.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Roll in flour and fry in butter.
4. Lay in a pan, pour the drippings over.
5. Let simmer until tender.
6. Place on a platter, garnish with triangular toast.
7. Add chopped mushrooms to the gravy.
8. Cook for a few minutes and pour over the chicken.

title: Meringue
body:
## Ingredients

- whites of 3 eggs
- 7 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1/3 teaspoonful of vanilla

## Directions

1. Whip whites of 3 eggs until stiff
2. Add slowly 7 tablespoonfuls of sugar and 1/3 teaspoonful of vanilla

title: Meringue
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of granulated sugar
- 1/2 lb. of powdered sugar
- 8 whites of eggs

## Directions

1. Whip eggs to a stiff froth, add slowly sugar, sifted many times, into it.
2. May be flavored with vanilla, lemon or orange.
3. Put the mixture on paper with spoon or press it through a pastry bag.
4. Place the paper on board or in baking pan.
5. Put in oven to bake slowly.
6. When light brown and dry, take them out, let cool and remove the paper with knife.
7. Put the meringues together in pairs combining them with the same mixture or fill with whipped cream, flavored with vanilla, lemon, coffee, chocolate, etc.

title: Meriäyriäiset (Shrimps)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup rich milk
- 1 pint boiled shrimps
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- 2 egg yolks
- cream

## Directions

1. Prepare a gravy of 1 tablespoon of butter, 1 tablespoon of flour and 1 cup of rich milk.
2. Add 1 pint of boiled shrimps and heat.
3. Season with salt, pepper and onion juice.
4. Last of all add two yolks of eggs beaten with some cream.
5. Serve either baked in a mold with breadcrumbs sprinkled on top, or fill scooped tomatoes with the mixture.
6. If using tomatoes instead of milk, use bouillon and add the scooped inside of tomato to the mixture.
7. Stir in the shrimps cut in pieces last of all.

title: Meriäyriäiset (Shrimps)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup cream mixed with milk
- 1 pint cooked shrimps
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- 2 egg yolks
- cream

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of 1 tablespoon butter, 1 tablespoon flour and 1 cup of cream mixed with milk
2. Add 1 pint of cooked shrimps to the sauce
3. Heat through
4. Season with salt, pepper and onion juice
5. Beat 2 egg yolks with some cream
6. Add the beaten egg yolks to the sauce
7. Serve either baked in molds with bread crumbs sprinkled on top, or in another form

title: Mignon Fillet
body:
## Ingredients

- fillet beef slices
- salt and pepper
- butter
- Bearnaise sauce
- fried bananas

## Directions

1. Cut fillets into one inch thick slices
2. Pound the slices and trim into round equal-sized cakes
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
4. Fry in butter in a pan
5. Pour Bearnaise Sauce on a serving platter
6. Arrange the fillets on it
7. Garnish with fried bananas
8. Alternatively, the fillets may be broiled about 4-5 minutes
9. Serve with parsley, mushroom or sherry sauce

title: Mignon fillet (Mignon Fillet)
body:
## Ingredients

- Tenderloin (selkäliha/fillet)
- Salt
- Pepper
- Butter
- Bearnaise sauce
- Fried bananas

## Directions

1. Cut fillets into pieces 1 inch thick.
2. Pound the pieces and form into round cakes of equal size.
3. Add a sprinkling of salt and pepper.
4. Fry in butter in a pan.
5. Pour Bearnaise sauce on a serving platter and arrange the cakes on top.
6. Garnish around with fried bananas.
7. Alternatively, the fillets may be broiled for 4 or 5 minutes.
8. Serve with parsley, mushroom or sherry sauce.

title: Milk or White Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 1/2 cupful of cream
- white pepper and salt to taste

## Directions

1. Cook butter, flour and milk; add cream, pepper and salt.
2. Ready to be served when it comes to boiling-point.

title: Mimakokkeli (Scrambled Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 4 tablespoons cream, milk or water
- 1 tablespoon butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Stir eggs, add milk, salt and pepper.
2. Melt butter in a pan and turn the mixture in.
3. Let cook slowly stirring constantly.
4. When it begins to thicken, remove from the pan carefully with a spoon.
5. If water is used instead of milk, the eggs will become bright yellow.
6. Alternatively, melt 1 tablespoon of butter in a clean hot pan, break the eggs into the pan, and stir with fork until the whites become firm, then season with salt and pepper.

title: Minttu Kastike (Mint Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 bunch of mint
- 1/2 cupful of vinegar
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar

## Directions

1. Rinse the mint, chop the leaves finely
2. Mix sugar with vinegar
3. When sugar has melted, mix with the mint
4. Let stand one hour
5. If the vinegar is too strong dilute with a little water
6. Serve with roast lamb

title: Minttukastike (Mint Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 bunch mint
- 1/2 cup vinegar
- 1 tablespoon sugar

## Directions

1. Rinse mint, chop the leaves fine.
2. Mix sugar with vinegar.
3. When the sugar is dissolved, add the mint to the vinegar.
4. Let stand about an hour.
5. If too strong the vinegar may be diluted with water.
6. Serve with roast mutton.

title: Mock Turtle Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 calf's head
- 1 red onion and 1 leek
- 1 carrot
- 2 sprigs of celery
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 10 peppercorns
- 2 tablespoonfuls of salt
- 1 cupful of stewed and strained tomatoes
- juice of lemon
- 2 cupfuls of brown stock
- Madeira wine

## Directions

1. Clean and wash the split calf's head.
2. Place it into boiling water and cook until tender with vegetables salt and pepper.
3. Remove the head from the kettle.
4. Take the bones out of it and put them to boil again.
5. Cut the meat and the tongue, removing the skin from it, into nice pieces — only nice pieces may be used — and warm them in a small quantity of strained stock.
6. Chop the onion, brown in butter, add flour, meat stock and the stock of calf's head into it and let it boil up.
7. Add tomatoes and the cut meat.
8. Season with cayenne and color with Kitchen Bouquet.
9. Then season with salt, pepper, lemon and wine.
10. Serve with hardboiled yolks or Royal Custard cut into cubes or with egg balls.

title: Mock Turtle-Keitto (Mock Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 quarts vegetable stock or water
- 2 onions
- 2 small carrots
- 2 small turnips or 2 potatoes
- 1 stalk celery
- 1/2 cup tomato
- 1 cup mushrooms
- 2 tablespoons chopped chives
- Butter and flour for thickening
- Lemon
- Salt and pepper
- Hard boiled egg yolks or egg balls

## Directions

1. Clean the vegetables and cut in pieces.
2. Cook in vegetable stock with the mushrooms, the tomato and the chives.
3. Add liquor of boiled rice or vegetable stock as needed.
4. Force through a sieve.
5. Brown 2 tablespoonfuls of butter with 1 tablespoonful of flour.
6. Add the soup to the butter.
7. Bring to boil.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Flavor with lemon.
10. Serve with hard boiled yolks of eggs or with egg balls.

title: Molasses Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of brown sugar
- 1 cupful of molasses
- 1 cupful of boiling water
- 1/4 cupful of butter
- 1/4 cupful of lard
- 1 heaping cupful of flour
- 2 eggs
- 1 heaping teaspoonful of soda
- 1/4 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- 1/4 teaspoonful of ginger
- 1/4 teaspoonful of mace

## Directions

1. Beat well together molasses, sugar and water, add butter and lard, melted, beaten eggs, spices, baking soda dissolved in hot water and flour.
2. Bake in a moderate oven.

title: Molded Herring (Sillimureketta)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 herrings
- 1 cupful of crackercrumbs
- 2 cupfuls of rich milk
- 1/2 cupful of butter
- 1/2 onion
- 3 eggs
- a little pepper and sugar

## Directions

1. Soak the herrings, bone and skin, chop with meat chopper.
2. Cook the chopped onion in butter, add cracker crumbs, milk and beaten eggs.
3. Mix gradually with the herrings.
4. Season.
5. Turn in a buttered mold.
6. Bake in a pan of water.

title: Molded Herring with Potatoes (Sillimureketta Perunoiden Kanssa)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 herrings
- 4 cupfuls of boiled potatoes
- 1/2 onion
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 cupfuls of milk
- 3 eggs
- chopped parsley and pepper

## Directions

1. Soak the herrings, bone and skin.
2. Butter a mold.
3. Fill it with alternating layers of potatoes and herring, having potatoes on the bottom and on the top.
4. Sprinkle the layers of herring with chopped onion and pour the melted butter over.
5. Beat the eggs, add milk, pepper and parsley into it, pour into the mold.
6. Sprinkle with crackercrumbs and bake in oven.

title: Mousse of Mushrooms
body:
## Ingredients

- mushrooms
- 1 cupful of pressed mushrooms
- 1½ cupfuls of chicken mousse
- a little sherry
- salt
- pepper
- butter

## Directions

1. Peel the mushrooms, put on fire in boiling water, let cook 10 minutes
2. Press through a strainer
3. Mix with 1 cupful of pressed mushrooms with 1½ cupfuls of chicken mousse, a little sherry, salt and pepper
4. Butter small timbale moulds, garnish and fill with the mixture of mushrooms
5. Bake in oven in a pan of water, covered with a buttered paper, about 15 minutes or until it is firm
6. Serve with mushroom sauce

title: Muffensia (Muffins)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 1 cup milk
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 2 eggs
- 3 tablespoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Sift the flour with salt and baking powder.
2. Beat the eggs with the sugar, add milk, butter and gradually flour.
3. Drop by the spoonful into buttered biscuit tins and bake in a moderate oven.
4. The muffins will be made lighter by adding beaten egg whites to the batter last.

title: Muffensia (Muffins)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of flour
- ¾ cupfuls of milk
- ¼ cupful of butter
- 2 eggs
- ½ teaspoonful of salt
- 2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder

## Directions

1. Sift salt and baking powder with flour
2. Beat eggs with sugar until light
3. Add milk, butter and flour gradually into it
4. Put the batter in buttered molds
5. Bake in a moderate oven

title: Muhennettu ankerias (Stewed Eel)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eel
- Water
- Salt
- Pepper
- Onion
- Milk sauce
- Parsley
- Egg yolks

## Directions

1. Clean the fish, cut in pieces 1 inch thick.
2. Place on fire in cold water with salt, pepper and onion.
3. Let cook until tender.
4. Drain off the water, pour rich milk sauce over the fish, season, add some chopped parsley, return to fire.
5. If mixed with 2 yolks of egg, the gravy will be delicious.

title: Muhennettu ankerias (Stewed Eel)
body:
## Ingredients

- eel
- water
- salt
- pepper
- onion
- fish stock
- milk sauce
- parsley
- egg yolks

## Directions

1. Clean the eel and cut into pieces 1 inch long.
2. Put in cold water, place on range with salt and pepper.
3. Cook until soft.
4. Drain off the water and pour on the fish thin milk sauce seasoned and mixed with parsley.
5. Return to the fire for a little while.
6. Yolks of two eggs mixed with the sauce give a good taste to it.

title: Muhennettu Oisteri (Stewed Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups oysters
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 1/2 cup milk or cream
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and milk
2. Add the beaten egg yolk to the sauce
3. Add the oysters to the mixture
4. Heat through over the fire until thick
5. Serve hot

title: Muhennettuja papuja (Stewed Beans)
body:
## Ingredients

- beans
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- juice of half a lemon
- some onion juice
- 1 cup beef stock or bean cooking liquid

## Directions

1. Soak beans in cold water over night.
2. Put on the fire in cold water.
3. Cook for an hour.
4. Drain.
5. Pour beef stock or water over the beans, cook until tender.
6. Make a sauce of 3 tablespoons butter, 2 tablespoons flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, juice of half a lemon, some onion juice and 1 cup of beef stock or liquor of the beans.
7. Cover the beans with the sauce, continue to boil for 10 minutes.

title: Mukailtu kilpikonna-keitto (Mock Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 calf's head
- 1 red onion
- 1 leek
- 1 carrot
- 2 stalks celery
- 4 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 tablespoons salt
- 10 peppercorns
- 1 cup stewed strained tomato
- 1/2 lemon juice
- 2 cups brown stock

## Directions

1. Clean and wash the split calf's head
2. Place on the fire in boiling water and cook tender, with roots, salt and pepper
3. Remove the head from boiling; cut the meat away and place the bones back to boil again
4. Cut the meat and the tongue, peeled into nice pieces, separating the ugly pieces away and warm in a little strained broth
5. Mince the leek, brown it in butter, add the flour, meat broth and strained calf's head broth and let the mixture come to boil
6. Add the tomato and meat pieces, color with Kitchen Bouquet, season with cayenne pepper, salt, lemon and wine
7. Serve with hard boiled egg yolks, or custard (Royal Custard) cut in cubes, or egg balls (Egg Balls)

title: Mukailtua kalamureketta (Mock Fish Farce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 Jerusalem artichokes
- 6 potatoes
- 2 parsnips
- 1 stalk of celery
- 1 onion
- 1/4 pound butter
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 3/4 cup milk or cream
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 3 eggs
- Salt
- Pepper
- Tomato sauce or Hollandaise sauce for serving

## Directions

1. Cook the artichokes, potatoes, parsnips, celery, and onion
2. Force through a meat grinder
3. Make a sauce of 1/4 pound butter, 3 tablespoons flour and 3/4 cup milk or cream
4. Add 1 cup bread crumbs, 3 eggs, salt and pepper
5. Combine the mixtures
6. Stir until smooth
7. If too thick, dilute with milk
8. Bake in a buttered mold in a pan of water covered with buttered paper
9. Serve with tomato or Hollandaise sauce

title: Mukailtua Kalamureketta (Mock Fish Farcie)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 artichokes
- 6 potatoes
- 2 parsnips
- 1 celery
- 1 onion
- 3 tablespoonfuls flour
- 3/4 cupful cream
- 6 ounces butter
- 3 eggs
- 1 cupful bread crumbs
- salt

## Directions

1. Boil all vegetables and grind them together
2. Add beaten eggs, bread crumbs soaked in cream, butter, flour and seasonings
3. Rub the mixture well
4. Bake in a buttered mold placed in a pan of water, covered with buttered paper
5. Serve with tomato or hollandaise sauce

title: Mukailtua Klipikonnakeittoa (Mock Turtle Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 calf's head
- 1 red onion
- 1 leek
- 1 carrot
- 2 sprigs of celery
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 10 peppercorns
- 2 tablespoonfuls of salt
- 1 cupful of stewed and strained tomatoes
- juice of lemon
- 2 cupfuls of brown stock
- Madeira wine
- cayenne pepper
- hard boiled egg yolks or Royal Custard or egg balls

## Directions

1. Clean and wash the split calf's head.
2. Place it into boiling water and cook until tender with vegetables, salt and pepper.
3. Remove the head from the kettle and take the bones out.
4. Cut the meat and tongue into nice pieces, discarding any unattractive pieces, and warm in a little strained stock.
5. Mince the leek, saute it in butter, add the flour, meat stock and strained calf's head stock and let the mixture come to a boil.
6. Add the tomatoes and meat pieces to the mixture.
7. Season with cayenne pepper and color with Kitchen Bouquet.
8. Season with salt, pepper, lemon and wine.
9. Serve either with hard boiled egg yolks or Royal Custard cut into cubes or egg balls.

title: Mulligatawny-Keitto (Mulligatawny Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 quarts vegetable stock
- 4 large onions
- 2 stalks celery
- 2 carrots
- 2 sour apples
- 1/2 cup tomato
- Some parsley
- Butter and flour for thickening

## Directions

1. Peel and cut in pieces the onions, the carrots, and the apples.
2. Brown with a little lump of butter.
3. Add the vegetable stock and the parsley.
4. Cook until the vegetables are tender.
5. Press through a sieve.
6. Thicken with butter and flour, or serve with boiled rice.

title: Muna Kastike (Egg Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 cupfuls of fish stock
- 2 - 3 hard-boiled eggs
- 1 tablespoonful of minced parsley
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and fish stock
2. Add finely chopped egg
3. Season with salt, pepper, parsley and chives
4. Alternatively: Cook 1/2 pound of butter with 1 cupful of fish stock
5. Chop 4 hard-boiled eggs and pour the sauce over

title: Muna- ja anchovy-voileipiä (Egg and Anchovy Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- toasted bread
- anchovy butter
- eggs
- olives
- pickles

## Directions

1. Spread toast with anchovy butter.
2. Boil eggs.
3. Separate the yolks from the whites.
4. Chop.
5. Spread the chopped whites on the anchovy butter.
6. Sprinkle with chopped yolks, olives and pickles.

title: Muna-paistos (Royal Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 egg yolks
- 1 egg
- ⅓ cup bouillon or milk
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs, add bouillon and seasonings.
2. Pour into a well buttered mold.
3. Bake in oven in a pan of water until firm.
4. Unmold, cut into nice pieces.
5. Serve with bouillon.

title: Muna-soufflé (Egg Soufflé)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 2 cupfuls rich milk
- 2 tablespoons chopped parsley
- Onion juice
- Salt and pepper
- Milk sauce and vegetable balls for serving

## Directions

1. Make a sauce of butter, flour and milk.
2. Add the yolks beaten well and the seasonings.
3. Last of all mix in the whites beaten stiff.
4. Bake in a soufflé dish with a hole in the center, placed in a pan of water, until it sets.
5. Serve with milk sauce and vegetable balls.
6. When served unmolded, the soufflé may be made without flour to make it fluffy.

title: Muna-timbaleja No. 1 (Egg Timbales No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- Timbale molds
- Chopped parsley
- Eggs
- Salt
- Butter
- Tomato, mushroom or milk sauce for serving

## Directions

1. Butter carefully timbale molds and sprinkle with chopped parsley on the sides and bottom.
2. Break one egg into each mold.
3. Sprinkle with salt and put a little lump of butter on top.
4. Bake in a pan of water in the oven until firm.
5. Turn out onto a platter and serve with tomato, mushroom or milk sauce.

title: Muna-timbaleja No. 2 (Egg Timbales No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1½ tablespoons flour
- ½ cup milk or cream
- Chopped parsley or chives
- Salt and pepper
- Hollandaise or tomato sauce for serving

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and milk.
2. Add the yolks beaten well and seasonings.
3. Last of all add the whites beaten stiff.
4. Put into buttered timbale molds.
5. Bake in a pan of water until firm.
6. Serve with Hollandaise or tomato sauce.
7. Chopped parsley may be mixed into the mixture or used to garnish the molds.

title: Munahyydyke pai (Custard Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 whole egg
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- a dash of salt
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla
- pastry

## Directions

1. Mix milk with 2 yolks and 1 whole egg, beaten with 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar
2. Season with a dash of salt and 1 teaspoonful of vanilla
3. Lay pastry in a pieplate
4. Spread with white of egg
5. Pour the custard on
6. Bake until it gets firm

title: Munahyydyke-piirakka (Custard Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups warm milk
- 2 egg yolks and 1 whole egg
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- Salt, nutmeg or vanilla to taste

## Directions

1. Whip the eggs and add to the milk.
2. Mix with the spices.
3. Cover a pie plate with pastry and brush with egg white.
4. Fill with the mixture.
5. Bake until it becomes firm, first having the oven hot and reducing the heat when nearly done.

title: Munakastike (Egg Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 cups fish stock
- 2 or 3 hard boiled eggs
- 1 tablespoon chopped parsley
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Make a gravy of butter, flour and fish stock.
2. Add finely chopped egg and season with salt, pepper, parsley and chives.

title: Munakohokas (Egg Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 2 cups rich milk
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 4 tablespoons flour
- 2 tablespoons chopped almonds
- 1/2 tablespoon lemon juice

## Directions

1. Beat the yolks with the sugar, add the warmed milk and butter; beat over heat until it thickens.
2. When the mixture has cooled, mix in the flour, almonds and the stiffly beaten egg whites.
3. Caramelize 2 tablespoons of sugar in a baking pan, add 2 tablespoons of water and a little lemon juice, pour into the mold and turn to coat the bottom and sides.

title: Munakohokas (Egg Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 2 cupfuls of rich milk
- 4 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 tablesp. of chopped almonds
- 1/2 tablespoonful of lemon juice

## Directions

1. Beat yolks of eggs with sugar, add scalded milk and butter and stir over the fire until thick.
2. When cool mix with flour, almonds and whites of eggs, beaten to a firm froth.
3. Brown 2 cupfuls of granulated sugar in a fryingpan, add 2 tablespoonfuls of water and a dash of lemon juice.
4. Pour into a mold turning the mold so as to cover the bottom and the sides of it with the syrup.
5. Pour the mixture into the mold and bake in a pan of water 1 hour.
6. Serve with vanilla sauce.

title: Munakokkeli (Scrambled Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 4 tablespoonfuls of milk or water
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Whip the eggs and add milk, salt and pepper
2. Melt the butter in a frying pan but do not let it brown
3. Pour the egg mixture into the butter and stir gently over a slow fire
4. When the mixture begins to thicken, remove carefully with a spoon
5. Use water instead of milk for a lighter yellow color

title: Munanruskuainen Puuro (Egg Yolk Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons flour
- 2 tablespoons chopped almonds
- 1/2 tablespoon lemon juice
- egg yolks
- sugar
- scalded milk
- butter
- egg whites
- 2 tablespoons granulated sugar
- 2 tablespoons water

## Directions

1. Beat the yolks with the sugar, add the scalded milk and butter, stir over the fire until it becomes thick
2. Cool, mix with flour, almonds and the egg whites beaten firm
3. Brown 2 tablespoons of granulated sugar in a pan, add 2 tablespoons water and some lemon juice
4. Coat the bottom and the edges of a mold with the syrup
5. Fill the mold with the mixture
6. Bake in oven in a pan of water or steam on the stove for 1 hour
7. Serve with vanilla sauce

title: Munapalleroita (Egg Balls)
body:
## Ingredients

- Hard boiled eggs
- Fried chopped mushrooms
- Thick milk sauce
- Salt
- Pepper
- Bread crumbs
- Egg for dipping
- Butter for frying

## Directions

1. Chop hard boiled eggs fine.
2. Add a few fried chopped mushrooms, thick milk sauce and season with salt and pepper.
3. When cold, form into balls.
4. Roll in bread crumbs and dip in egg, then roll in bread crumbs again.
5. Fry in butter in a pan or bake in the oven.

title: Munapesiä (Eggs in Nests)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- buttered toast
- salt
- pepper
- red pepper

## Directions

1. Separate whites from yolks and leave the yolks in shells
2. Beat the whites to a firm froth
3. Press through a pastry bag a layer of it about an inch thick on buttered toast, close to the edge
4. Place the yolks in center one on each toast
5. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
6. Garnish with red pepper
7. Bake until the whites are light brown

title: Munapullia (Egg Balls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 hard boiled egg yolks
- 1 raw yolk
- ½ teaspoon butter
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Force the yolks through a sieve, add seasonings and raw yolk of an egg.
2. Form into small balls, roll in flour.
3. Boil in salted water or in butter.
4. Serve with soup.

title: Munasalaatti (Egg Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- lettuce leaves
- hard cooked eggs
- French dressing
- boiled potatoes

## Directions

1. Wash the lettuce and wipe
2. Arrange on a platter
3. place hard cooked eggs split lengthwise on the lettuce
4. Pour French dressing over
5. Boiled potatoes cut in nice pieces may be used in egg salad

title: Munasalaatti with Cheese and Pickles (Egg Salad with Cheese and Pickles)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- grated cheese
- lettuce leaves
- chopped pickles
- tomato
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Cut the eggs in slices
2. sprinkle thickly with grated cheese
3. Arrange on lettuce leaves
4. add a sprinkling of chopped pickles
5. garnish with tomato and mayonnaise

title: Munasalaatti with Chicken Liver (Egg Salad with Chicken Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- fried chopped chicken liver
- onion juice
- salt
- pepper
- lettuce leaves
- chopped pickles
- tomato
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Cut the eggs in slices
2. remove carefully the yolks
3. place the rings of whites on lettuce leaves
4. Mix the yolks with fried chopped chicken liver, some onion juice, salt and pepper
5. rub the mixture well
6. Place into the rings of whites
7. Garnish with chopped pickles, tomato and mayonnaise

title: Munasalaatti with Lemon and Oil (Egg Salad with Lemon and Oil)
body:
## Ingredients

- egg yolks
- lemon juice
- olive oil
- egg whites
- lettuce leaves

## Directions

1. Mix the yolks with a few drops of lemon juice and olive oil
2. Form into tiny balls
3. place inside of the rings of whites if preferred

title: Munatippoja (Egg Drops)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- ½ teaspoonful of salt
- 2 tablespoonfuls of milk or bouillon
- ½ cupful of flour

## Directions

1. Beat 2 eggs, add salt, milk or bouillon and flour.
2. Pour slowly through a strainer into boiling lard.
3. When brown drain on paper.
4. Serve in hot bouillon.

title: Munatomaatteja (Eggs in Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- small tomatoes
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- water
- eggs

## Directions

1. Use small tomatoes of equal size and cover with boiling water.
2. Skin the tomatoes, cut off the tops, and scoop carefully.
3. Place in a saucepan and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Put a little lump of butter on the bottom of the space and break an egg into each tomato.
5. Put a little water with some butter into a baking dish, place the tomatoes in it, and bake 15 minutes.
6. Alternatively, fill the tomatoes with scrambled eggs and bake.
7. Serve on buttered toast.

title: Munavoileipiä (Egg Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- hard boiled eggs
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- mayonnaise
- buttered toast
- olives

## Directions

1. Chop hard boiled eggs.
2. Season with salt, pepper and onion juice if desired.
3. Soften with mayonnaise.
4. Serve on buttered toast.
5. Mix with chopped olives if preferred.

title: Munavoileipiä tomaatin kanssa (Egg Sandwiches with Tomato)
body:
## Ingredients

- salad leaf
- tomato
- chopped egg
- salt
- paprika
- mayonnaise
- mustard

## Directions

1. Place a tomato slice on a salad leaf.
2. Add finely chopped egg, season with salt and paprika.
3. Neatly set with a knife on top of the tomato.
4. Cover with mayonnaise prepared with mustard.

title: Munavoileipiä tomaatin kanssa (Egg Sandwiches with Tomato)
body:
## Ingredients

- lettuce leaf
- tomato slice
- eggs
- salt
- paprika
- mayonnaise
- mustard
- pepper
- onion juice

## Directions

1. Place a slice of tomato on a lettuce leaf.
2. Lay chopped egg seasoned with salt and paprika carefully with a knife on the tomato.
3. Cover with mayonnaise mixed with mustard.
4. Alternatively, chopped egg seasoned with salt, pepper and onion juice may be shaped in different ways and served on lettuce leaf garnished with mayonnaise.

title: Munia au Gratin (Eggs au Gratin)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 hard boiled eggs
- grated cheese
- anchovy essence
- melted butter
- milk sauce
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Shell and split lengthwise 4 hard boiled eggs
2. Remove the yolks and mix them with grated cheese, anchovy essence and melted butter
3. Fill the halves of whites with this mixture
4. Butter a baking dish and spread some of the paste on the bottom
5. Arrange the eggs on top
6. Cover with milk sauce
7. Sprinkle with cheese and bread crumbs
8. Brown in oven

title: Munia pinaatin kanssa (Eggs with Spinach)
body:
## Ingredients

- hard boiled eggs
- spinach
- melted butter
- cream
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- milk sauce

## Directions

1. Cut hard boiled eggs lengthwise in halves
2. Rub the yolks through a sieve
3. Mix chopped boiled spinach with melted butter, cream, onion juice, salt and pepper
4. Fill the halves of the whites with this mixture
5. Arrange them in a buttered mold
6. Cover with a rich milk sauce
7. Sprinkle with grated yolk of egg
8. Bake until light brown
9. Serve in mold

title: Munia Tomaattien Kanssa (Eggs with Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful tomatoes, fresh or canned
- 1/2 onion
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- salt
- sugar
- paprika
- 6 eggs
- cream
- buttered toast

## Directions

1. Cook 1 cupful of tomatoes, onion, 2 tablespoonfuls of butter, salt, some sugar and paprika for 10 minutes.
2. Beat lightly 6 eggs and add some cream.
3. Mix the eggs slowly with tomatoes and stir until thick.
4. Serve with buttered toast, cut in triangles and placed around the tomato.

title: Munkkia (Puffs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 tablespoons butter
- 1 cup flour
- 3/4 cup milk
- 4 tablespoons cornstarch or potato flour
- 6 eggs
- Sugar for sprinkling
- Jam and cream for serving

## Directions

1. Scald the milk with the butter, mix with the flour.
2. Cook stirring carefully until it begins to brown on the bottom.
3. Work immediately an egg yolk into the paste, adding the rest of the yolks and the beaten whites when it begins to cool.
4. Drop by the spoonful into boiling lard.
5. Cook until done, sprinkle immediately with sugar.
6. Serve with jam and cream.

title: Munuais voileipiä (Kidney Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- roasted calf or lamb kidneys
- 2 ounces butter
- lemon juice
- salt
- pepper
- egg yolk
- toast

## Directions

1. Mince the roasted kidneys very fine.
2. Put 2 ounces of butter in a saucepan.
3. Mix with minced kidneys, a little lemon juice, salt and pepper.
4. Let boil a few minutes.
5. Remove the saucepan from the fire, stir an egg yolk into the mixture.
6. Spread on toast and serve very hot.

title: Munuais-keitto (Kidney Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 kidneys of veal or 2 kidneys of ox
- 1 quart of water
- 1 quart of meat stock
- 1 onion
- 1 stalk of celery
- 1 carrot
- 1 parsnip
- 1 sprig of parsley
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- salt and pepper
- 1/2 cupful of tomato liquor
- sherry or lemon juice

## Directions

1. Remove the fat from the kidneys and cut them into small cubes.
2. Cut the vegetables in the same way and brown all in butter.
3. Mix with the flour and pour the boiling stock slowly on it.
4. Let boil covered for 2 hours.
5. At last add the tomato liquor, seasonings and wine or lemon juice into the soup.
6. Color with Kitchen Bouquet if necessary.

title: Munuais-muhennus (Stewed Kidneys)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidneys
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- tablespoonful of butter
- chopped onion
- 1 cupful of meat stock or water
- sherry or Worcestershire sauce
- chopped mushrooms

## Directions

1. Prepare kidneys as for frying.
2. Cut in half an inch thick pieces.
3. Dip in flour and fry with chopped onion in a tablespoonful of butter until brown.
4. Add 1 cupful of meat stock or water and let boil 10 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Flavor with sherry or Worcestershire sauce and chopped mushrooms when sending it to the table.

title: Munuais-Ragu (Ragout of Kidneys)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidneys
- cold water
- salt
- pepper
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter
- onion, sliced
- 1 tablespoon flour
- water or bouillon
- 1/2 cup mushrooms, cleaned
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Soak kidneys in cold water for about an hour.
2. Wipe and cut into pieces.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, dip in egg and bread crumbs.
4. Cook in butter with a slice of onion.
5. Add 1 tablespoon of flour and water or bouillon, continue cooking for 5 minutes.
6. Mix in 1/2 cup of mushrooms cut into quarters.
7. Season with salt and pepper and cook for a few more minutes.
8. Serve hot.

title: Munuais-ragu (Ragout of Kidneys)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidneys
- cold water
- salt
- pepper
- bread crumbs
- butter
- onion
- flour
- 1/2 cupful of meat stock
- 1/2 cupful of mushrooms

## Directions

1. Soak kidneys in cold water for one hour.
2. Wipe and cut into pieces.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Dip in bread crumbs and cook in butter with onion slices.
5. Add flour, 1/2 cupful of meat stock and let boil 5 minutes.
6. Strain, add 1/2 cupful of mushrooms, cleaned and cut into four pieces.
7. Season with salt and pepper and let boil a few minutes more.

title: Munuaisleipiä (Kidney Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- fried calf's or sheep's kidneys
- 2 tablespoons butter
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- 2 egg yolks
- cream
- toasted bread

## Directions

1. Grind or chop fried calf's or sheep's kidneys.
2. Put into a saucepan with 2 tablespoons butter, salt, pepper and lemon juice.
3. Let boil for a few minutes.
4. Remove from fire, add 2 yolks of eggs and a little cream.
5. Reheat.
6. Serve hot on toast.

title: Munuaismuhennus (Kidney Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidneys
- flour
- 1 tablespoon butter
- onion, chopped
- 1 cup bouillon or water
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice or Worcestershire sauce
- mushrooms, chopped

## Directions

1. Prepare kidneys same as for broiling.
2. Cut in slices approximately 3/8 inch thick.
3. Roll in flour and brown in butter with a chopped onion.
4. Add 1 cup of bouillon or water and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Just before serving, flavor with lemon juice or Worcestershire sauce and add chopped mushrooms.
7. Serve hot.

title: Murekkeella täytetty kana (Stuffed Boned Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken, turkey or fowl
- stuffing
- cream

## Directions

1. Remove the bones from chicken, turkey or any kind of fowl.
2. Stuff the bird.
3. Sew closed.
4. Roast in the oven as directed for stuffed chicken.
5. Prepare the gravy of the drippings by adding some cream.

title: Murekkeella täytetty lintu (Stuffed Boned Fowl)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken, turkey, or fowl
- stuffing of choice
- cream

## Directions

1. Bone the chicken, turkey or fowl
2. Stuff with one of the provided stuffings
3. Sew up
4. Roast in oven as directed for stuffed chicken
5. Prepare a sauce of its own liquor by adding cream

title: Muroleivoksia (Sand Tarts)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound butter
- 3/4 pound sugar
- 3 eggs
- 2 tablespoons cream
- 1/2 cup almonds
- 3/4 cup flour
- 2 tablespoons cracker dust

## Directions

1. Blanch and chop the almonds
2. Wash the butter and rub to a cream
3. Add all remaining ingredients to the butter and work well together
4. Wipe small molds
5. Line with a thin layer of batter
6. Place the molds on a baking sheet
7. Bake in a quick oven until light brown
8. Unmold carefully

title: Muroleivoksia (Sand Tarts)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of butter
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of cream
- 1/2 cupful of almonds
- 12 ozs. of flour
- 2 tablespoonfuls of bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Peel almonds and chop fine
2. Wash butter and rub to a cream
3. Mix with remaining ingredients stirring well
4. Wipe small molds, cover them inside with a thin layer of batter
5. Put the molds on a baking sheet and bake in a quick oven to light brown
6. Turn the tarts carefully out

title: Mushroom Farcie (Mushroom Loaf)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 lbs. of mushrooms
- 10 ozs. of bread crumbs
- 1/4 lb. of butter
- 2 cupfuls of rich milk
- 2 small onions
- 3 eggs
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Clean mushrooms and grind in meat mill
2. Chop onions and fry in butter
3. Add fried onions to mushrooms
4. Add bread crumbs soaked in milk
5. Add seasonings and beaten eggs
6. Rub mixture thoroughly together
7. Bake in a buttered mold 1 hour
8. Serve with vegetables and sauce made of melted butter or vegetable stock

title: Mushroom Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1/2 can of mushrooms with liquor
- 2 cupfuls of beef or fish stock
- 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice
- a pinch of white pepper
- a pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Cook the butter with the flour, the beef stock and the mushroom liquor
2. Put small mushrooms into the mixture
3. Let boil 10 minutes
4. Season with lemon juice, pepper and salt
5. Serve hot
6. Before serving mix one yolk and cream into the sauce, if you want to thicken it
7. Color with Kitchen Bouquet
8. For white sauce use white stock or milk and prepare the sauce without coloring

title: Mushroom à la Roulette
body:
## Ingredients

- cleaned mushrooms
- butter
- beef stock
- salt
- pepper
- cream
- yolks of two eggs

## Directions

1. Cook the cleaned mushrooms 5 minutes with a little butter
2. Add beef stock, salt and pepper
3. When ready to send to table, mix with a little cream and yolks of two eggs

title: Musta Kakku (Black Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cupfuls of molasses
- 1/2 cupful of butter
- 1/2 cupful of cream
- 3 eggs
- 3 cupfuls of flour
- 1/2 teaspoonful of ginger
- 1/2 teaspoonful of soda

## Directions

1. Beat molasses
2. Add butter, beaten eggs, cream, ginger, soda and flour
3. Bake in a hot oven

title: Musta-kakku (Black Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups molasses
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1/2 cup cream
- 3 eggs
- 3 cups flour
- 1/2 teaspoon soda
- 1/2 teaspoon ginger

## Directions

1. Rub molasses
2. Add butter
3. Add beaten eggs
4. Add cream, ginger, soda and flour
5. Bake in a hot oven

title: Mustikka pai (Huckleberry Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- pastry
- huckleberries
- a little corn starch or flour
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- a little salt

## Directions

1. Cover pieplate with pastry
2. Fill with huckleberries, mixed with a little corn starch or flour
3. Pour 1/2 cupful of sugar on and dust with a little salt
4. Place the upper crust on
5. Bake in a moderate oven

title: Mustikkapiirakka (Blueberry Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- blueberries
- sugar
- ½ tablespoon cornstarch
- 2 tablespoons lemon juice
- cinnamon
- salt
- pastry for two crusts
- egg white or bread crumbs
- alternative: 1 egg yolk and 3 tablespoons cream

## Directions

1. Cover a pie plate with pastry, brush with egg white or sprinkle with bread crumbs.
2. Fill with blueberries mixed with sugar, ½ tablespoon cornstarch, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, cinnamon and salt.
3. Cover with the crust, bake in a moderate oven.
4. Instead of cornstarch, an egg yolk beaten with 3 tablespoons of cream may be used and poured over the berries.

title: Mutton Broth
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 lbs. of lean mutton
- 3 quarts of cold water
- 6 peppercorns
- 1 tablespoonful of salt

## Directions

1. Cut the meat into pieces and remove the fat.
2. Put the meat into the kettle with bones, pour cold water on them.
3. Place on a slow fire to boil for a few hours.
4. Strain and remove the fat.
5. Serve with rice or barley.

title: Mutton Chops
body:
## Ingredients

- mutton chops
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- mashed potatoes or string beans

## Directions

1. Trim off the fat
2. Scrape the bones
3. Broil on both sides
4. One inch thick chops have to be broiled 8-10 minutes
5. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
6. Dot with small bits of butter
7. Arrange the chops on a hot platter having mashed potatoes or string beans in centre of it

title: Mutton Fricasse
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds of mutton
- vegetables
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- butter

## Directions

1. Cut mutton into pieces
2. Wipe
3. Put into a kettle and pour over it boiling water
4. Cook slowly with vegetables until the meat is tender
5. Strain
6. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
7. Dip in flour and fry in butter
8. Arrange on a platter
9. Make sauce of the liquor of mutton, by carefully removing the fat first
10. Pour the brown sauce upon it

title: Mutton Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- remains of roast mutton
- 3 quarts of water
- 2 stalks of celery
- 1 small pickle onion
- 1 small parsnip
- 2 sprigs of parsley
- salt and pepper
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 yolks
- 1/2 cupful of cream

## Directions

1. Cut the bones and put into cold water.
2. Place on the fire.
3. When coming to boiling point add the browned vegetables and seasonings into it.
4. Let cook slowly for a few hours.
5. Thicken with butter and flour.
6. Strain and season.
7. Whip the yolks with cream.
8. Pour the soup slowly into it whipping well.

title: Mutton with Cabbage
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 lbs. of breast of mutton
- 1-2 cabbages
- 2 tablespoonfuls of salt
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 10 peppercorns
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1 quart of boiling water

## Directions

1. Cut the meat into pieces and crack the bones.
2. Chop the cabbage coarsely.
3. Put the butter into a kettle and lay meat and cabbage alternately in.
4. Sprinkle with salt, flour and pepper.
5. Pour 1 quart of boiling water over.
6. Cook tightly covered on a slow fire 2-3 hours, or until the meat and cabbage are tender.
7. Meat may also be browned first and a little water put into the pan, then pour the water over the meat and cabbage.

title: Muusi-Kotletti (Mousse Cutlets)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds veal
- 1 cup rich milk
- salt
- pepper
- mustard
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Grind the meat several times.
2. Add the milk gradually, rubbing well, and season with salt, pepper and mustard.
3. Form into cutlets, dip in egg and bread crumbs.
4. Brown in butter.
5. Cover and continue frying until done.
6. Make a gravy of the drippings by adding flour and bouillon, or serve with tomato, milk or Bearnaise sauce.

title: Muusi-Kotletti (Mousse Cutlets)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. of veal
- 1 cupful of rich milk
- salt
- pepper
- mustard
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter
- veal stock

## Directions

1. Grind veal several times.
2. Mix with milk gradually, stirring thoroughly.
3. Add seasonings.
4. Form into cutlets.
5. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
6. Fry in butter until brown.
7. Pour a little veal stock over and let boil 10-15 minutes.

title: Muusilla täytetty kana (Chicken Stuffed with Mousse)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken
- chicken breast for mousse
- truffles
- red pepper
- Hollandaise sauce

## Directions

1. Bone the chicken carefully so as not to break the skin.
2. Make a mousse of chicken breast.
3. Stuff, adding truffles and red pepper cut into long strips between the layers of stuffing.
4. Sew up.
5. Wrap into a cloth and steam until tender.
6. Remove the cloth and put in the oven to evaporate but not to brown.
7. Place on a platter.
8. Cut lengthwise in the middle, then slice crosswise.
9. Serve with Hollandaise sauce.

title: Muussilla täytetty kana (Chicken Stuffed with Mousse)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken
- chicken breast for mousse
- truffles
- red pepper

## Directions

1. Bone the chicken and remove the flesh carefully so the skin does not tear
2. Make mousse from the chicken breast
3. Place the mousse mixture inside the skin
4. Intersperse with truffles and red pepper cut into long slices
5. Sew closed
6. Wrap in cloth and steam until firm to the touch
7. Remove cloth and place in oven to dry briefly without browning
8. Place on a serving dish
9. Cut lengthwise down the middle and then crosswise into neat slices
10. Serve with Holland sauce

title: Mykyä (Dumplings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 cup milk
- 3 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix all the dry ingredients.
2. Rub the butter into it with fingers.
3. Add the milk slowly.
4. Roll into a sheet 1/2 inch thick.
5. Cut into small circles with a round cutter.
6. Place into the kettle to cook with the meat.
7. Boil slowly so as not to break the dumplings.
8. Serve immediately because the dumplings will fall quickly.

title: Nauriita maitosoosin kanssa (Creamed Turnips)
body:
## Ingredients

- turnips
- salt
- water
- milk sauce
- butter

## Directions

1. Peel and rinse turnips and cut in cubes
2. Boil in salted water until tender
3. Drain and mix with milk sauce moderately thick
4. If used without milk sauce, add some butter to turnips
5. Shake over the fire until butter is mixed with turnips

title: Nauriita maitosoosin kanssa (Turnips with Milk Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- turnips
- salted water
- milk sauce

## Directions

1. Peel, wash and cut turnips into dice.
2. Cook in salted water until tender.
3. Strain and add milk sauce so that it reaches the usual consistency.

title: Naurispaistosta (Turnip Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups boiled mashed turnips
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoons almonds
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- Pepper

## Directions

1. Add to the mashed turnips butter, sugar, salt, pepper, blanched and grated almonds, bread crumbs and eggs beaten.
2. Put into a buttered mold, sprinkle with bread crumbs.
3. Bake until the top becomes brown.
4. Serve with mutton or pork.

title: Naurispaistosta (Turnip Roast)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds turnips
- 1/2 teaspoonful salt
- 1/8 teaspoonful pepper
- 3 tablespoonfuls butter
- 1 1/2 tablespoonfuls sugar
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls almonds
- 1 cupful bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Peel, wash and cook turnips until tender.
2. Mash the turnips.
3. Add butter, sugar, peeled and grated almonds, bread crumbs and beaten eggs.
4. Pour into a buttered mould, sprinkle bread crumbs on top and bake in the oven until the top is brown.
5. Serve with lamb or pork.

title: Noodles
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1/2 tablespoonful water
- salt
- flour enough to make a dough

## Directions

1. Beat eggs to a froth
2. Add water, salt and flour enough to make a dough
3. Knead the dough thoroughly
4. Roll as thin as paper
5. Cover with a damp towel and let stand for a while
6. Cut with a sharp knife into nice strips
7. Let dry on the table
8. Cook the noodles for 15 minutes before adding to the soup
9. They may also be rolled together and cut with a knife into very thin slices

title: Noodles (Noodeleja)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1/2 tablespoonful water
- salt
- flour

## Directions

1. Whisk 2 eggs into foam; add 1/2 tablespoonful of water, a little salt, and flour enough to make a thick dough.
2. Knead the dough well.
3. Roll out thin, like thin paper.
4. Cover with a cloth and let stand for a little while.
5. Cut into nice pieces with a sharp knife.
6. Let dry on the table.
7. Boil 15 minutes before putting in the soup.

title: Nopea Kakku (Quick Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of butter
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cupful of milk
- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 2 1/2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder
- 1/2 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- 3/4 teaspoonful of nutmeg

## Directions

1. Put all ingredients into a bowl, beat well five minutes.
2. Bake in a buttered baking pan 30 - 40 minutes.

title: Nopea laserrus (Quick Icing)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg white
- a small cup sugar
- 3 tablespoons cold water
- vanilla for flavoring
- coffee or chocolate (optional)
- 1 1/2 ounces chocolate dissolved (optional)

## Directions

1. Put into a double boiler 1 egg white, a small cup sugar and 3 tablespoons cold water
2. Cook for 7 minutes and beat while cooking
3. Flavor with vanilla
4. Instead of water, coffee or chocolate may be used
5. 1 1/2 ounces of chocolate dissolved may be added after removing the icing from the fire

title: Normandy Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of fish stock
- white wine
- 2 egg yolks
- a little cream

## Directions

1. Mix butter with flour
2. Add fish stock
3. Flavor with a dash of white wine
4. Mix with yolks of 2 eggs and a little cream

title: Noste Muffensia (Yeast Muffins)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- ½ teaspoonful of salt
- ¾ cake of yeast
- 2 eggs
- 3–4 cupfuls of flour

## Directions

1. Heat milk
2. Add sugar, salt, butter and yeast dissolved in a small amount of milk
3. Add enough flour to make a loose batter
4. Cover and let rise overnight
5. In the morning beat eggs well
6. Mix into the batter
7. Fill buttered muffin molds about halfway
8. Let rise until full
9. Bake about 30 minutes
10. Alternatively, use ⅓ cupful of cornmeal and ¾ cupful of wheat flour

title: Noste vohvelia (Risen Waffles)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ cupfuls of milk
- ½ teaspoonful of salt
- 1½ cupfuls of flour
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 eggs
- ¼ cake of yeast

## Directions

1. Scald milk, add yeast dissolved, butter, salt and flour, stirring well.
2. Set to rise over night.
3. In the morning mix with beaten eggs and fry like waffles usually.

title: Noste-kauraryyni-muffensia (Risen Oatmeal Muffins)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- ½ yeast cake
- ½ teaspoon salt
- 2 cups flour
- 1 cup cold oatmeal porridge
- 2 tablespoons butter

## Directions

1. Warm the milk, add salt, sugar, butter melted and yeast dissolved in milk, oatmeal and flour.
2. Cover and let rise over night.
3. In the morning butter muffin tins, fill to ¾ of their height, let rise until full.
4. Bake in a moderate oven for 30 minutes.

title: Noste-muffensia (Risen Muffins)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- ½ teaspoon salt
- ¼ yeast cake
- 2 eggs
- 3 or 4 cups flour

## Directions

1. Warm the milk, add sugar, salt and yeast dissolved in a small quantity of milk.
2. Make a moderately thick dough by adding flour to the milk.
3. Let rise over night.
4. In the morning mix the dough with the beaten eggs.
5. Half fill the buttered muffin tins, let rise until full and bake for 30 minutes.

title: Noste-pyörylöitä (Risen Doughnuts)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups warmed milk
- 3/4 cups sugar
- 1/4 cup butter
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 yeast cake
- 2 eggs
- Some nutmeg
- Flour

## Directions

1. Dissolve yeast in lukewarm milk, add salt and flour enough to make a thick batter, let rise over night.
2. In the morning add melted butter and eggs beaten with sugar.
3. Work more flour in, if necessary.
4. Let rise again.
5. Roll out to 1/2 inch thickness, shape into rings or round balls.
6. Let rise, cook in boiling fat until light brown.
7. Dip in powdered sugar.

title: Nostevohveleita (Risen Waffles)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups milk
- 2 cups flour
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 eggs
- 1/2 yeast cake

## Directions

1. Warm the milk
2. Add the dissolved yeast, butter, salt and flour
3. Stir well
4. Let rise over night
