5. In the morning add the eggs beaten until frothy
6. Fry in hot greased waffle-iron until brown on both sides

title: Nougat Putinki (Nougat Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 whites of eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls of finely chopped almonds
- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 3 yolks of eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1/2 tablespoonful of corn starch
- 8 gelatine leaves
- a little brandy
- 5 tablespoonfuls of whipped cream
- 1 package lemon jelly
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of water

## Directions

1. Beat 3 whites of eggs until stiff.
2. Add 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar and 2 tablespoonfuls of finely chopped almonds.
3. Boil 2 cupfuls of milk.
4. Drop the beaten whites with spoon into it and let boil for a few minutes.
5. Take out the drops and set to drain.
6. Add 3 yolks, whipped with 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar and 1/2 tablespoonful of corn starch into the milk.
7. Stir the mixture over the fire until it thickens.
8. Add 8 gelatine leaves, dissolved, and let cool.
9. When cold, mix with a little brandy and 5 tablespoonfuls of whipped cream.
10. Lay the white drops on the bottom of the mold.
11. Pour on them slowly 1 cupful of jelly made from 1 package lemon jelly and 1 1/2 cupfuls of water.
12. When firm, lay the cream mixture on it and set to harden.

title: Nougat-putinki (Nougat Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 egg whites
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 2 tablespoons finely chopped almonds
- 2 cups milk
- 3 egg yolks
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 1/2 tablespoon cornstarch
- 1/2 package gelatine
- lemon juice
- 5 tablespoons whipped cream
- 1 package lemon jelly powder
- 1/2 cup water

## Directions

1. Beat until firm 3 egg whites, add 2 tablespoons sugar.
2. Scald 2 cups milk with 2 tablespoons finely chopped almonds.
3. Drop the beaten egg whites by the spoonful into the milk, let boil for a few minutes.
4. Take out the whites, drain.
5. Add to the milk 3 egg yolks beaten with 2 tablespoons sugar and 1/2 tablespoon cornstarch.
6. Beat over the fire until thick, add 1/2 package of gelatine, let cool.
7. When cold, add some lemon juice and 5 tablespoons whipped cream.
8. Lay on the bottom of a mold the whites.
9. Pour slowly over the whites 1 cup of liquid jelly made of 1 package of lemon jelly powder and 1/2 cup water.
10. When firm, pour the cream mixture over, put aside to set.

title: Nut Farcie (Nut Loaf)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of nuts
- 1 lb. of potatoes
- 3/4 lb. of bread crumbs
- 2 ozs. of corn starch
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of milk
- 3 eggs
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes and mash
2. Grind shelled nuts
3. Combine both mixtures
4. Add bread crumbs soaked in milk
5. Add whipped eggs, corn starch and seasonings
6. Put in a buttered mold
7. Bake in a pan of water
8. Alternatively, form into croquettes and fry in butter
9. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and vegetable stock
10. Mix sauce with cream

title: Nut Farcie (Vegetarian Nut Loaf)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of nuts
- 1 lb. of potatoes
- 3/4 lb. of bread crumbs
- 2 ozs. of corn starch
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of milk
- 3 eggs
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes and mash.
2. Grind shelled nuts.
3. Combine both the mixtures.
4. Add bread crumbs soaked in milk, whipped eggs, corn starch and seasonings.
5. Put in a buttered mold and bake in a pan of water.

title: Oatmeal Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of oatmeal
- 1/2 cupful of molasses
- 1/2 cupful of hot water
- 1 yeast cake
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- flour

## Directions

1. Cook oatmeal to a batter
2. When cool add salt, molasses and yeast dissolved in lukewarm water
3. Add flour enough to make a thin batter
4. Put in buttered molds to rise
5. Bake in a moderate oven 1-1 1/2 hours
6. Serve on following day

title: Oatmeal Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 1 cupful of oatmeal
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 1/2 cupful of water or milk
- 1 egg
- 1 1/2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix flour with sugar, salt and baking powder, work butter into it
2. Whip egg with sugar, add milk into it and pour it slowly into the flour
3. Roll the batter thin, cut with cutter into small cookies
4. Lay on greased baking-sheet and bake in a hot oven to light brown

title: Oatmeal Cookies I
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of oatmeal
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 1/2 cupful of granulated sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoonful of cream
- 1 teaspoonful of baking powder
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 1/2 cupful of butter

## Directions

1. Cream butter with sugar
2. Add beaten eggs and cream
3. Mix in oatmeal, flour mixed with baking powder and salt
4. Rub well
5. Roll into a thin sheet, take with cutter small round cakes
6. Bake in a hot oven

title: Oatmeal Cookies II
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of oatmeal
- 3/4 lb. of flour
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of milk
- 1 1/4 lb. of butter
- 2 teaspoonfuls of salt
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of baking soda
- 1/2 teaspoonful of cream of tartar

## Directions

1. Boil milk with oatmeal
2. Add salt and sugar
3. When cool mix with melted butter and flour sifted with baking soda and cream of tartar
4. Roll into a thin sheet
5. Take with cutter small round cakes
6. Lay on a buttered mold
7. Bake to a light brown

title: Oatmeal Cookies III
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 3/4 lb. of butter
- 1 1/4 lb. of sugar
- 3 1/2 cupfuls of oatmeal
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour

## Directions

1. Whip eggs with sugar to a froth
2. Mix with melted butter, oatmeal and flour
3. Drop from tip of spoon in small portions on a buttered baking sheet
4. Bake until brown

title: Oisteri cocktaili (Oyster Cocktail)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons vinegar
- 1 tablespoon grated horseradish
- 4 tablespoons lemon juice
- 3 tablespoons tomato catsup
- A few drops of tobasco
- Salt
- Paprika
- Small oysters

## Directions

1. Make a dressing of vinegar, grated horseradish, lemon juice, tomato catsup, a few drops of tobasco, salt and paprika.
2. Place on ice to cool.
3. Wash small oysters and chill on ice.
4. Serve ice cold in small glasses, five oysters in each glass and the dressing poured over the oysters.

title: Oisteri Cocktaili (Oyster Cocktail)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of vinegar
- 1 tablespoonful of grated horseradish
- 4 tablespoonfuls of lemon juice
- 3 tablespoonfuls of tomato catsup
- Tabasco sauce
- salt
- paprika
- ice
- small oysters

## Directions

1. Mix vinegar, grated horseradish, lemon juice, tomato catsup, Tabasco sauce, salt and paprika
2. Set on ice to cool
3. Wash small oysters and set on ice
4. Serve in small glasses with five oysters in each glass and sauce poured over

title: Oisteri Cocktaili (Oyster Cocktail)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls vinegar
- 1 tablespoonful grated horseradish
- 4 tablespoonfuls lemon juice
- 3 tablespoonfuls tomato catsup
- a few drops of Tabasco
- salt
- paprika
- small oysters

## Directions

1. Mix vinegar with grated horseradish, lemon juice, tomato catsup, Tabasco, salt and paprika.
2. Place on ice to get cool.
3. Wash small oysters and place on ice.
4. Serve the cocktail in small glasses, with five oysters in each glass.
5. Pour the sauce over the oysters.

title: Oisteri Mykyjä (Oyster Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup flour
- 1 pint oysters
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 1/2 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs
2. Add milk, flour, baking powder and finely chopped oysters
3. Add salt
4. Drop by the spoonful into boiling lard
5. Cook until brown on both sides
6. Serve hot garnished with slices of lemon and parsley

title: Oisteri-Kalopsi (Scalloped Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint oysters
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 1/2 cups bread crumbs
- Equal parts oyster liquor and milk or cream
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Clean and drain 1 pint of oysters
2. Mix 1/2 cup of butter and 1 1/2 cups of bread crumbs
3. Butter a mold and dredge with bread crumbs
4. Lay alternately oysters and bread crumbs into the mold, sprinkling with salt and pepper
5. Have a layer of bread crumbs on the top
6. Mix equal parts of oyster liquor and milk or cream to fill the mold
7. Bake in a hot oven for 20 or 30 minutes
8. Serve in the mold

title: Oisteri-mykyjä (Oyster Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 cupful of flour
- 1 pint of oysters
- 1 teaspoonful of baking powder
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs
2. Add milk, flour and baking powder, salt and chopped oysters
3. Drop by the spoonful into boiling lard
4. Cook until brown on both sides
5. Serve hot garnished with slices of lemon

title: Oisteri-soppa (Oyster Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 dozen oysters
- 3 cupfuls of oyster liquor
- 1 stalk of celery
- 1 sprig of parsley
- slice of onion
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 3 cupfuls of milk
- 1 cupful of cream
- salt, pepper and a little mace

## Directions

1. Scald the oysters in their own liquor until they ruffle.
2. Strain the liquor and thicken with butter and flour.
3. Add onion, celery and parsley into it and let boil for 10 minutes.
4. Remove the vegetables from the soup.
5. Mix the soup with a pinch of soda before pouring the cream in.
6. Pour the scalded cream and milk gently into it.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Put the oysters into the soup, scald it and serve.

title: Oisteria Makaroonien Kanssa (Oysters with Macaroni)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound macaroni
- Oysters
- Salt and pepper
- Grated cheese
- Butter

## Directions

1. Boil 1/2 pound of macaroni broken in pieces 1 inch long in salted water until tender
2. Strain and rinse well in cold water
3. Fill a buttered mold with alternating layers of macaroni and oysters
4. Sprinkle oysters with salt and pepper
5. Lay macaroni on the top
6. Sprinkle with grated cheese and dot with butter
7. Bake for 20 or 30 minutes
8. Instead of macaroni, spinach or rice may be used

title: Oisterikeitto (Oyster Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 dozen oysters
- 3 cups liquor of oysters
- 1 stalk celery
- 1 sprig of parsley
- Slice of onion
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 3 cups milk
- 1 cup cream
- Salt and pepper
- Soda

## Directions

1. Scald the oysters in their own liquor until they ruffle.
2. Strain, add onion, celery and parsley and cook for 10 minutes.
3. Thicken with butter and flour, remove the vegetables from the soup, add some soda so as not to curdle.
4. Pour the scalded milk and cream slowly into the soup.
5. Add the oysters, season, scald and serve.
6. May be made by using equal parts of clams and oysters.

title: Oisterimiihennus (Oyster Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart oysters
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup cream
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour

## Directions

1. Strain the liquor of the oysters through a fine cloth, put on the fire.
2. Thicken with butter and flour.
3. Wash the oysters, add to the hot liquor and bring quickly to a boil.
4. Mix with teaspoonful of soda.
5. Scald the milk with the cream, pour slowly into the soup.
6. Yolks of 2 hard boiled eggs rubbed through a sieve and added to the soup will improve the color and taste.
7. Serve with slices of lemon and toast.

title: Oisterit Hyydykkeen Kanssa (Oysters à la Aspic)
body:
## Ingredients

- Oysters
- Salt
- Pepper
- Lemon juice
- Aspic made from oyster liquor
- Red pepper
- Jelly

## Directions

1. Boil the oysters quickly with salt, pepper and lemon juice
2. Wipe and put on a platter in two rows
3. Prepare an aspic from the liquor in the pan
4. Baste the oysters with the aspic, having a moderately thick layer covering them
5. Garnish with red pepper, lemon and whipped jelly

title: Oisterit hyydykkeen kanssa (Oysters à la Aspic)
body:
## Ingredients

- oysters
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- aspic
- toast
- red pepper
- chopped jelly

## Directions

1. Place the oysters on the fire
2. Mix with salt, pepper and lemon juice
3. Bring to the boil
4. Wipe and put in two rows on a platter
5. Prepare the aspic of the liquor
6. Baste the oysters with the aspic
7. Arrange on toast
8. Garnish with red pepper, lemon and chopped jelly

title: Oisterit Silavan Kanssa (Oysters with Bacon)
body:
## Ingredients

- Large oysters
- Thin slices of bacon
- Flour

## Directions

1. Choose large oysters and wipe dry
2. Roll each oyster into a thin slice of bacon
3. Fasten with a toothpick
4. Dredge with flour
5. Fry quickly in a pan
6. Serve very hot

title: Oisterit silavan kanssa (Oysters with Bacon)
body:
## Ingredients

- large oysters
- bacon
- flour

## Directions

1. Choose large oysters and wipe them
2. Wrap each oyster in a thin slice of bacon
3. Dip in flour
4. Fry quickly

title: Omelet Souffle (Omeletti-vanukas)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of vanilla
- butter
- sugar for sprinkling

## Directions

1. Beat separately the whites and yolks of 4 eggs.
2. Mix the yolks with 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar and 1 tablespoonful of vanilla and whip well.
3. At the last stir gently into it the hard beaten whites.
4. Turn it into a buttered omelet dish and sprinkle with sugar.
5. Bake in a hot oven until lightly browned.

title: Omelet à la Dauphin
body:
## Ingredients

- apples or other fruit
- sugar
- a little butter
- eggs
- milk or cream
- salt
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Cook apples or other fruit with sugar and a little butter.
2. Prepare omelet as usually.
3. Fold cooked fruit in.
4. Garnish with whipped cream.

title: Omeletti à la Dauphin (Omelet à la Dauphin)
body:
## Ingredients

- Apples or other fruit
- Sugar
- A little butter
- Whipped cream

## Directions

1. Cook apples or any other kind of fruit with sugar and a little lump of butter.
2. Prepare an omelet as directed.
3. Fold the cooked fruit into the omelet.
4. Garnish with whipped cream.

title: Omelettivanukas (Omelet Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 1 tablespoon vanilla
- butter
- sugar for sprinkling

## Directions

1. Beat separately whites and yolks of 4 eggs.
2. Mix the yolks with 3 tablespoons of sugar, 1 tablespoon of vanilla, beating well.
3. Add carefully the whites beaten stiff.
4. Turn into a buttered mold and sprinkle with sugar.
5. Bake in a hot oven until light brown.

title: Omena Kastike (Apple Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Pare and core the apples, put on the fire with a little water.
2. Let boil covered, until soft.
3. Force through a strainer and sweeten to taste with sugar.
4. Apples cooked without paring make a better sauce.
5. Serve with roast pork and turkey.

title: Omena Lunta (Apple Snow)
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- 1 pint of apple sauce
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 3 whites of eggs
- 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cook apples until tender.
2. Force through a sieve and set to cool.
3. Mix apple sauce with sugar and lemon juice.
4. Add whites, beaten stiff.
5. Serve in small glasses, covered with whipped cream.

title: Omena- ja leipäputinkia (Apple and Bread Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups apples
- 2 cups bread
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 tablespoons butter
- Cinnamon
- Rind of 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Cut the bread and the apples in small cubes, mix with lemon rind, sugar and cinnamon.
2. Put into a buttered mold, pour 0.5 cup water over.
3. Dot with butter.
4. Bake covered, removing the cover only to brown the surface.
5. Serve with vanilla sauce or whipped cream.

title: Omena- ja leipäputinkia (Apple- and Bread Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of apples, cut in pieces
- 3 cupfuls of bread, cut in pieces
- 1 cupful of sugar
- a little cinnamon
- 1 tablespoonful of butter

## Directions

1. Cut bread and apples in small cubes and mix with sugar and cinnamon
2. Dot with bits of butter
3. Bake in oven, first covered, then uncovered to brown the surface
4. Serve with whipped cream

title: Omena- ja viinimarjahyytelö (Apple and Currant Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- currants
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Pare apples and cut in pieces.
2. Put over the fire in cold water, having water just enough to cover the apples.
3. When tender, add currants, allowing 1 part of currants to 2 parts of apples.
4. Cook until tender and strain.
5. Prepare the jelly as directed.

title: Omena-kermaa (Apple Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cream
- 1 cup apple sauce
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 1/2 yellow rind of a lemon, grated
- 1/2 package gelatine

## Directions

1. Add to the apple sauce the lemon rind and the gelatine dissolved in water.
2. Last of all mix with the whipped cream.
3. Pour into a wet mold to set.
4. Unmold onto a serving dish.
5. Garnish with fruit and macaroons.

title: Omena-pääryniä (Apple Pears)
body:
## Ingredients

- apple sauce
- brandy
- carmine coloring
- pears
- sugar
- 1 cup apple juice
- 3 tablespoons lemon juice
- 2 tablespoons cornstarch
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- cake or puff paste
- cream

## Directions

1. Mix apple sauce with brandy and carmine coloring, beat well
2. Pare the pears, split and cook with sugar
3. Let cool
4. Baste with a sauce made of 1 cup apple juice, 3 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 tablespoons cornstarch, 4 tablespoons sugar, carmine coloring
5. Place the pears on a cake or puff paste having the apple sauce in the center
6. Garnish with cream

title: Omenahilloa (Apple Compote)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 pounds of apples
- 4 pounds of sugar
- 3 cupfuls of water
- a piece of cinnamon
- lemon rind

## Directions

1. Pare and core 6 pounds of apples.
2. Prepare them whole or cut in nice pieces.
3. Cook 4 pounds of sugar, 3 cupfuls of water, a piece of cinnamon and lemon rind until thick syrup.
4. Place the apples in and let simmer until quite done and clear.
5. Put in jar and seal as directed.

title: Omenahilloke (Apple Preserve)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. of sugar per 1 quart of water
- apples

## Directions

1. Make a sugar syrup of 2 lbs. of sugar to 1 quart of water.
2. Peel apples, remove seeds and cut in pieces or keep whole.
3. Carefully place them in glass jars with airtight covers and fill jars with sugar syrup.
4. Place covers on and set jars in kettle on stands so they do not break when boiling.
5. Pour lukewarm water so it covers 3/4 of the jars.
6. Set kettle on fire, let water heat slowly and then boil 20-30 minutes, depending on the size and type of fruit.
7. Leave jars in water until they cool.

title: Omenahyytelöä (Apple Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- washed unpared crab apples
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Cut washed unpared and uncored apples or crab apples in halves
2. Cook until soft, allowing 1 part of water to 2 parts of apples (10 quarts apples to 5 quarts water)
3. Strain through a cheese cloth without pressing the cloth
4. Weigh the juice and have an equal amount of sugar
5. Place the juice on the fire, when coming to boil, add the sugar
6. Simmer stirring often, until it becomes firm when dropped from a spoon on a cold plate
7. Skim carefully and pour into hot jelly glasses
8. When cooled down, cover the top with melted wax

title: Omenakohokas (Apple Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups apple sauce
- juice of 1 lemon
- 4 egg whites
- sugar to taste

## Directions

1. Add to the apple sauce the lemon juice, sugar according to taste and the whites beaten stiff.
2. Bake in a buttered mold as directed for souffles.
3. Serve with vanilla sauce or cream.

title: Omenakohokas (Apple Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups apple sauce
- 4 egg whites
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed for apple snow
2. Allow 2 cups of apple sauce to 4 egg whites
3. Bake in a slow oven for 25 minutes
4. Serve with whipped cream

title: Omenakohokas (Apple Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of apple sauce
- whites of 4 eggs

## Directions

1. Beat whites to a firm froth, mix with apple sauce.
2. Pour the mixture into a buttered mold.
3. Bake in a pan of water.
4. Serve with vanilla sauce or cream.

title: Omenakohokas (Apple Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 ripe apples
- 3 eggs
- 2 ozs. of butter
- 2 ozs. of flour
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of milk
- 3 ozs. of sugar
- a dash of cinnamon
- jam

## Directions

1. Pare and core the apples and cook with 1 cupful of sugar and cinnamon.
2. Lay them on bottom of a souffle mold and fill the hollowed cores with jam.
3. Cook half of the butter with flour and milk until paste.
4. Whip yolks with sugar and stir it into the paste, add remaining butter.
5. Lastly mix with the stiff beaten whites.
6. Pour the mixture on the apples.
7. Bake in oven nearly 30 minutes.

title: Omenakohokas (Apple Soufflé)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 good apples
- 4 tablespoons butter
- 5 tablespoons flour
- 1 1/2 cups milk
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 3 eggs
- Dash of cinnamon
- Few teaspoons jam

## Directions

1. Pare and core the apples, cook with 1 cup of sugar and a stick of cinnamon.
2. Lay the apples into a buttered mold, fill the hollowed cores with jam.
3. Cook a batter of 2 tablespoons butter, flour and milk.
4. Beat the yolks of the eggs with the sugar, add to the batter with the rest of the butter.
5. Last of all mix with the whites whipped to a firm froth.
6. Cover the apples with the mixture.
7. Bake in oven in a pan of water for 30 minutes.
8. When the surface is becoming brown, cover with buttered paper.

title: Omenakräämiä (Apple Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of cream
- 2 cupfuls of apple sauce, cooked with sugar
- 1/2 grated lemon rind
- 7 leaves or 5 tablespoonfuls of gelatine

## Directions

1. Mix apple sauce with lemon rind and gelatine.
2. Add cream, whipped to a froth.
3. Wet a mold with cold water and pour the cream mixture into it.
4. Let get firm.
5. Turn on a serving dish and garnish with fruit and macaroons.

title: Omenakääryjä (Apple Dumplings)
body:
## Ingredients

- Puff paste
- Apples
- Sugar
- Cinnamon
- Butter
- Egg white
- Hard sauce

## Directions

1. Roll puff paste into a thin sheet and cut into squares large enough to enclose an apple.
2. Peel and core the apples, then bake for a while.
3. Place an apple in the center of each square.
4. Fill the hollowed core with sugar mixed with cinnamon.
5. Dot with butter.
6. Moisten the edges of the paste with egg white and close the paste by bringing the corners together.
7. Turn the edges in and spread with egg.
8. Bake in a moderate oven until the apples feel tender.
9. Serve hot with hard sauce.

title: Omenakääryjä (Apple Dumplings)
body:
## Ingredients

- puff paste
- apples
- sugar
- cinnamon
- butter
- egg white

## Directions

1. Roll puff paste into a thin sheet, cut into squares, big enough to enclose an apple.
2. Pare and core apples.
3. Bake them in oven a little while.
4. Put in the centre of each square an apple, fill the core with sugar, mixed with a little cinnamon and dot with a little piece of butter.
5. Dampen the edges of the paste with white of egg, close the paste, bringing the corners together.
6. Turn the edges nicely in.
7. Spread with egg, bake in a moderate oven until the apples are softened.
8. Serve hot with hard sauce.

title: Omenalunta (Apple Snow)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup thick apple sauce
- sugar
- 4 egg whites
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Have 1 cup of thick apple sauce, sweeten with sugar according to taste
2. Add 4 egg whites beaten stiff
3. Serve in sherbet glasses with whipped cream on top

title: Omenamarmelaadia (Apple Marmalade)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 pounds apples
- 2.5 pounds sugar
- 3 cups water

## Directions

1. Wash and cut the apples in pieces.
2. Cook with water to a sauce.
3. Force the apple sauce through a strainer and return to the fire.
4. Add the sugar and simmer stirring continuously until of firm consistency.
5. Spread a platter with oil or butter and pour marmalade over, spreading with a knife.
6. When cold, cut in squares, dip in granulated sugar and dry.

title: Omenamarmelaadia (Apple Marmalade)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 lbs. of apples
- 2.5 lbs. of sugar
- 3 cupfuls of water

## Directions

1. Rinse apples, cut in pieces and put to boil with water until soft.
2. Press through a sieve and put to boil again with sugar, stirring constantly, until marmalade is firm.
3. Pour on plates greased with cooking oil or butter, which when cooled are cut into pieces, rolled in crystal sugar and dried.

title: Omenapai (Apple Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- pastry
- sliced apples
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice
- a little salt
- cinnamon
- a little butter
- egg

## Directions

1. Cover pieplate with pastry.
2. Fill with sliced apples.
3. Mix 1/2 cupful of sugar, 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice a little salt and cinnamon.
4. Pour over the apples.
5. Dot with a little butter.
6. Moisten the edges of the pastry with water, place upper crust on, press the edges together and fold them under.
7. Brush over with egg and bake in a moderate oven 1 hour.

title: Omenapannukakku (Apple Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 tablespoon baking powder
- Some salt
- Apples
- Egg yolks
- Sugar
- Milk
- Butter
- Flour
- Cinnamon
- Cream
- Egg whites

## Directions

1. Pare the apples, cut lengthwise in six or eight parts and slice thinly the parts crosswise.
2. Beat the yolks with sugar, add milk, butter, flour, cinnamon, salt and cream.
3. Add to the batter the slices of apples and last of all the whites beaten stiff.
4. Drop by the spoonful into boiling lard.
5. Cook until brown.
6. Serve with hard sauce.

title: Omenapiirakka (Apple Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- pastry for pie crust
- apples, thinly sliced
- 1/2 to 2/3 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice
- salt
- cinnamon
- butter
- egg for brushing

## Directions

1. Cover a pie plate with pastry.
2. Fill with thin slices of apples.
3. Mix 1/2 to 2/3 cup of sugar, 1 teaspoon lemon juice, some salt and cinnamon, add to the apples.
4. Dot with butter.
5. Moisten the edges of the pastry with water, place the upper crust on, press the edges together and fold the upper edge under the lower.
6. Brush with egg, bake in a moderate oven for 1 hour.

title: Omenaputinki (Apple Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups apple sauce
- 3 eggs
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 0.25 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- 0.5 teaspoon cinnamon
- 0.25 teaspoon nutmeg

## Directions

1. Mix the apple sauce with the spices, sugar, butter and the egg yolks, beat until frothy.
2. Bake in a buttered mold in a hot oven for 10-15 minutes.
3. Remove from the oven, coat with meringue made of the egg whites beaten stiff and 0.25 cup of powdered sugar and vanilla.
4. Return to the oven so as to brown the surface.
5. Serve cold with whipped cream.

title: Omenatipat (Apple Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 2 apples
- 5 tablespoonfuls of milk
- 1 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- 3 tablespoonfuls of whipped cream
- 3 eggs
- a little salt
- 1/2 teaspoonful of baking powder

## Directions

1. Peel and split the apples lengthwise in six or eight parts, slice the parts crosswise thinly.
2. Beat yolks with sugar, add milk, butter, flour, cinnamon, salt and cream.
3. Mix the paste with sliced apples and stir stiff beaten whites into it.
4. Drop with a spoon into boiling lard and cook until brown.
5. Serve with hard sauce.

title: Omenatippoja (Apple Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 1½ cups flour
- 2 large apples
- 4 tablespoons milk
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 3 tablespoons whipped cream
- 3 eggs
- ½ teaspoon baking powder
- Some salt
- Lard for frying

## Directions

1. Pare the apples
2. Cut lengthwise in six or eight parts
3. Slice thinly the parts crosswise
4. Beat the yolks with sugar
5. Add milk, butter, flour, cinnamon, salt and cream
6. Add the sliced apples to the batter
7. Last, fold in the beaten whites
8. Drop by the spoonful into boiling lard
9. Fry until brown
10. Serve with hard sauce

title: Omenavettä (Apple Juice)
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- sugar
- water
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Pare and core apples
2. Fill the cores with sugar
3. Bake until tender
4. Mash the apples
5. Add water, allowing 1 cup water and 1 teaspoon lemon juice to a large apple
6. Let stand for 1/2 hour
7. Strain

title: Orange Cream (Appelsiinikerma)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 egg yolks
- 2 ounces of sugar
- juice of 1 orange
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice
- 8 leaves or 6 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- 2 cupfuls of cream
- whipped cream
- egg whites

## Directions

1. Whip yolks and sugar together
2. Add orange and lemon juice and stir on the fire until thick
3. Add dissolved gelatine and let cool
4. Pour whipped cream and whites, beaten stiff and dry, into the mixture
5. Turn in a wet mold
6. Unmold on a serving dish

title: Orange Cream in Baskets (Appelsiinikerma koreissa)
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 oranges
- 3 egg yolks
- 2 ounces of sugar
- 1 cupful of thin cream
- 1/2 grated yellow lemon rind
- 1 grated orange rind
- juice of 5 oranges
- 6 leaves or 4 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of rich cream

## Directions

1. Put thin cream with orange and lemon rinds in a saucepan and place on fire to boil
2. Whip yolks and sugar together
3. Add the boiling cream gradually into it, stirring over the fire until it thickens
4. Set to cool
5. Mix with orange juice and gelatine
6. Add the whipped rich cream
7. For baskets: take oranges of equal size and remove one half from each one, leaving remaining part in shape of basket with a handle
8. Remove pulp and notch the edges of the peel in points
9. Fill baskets with the mixture

title: Orange Ice
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cupfuls of water
- 2 1/2 cupfuls of sugar
- juice and rind of 5 oranges
- 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Grate yellow rind of 2 oranges and of 1 lemon
2. Cook in water, mixed with sugar, 15 minutes
3. Let cool, mix with juice of fruits and freeze

title: Orange Marmelade
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 lbs. of oranges
- 2 lemons
- 5 lbs. of granulated sugar
- 1 1/2 quarts of water

## Directions

1. Wipe oranges and lemons carefully.
2. Peel and remove the white part from inside of peels.
3. Slice yellow rinds and put to simmer for 1/2 hour with 1 1/2 cupfuls of water.
4. Cut the fruit in pieces, remove seeds.
5. Place in kettle to simmer for 1/2 hour with 1 1/2 cupfuls of water.
6. Pour on a tight cloth to drain without stirring.
7. Simmer the drained juice mixed with sugar, sliced and cooked rinds of fruit and their own liquor for 15 minutes stirring constantly.
8. Place the marmalade in small jars and preserve as directed.
9. Serve with tea and toast.

title: Orange Omelet (Appelsiini-omeletti)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 4 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice
- 4 tablespoonfuls of orange juice
- the grated yellow rind of one orange
- butter

## Directions

1. Beat separate whites and yolks of 5 eggs.
2. Mix the yolks with 4 tablespoonfuls of sugar, 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice, 4 tablespoonfuls of orange juice and the grated yellow rind of one orange.
3. Last of all mix, lightly stirring, the beaten whites.
4. Melt a dot of butter in a hot omelet pan, pour the mixture in and cook until firm.
5. Fold once, and serve on a hot platter with slices of orange thoroughly sugared.

title: Orange Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- juice and rind of 2 oranges
- 2 teaspoonfuls of corn starch
- 3/4 cupful of sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of currant jelly or juice of 1/2 lemon

## Directions

1. Mix sugar with corn starch.
2. Add orange juice and grated rind, then currant jelly.
3. Stir on the fire until it is thick.

title: Orange-rind Liquor (Appelsiinin kuorimehu)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 big oranges
- 5 cupfuls of sugar
- 2 teaspoonfuls of lemon acid
- 1 quart of water

## Directions

1. Remove the white part from peels of five big oranges
2. Cut the rinds into strips and bottle with five cupfuls of sugar and 2 teaspoonfuls of lemon acid
3. Add 1 quart of water and keep the bottle in the sun for one week shaking it every day
4. Drain the liquor and bottle up
5. Cork and keep in a cold place
6. Mix with water when served

title: Orleanssi Putinki (Orleans Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 1/2 cupfuls of milk
- 3 1/2 cupfuls of cream
- 4 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- yolks of 6 eggs
- 10 leaves or 8 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- vanilla to flavor

## Directions

1. Stir all the ingredients, except cream, in a saucepan until the mixture is thick.
2. Beat the cream to a froth and mix with the cold mass.
3. Divide into three parts.
4. Color one part red, one chocolate colored, and leave one white.
5. Pile the parts in layers in a mold.

title: Ox-tail Soup (Häntäpaistin Keitto)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 ox-tails
- 1 onion
- 1 carrot
- 1 root or stalk of celery
- 1 sprig of parsley
- 5 peppercorns
- 2 cloves
- few grains of cayenne
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 5 quarts of brown stock
- a little wine and lemon
- 3 tablesp. of butter or 1 tablesp. of raw ham cut into pieces
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour

## Directions

1. Scrape the vegetables and cut into small cubes.
2. Cut the ox-tails separating them at the joints.
3. Saute the pieces with vegetables, flour and seasonings in butter in the soup-pot on a slow fire.
4. Add brown stock and salt into it, let simmer, covered, for 3 hours.
5. Remove the pieces of ox-tail, when the meat is tender, strain the stock, season with cayenne, white wine or sherry.
6. Serve with the pieces of ox-tail, hard boiled yolks of egg, fried bread dice and two slices of lemon.
7. Color with Kitchen Bouquet if wanted.

title: Oyster Stew
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of oysters
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 cupful of cream
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour

## Directions

1. Strain the oyster liquor through a fine sieve and put on heat.
2. Thicken with butter and flour.
3. Rinse the oysters and put into the hot liquor and let come to a quick boil.
4. Pour the scalded milk and cream gradually into it and season.

title: Oyster Stew
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of oysters
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 cupful of cream
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- yolks of 2 eggs
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Strain the oyster liquor through a fine cloth and place on the fire
2. Thicken with butter and flour
3. Wash the oysters and put into the hot liquor and bring quickly to boil
4. Pour the scalded milk and cream gradually in and season
5. Rub the yolks of two hard boiled eggs through a sieve and add to the soup to improve the taste
6. Serve with sliced lemon and toast

title: Oysters Fried in Batter (Taikinassa paistettu oisteri)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 1/2 cupful of flour
- 1/2 teaspoonful of baking powder
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- large oysters
- butter or lard
- lemon or parsley
- Tartar or lemon sauce

## Directions

1. Mix 1 egg with 1/2 cupful of milk and 1/2 cupful of flour mixed with 1/2 teaspoonful of baking powder and 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
2. Wash and wipe large oysters
3. Dip in batter
4. Cook in butter or lard
5. Serve on a folded napkin garnished with lemon or parsley
6. Serve with Tartar or lemon sauce

title: Oysters with Macaroni (Oisteri makaroonien kanssa)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 lb. of macaroni
- oysters
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- grated cheese

## Directions

1. Break 3/4 lb. of macaroni in pieces 1 inch long
2. Put into boiling water mixed with a little salt
3. Cook until tender
4. Strain and wash well in cold water
5. Fill a buttered mold with layers of macaroni and oysters sprinkled with salt and pepper
6. Dot with butter
7. Have the last layer of macaroni
8. Dredge with grated cheese
9. Bake for 20-30 minutes
10. Instead of macaroni spinach may be used

title: Paahdettu ankerias (Broiled Eel)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eel
- Water or fish stock
- Salt
- Pepper
- Lemon juice
- Melted butter

## Directions

1. Clean and cut the fish in 2 or 3 inch thick pieces.
2. Parboil with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
3. Wipe, dip in melted butter, broil on a slow fire.

title: Paahdettu Ankerias (Roasted Eel)
body:
## Ingredients

- eel
- water or fish stock
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Clean and cut eel into 2-3 inch pieces.
2. Boil in water or fish stock with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
3. Dry them and roll in melted butter.
4. Roast over a gentle fire.

title: Paahdettu Hummeri (Broiled Lobster)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lobster
- butter
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Prepare for broiling as directed.
2. Place on a buttered broiler.
3. Broil for 8 minutes on meat side.
4. Turn over and continue broiling for 6 minutes on shell side.
5. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and dot with butter.
6. Put in oven for a few minutes.
7. Open the claws.

title: Paahdettu Häränpaisti (Broiled Beef Steak)
body:
## Ingredients

- porterhouse, sirloin or round steak
- fat or grease
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- onions
- mushrooms (optional)
- brown gravy
- tomato, mushroom or Béarnaise sauce or parsley butter (optional)

## Directions

1. Wipe the steak with a cloth wrung out of boiling water.
2. Spread with grease and place on a larded broiler with the fat edge next to the handle.
3. Broil over a clear fire until brown on both sides.
4. Place on a hot platter, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and dot with butter.
5. Put in oven for a few minutes.
6. Serve with brown gravy having slices of fried onions on top. If mushrooms are used, place them on the steak and pour the gravy around.
7. May be served also with tomato, mushroom or Béarnaise sauce or parsley butter.

title: Paahdettu kala (Broiled Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- melted butter
- salt
- pepper
- parsley butter
- watercress
- lemon

## Directions

1. Split the fish in back, rinse, wipe dry, spread with melted butter.
2. Heat the broiler and grease.
3. Have the fire clear and hot for small fish, more moderate for large fish so as to have the inside done before the outside will scorch.
4. The fish should be first broiled on flesh side.
5. If there is danger of burning, lay the broiler on a pan in oven to finish the cooking.
6. Put the fish on a warm platter, spread with butter or parsley butter, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
7. Garnish with watercress and lemon.

title: Paahdettu kana (Broiled Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- Spring chicken or young chicken
- Melted butter
- Salt
- Pepper
- Lemon
- Watercress

## Directions

1. Use only spring chickens for broiling.
2. Divide from the back, draw and remove the backbone.
3. Wipe and rub with melted butter.
4. Broil over a slow fire skin side up until brown.
5. Turn over, brown on the other side.
6. Put in a pan, spread with melted butter, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
7. Place in oven for 15-20 minutes.
8. Arrange on the platter having small chickens cut in halves and the larger ones quartered.
9. Garnish around with lemon and watercress.

title: Paahdettu mahasylkirauhanen (Broiled Sweetbreads)
body:
## Ingredients

- Sweetbreads
- Melted butter
- Salt
- Pepper
- Fried mushrooms

## Directions

1. Prepare the sweetbreads as directed.
2. Wipe, dip in melted butter and broil over a clear fire turning often so as not to scorch them.
3. When done, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Baste with melted butter.
5. Line with fried mushrooms.

title: Paahdettu makrelli (Broiled Mackerel)
body:
## Ingredients

- mackerel
- butter or olive oil
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Soak the fish, wipe and spread with butter or olive oil and lemon juice.
2. Let stand for a while.
3. Broil on a slow fire, basting with butter often.
4. Serve with tomato or milk sauce.

title: Paahdettu makrelli (Broiled Mackerel)
body:
## Ingredients

- mackerel
- butter or salad oil
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Soak the fish, wipe and spread with butter or salad oil and lemon juice.
2. Let stand for a while.
3. Then broil on a slow fire spreading often with butter.
4. Serve with tomato or milk sauce.

title: Paahdettu maksa savustetun silavan kera (Broiled Liver with Bacon)
body:
## Ingredients

- Liver
- Hot water
- Salt
- Pepper
- Bacon
- Butter or lard (optional)

## Directions

1. Slice the liver 1/2 inch thick.
2. Pour hot water over and let stand 5 minutes, so the blood water runs off.
3. Wipe the liver slices and remove the skin from the surface.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Cut bacon slices of the same size as the liver slices and fasten with a skewer on top of the liver.
6. Broil over bright fire; put in the oven for a few minutes.
7. Dish.
8. If bacon is not used, the liver slices may be dipped in butter or lard before broiling.

title: Paahdettu maksa savustetun silavan kera (Broiled Liver with Bacon)
body:
## Ingredients

- Liver
- Bacon
- Salt
- Pepper
- Butter or lard (if bacon is not used)

## Directions

1. Cut the liver in slices 1/2 inch thick.
2. Cover with boiling water and let stand for 5 minutes to draw out the blood.
3. Wipe the slices and remove the skin carefully.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Cut slices of bacon the same size as the liver slices.
6. Fasten the bacon slices with toothpicks on the liver.
7. Broil over a clear fire and place in oven for a few minutes.
8. Dish and serve.
9. If bacon is not used, dip the liver in melted butter or lard before broiling.

title: Paahdettu Maksa Savustetun Silavan Kera (Broiled Liver with Bacon)
body:
## Ingredients

- liver
- boiling water
- salt
- pepper
- pork
- butter (optional)

## Directions

1. Cut liver in half an inch thick slices.
2. Cover with boiling water and let stand for 5 minutes to draw out the blood.
3. Wipe the slices and remove carefully the skin.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Cut pork into thin slices as big as the slices of liver and fasten with sticks on the liver.
6. Broil over a clear fire and push into the oven for a few minutes.
7. Dish on a plate.

title: Paahdettu Oisteri (Broiled Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- equal-sized oysters
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- bread crumbs or cracker crumbs
- lemon juice
- lemon butter

## Directions

1. Rinse and wipe equal-sized oysters
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
3. Dip in butter and lay on a buttered broiler
4. Broil for a few minutes over a clear fire on both sides
5. Serve on buttered toast having 3 or 4 oysters on each
6. Baste with melted butter and lemon juice
7. Serve with lemon butter

title: Paahdettu Oisteri (Broiled Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- oysters
- salt and pepper
- butter
- toast
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Wash and wipe oysters of uniform size.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Sprinkle with butter sauce and place on broiler.
4. Broil on both sides over bright fire for a few minutes.
5. Serve on toast spread with butter, about 3-4 for each serving.
6. Brush with a little butter sauce and lemon juice.
7. Serve with lemon butter.

title: Paahdettu peltopyy (Broiled Squab)
body:
## Ingredients

- Squab
- Salt
- Pepper
- Lemon juice
- Butter

## Directions

1. Remove the bones from the squabs, sprinkle with salt and pepper, flavor with lemon juice.
2. Let stand for awhile.
3. Broil on a slow fire, place in oven for a few minutes dotted with butter.
4. May be broiled leaving the bones in, same as directed for chicken.

title: Paahdettu peltopyy (Broiled Squab)
body:
## Ingredients

- squabs
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- butter

## Directions

1. Remove bones from squabs, sprinkle outside with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
2. Let stand for a little while.
3. Broil on a slow fire, dot with butter, push into the oven for a few minutes.
4. May be broiled leaving the bones in, same as directed for broiled chicken.

title: Paahdettu silliä
body:
## Ingredients

- herrings
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- melted butter

## Directions

1. Clean the herrings and wipe.
2. Dip in melted butter and broil on a slow fire.

title: Paahdettua Kinkkua (Broiled Ham)
body:
## Ingredients

- Slices of smoked ham
- Butter or olive oil

## Directions

1. Place ham slices on the fire in cold water.
2. Cook slowly until almost done.
3. Remove from the water and wipe dry.
4. Spread with butter or olive oil.
5. Broil until done.

title: Paahdettuja fillet pihviä (Broiled Fillet of Beef)
body:
## Ingredients

- Tenderloin (selkäliha)
- Salt
- Pepper
- Butter or olive oil
- Bearnaise sauce

## Directions

1. Cut tenderloin into pieces two inches thick.
2. Pound lightly.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Dip in butter or olive oil.
5. Broil.
6. Serve with Bearnaise sauce.

title: Paahdettuja liha-kakkuja (Broiled Meat Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds of chopped meat
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Mix the meat with rubbed butter, salt and pepper
2. Stir until smooth
3. Form into round thin cakes
4. Broil or fry in a pan
5. Arrange fried slices of onion on the cakes
6. Serve with brown sauce or parsley butter

title: Paahdettuja lihakakkuja (Broiled Meat Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds ground meat
- 3 tablespoons butter
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Mix the meat with butter rubbed to a cream and season.
2. Stir until smooth.
3. Form into round, thin cakes.
4. Broil or fry in a pan.
5. If desired, mix in two whites of eggs to make the cakes fluffy.
6. Serve with a brown gravy having sliced onions fried in butter on top of the cakes, or may be served with parsley butter.

title: Paahdettuja Munuaisia (Broiled Kidneys)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidneys
- salt
- pepper
- butter, melted
- lemon juice
- bread crumbs
- toasted bread

## Directions

1. Cut kidneys crosswise into slices.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Dip in melted butter mixed with some lemon juice.
4. Roll in bread crumbs.
5. Broil over a clear fire, turning often so as not to burn them.
6. Serve very hot on toast basted with melted butter.

title: Paahdettuja Munuaisia (Broiled Kidneys)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidneys
- salt
- pepper
- melted butter
- lemon juice
- bread crumbs
- toast

## Directions

1. Cut kidneys crosswise into slices.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Dip into melted butter mixed with a dash of lemon juice.
4. Roll in bread crumbs.
5. Broil over a clear fire turning often so as not to burn them after they are done.
6. Arrange on toast, pour melted butter over.
7. Serve very hot.

title: Paahdettuja Sieniä (Broiled Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- Mushrooms
- Melted butter

## Directions

1. Peel the mushrooms and cut off the stems
2. Dip in melted butter
3. Lay on a broiler and broil over a clear fire until brown on both sides
4. Serve on toast basted with butter

title: Paahdettuja sieniä (Broiled Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- mushrooms
- butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Peel the mushrooms and cut off the stems
2. Dip in melted butter
3. Place on the broiler and broil over clear coals on both sides to a nice brown
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and pour a little melted butter on

title: Paahdettuja Tomaatteja (Broiled Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- parsley
- mayonnaise or Béarnaise sauce

## Directions

1. Cut tomatoes with peelings on crosswise in two or in pieces 1/2 inch thick.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Broil until brown, first having the skin side down.
4. Arrange on a hot platter with a dot of butter on each.
5. Sprinkle with parsley.
6. May be served with hot mayonnaise or Béarnaise sauce.

title: Paahdettuja Tomaatteja (Broiled Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- salt
- pepper
- parsley butter or mayonnaise or Bearnaise sauce

## Directions

1. Cut tomatoes crosswise in two
2. Do not peel them
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
4. Broil with skin side down on slow fire, turning often until done
5. Place on hot dish
6. Spread with parsley butter, hot mayonnaise, or Bearnaise sauce

title: Paahtopaistia (Roast Beef)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef
- butter
- salt
- boiling water
- tomato
- pepper
- flour (optional)

## Directions

1. Wipe the meat carefully with a cloth wrung out of warm water.
2. Place the meat in a buttered dripping pan skin-side down.
3. Put into a hot oven.
4. When brown, sprinkle with salt and pour a little boiling water into the pan.
5. Baste often with the drippings.
6. When half done turn it over and continue baking slowly.
7. If getting too brown, cover the roast with buttered paper.
8. Cook 10 to 15 minutes per pound.
9. Place the roast on a platter skin-side up.
10. Remove some fat from the pan.
11. Prepare a gravy by adding flour and some water to the drippings (or use the drippings without flour).
12. Season with tomato, pepper and salt.

title: Paistettu Eggplant (Fried Eggplant)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggplant
- Salt
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Butter or lard
- Grated cheese (optional)

## Directions

1. Peel the eggplant and cut in thin slices.
2. Pile the slices on top of each other and sprinkle salt between.
3. Place under a light weight for 1/2 to 1 hour.
4. Wipe the slices.
5. Turn in egg and bread crumbs.
6. Fry in butter or lard.
7. Add a sprinkling of grated cheese, if preferred.

title: Paistettu Hummeri (Fried Lobster)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 boiled lobster
- bread crumbs
- egg
- lard

## Directions

1. Clean 1 boiled lobster.
2. Cut the tail meat in quarters and the meat of claws in halves.
3. Roll in bread crumbs, dip in egg and roll in bread crumbs again.
4. Fry in lard.
5. Serve with tartare sauce.

title: Paistettu Jänis (Roast Rabbit)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 rabbit
- ½ lemon
- ¼ pound bacon
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 2 cups bouillon or water

## Directions

1. Clean the rabbit, rinse and soak in water for 2 hours to remove the fiber more easily.
2. Rub with lemon and line with thin slices of bacon.
3. Melt the butter in a pan and place the rabbit in it.
4. Sprinkle with salt, baste often and add bouillon when necessary.
5. Roast for 1 to 1½ hours.
6. Prepare a gravy of the drippings by adding some flour, bouillon and cream.
7. Alternatively, the rabbit may be cut in three parts: hind-legs and fore-legs trimmed and tied together, and the middle part cut in two and tied around for easier roasting.

title: Paistettu kala (Fried Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- egg
- bread crumbs
- flour
- salt
- butter or lard
- water or cream

## Directions

1. Scale the fish, rinse, wipe and cut into pieces.
2. Dip in egg and bread crumbs or in flour mixed with salt.
3. Melt butter in a hot pan, fry the fish until light brown.
4. Cover, place the pan in a hot oven for a short while.
5. Place the fish on a platter, make a gravy of the drippings in the pan by adding cream. Pour over the fish.
6. If cooked in lard, dip fish in bread crumbs, in egg and in bread crumbs again, taking care not to leave any opening for the lard to get in.

title: Paistettu kala (Fried Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- 1 cup flour
- 1 1/2 tablespoons salt
- butter
- cream

## Directions

1. Scale the fish, rinse, dry and slice
2. Mix 1 1/2 tablespoons salt into 1 cup flour
3. Coat the pieces in this flour mixture
4. Brown butter in a pan
5. Fry the fish in the pan until light brown
6. Cover the pan
7. Place the pan in the oven to braise until done
8. Pour a little cream into the pan
9. Let it come to a boil
10. Pour over the fish

title: Paistettu kana (Fried Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- Chicken
- Salt
- Pepper
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Butter or lard
- Milk
- Cream
- Flour
- Bouillon

## Directions

1. Cut the chicken in pieces.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Roll in beaten egg and bread crumbs.
4. Fry until brown in butter or lard.
5. Place in the oven covered for 15 minutes.
6. Serve with milk sauce made only of milk or mixed with cream, or make gravy of drippings by adding flour, bouillon and cream.

title: Paistettu kana (Fried Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken
- salt
- pepper
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter or lard
- milk or cream

## Directions

1. Joint a chicken and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
3. Fry in butter or lard until brown.
4. Place in oven with cover for 15 minutes to finish cooking.
5. Serve with a milk sauce made from either milk or cream.
6. Pour the sauce on a serving dish and arrange the chicken pieces on top.
7. May also be served with tomato sauce.

title: Paistettu Kanan-Maksa (Fried Chicken Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken liver
- butter
- flour
- brown sauce
- Madeira wine
- salt
- pepper
- Kitchen Bouquet (optional)

## Directions

1. Split liver and wipe.
2. Place 1 tablespoonful of butter in a frying-pan and fry the liver in it about 5 minutes, turning often so it does not burn.
3. Dredge with flour and add brown sauce and a little Madeira wine into the pan.
4. Season with salt and pepper and cook gently 10 minutes.
5. Add a dash of Kitchen Bouquet if desired.

title: Paistettu kananmaksa (Fried Chicken Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- Chicken liver
- 1 tablespoon butter
- Flour
- Brown sauce
- Lemon juice
- Salt
- Pepper
- Kitchen Bouquet (optional)

## Directions

1. Split the liver and wipe.
2. Melt a tablespoon of butter in a frying pan.
3. Fry the liver in the butter for 5 minutes, turning often so as not to burn it.
4. Sprinkle with flour.
5. Add some brown sauce and lemon juice to the drippings.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Cook gently for 10 minutes.
8. Add some Kitchen Bouquet if the color is not brown enough.

title: Paistettu Kieli (Fried Tongue)
body:
## Ingredients

- tongue
- salt
- water
- 3 tablespoons butter
- onion
- flour
- carrots
- celery
- turnips
- parsley
- 3 cups broth
- tomato
- mushrooms
- pepper
- lemon

## Directions

1. Rinse and scrape the tongue.
2. Put on the fire in hot salt water and boil slowly for 1 hour.
3. Remove the tongue from water, skin and remove the roots.
4. Cook 3 tablespoons of butter with a sliced onion in a pan.
5. Place the tongue in and fry on both sides.
6. Add a sprinkling of flour, place carrots, turnips and celery cut in pieces and chopped parsley around.
7. Pour 3 cups of liquor over the tongue.
8. Cover tightly and cook for 2 or 3 hours.
9. Lift the tongue onto a platter.
10. Prepare gravy of the liquor in the pan by adding flour, bouillon and 1/2 cup of tomato.
11. Strain the gravy and add chopped mushrooms to it.
12. Cook for 5 minutes.
13. Season with salt and pepper, flavor with lemon.
14. Place the tongue on a serving dish and pour the gravy over.

title: Paistettu Kukkakaali (Fried Cauliflower)
body:
## Ingredients

- cold boiled cauliflower
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Cut cold boiled cauliflower in small pieces
2. Dip in egg and bread crumbs
3. Fry carefully in butter or lard
4. May be fried without egg

title: Paistettu Kurkku (Fried Cucumber)
body:
## Ingredients

- cucumbers
- salt
- pepper
- bread crumbs
- egg
- lard or butter

## Directions

1. Peel and cut lengthwise the cucumbers.
2. Wipe with a cloth.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Turn in bread crumbs, dip in egg and in bread crumbs again.
5. Fry in lard.
6. Or roll in flour, fry in a frying-pan with butter or lard.

title: Paistettu Kurkku (Fried Cucumber)
body:
## Ingredients

- cucumbers
- salt
- pepper
- bread crumbs
- egg
- lard

## Directions

1. Peel cucumbers and cut lengthwise into pieces
2. Wipe with a cloth
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
4. Dip in bread crumbs, then egg, then bread crumbs again
5. Fry in lard

title: Paistettu Kurkku (Fried Cucumber)
body:
## Ingredients

- cucumbers
- salt and pepper
- bread crumbs
- egg
- fat for frying

## Directions

1. Peel cucumbers
2. Cut lengthwise
3. Dry with cloth
4. Sprinkle salt and pepper on top
5. Dredge in bread crumbs
6. Dip in egg
7. Dredge again in bread crumbs
8. Fry in fat

title: Paistettu Kyssäkaali (Fried Summer Squash)
body:
## Ingredients

- summer squash
- flour
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Peel the squash and cut in pieces
2. Bake in oven covered for 1/2 hour
3. Dip in egg and bread crumbs or turn in flour
4. Fry in butter

title: Paistettu lohi (Salmon Steaks)
body:
## Ingredients

- salmon
- salad oil
- butter
- lemon juice
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- Bearnaise sauce

## Directions

1. Cut the fish in one inch thick pieces.
2. Lay in olive oil for an hour.
3. Wipe, fry on a slow fire basting with butter now and then. The fish needs about 20 minutes to cook.
4. Place on a platter.
5. Put a small piece of butter, a little lemon juice, salt, pepper and fine parsley on each piece.
6. Serve with Bearnaise sauce.

title: Paistettu lohi (Salmon Steaks)
body:
## Ingredients

- salmon, 1 inch thick pieces
- olive oil
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- lemon juice
- Bearnaise sauce

## Directions

1. Cut the fish in one inch thick pieces.
2. Lay in olive oil for an hour.
3. Wipe and fry on a slow fire basting with butter now and then.
4. Cook for about 20 minutes, carefully watching that it does not scorch.
5. Lay on a platter.
6. Sprinkle each piece with salt, pepper and parsley.
7. Dot with butter and squeeze some lemon juice on each.
8. Serve with Bearnaise sauce.

title: Paistettu lohi (Salmon Steaks)
body:
## Ingredients

- salmon steaks cut nearly one inch thick
- salad oil
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- chopped parsley
- Bearnaise sauce

## Directions

1. Have the steaks cut nearly one inch thick.
2. Wipe and lay in salad oil for an hour.
3. Drain and put upon a gridiron over a slow fire basting with butter now and then.
4. They will take at least twenty minutes to cook and must be carefully watched that they do not scorch.
5. Turn on serving-dish and put on each steak a generous lump of butter.
6. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and a little lemon juice.
7. Sprinkle with chopped parsley.
8. Serve with Bearnaise sauce.

title: Paistettu Maha (Fried Tripe)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled tripe, cold
- butter, melted
- lemon juice
- egg
- bread crumbs or flour
- butter or lard
- Béarnaise sauce or hot mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Pour melted butter mixed with some lemon juice over pieces of cold boiled tripe.
2. Let stand for an hour.
3. Dip in egg and roll in bread crumbs or flour.
4. Fry in butter or lard until light brown.
5. Serve with Béarnaise or hot mayonnaise sauce.

title: Paistettu mahasylkirauhanen (Fried Sweetbreads)
body:
## Ingredients

- Sweetbreads
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Butter or lard
- Bechamel sauce, tomato sauce, or milk sauce

## Directions

1. Prepare the sweetbreads as directed.
2. Split lengthwise.
3. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
4. Fry in butter or lard.
5. Serve with Bechamel, tomato or milk sauce.

title: Paistettu mahasylkirauhanen (Fried Sweetbreads)
body:
## Ingredients

- sweetbreads
- egg
- bread crumbs
- lard or butter
- Bechamel sauce or tomato sauce

## Directions

1. Prepare sweetbreads as directed above
2. Divide lengthwise through the center
3. Dip in egg and bread crumbs
4. Fry in lard or butter
5. Serve with Bechamel or tomato sauce

title: Paistettu Oisteri (Fried Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- large oysters
- salt
- pepper
- cracker crumbs
- eggs
- butter or lard
- lemon butter

## Directions

1. Wash and wipe large oysters
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
3. Roll in cracker crumbs, dip in egg, roll again in cracker crumbs
4. Fry quickly in deep butter or lard a few oysters at a time
5. Serve with lemon butter

title: Paistettu Oisteri (Fried Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- oysters
- lemon juice
- chopped parsley
- salt
- pepper
- mustard
- butter
- flour
- milk
- yolk of one egg
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Drain and chop the oysters
2. Prepare the sauce of butter, flour and milk
3. Add beaten yolk of one egg, oysters, lemon juice, parsley and seasonings to the sauce
4. Put the mixture into clean buttered oyster shells
5. Dredge with bread crumbs
6. Bake in a hot oven 15 minutes
7. Arrange on plates, 3 on each, garnish with slices of lemon and parsley

title: Paistettu Oisteri (Fried Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- large oysters
- salt and pepper
- cracker crumbs
- eggs
- butter or fat
- lemon butter

## Directions

1. Wash and wipe large oysters, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Roll in cracker crumbs, then dip in egg and roll again in cracker crumbs.
3. Fry quickly in deep butter or fat, a few oysters at a time.
4. Serve with lemon butter.

title: Paistettu täytetty silli (Fried Stuffed Herring)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 fresh herrings
- 6 anchovies
- 4 tablespoons bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoons milk
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Split the herrings in back, bone.
2. Rinse the fish, wipe, rub with salt.
3. Bone the anchovies and chop.
4. Soak the bread crumbs in milk, mix with the anchovies, season with salt and pepper, flavor with onion juice and chopped parsley.
5. Stuff the herrings with the mixture.
6. Place in a buttered pan, bake for half hour.
7. Serve with currant or any tart sauce.

title: Paistettu täytetty silli (Fried Stuffed Herring)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 fresh herrings
- 6 anchovies
- 4 tablespoonfuls of breadcrumbs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of milk
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Open the herrings at the back, remove the backbone and small bones.
2. Wash the fish, wipe and rub with salt.
3. Remove the bones from the anchovies and chop finely.
4. Soak the breadcrumbs in milk, add the chopped anchovies.
5. Season with salt and pepper.

title: Paistettu täytetty silli (Fried Stuffed Herring)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 fresh herrings
- 6 anchovies
- 4 tablespoonfuls of breadcrumbs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of milk
- salt and pepper
- onion juice
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Split the herring down the back; remove the backbone and small bones.
2. Wash the fish, wipe and rub with salt.
3. Bone the anchovies and chop them.
4. Soak the breadcrumbs in milk, mix with the chopped anchovies.
5. Season with salt, pepper, onion juice and chopped parsley.
6. Stuff the herrings with this mixture.
7. Place in a buttered pan, bake about 1/2 hour.
8. Serve with currant- or any kind of sour sauce.

title: Paistettu täytetty silli - sienitäytteellä (Fried Stuffed Herring with Mushroom Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 fresh herrings
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1/2 onion
- 1/2 cup chopped mushrooms
- 1/2 tablespoon chopped parsley
- Lemon juice
- 2 tablespoons cream
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cook butter with chopped onion.
2. Add chopped mushrooms, chopped parsley and some lemon juice.
3. Let simmer on the stove for 10 minutes.
4. Add cream, season with salt and pepper.
5. Stuff the herrings with the mixture.
6. Wrap in buttered paper and bake in oven until done.
7. Serve with tomato sauce.

title: Paistettu täytetty silli, sieniversion (Fried Stuffed Herring with Mushroom Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 fresh herrings
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1/2 chopped onion
- 1/2 cupful of chopped mushrooms
- 1/2 tablespoonful of chopped parsley
- a little lemon juice
- 2 tablespoonfuls of cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cook 1 tablespoonful of butter with 1/2 chopped onion.
2. Add to it 1/2 cupful of chopped mushrooms, 1/2 tablespoonful of chopped parsley and a little lemon juice.
3. Let cook on the stove 10 min.
4. Mix with 2 tablespoonfuls of cream, season with salt and pepper.
5. Stuff the herrings with this mixture.
6. Wrap in a buttered paper, bake in oven.
7. Serve with tomato sauce.

title: Paistettu Vasikan Kyljys (Fried Veal Chops)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal chops
- salt
- pepper
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoonful of melted butter
- 1 tablespoonful of cream
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Wipe chops, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Dip in a mixture made of 1 egg, 1 tablespoonful of melted butter and 1 tablespoonful of cream.
3. Roll in bread crumbs.
4. Fry in deep fat on both sides.
5. Cover, bake in oven for a few minutes.
6. Serve with tomato sauce, or mix the drippings with a little cream, strain over the chops.

title: Paistettu vasikan maksa (Fried Calf's Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- Calf's liver
- Salt
- Pepper
- Water
- Cream

## Directions

1. Cut in slices.
2. Rinse and wipe.
3. Fry on both sides until brown.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Add some water so as not to scorch.
6. Bring to boiling.
7. Add a little cream.

title: Paistettu Vasikan Maksa (Fried Veal Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal liver
- salt
- pepper
- water
- cream

## Directions

1. Cut veal liver in slices.
2. Rinse, dry and fry on both sides until brown.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and pour enough water into the pan so it does not burn.
4. Let simmer gently for a while.
5. Pour cream on top and let boil.

title: Paistettu voi kala (Fried Butterfish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- milk
- flour
- salt
- butter
- lemon juice
- parsley

## Directions

1. Clean, wash and wipe fishes.
2. Dip in milk, roll in flour mixed with salt.
3. Brown butter in the frying-pan, fry fishes until brown on both sides.
4. Bake covered in oven until thoroughly done.
5. Arrange the fish on a serving-dish, baste with browned butter mixed with a dash of lemon juice.
6. Sprinkle with chopped parsley.
7. Garnish with parsley and sliced lemon.

title: Paistettu Voikala (Fried Butterfish)
body:
## Ingredients

- Fish
- Milk
- Flour
- Salt
- Butter
- Lemon juice
- Parsley

## Directions

1. Clean, rinse and wipe the fish.
2. Dip in milk, roll in flour mixed with salt.
3. Brown some butter in frying-pan, fry the fish until brown on both sides.
4. Cover, place in oven until well done.
5. Arrange on the platter, pour browned butter mixed with some lemon juice over the fish, strew with chopped parsley.
6. Garnish with parsley and lemon.

title: Paistettua Hominya (Fried Hominy)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled hominy
- egg
- bread crumbs
- lard or butter

## Directions

1. Slice boiled hominy into half an inch thick pieces.
2. Dip in egg and turn in bread crumbs.
3. Fry in lard or butter.

title: Paistettua juuriselleriä (Fried Celery)
body:
## Ingredients

- Celery roots
- Salted water
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Butter or lard
- Melted butter
- Parsley

## Directions

1. Cook roots of celery in salted water until tender
2. When cool, cut in thin slices
3. Dip in egg and bread crumbs
4. Fry in butter or cook in deep lard
5. Pour some melted butter over, sprinkle with parsley

title: Paistettua Kinkkua (Fried Ham)
body:
## Ingredients

- Slices of smoked ham
- Butter or lard

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed for broiled ham (place in cold water and cook slowly until almost done, then remove and wipe dry).
2. Heat the pan.
3. Fry quickly in butter or lard until brown on both sides.
4. Serve with fried eggs or with potatoes.
5. Alternatively, the ham may be fried without boiling first, if preferred.

title: Paistettua silliä (Fried Herring)
body:
## Ingredients

- Herrings
- Salt
- Pepper
- Flour or bread crumbs
- Butter or lard

## Directions

1. Clean the herrings, rinse and wipe.
2. Rub with salt and pepper.
3. Roll in flour or bread crumbs.
4. Fry in butter or lard until brown on both sides.
5. Cover, place the pan in hot oven for a few minutes until the fish is thoroughly done.
6. For salt herring: Soak the fish, wrap in butter paper, then fry.

title: Paistettua silliä (Fried Herring)
body:
## Ingredients

- herrings
- salt
- flour

## Directions

1. Clean the fish, wash quickly, drain
2. Sprinkle the inside with salt
3. Roll in flour mixed with salt
4. Fry in butter or fat until brown on both sides
5. Cover and let cook until thoroughly done
6. For salted herring, soak over night first before preparing in the same way

title: Paistettua silliä (Fried Herring)
body:
## Ingredients

- herrings
- salt
- pepper
- flour or crackerdust

## Directions

1. Clean the herrings, wash and wipe.
2. Rub with salt and pepper, roll in flour or crackerdust, and fry in a pan on the stove until browned on both sides.
3. Cover and bake in oven until done.

title: Paistettua spaghettia (Fried Spaghetti)
body:
## Ingredients

- spaghetti
- salted water
- butter
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Break spaghetti into pieces
2. Boil in salted water for 15 to 20 minutes
3. Drain water carefully
4. Brown in butter
5. Sprinkle with fried bread crumbs

title: Paistettuja banaaneja (Fried Bananas)
body:
## Ingredients

- Bananas
- Salt
- Bread crumbs
- Egg
- Butter or lard

## Directions

1. Peel and split the bananas, sprinkle with salt.
2. Turn in bread crumbs, egg and in bread crumbs again.
3. Fry in butter or lard.
4. Serve very hot.

title: Paistettuja Halibut Steaks (Fried Halibut Steaks)
body:
## Ingredients

- halibut steaks
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- melted butter
- flour
- eggs
- butter or lard for frying

## Directions

1. Rub the pieces of fish with salt, pepper and lemon juice on both sides
2. Let stand about half an hour
3. Wipe and spread with melted butter, roll in flour, egg and again in flour
4. Fry in butter or lard

title: Paistettuja Halibut viipaleita (Fried Halibut Steaks)
body:
## Ingredients

- Halibut steaks
- Salt
- Pepper
- Lemon juice
- Melted butter
- Flour
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Butter or lard for frying
- Béarnaise sauce, lemon sauce, or tomato sauce for serving

## Directions

1. Rub the pieces of fish with salt, pepper and lemon juice on both sides.
2. Let stand for half an hour.
3. Wipe, spread with melted butter, roll in flour, egg and bread crumbs.
4. Fry in butter or lard.
5. Alternatively, roll the pieces in flour mixed with salt and pepper and fry.
6. For broiling: prepare the fish as directed above. Broil over clear fire, sprinkle with salt and pepper, place in a pan, dot with butter, bake for a few minutes.
7. Serve with Béarnaise, lemon or tomato sauce.
8. For steamed halibut: rub the pieces of fish with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
9. Place in a buttered pan, sprinkle with fried chopped onion, cover.
10. Cook in oven for 20-30 minutes.
11. Lift onto a platter and cover with rich milk sauce.

title: Paistettuja Kastanjoita (Fried Chestnuts)
body:
## Ingredients

- Shelled chestnuts
- Butter
- Salt
- Chicken stock

## Directions

1. Cut the shelled chestnuts in two or four pieces
2. Fry quickly in best butter
3. Sprinkle with salt
4. Cover with chicken stock
5. Let stand in pan covered for 2 minutes

title: Paistettuja Kyljyksiä (Fried Chops)
body:
## Ingredients

- mutton chops
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- bouillon
- tomato

## Directions

1. Trim as directed for broiling.
2. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
3. Fry in butter until brown on both sides, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Put the pan in hot oven for a few minutes.
5. Make a gravy of the drippings in the pan by adding some flour, bouillon, pepper, salt and tomato.
6. Strain and serve with the chops.

title: Paistettuja makeita perunoita (Fried Sweet Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- Boiled sweet potatoes
- Butter or lard
- Sugar (optional)

## Directions

1. Peel boiled potatoes
2. Cut into thick slices
3. Fry in butter or lard
4. Sprinkle with a little sugar while frying for better appearance

title: Paistettuja Munuaisia (Fried Kidneys)
body:
## Ingredients

- beef, mutton, or veal kidneys
- salted water
- bacon slices, smoked
- flour
- 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce
- 1 teaspoon catsup
- toasted bread
- salt
- pepper
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Remove the fat and white center from the kidneys carefully.
2. Soak in salted water for an hour.
3. Cut kidneys in halves.
4. Fry a few slices of smoked bacon in a pan, then remove from the pan.
5. Fry the kidneys in the bacon drippings for 10 minutes.
6. Add some flour, 1 teaspoon of Worcestershire sauce and 1 teaspoon of catsup to the drippings.
7. Place the kidneys on toast upon a platter, pour the gravy over and lay the slices of bacon around the toast.
8. Alternatively, cut kidneys crosswise into slices, dip in egg and bread crumbs and fry in butter.

title: Paistettuja Munuaisia (Fried Kidneys)
body:
## Ingredients

- kidneys of beef, mutton or veal
- salted water
- bacon slices
- flour
- Worcestershire sauce
- catsup
- toast
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Remove fat and the white center from kidneys carefully.
2. Soak in salted water for one hour.
3. Divide in halves.
4. Fry a few slices of bacon.
5. When done remove from pan and fry the kidneys in the drippings of the bacon for 10 minutes.
6. Add to the gravy a dash of flour, 1 teaspoon of Worcestershire sauce and 1 teaspoonful of catsup.
7. Arrange the kidneys on toast upon a platter, pour over it the sauce and lay the slices of bacon around the toast.
8. Alternatively, the kidneys may be cut crosswise into slices, dipped in egg and bread crumbs and fried in butter.

title: Paistettuja norsia (Fried Smelts)
body:
## Ingredients

- smelts
- flour
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- lard
- egg
- bread crumbs
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 3 tablespoons lemon juice
- 1 tablespoon parsley, chopped
- lemon halves

## Directions

1. Clean, rinse and wipe the smelts.
2. Roll in flour mixed with salt and pepper.
3. Fry in butter.
4. If cooked in lard, roll in flour, dip in egg and roll in bread crumbs.
5. Fry three or four fishes at a time.
6. When done, lay them in a hot strainer or on brown paper to drain.
7. Make sauce of 3 tablespoons of creamed butter, 3 tablespoons of lemon juice and 1 tablespoon of chopped parsley.
8. Serve the sauce on the same platter in cups made of halves of lemon or place it in dots around the fish.

title: Paistettuja norsia (Fried Smelts)
body:
## Ingredients

- smelts
- flour
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- lard
- crackerdust
- egg
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of lemon juice
- 1 tablespoonful of chopped parsley
- lemon halves

## Directions

1. Clean, wash and wipe smelts
2. Roll in flour mixed with salt and pepper
3. Fry in butter
4. When lard is used for frying, roll the smelts in crackerdust, dip in egg and roll in crackerdust again
5. Fry 3-4 fishes at a time
6. When done lay them on brown paper to drain
7. Prepare sauce of 3 tablespoonfuls of butter rubbed to a froth mixed with 3 tablespoonfuls of lemon juice and 1 tablespoonful of chopped parsley
8. Serve with the sauce in cups made of halves of lemons

title: Paistettuja pieniä kananpoikia (Roast Young Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- young chickens
- butter
- minced parsley
- salt
- bread crumbs
- water
- cream

## Directions

1. Clean young chickens.
2. Mix a few tablespoonfuls of butter with minced parsley and stuff the chickens with the butter.
3. Tie up and roast in oven having a little butter in your roaster.
4. Sprinkle with salt and bread crumbs when the chickens are slightly browned.
5. Pour water into the pan so as not to burn the chickens.
6. Baste frequently.
7. Dish and decorate with vegetables.
8. Thicken the gravy with cream.

title: Paistettuja pieniä kananpoikia (Roast Young Chickens)
body:
## Ingredients

- young chickens
- butter
- parsley
- salt
- bread crumbs
- water
- cream

## Directions

1. Clean the chicks.
2. Mix a few spoonfuls of butter with some chopped parsley.
3. Fill the chicks with the butter.
4. Tie with string.
5. Roast in oven having a little butter in the roasting pan.
6. When lightly brown, sprinkle with salt and bread crumbs.
7. Pour some water into the pan to prevent from burning and baste often.
8. Arrange on a platter and garnish with vegetables.
9. Make a gravy of the drippings by adding some cream.

title: Paistettuja pieniä kananpoikia (Roasted Young Chickens)
body:
## Ingredients

- young chickens
- butter
- chopped parsley
- salt
- bread crumbs
- water
- cream
- vegetables for garnish

## Directions

1. Clean young chickens
2. Mix butter and fine parsley
3. Place the butter mixture inside the chickens
4. Tie and roast in oven with a little butter in the pan
5. When they turn light brown, sprinkle salt and bread crumbs on top
6. Pour water into the pan so the chickens do not burn
7. Baste often with the liquid
8. Arrange on serving dish and garnish with vegetables around the sides
9. Prepare sauce from the liquid by adding a little cream

title: Paistettuja scallopeja (Fried Scallops)
body:
## Ingredients

- Scallops
- Salt
- Pepper
- Lemon juice
- Melted butter
- Flour
- Butter or lard

## Directions

1. Bring to the boiling point, strain, place in a dish with pepper, salt, lemon juice and some melted butter.
2. Let stand 10 minutes.
3. Roll in bread crumbs, fry in butter or lard.
4. If dipped in flour, egg and bread crumbs, the scallops will look nicer.
5. Cook in lard.

title: Paistettuja Scallopeja (Fried Scallops)
body:
## Ingredients

- scallops
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- melted butter
- flour
- egg
- crackerdust
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Bring the fish to the boiling point.
2. Drain off the water.
3. Wipe and put in a dish with salt, pepper, lemon juice and a little melted butter.
4. Put aside for 10 min.
5. Roll in flour and fry in butter or lard.
6. Alternatively, dip first in flour, then in egg, then in crackerdust and cook in lard.

title: Paistettuja Sieniä (Fried Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- Mushrooms
- Butter
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Lemon

## Directions

1. Clean the mushrooms and cut off the stems
2. Heat the butter in a frying pan
3. Fry the mushrooms rapidly, turning often
4. For larger mushrooms, dip in egg and bread crumbs, then brown in butter
5. Serve on toast garnished with lemon

title: Paistettuja sieniä (Fried Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- mushrooms
- butter

## Directions

1. Peel the mushrooms and cut off the stems
2. Heat butter in a frying pan
3. Fry the mushrooms rapidly, turning often
4. Serve on toast

title: Paistettuja sipulia (Fried Onions)
body:
## Ingredients

- onions
- salt
- water
- butter
- sugar
- bouillon or water
- egg
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Peel the onions and cook in salted water until half done
2. Drain and brown in butter
3. Sprinkle with salt and sugar
4. Pour 1 cup of bouillon or water over the onions, cover
5. Let simmer until tender
6. For raw fried onions: slice thinly and fry on slow fire on both sides until brown
7. Alternatively, sliced onions may be turned in egg and bread crumbs and browned in butter

title: Paistettuja Tomaatteja (Fried Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- salt
- pepper
- egg
- bread crumbs
- browned butter

## Directions

1. Cut tomatoes crosswise into slices
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
3. Dip in egg and bread crumbs
4. Fry on both sides in browned butter

title: Paistettuja Tomaattia (Fried Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter
- poached eggs

## Directions

1. Slice the tomatoes crosswise.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Turn in flour or in egg and bread crumbs.
4. Brown on both sides in butter.
5. Serve on a platter or on toast.
6. Poached eggs may be served on top, if preferred.

title: Paistettuja vasikankylkylisiä (Fried Veal Chops)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal chops
- salt and pepper
- egg
- melted butter
- cream
- bread crumbs
- lard
- tomato sauce

## Directions

1. Wipe the chops, sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Dip in a mixture made of 1 egg, 1 tablespoon of melted butter and 1 tablespoon of cream.
3. Roll in bread crumbs.
4. Fry in deep lard on both sides.
5. Cover, place in a hot oven for a few minutes.
6. Serve with tomato sauce or add some cream to the drippings and strain over the chops.
7. Or the chops may be sprinkled with salt and pepper, dipped in flour and fried in butter or lard until brown on both sides.

title: Paistettuja Vasikanliha-kääryleitä (Rolled Veal Roulade)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal steak
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- bread
- mushrooms
- liver or boiled ham
- flour
- bouillon or water

## Directions

1. Cut veal steak into thin slices
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and flavor with lemon juice
3. Spread with soaked bread mixed with mushrooms, liver or boiled ham
4. Roll together and tie with string
5. Roll in flour and fry until brown
6. Cover with bouillon or water and cook until done
7. Make a gravy of the bouillon in the pan

title: Paistetut Munat (Fried Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- eggs
- salt

## Directions

1. Melt some butter in a hot pan.
2. Break the eggs into the pan one at a time.
3. Sprinkle with salt and fry until the whites are firm.
