4. If preferred, fry the eggs on both sides.
5. Serve plain or on slices of tomato cut crosswise, rolled in bread crumbs and fried in butter.

title: Paisti Sipulin Kanssa (Steak with Onions)
body:
## Ingredients

- steak
- salt
- pepper
- butter or lard
- onions

## Directions

1. Heat the frying pan and place the steak in it.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, dot with butter or spread with lard.
3. When brown, turn the meat over and continue frying until done.
4. Fry onions separately or with the steak and serve on top of the steak on the serving platter.

title: Palkopapusalaatti (String Bean Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- string beans
- salt
- lettuce leaves
- mayonnaise
- green peas
- beets
- tomatoes
- radishes

## Directions

1. Cut the string beans lengthwise
2. Boil in salted water until tender
3. Let cool
4. Arrange on a bed of lettuce
5. Pour mayonnaise over
6. String beans may be mixed with green peas and served with mayonnaise
7. Garnish with beets, tomatoes or radishes

title: Palsternakka (Parsnips)
body:
## Ingredients

- Parsnips
- Salt
- Pepper
- Melted butter
- Flour
- Butter for frying

## Directions

1. Rinse parsnips carefully, boil in salted water about 1 hour or until tender.
2. Drain and peel.
3. Cut lengthwise in pieces 3/4 inches thick, sprinkle with salt and pepper, dip in melted butter, roll in flour and fry in butter until brown on both sides.

title: Palsternakka (Parsnips)
body:
## Ingredients

- parsnips
- salt
- pepper
- melted butter
- flour

## Directions

1. Wash parsnips carefully.
2. Cook them in salted water 1 hour or until tender.
3. Drain off the water and peel the parsnips.
4. Cut lengthwise in 1/4 inch thick pieces.
5. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
6. Dip in melted butter and flour and brown in butter on both sides.

title: Palsternakkamuhennus (Stewed Parsnips)
body:
## Ingredients

- Parsnips
- Salt
- Butter
- Cream
- Milk
- Flour
- Pepper

## Directions

1. Peel and cut parsnips into pieces, boil in salted water until tender.
2. Drain, add some butter and cream and let boil.
3. Alternatively, boil in milk, mix with butter and flour and season with salt and pepper.

title: Panned Oysters (Pannu oisteria)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of oysters
- 1/2 cupful of butter
- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- yolks of 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Wash and wipe oysters
2. Brown the butter in pan
3. Place oysters on it and cook for a few minutes
4. Add flour and beaten yolks mixed with milk
5. Shake on the fire until firm
6. Serve on toast

title: Pannu Oisteria (Pan Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of oysters
- ½ cupful of butter
- ½ cupful of milk
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Wash and dry oysters.
2. Brown butter in pan, put oysters into it and cook for a few minutes.
3. Add flour and egg yolks beaten and mixed with milk.
4. Stir gently.

title: Pannuoisteri (Panned Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups oysters
- 2 tablespoons butter
- salt
- pepper
- cream

## Directions

1. Put the butter in a pan with a cover
2. When melted add the oysters, salt and pepper
3. Shake over the fire until hot
4. Drain the oysters
5. Add some cream to the drippings
6. Pour the gravy over the oysters and serve

title: Papu-paistia (Bean Steak)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups dried lima beans
- water
- 1 cup chopped walnuts
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 4 tomatoes
- 1/4 pound butter
- 2 eggs
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Soak 2 cups of dried lima beans in water.
2. Cook and mash the beans.
3. Add 1 cup chopped walnuts, 1 cup bread crumbs, 4 tomatoes, and 1/4 pound butter.
4. Add 2 eggs.
5. Rub the mixture until smooth.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Form into a loaf.
8. Bake, basting often.

title: Papuvoileipia (Bean Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup baked beans
- 1 teaspoon onion juice
- 1 teaspoon chopped celery
- catsup
- chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Force baked beans through a sieve.
2. Mix 1 cup of beans with 1 teaspoon onion juice, 1 teaspoon chopped celery, a little catsup and chopped parsley.

title: Parker House Pullia (Parker House Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups milk
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 4 or 5 cups flour
- 1/2 yeast cake

## Directions

1. Dissolve the yeast in 1 cup lukewarm milk, add 1 1/2 cups flour and let rise.
2. Warm the rest of the milk, add the butter, sugar, salt, the risen sponge of the yeast and flour enough to make a moderately thick dough.
3. Let rise in a warm place.
4. Knead on the baking board, and roll into 3/8 inch thick sheet.
5. Cut with biscuit cutter into round cakes.
6. Brush with melted butter one half of the surface of the cake.
7. Fold the other half on.
8. Let rise and bake in a hot oven for 15 minutes.

title: Parker House Rolls
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1/4 cupful of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 4-5 cupfuls of flour
- 1/2 cake of yeast

## Directions

1. Dissolve yeast in 1 cupful of lukewarm milk
2. Mix with 4 tablespoonfuls of flour and let rise
3. Scald the rest of the milk
4. Mix with butter, sugar, salt and flour enough to make a soft paste
5. Work the risen sponge into it
6. Add flour until it becomes a moderately thick dough
7. Set to rise
8. Roll on the baking board into a sheet 1/2 inch thick
9. Cut with biscuit cutter into round cakes
10. Moisten one side of the surface with melted butter and double the other side over it
11. Put to rise and bake in a hot oven 15 minutes

title: Parsa-vanukas (Asparagus Soufflé)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 unssia voita
- 8 munanruskuaista
- 6 kuppia kermaisekaista maitoa
- 1 kuppi vehnäjauhoja
- vähän suolaa
- sokuria
- yhden sitruunan keltainen kuori
- 1/2 paunaa parsaa paloiteltuna ja keitettynä suolatussa vedessä
- valkuaiset kovaksi vaahdoksi vatkattuna

## Directions

1. 6 unssia voita hierotaan vaahdoksi.
2. Siihen seotetaan yksitellen 8 munanruskuaista, sekä 6 kuppia kermaisekaista maitoa, 1 kuppi vehnäjauhoja, vähän suolaa, sokuria ja yhden sitruunan keltainen kuori.
3. Lisätään 1/2 paunaa parsaa paloiteltuna ja keitettynä suolatussa vedessä.
4. Viimeksi vaahdoksi vatkatut valkuaiset.
5. Paistetaan voidellussa vormussa uunissa.

title: Parsaa maitosoosin kanssa (Creamed Asparagus)
body:
## Ingredients

- asparagus
- salt
- water
- butter
- flour
- milk
- parsley
- pepper

## Directions

1. Clean asparagus and cut the tender part in pieces an inch long.
2. Cook in salted water until tender.
3. Make a milk sauce of 1 tablespoon butter, 1 tablespoon flour and 1 cup milk.
4. Mix the asparagus with the sauce and bring to boiling.
5. Alternatively, asparagus may be cooked in scanty water with butter and salt until tender, dusted with flour or sprinkled with parsley when ready to be served.
6. Boiled asparagus cut in pieces may be mixed with carrots or peas in equal parts and served in a sauce made of the liquor of the asparagus or without sauce, sprinkled with salt and pepper and basted with butter.

title: Parsan päitä (Asparagus Tips)
body:
## Ingredients

- asparagus tips
- salt
- water
- butter
- flour
- milk
- egg yolks
- rolls or bread

## Directions

1. Cut the tips off the asparagus and put on the fire in boiling salted water.
2. Cook until tender.
3. Prepare a milk sauce mixed with 1 or 2 egg yolks.
4. Add the asparagus tips to the sauce carefully and heat but do not bring to boiling.
5. Serve on toast or in cups made of rolls (cut off the end of each roll, hollow out the cavity, and dry a little in the oven).

title: Parsasalaatti (Asparagus Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- asparagus
- salted water
- lettuce leaves
- mayonnaise
- hard cooked eggs

## Directions

1. Cook the asparagus tips in salted water until tender
2. Arrange on a bed of lettuce leaves
3. Cover with mayonnaise
4. Hard cooked eggs may be used in asparagus salad

title: Parsasalaatti (Asparagus Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- asparagus tips
- salted water
- lettuce
- mayonnaise
- hard cooked eggs

## Directions

1. Cook the asparagus tips in salted water until tender.
2. Arrange on a platter on a bed of lettuce.
3. Pour mayonnaise over.
4. Hard cooked eggs may be used in asparagus salad.

title: Parsavanukas (Asparagus Soufflé)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 cup butter
- 5 egg yolks
- 3 cups rich milk
- 3/4 cup flour
- salt
- sugar
- yellow rind of 1 lemon, grated
- 1/2 pound asparagus, cut in pieces and cooked in salted water
- egg whites beaten stiff

## Directions

1. Rub butter until creamy
2. Add egg yolks one by one
3. Add rich milk, flour, salt, sugar, and grated lemon rind
4. Add asparagus cut in pieces and cooked in salted water
5. Last of all add the egg whites beaten stiff
6. Bake in a buttered mold in a pan of water. Chopped asparagus may be used for soufflé, if preferred.

title: Pata-paisti (Pot Roast)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds of beef
- Butter or pork
- 1 onion
- 1 carrot
- 1 turnip
- Boiling water or meat stock
- Flour
- Cream
- Salt
- Pepper

## Directions

1. Take a four-pound piece of beef and brown with butter or pork.
2. When well-browned, add 1 onion, 1 carrot, and 1 turnip cut in pieces.
3. Half cover with boiling water and let simmer, tightly covered, until tender.
4. Remove the fat and thicken with flour.
5. Strain the stock and rub the vegetables through a sieve.
6. Add water and a little cream until moderately thick.

title: Patapaistia (Pot Roast)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pound piece of beef
- Butter or pork
- 1 onion
- 1 carrot
- 1 turnip
- Water or meat stock
- Flour
- Cream

## Directions

1. Brown the beef with butter or pork
2. When well browned, add onion, carrot and turnip cut in pieces
3. Half cover with boiling water or meat stock
4. Cook tightly covered until tender
5. Remove the fat and thicken with flour
6. Strain the stock, rubbing the vegetables through the strainer
7. Add meat stock and cream until moderately thick

title: Patties (Pattyja)
body:
## Ingredients

- puff paste
- creamed oysters, lobsters, fish or meat, cut in pieces

## Directions

1. Make patty shells of puff paste.
2. Fill them with creamed oysters, lobsters, fish or meat cut in pieces.

title: Pattyjä (Patties)
body:
## Ingredients

- Puff paste
- Oysters, lobsters, fish, or meat, diced
- Cream sauce

## Directions

1. Make patty shells of puff paste
2. Fill with creamed oysters, lobsters, fish, or meat cut into pieces

title: Pauna Kakku (Pound Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of butter
- 1 lb. of sugar
- 1 lb. of flour
- 10 eggs
- 3/4 cupful of brandy
- a dash of mace

## Directions

1. Work butter and sugar to a froth, add beaten yolks of eggs into it, then season and mix with flour.
2. At the last stir the whites of eggs, beaten to a stiff froth, into it.
3. Bake in a moderate oven.

title: Pea Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of cooked, mashed peas
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cupful of milk
- 1/2 teaspoonful of baking powder
- 5 tablespoonfuls of flour
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Mix butter, seasonings, milk, beaten eggs and flour with mashed peas
2. Form into thin cakes
3. Bake in oven
4. Serve instead of vegetables with meat or fish

title: Pea Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of dried peas
- 1 cupful of bread crumbs
- 1 cupful of milk
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 onion
- 2 eggs
- salt, pepper and chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Cook peas until tender and drain

title: Pea Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can of peas
- 3 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- a pinch of pepper
- few drops of onion juice

## Directions

1. Wash one can of peas and rub through a strainer
2. Add 3 eggs, 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter, 1/2 teaspoonful of salt, a pinch of pepper and few drops of onion juice
3. Pour the mixture in a buttered mould
4. Bake in oven in a pan of water, covered with a buttered paper, until firm

title: Pea Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of green peas
- 3 quarts of water
- several kinds of vegetables
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cook the peas in 1 1/2 quarts of water.
2. Boil separately the finely cut vegetables and add to the soup with their liquor.
3. Thicken with butter and flour.
4. Small artichokes may be served in soup and finely chopped parsley will give it a good flavor.
5. If desired, the peas may be strained out before adding the other vegetables.

title: Pea Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cupfuls of dried peas
- 1 1/2 quarts of bouillon
- 2 1/2 quarts of cold water
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1/2 pound of ham

## Directions

1. Wash the peas and put them into warm water to soak for a few hours.
2. Drain and put the peas and ham into cold water to simmer until the peas are thoroughly soft.
3. Thicken the soup with butter and flour.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Rub through a sieve and add bouillon into it as much as required.
6. Cut the ham into pieces.

title: Peach Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of peaches
- 1 ounce of gelatine
- sugar to taste
- a little lemon juice
- 2 cupfuls of whipped cream

## Directions

1. Skin peaches, stone and force through a sieve.
2. Dissolve gelatine into the fruit juice by heating.
3. Add sugar to taste and a little lemon juice.
4. When cool, add two cupfuls of whipped cream and pour in a mold to form.

title: Peach Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- peaches
- sugar

## Directions

1. Skin peaches and cut in pieces
2. Let stand for 1 hour in sugar
3. Bake between two crusts in a moderate oven 1 hour

title: Peach Short Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of butter
- 1/2 lb. of sugar
- 1 lb. of flour
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Wash butter and work to a cream with sugar
2. Mix with flour and lastly with beaten eggs
3. Bake in two molds to light brown
4. Lay fruit between and on the cakes
5. Serve with whipped cream

title: Peanut butter-voileipiä (Peanut Butter Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- peanut butter
- cream
- salt
- buttered bread
- raisins
- walnuts

## Directions

1. Dilute peanut butter with a little cream.
2. Season with salt.
3. Spread on buttered bread.
4. Mix with chopped raisins and walnuts if preferred.

title: Pear Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of pears
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1 pint of milk
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- grated yellow rind of 1 lemon
- 4 eggs
- 1/4 lb. of sugar
- 2 cupfuls of water

## Directions

1. Pare and core pears and cook them with 1 cupful of sugar and 2 cupfuls of water until tender
2. Prepare a batter of milk and flour
3. Stir butter, yolks whipped with sugar, and lemon rind into it
4. Mix with stiffly beaten whites of eggs
5. Butter a mold and lay the cooked pears on the bottom
6. Pour the batter in
7. Bake in oven 3/4 hour

title: Pears à l'Aurore (Pears at Dawn)
body:
## Ingredients

- pears
- sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of sherry
- 1 tablespoonful of brandy
- 2 tablesp. of chopped almonds
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls of dissolved gelatine or 3 leaves
- 1 cupful of whipped cream
- 1/4 lb. of chocolate
- 1/2 cupful of hot water
- 1 cupful of sugar
- butter
- sponge cake

## Directions

1. Pare and core pears leaving the stems on
2. Cook with sugar until tender, let cool
3. Mix sherry, brandy, chopped almonds, sugar, and gelatine together, except cream, and keep on the fire until the gelatine is dissolved
4. Let cool and add lastly the whipped cream
5. Fill the pears with this mixture
6. Melt chocolate, cook sugar and water together, add gradually into the chocolate
7. Baste the pears with chocolate caramel
8. Place prepared pears on a foundation of sponge cake
9. Line the serving dish with them
10. Pour the whipped cream in centre of cake

title: Peltopyy-paisti (Roast Squab)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 squab
- thin slice of bacon
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- cream

## Directions

1. Clean a squab, lay on it a thin slice of bacon, put a little lump of butter in; sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Roast 20-30 minutes.
3. Thicken the gravy with a little cream.
4. Divide the squab lengthwise in two, remove the backbone.
5. Arrange on a platter and strain over it the gravy.

title: Peltopyypaisti (Roast Squab)
body:
## Ingredients

- Squab
- Thin slice of bacon
- Butter
- Salt
- Pepper
- Cream

## Directions

1. Clean the squab, line with a thin slice of bacon and place a little lump of butter in.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, roast for 20 or 30 minutes.
3. Make a gravy of the drippings by adding some cream.
4. Divide lengthwise in two, remove the backbone.
5. Place on a platter and strain the gravy over.

title: Peltopyytä ä la Florence (Squab à la Florence)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 squabs
- 3 ounces marrow
- 4 ounces butter
- 2 ounces bread
- 1 egg
- salt
- pepper
- chopped parsley
- artichoke slices
- cream

## Directions

1. Clean the squabs.
2. Mince the marrow mixed with butter and rub well.
3. Add the other ingredients (bread, egg, salt, pepper, and chopped parsley).
4. Stuff the squabs with this mixture.
5. Bake for 30 minutes, basting often.
6. Arrange on fried slices of artichokes.
7. Skim the drippings and add a little cream to make the gravy.

title: Perch Chowder
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 lbs. of perches
- 5 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 tablespoonfuls of salt
- 3 tablespoonf. of chopped parsley
- 1/2 chopped onion
- 4 cupfuls of water
- pepper

## Directions

1. Scale the fish, clean and wash.
2. Rub inside with salt, put the roes into the fish.
3. Lay in a buttered kettle with butter, salt, pepper, flour, onion and parsley.
4. Pour warm water on, and let simmer 20 — 30 min.
5. Place on a serving-dish, pour over it the sauce and arrange small potatoes around it.

title: Persikat kerman kanssa (Peach Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart peaches
- 1/2 package gelatine
- Sugar
- Lemon juice
- 2 cups whipped cream

## Directions

1. Peel 1 quart of peaches, remove the stones, rub through a sieve.
2. Add 1/2 package of gelatine, dissolve by heating.
3. Mix with sugar and lemon juice, according to taste.
4. When cool, add 2 cups of whipped cream.
5. Put into a mold to set.

title: Persikka Pai (Peach Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- peaches
- sugar

## Directions

1. Skin peaches and cut in pieces.
2. Let stand for 1 hour in sugar.
3. Bake between two crusts in a moderate oven 1 hour.

title: Persikkapiirakka (Peach Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- peaches
- sugar
- lemon juice
- pastry for two crusts

## Directions

1. Peel the peaches, cut in pieces.
2. Let stand mixed with sugar and lemon juice for 1 hour.
3. Bake between the crusts in a moderate oven for 1 hour.

title: Persikkasalaatti (Peach Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- Ripe peaches
- Figs
- Dates
- Mayonnaise
- Lettuce
- Raspberries
- Whipped cream
- Cream cheese
- Chopped nuts

## Directions

1. Peel and split ripe peaches, fill the cavity in the center with chopped figs and dates, coat with mayonnaise
2. Serve on a bed of lettuce
3. Peaches may be filled with raspberries and covered with whipped cream
4. Form tiny balls of cream cheese, fill the cavity in peaches with the cheese balls
5. Add a sprinkling of chopped nuts

title: Persiljaperunoita (Parsley Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- salt
- water
- parsley, finely chopped
- butter

## Directions

1. Cook as for boiled potatoes.
2. Drain the water.
3. Sprinkle with finely chopped parsley, salt, and small pieces of butter.

title: Peruna- ja kastanjakyljyksiä (Potato and Chestnut Chops)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups mashed potato
- 1 1/2 cups mashed chestnuts
- 2 tablespoons bread crumbs
- 3 eggs
- 4 tablespoons butter
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Mix together all the ingredients
2. If too thick, dilute with cream or milk
3. Form into patties
4. Fry in butter, or dip in egg and turn in bread crumbs and cook in lard

title: Peruna-soppa (Potato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 quarts of meat stock
- 3/4 quart of potatoes
- 1/2 root or 2 stalks of celery
- 1 leek or 2 slices of onion
- a little finely chopped parsley
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 cupful of cream or milk
- salt

## Directions

1. Peel the potatoes and celery, cut in pieces and cook in 1 quart of meat stock until tender; force it through a sieve.
2. Cook the butter with the onion in a kettle, add the flour and pour the soup and the meat stock slowly into it; boil 10 minutes.
3. Season and at last add the yolks and cream, whipping well.
4. Serve with fried bread dice.

title: Perunajauho-kakkuja (Potato Flour Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 2 cups sugar
- 1/2 cup cream
- 1/2 cup butter
- 2 cups potato flour
- 4 cups white flour
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Beat to a froth eggs with sugar
2. Add cream, potato flour, butter rubbed until creamy and flour mixed with soda
3. Mix all well together
4. Roll out thin
5. Prick with a fork and cut small round cookies
6. Bake on a buttered baking sheet in the oven until light brown

title: Perunajauho-muffensia (Potato Flour Muffins)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- ¾ cup potato flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 2 tablespoons ice water
- lemon juice for flavoring

## Directions

1. Sift several times the potato flour with the baking powder.
2. Beat the egg yolks with the sugar, add ice water and the flour.
3. Flavor with lemon juice.
4. Beat until firm the egg whites, fold in the batter.
5. Bake in buttered muffin tins for 15 minutes.

title: Perunajauholeivokset (Potato Flour Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup cream
- 1/2 cup butter
- 2 cups potato flour
- 4 cups white flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- eggs

## Directions

1. Beat eggs and sugar to a froth
2. Add cream, soda and potato flour
3. Add butter rubbed until creamy and flour mixed with soda
4. Mix all ingredients well together
5. Roll dough thin
6. Perforate with a fork
7. Cut into small round cookies
8. Bake on a buttered baking sheet in an oven until light brown

title: Perunakakkuja (Potato Patties)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cold mashed potato
- Butter

## Directions

1. Mold mashed potato into cakes inch thick
2. Fry in a buttered pan until light brown on both sides

title: Perunakokkareita (Potato Dumplings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of mashed potato
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of cream
- 3 tablespoonfuls of bread crumbs
- 2 beaten eggs
- Flour, approximately 1 cupful
- Salt

## Directions

1. Mix mashed potato with butter, cream, bread crumbs and beaten eggs.
2. Add flour enough to make a firm batter.
3. Test first by dropping a little of it into boiling water.
4. Drop by the spoonful into boiling salted water or into bouillon shortly before serving.

title: Perunalunta (Potato Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- salt
- water

## Directions

1. Cook as directed for boiled potatoes.
2. Press through a potato ricer into the center of a serving dish.
3. Sprinkle with fine salt and serve.

title: Perunamunia (Potato Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- equal-sized potatoes
- eggs
- salt
- pepper
- butter

## Directions

1. Boil equal sized potatoes with some salt.
2. Scoop carefully and peel.
3. Fill each one with an egg.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Bake until the eggs are firm.
6. Serve with browned butter.

title: Perunamykyjä (Potato Dumplings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint mashed potatoes
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 egg and 1 yolk of egg
- 1/4 cup flour
- 3/4 cup bread crumbs
- nutmeg and pepper
- chopped onion (optional)

## Directions

1. Mix mashed potatoes with butter, salt, beaten eggs and flour.
2. Form into balls and roll in flour.
3. Cook in salted water for 15 minutes.
4. Serve as is, or roll the boiled dumplings in egg and bread crumbs and cook in deep lard.
5. When boiling the dumplings take care not to stop boiling before they are done, otherwise they will fall apart.

title: Perunaomeietti (Potato Omelet)
body:
## Ingredients

- mashed potatoes
- butter

## Directions

1. Lay mashed potatoes in a buttered omelet pan.
2. Bake until brown underneath.
3. Double on a platter same as omelet.

title: Perunapalleroita (Potato Croquettes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups mashed potatoes
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 3 egg yolks
- salt
- pepper
- egg for dipping
- bread crumbs
- lard or butter for frying

## Directions

1. Mix the mashed potatoes with salt, pepper, butter and egg yolks.
2. Form into balls or oval-shaped croquettes.
3. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
4. Fry in butter or cook in deep lard.

title: Perunaryhmä ja sillit (Potato and Lentil Patties)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup lentils
- 1/4 cup brown beans
- 1/2 onion
- celery
- carrot
- a sprig of parsley
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup milk sauce
- salt and pepper
- butter or lard for cooking

## Directions

1. Wash the lentils and brown beans
2. Put over the fire in cold water with onion, celery, carrot and a sprig of parsley
3. Cook until tender and the water has evaporated
4. Force through a sieve
5. Add bread crumbs, egg, milk sauce, salt and pepper
6. Stir until smooth
7. Form into any shape preferred
8. Dip in egg and turn in bread crumbs
9. Cook or fry in butter

title: Perunasalaatti (Potato Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- 1 small onion
- salt
- 1 cup celery
- 1 dill pickle or beet
- mayonnaise dressing
- lettuce
- hard boiled eggs
- beets

## Directions

1. Cook the potatoes in jackets.
2. Let cool.
3. Peel and cut in thin slices.
4. Have 4 cups of potato, mix with 1 small onion grated and some salt.
5. Shortly before serving add 1 cup of celery, 1 dill pickle or beet.
6. Mix with boiled mayonnaise dressing.
7. Serve on a bed of lettuce garnished around with hard boiled egg and beets.

title: Perunasoppa (Potato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts bouillon, water or milk
- 2 cups potatoes cut in cubes
- 2 stalks celery
- 2 slices onion
- 2 tablespoons chopped parsley
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 cup cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Peel the potatoes and celery and cut in pieces.
2. Boil in 1 quart of bouillon or water until tender.
3. Press through a sieve.
4. Cook the onion with the butter in a saucepan.
5. Thicken with the flour and add gradually the soup to the onion.
6. Mix with the rest of the bouillon or with milk.
7. Cook for 10 minutes.
8. Season and add the yolks and cream, if preferred.
9. Serve with croutons.

title: Perunasose (Mashed Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled pared potatoes
- 2 tablespoons butter
- salt
- milk or cream
- pepper

## Directions

1. Mash the pared boiled potatoes.
2. Add 2 tablespoons of butter, salt, milk or cream and a pinch of pepper.
3. Rub to a smooth paste and heat.
4. Heap on a serving dish, trim nicely with a knife, or work the mashed potatoes through a potato ricer into the center of the dish.
5. Chopped onion browned in butter or lard may be placed on top if desired.

title: Perunatippoja (Potato Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup mashed potatoes
- 1 tablespoon cream
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- nutmeg and pepper
- 1 yolk and 2 egg whites

## Directions

1. Mix the potato with the cream, salt, nutmeg and pepper.
2. Add the whites beaten stiff last of all.
3. Drop by the spoonful into boiling lard.
4. Cook until light brown.

title: Perunavanukas (Puffed Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups mashed potato
- 1/4 pound butter
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 3 or 4 eggs
- 8 tablespoons cream or milk
- 2 tablespoons flour

## Directions

1. Add to the potato butter, salt, cream, flour and yolks of eggs.
2. Last of all add the whites of eggs beaten firm.
3. Bake in oven until light brown.
4. May be baked in muffin molds; when half done spread with white of egg beaten firm and brown the top in oven.

title: Perunoita maitokastikkeen kanssa (Creamed Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- new potatoes or cold boiled potatoes
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 pint scalded milk
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- bread crumbs and grated cheese (optional)

## Directions

1. Cut new potatoes into dice or boil whole potatoes in salted water until done.
2. Drain and cover with milk sauce made of 2 tablespoons of butter, 2 tablespoons of flour and 1 pint of scalded milk.
3. Season with salt, pepper and parsley.
4. If cold boiled potatoes are used, cut the potatoes in pieces and boil slowly in rich milk.
5. Add 1 tablespoon of butter, salt and pepper and just before serving sprinkle with minced parsley.
6. Alternatively, bake potatoes in a buttered mold sprinkled with bread crumbs and grated cheese, using half the amount of flour in the sauce, covering until potatoes are nearly done (about 40 minutes), then remove cover, sprinkle cheese and bread crumbs or 2 beaten eggs on top, and bake until browned.

title: Pickled Apples
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 cups sugar
- 2 cups water
- 4 cups vinegar
- 2 tablespoons cinnamon and cloves
- apples

## Directions

1. Pare the apples, place into a jar alternate layers of apples and sugar
2. Pour water and vinegar over
3. Let stand covered overnight
4. Drain the juice, put into a kettle with the spices tied in a bag
5. When the juice is coming to a boil and looks clear, add the apples
6. Cook until nearly done
7. Place the apples into glass jars, pour the boiling hot juice over
8. Cover airtight
9. Note: Crab apples must not be pared before cooking. Alternatively, boil the sugar in water mixed with vinegar, add the apples and cook

title: Pickled Onions
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of small white onions
- 1 quart of vinegar
- 1 lb. of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of white pepper
- mace, cloves and ginger, a little of each

## Directions

1. Wash onions, pour boiling water on and peel when water gets cool.

title: Pickled Onions (Suomalais-Amerikalainen)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of small white onions
- 1 quart of vinegar
- 1 lb. of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of white pepper
- mace, a little
- cloves, a little
- ginger, a little
- a handful of salt to a quart of boiling water

## Directions

1. Wash onions, pour boiling water on and peel when water gets cool
2. Prepare a brine allowing a handful of salt to a quart of boiling water
3. Cover the onions with the brine
4. Let stand for 24 hours
5. Boil 10 minutes vinegar, sugar and spices, wrapped in a linen cloth
6. Remove the spices, place the onions in and let cook nearly tender
7. Put the onions in jar, drain the vinegar on, cork and keep in a cool place

title: Pieniä rinkeliä (Small Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 1 teaspoon cardamom pounded fine
- 1 yeast cake
- ¾ cup milk
- 6 tablespoons melted butter
- Flour

## Directions

1. Prepare the dough as given for coffee cake.
2. Let rise, knead and form into small rings.
3. Bake at once on a buttered baking sheet.

title: Pieniä Rinkeliä (Small Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 2 ounces of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of finely ground cardamom
- 1 cake of yeast
- 12 tablespoonfuls of milk
- 6 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- wheat flour as needed

## Directions

1. Prepare dough as for wheat dough.
2. Let it rise and shape small rings from it.
3. Bake them on buttered baking sheets in the oven immediately after shaping.

title: Pig's Head
body:
## Ingredients

- pork
- 4 eggs
- pepper
- salt
- sherry
- slices of carrots
- truffles
- cucumbers

## Directions

1. Split the head, remove the tongue, saw the bone leaving the nose whole.
2. Grind all kinds of pork, pound well.
3. Mix with 4 eggs, pepper, salt and sherry.
4. Put one half of the pork forcemeat into the head, lay on it slices of carrots, truffles, cucumbers, etc.
5. Fill with the remaining forcemeat.
6. Sew up the head and the eyes.
7. Put a slice of carrot in the ears and fasten them down.
8. Tie the nose with cord.
9. Wrap the head in a cloth and cook.
10. Place under a heavy weight.
11. Serve cold with Cumberland sauce.

title: Piirakat (Pies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 3/4 cup lard
- 1/4 cup butter
- 1/2 cup cold water
- 1/4 teaspoon baking powder
- salt
- egg for brushing

## Directions

1. Work with fingers thoroughly together the flour, salt, baking powder, butter and lard.
2. Add gradually the water. Knead to an even paste. Put in a cold place for a while.
3. Roll the paste in 1/2 inch thick sheet a little larger than the pie plate.
4. Place in the slightly buttered and with flour dusted plate, moisten the edges with water or egg white.
5. Fill, cover with the upper crust pressing the edges together.
6. Trim the edges even and fold down the edges of the top crust.
7. Perforate with a fork so as to let the steam escape.
8. Spread with egg, tie a strip of wet cloth around the edge.
9. Bake for 1 hour in a hot oven reducing the heat after baking a while.

title: Pikku Porsas (Roast Suckling Pig)
body:
## Ingredients

- A suckling pig, about 4 weeks old
- Salt and pepper
- Apple slices
- Prunes with stones removed
- Boiled rice or a mixture made of soaked bread, egg, chopped liver and heart of the pig, ham, and parsley

## Directions

1. Rub the inside of the suckling pig with salt and pepper.
2. Stuff with slices of apple and prunes (having the stones removed from the prunes) and boiled rice, or with a mixture made of soaked bread, egg, chopped liver and heart of the pig, ham and parsley.
3. Sew up the pig.
4. Spread the surface while roasting with butter or baste with the drippings.
5. Cover with paper if it becomes too brown.
6. Roast for 2 or 3 hours.
7. When done, lift onto a platter. If very small, cut the pig in quarters. If larger, cut in pieces having the pieces replaced around the backbone.
8. Make a gravy of the drippings in the pan.
9. It is best to tie the pig into the required shape before roasting so the meat is easier to handle.

title: Pinaatti-kääryjä (Spinach Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 lbs. of spinach
- 1/2 lb. of white bread
- 1/4 lb. of butter
- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 2 eggs
- salt, sugar and nutmeg

## Directions

1. Soak bread in milk
2. Clean spinach and boil
3. Separate the nicest leaves and grind the rest of leaves
4. Add melted butter, ground spinach, eggs and seasonings to the soaked bread, stirring well
5. Drop the mixture on the nice whole leaves and roll together
6. Bake in oven, covered, about 30 minutes
7. Arrange on a serving platter and serve with a sauce made of melted butter and hard-boiled egg

title: Pinaatti-munia (Spinach Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1/2 cupful of cream or spinach stock
- boiled chopped spinach
- hard-boiled eggs
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and cream or spinach stock
2. Mix with boiled chopped spinach
3. Cut hard-boiled eggs in halves
4. Rub the yolks to a paste and add to the spinach mixture
5. Let boil up
6. Fill the halves of whites with the spinach mixture
7. Serve with vegetables and fish

title: Pinaatti-Munia (Spinach Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful butter
- 1 tablespoonful flour
- 1/2 cupful cream or spinach broth
- cooked chopped spinach
- hard-boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce with butter, flour and cream or spinach broth
2. Mix in cooked chopped spinach
3. Cut hard-boiled eggs in half and chop the yolks finely
4. Mix the yolks with the spinach mixture and bring to a boil
5. Fill the egg white halves with the spinach mixture
6. Serve as a vegetable side dish with fish dishes

title: Pinaattikääryjä (Spinach Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ pound spinach
- ¾ pound white bread
- ¼ pound butter
- 2 cups milk
- 2 eggs
- Salt
- Sugar
- Nutmeg

## Directions

1. Soak the bread in milk.
2. Clean the spinach and boil.
3. Separate the nicest leaves and grind the remaining leaves.
4. Add to the bread the melted butter, chopped spinach, eggs and spices.
5. Stir the mixture well.
6. Place some of the mixture on the spinach leaves, roll up and bake covered in a buttered pan for 30 minutes.
7. Arrange on a platter, serve with a sauce made of melted butter and hard boiled eggs chopped.

title: Pinaattimuhennus (Stewed Spinach)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds spinach
- 4 tablespoons butter
- 1 1/2 tablespoons flour
- 1 cup milk or cream
- 1 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Clean and rinse the spinach carefully.
2. Boil in salted water with 1/4 teaspoonful of soda for 20 minutes.
3. Drain and chop.
4. Put butter and flour into a saucepan, add spinach, some liquor of spinach or milk, salt and some sugar according to taste.
5. Heat to boiling.
6. Place in a vegetable dish, garnish with hard boiled eggs.
7. Serve with meat or fish.

title: Pinaattimunia (Spinach Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1/2 cup cream or spinach liquor
- cooked chopped spinach
- hard boiled eggs
- cheese
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Make a sauce of butter, flour and cream or spinach liquor
2. Add boiled chopped spinach
3. Split hard boiled eggs and remove the yolks
4. Chop yolks and mix with the spinach and bring to boil
5. Fill the halves of the whites with the spinach mixture
6. Sprinkle with grated cheese and bread crumbs
7. Brown in oven

title: Pinaattiomeletti (Spinach Omelet)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound spinach
- 1 cup milk
- 4 eggs
- Butter
- Salt and pepper
- Cream

## Directions

1. Rinse the spinach, boil and chop.
2. Mix with butter, soften with cream.
3. Put in a buttered pan.
4. Beat the yolks and whites separately.
5. Mix the yolks with milk and season.
6. Add the whites.
7. Pour the mixture over the spinach.
8. Bake until firm and light brown.

title: Pinaattipaistos (Spinach Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound spinach
- 3/4 cup rice
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 cup water
- 3 cups milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoon salt

## Directions

1. Clean and boil the spinach in salt water with a little soda. Drain and chop.
2. Make a batter of rice, water and milk.
3. Mix with the spinach; add butter, sugar, salt and eggs.
4. Put in a buttered mold; bake for 30 or 40 minutes.
5. Serve with or without meat.

title: Pinaattitimboli (Spinach Timbale)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups boiled spinach
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon sugar
- 2 egg whites

## Directions

1. Take 2 cups of boiled spinach rubbed through a sieve.
2. Add butter, salt, sugar and egg whites beaten stiff.
3. Bake in buttered timbale molds in a pan of water.
4. May be flavored with onion juice if desired.

title: Pinaattivanukas (Spinach Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound spinach
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 3 cups milk
- 1 1/2 cups bread crumbs
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 3 eggs
- Some nutmeg

## Directions

1. Clean and boil the spinach and chop.
2. Add the bread crumbs soaked in milk, sugar, salt and nutmeg.
3. Add last the eggs beaten well.
4. Put into a buttered mold.
5. Bake in oven in a pan of water for 1 hour.
6. Serve with meat or fish.

title: Pineapple Ice
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cupfuls of water
- 3 cupfuls of sugar
- 1 grated pineapple
- juice of 2 oranges
- juice of 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Cook water and sugar 15 minutes
2. When cool, add pineapple and juice of fruits
3. Freeze

title: Piparjuuri Kastike (Horse-radish Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablesp. of grated horse-radish
- 1/2 tablespoonful of vinegar
- 4 tablespoonfuls of rich cream
- a little salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Mix horse-radish with vinegar, salt and pepper
2. Add the whipped cream last
3. Alternatively: Prepare a sauce of 2 tablespoonfuls of butter, 2 tablespoonfuls of flour and 2 cupfuls of fish stock
4. Add 3 - 4 tablespoonfuls of grated horse-radish, a dash of lemon juice, sugar and salt
5. At the last mix with yolk of 1 egg, if preferred
6. Hollandaise sauce may be mixed with horse-radish if desired

title: Piparjuuri lihaa (Meat with Horse-radish)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 lbs. of lean meat
- 3 quarts of water
- 2 tablespoonfuls of salt
- 1 onion
- 10 peppercorns
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 3 cupfuls of meat stock or milk
- yolks of 2 eggs
- 1/2 tablespoonful of vinegar
- 1/2 tablespoonful of sugar
- 4—5 tablespoonfuls of grated horse-radish

## Directions

1. Wipe the meat with cloth wrung out from hot water.
2. Put on fire in boiling water.
3. Skim and add salt, pepper and onion.
4. Cook covered until tender on a slow fire.
5. For the sauce: Mix butter with flour in saucepan.
6. Add meat stock and seasonings.
7. Let boil.
8. Remove from the fire.
9. Stir beaten egg yolks into it.
10. At the last mix with horse-radish.

title: Piparjuuri lihaa (Meat with Horseradish)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds lean meat
- 3 quarts water
- 2 tablespoons salt
- 1 onion
- 10 peppercorns
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 3 cups bouillon or milk
- 2 yolks of egg
- 1.5 tablespoon vinegar
- 0.5 tablespoon sugar
- 4 or 5 tablespoons grated horseradish

## Directions

1. Wipe the meat with a cloth wrung out of hot water.
2. Put into boiling water.
3. Cook, skimming off foam, and add salt, pepper and onion.
4. Continue boiling on a slow fire until tender.
5. For the sauce: Mix the butter and flour in a saucepan.
6. Add bouillon or milk, season and bring to boiling.
7. Remove from the fire and mix with yolks of egg.
8. Last of all add the grated horseradish.

title: Piparjuuri-kastike (Horseradish Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons grated horseradish
- ½ tablespoon lemon juice
- 4 tablespoons whipping cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Mix horseradish with lemon juice, salt and pepper.
2. Add whipped cream last.
3. Serve as desired or mix with Hollandaise sauce.

title: Piparjuurta Pöytää Varten (Horseradish for Table Use)
body:
## Ingredients

- horseradish
- sugar
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Clean and peel horseradish
2. Grate finely
3. Mix with sugar and vinegar, using as much vinegar as the horseradish absorbs
4. Pack in an airtight container and seal

title: Piparpähkinöitä (Peppernuts)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 1/2 teaspoons cardamom
- 1 1/2 teaspoons cinnamon
- 10 teaspoons cream
- 1/2 cup melted butter
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 7 or 8 cups flour

## Directions

1. Work eggs and sugar to a froth
2. Add spices and cream
3. Mix soda well with some flour and add
4. Mix in flour enough to make a soft batter
5. Work in the melted butter and the rest of the flour
6. Form the dough into small balls
7. Bake on a buttered baking sheet in oven until light brown

title: Piparpähkinöitä (Peppernuts)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 1 lb. of sugar
- 1 1/2 teaspoonfuls of cinnamon
- 10 tablespoonfuls of cream
- 1 1/2 teaspoonfuls of cardamom
- 1 teaspoonful of soda
- 2 lbs. of flour
- 1/2 cupful of melted butter

## Directions

1. Work eggs with sugar to a froth
2. Mix with spices and cream
3. Mix soda with a little flour and stir into the above mixture
4. Add flour enough to make a soft batter
5. Mix with melted butter and the rest of the flour
6. Form the batter into small nuts
7. Bake on greased baking sheet to a light brown, about 10-15 minutes

title: Pipuanti Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1 cupful of beef stock
- 1 cupful of tomato
- 1 tablespoonful of minced pickles
- 1 tablespoonful of minced fresh cucumber
- 1/2 teaspoonful of minced onion
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Make a sauce from butter, flour and beef stock
2. Add tomato, minced cucumbers, onion, salt and pepper
3. Cook for a few minutes

title: Piquanti-kastike (Piquant Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup bouillon
- 1 cup tomato
- some onion juice
- 1 tablespoon chopped pickles
- 1 tablespoon chopped fresh cucumber
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Make a gravy of butter, flour and bouillon.
2. Add tomato, chopped cucumber, pickles, onion juice, salt and pepper.
3. Cook for a few minutes.
4. Serve with meat or fish.

title: Plain Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 cupful of butter
- 3/4 cupful of sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour

## Directions

1. Rub butter and sugar to a cream, add well beaten eggs, milk, vanilla, baking powder mixed with flour into it.
2. Pour the mixture in a buttered mold and bake in a moderate oven.

title: Plain Omelet
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of water
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Whip the eggs, add water, pepper and salt
2. Melt butter evenly in a hot omelet pan, and turn the omelet onto it
3. Fry moving the pan over the fire; place the omelet on one side of the pan and brown it quickly on the bottom
4. Turn on a hot platter and serve with tomato sauce

title: Plain Pastry for Pies
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 1/4 cupful of lard
- 3/4 cupful of butter
- 1/2 cupful of cold water

## Directions

1. Work thoroughly together flour, salt and butter
2. Pour gradually water into it
3. Knead to an even paste
4. Put in a cold place for a while
5. Roll the paste into 1/2 inch thick crust, a little larger than the pie-plate
6. Place the crust on the floured pie plate
7. Spread the edges of the crust with water or white of egg
8. Have the upper crust a little larger than the under crust
9. Perforate the upper crust so that the steam may escape
10. Cover the filling with the upper crust pressing the edges well together
11. Cut the edges to fit evenly and fold down the edges of the upper crust
12. Spread with egg and tie around the edges with a wet cloth, 1 inch wide
13. Bake until lightly browned, first in hot oven then reducing the heat, 1 hour

title: Planked kala (Planked Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- mashed potato
- melted butter
- parsley
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Prepare the fish as for broiling. Broil on a plank, skin side down without turning.
2. When brown place the fish in oven to finish the cooking.
3. Lay mashed potato around the fish on the plank, brown.
4. Pour melted butter over, sprinkle with parsley.
5. Place the plank on a platter, serve garnished with parsley.

title: Plum Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- 6 ozs. of sugar
- 1/2 quart of thin cream
- 6 ozs. of butter
- 1 lb. of plums
- 4 ozs. of sweet almonds
- rind and juice of 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Beat yolks and sugar to a froth
2. add cream and butter and cook to a thick batter
3. Stir until cool
4. then add grated yellow rind and juice of lemon
5. Lastly mix carefully the beaten white into it
6. Cook plums in a little water until soft, then stone them
7. Butter a mold and cover inside with buttered paper
8. Put a layer of plums into it
9. then minced almonds
10. lastly pour the egg mixture in
11. Bake in a slow oven about 1 hour
12. Turn out upon a serving dish and serve with whipped cream or vanilla sauce

title: Plum Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 lbs. of plums
- 1 1/2 lbs. of sugar
- 1 pint of vinegar
- 1 tablespoonful of cloves
- a little cinnamon

## Directions

1. Wash plums and drain.
2. Prick skins in several places with a silver fork or a pin.
3. Cook sugar with vinegar and spices for a few minutes.
4. Pour the liquor on the plums into jars.
5. Cover tightly and let stand for two days.
6. Then boil up the liquor, place the plums in it and let simmer for a little while.
7. Place the plums into the jar and cook the liquor until it gets thick.
8. Pour the liquor on the plums, seal and keep in a cool place.

title: Poached Eggs in Soup (Lihalientä rikottujen munien kanssa)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- salt
- water

## Directions

1. Poach eggs in salted boiling water.
2. Let stand there until the white is firm.
3. Put carefully into soup.

title: Poached Eggs with Mushrooms
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh mushrooms
- butter
- toast
- eggs
- milksauce
- onion juice
- grated cheese
- breadcrumbs

## Directions

1. Fry fresh mushrooms in butter.
2. Place fried fresh mushrooms on buttered toast.
3. Arrange them upon a dish, and line with poached eggs.
4. Pour over the eggs milksauce mixed with onion juice and grated cheese.
5. Sprinkle with breadcrumbs and brown in oven.

title: Poltettuja mantelia (Burnt Almonds)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound almonds
- 1 pound sugar
- ½ teaspoon vanilla
- Water

## Directions

1. Select nice whole almonds and rub them between a cloth.
2. Moisten with syrup mixed with ½ teaspoon vanilla.
3. Cook the almonds stirring constantly until they begin to crack.
4. Remove from the fire and continue to stir until all the moisture has evaporated.
5. Place the pan again on a slow fire and add a few drops of water.
6. Stir until the almonds become coated with the syrup.
7. Remove from the fire and cover for 20 minutes with a clean cloth.

title: Pop-overia (Pop-overs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup flour
- 1 cup milk
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 or 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Sift flour with salt
2. Beat eggs, add milk and pour the mixture gradually into the flour
3. Beat well for 3 minutes
4. Heat and butter muffin tins, fill to 3/4 of their height
5. Bake for 30 or 40 minutes in a hot oven
6. Do not touch them before they are thoroughly done

title: Pop-overs
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of flour
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 2 eggs
- 1/2 teaspoonful of melted butter

## Directions

1. Put all ingredients in a bowl and whip well for 5 minutes.
2. Pour the batter in hot, buttered, deep iron molds.
3. Bake for 30 minutes, first in hot oven.
4. When risen, reduce heat.
5. Do not touch them before they are quite hard.

title: Porkkana-muhennus (Stewed Carrots)
body:
## Ingredients

- carrots
- salted water
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls flour
- cream
- parsley, chopped (optional)

## Directions

1. Peel, wash and cut carrots into dice or strips.
2. Cook in salted water until tender.
3. Prepare a sauce of butter and flour mixed with the cooking liquid from the carrots.
4. Add a little cream to the sauce.
5. Put the carrots in the sauce and let boil.
6. Sprinkle with chopped parsley if desired.

title: Porkkana-putinki (Carrot Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds carrots
- 2 cupfuls bread crumbs
- 1 1/2 tablespoonfuls sugar
- 2 cupfuls cream or milk
- 1 teaspoonful salt
- 3 tablespoonfuls butter
- 3/4 cupful almonds
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Clean and cook carrots until tender in salted water.
2. Mash the cooked carrots.
3. Add all ingredients to the mashed carrots, adding the beaten eggs last.
4. Bake in a slow oven or in a pan of water.
5. Serve in the same dish or turn it out onto a serving dish.

title: Porkkana-soppa (Carrot Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 quarts of bouillon
- 1 lb. of carrots
- 1 turnip
- 1 onion
- 1 root or 4 stalks of celery
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 yolks of eggs
- 1 cupful of cream or milk
- salt and pepper
- sugar

## Directions

1. Clean, scrape and cut the vegetables into pieces.
2. Put them into the kettle with butter, a little salt and sugar.
3. Let simmer in butter, stirring constantly, until lightly browned.
4. Add the stock and let it boil slowly until the vegetables are tender.
5. Pass through a sieve.
6. Thicken with butter and flour.
7. At the last add the yolks of eggs and cream into it, whipping well.

title: Porkkana-tippoja (Carrot Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 kuppia riivattua porkkanaa
- 4 munaa
- 1 kuppi kermaa
- 3 unssia leipäjauhoa
- 3 unssia vehnäjauhoja
- 4 ruokalus. sulatettua voita
- suolaa mausteeksi

## Directions

1. Riivattu porkkana, munanruskuaiset vatkattuna, kerma, leipäjauho, vehnäjauhot, sulatettu voi ja suola seotetaan hyvästi.
2. Vaahdoksi vatkatut valkuaiset seotetaan viimeksi sekaan.
3. Pannaan lusikalla kiehuvaan rasvaan ja paistetaan ruskeaksi molemmilta puolilta.

title: Porkkanainiihennus (Stewed Carrots)
body:
## Ingredients

- Carrots
- Salt
- Water
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- Carrot liquor or milk
- Cream
- Chopped parsley (optional)

## Directions

1. Peel the carrots, rinse, cut into cubes or strips.
2. Cook until tender in a small quantity of salted water.
3. Make a sauce of 2 tablespoons butter, 2 tablespoons flour, liquor of carrots or milk.
4. Add some cream to the sauce.
5. Stir the carrots in.
6. Boil quickly.
7. May be sprinkled with chopped parsley if desired.

title: Porkkanamuhennus (Mashed Carrots)
body:
## Ingredients

- carrots
- salt
- water
- butter
- pepper
- cream

## Directions

1. Peel the carrots and cook in salted water until tender
2. Force through a meat chopper, sieve, or grate them
3. Add butter, salt, pepper and some cream
4. Heat to boiling

title: Porkkanaputinki (Carrot Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds carrots
- 2 cups bread crumbs
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 2 cups cream or milk
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 1/4 cup almonds
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Clean and cook carrots in salted water until tender
2. Grate carrots
3. Mix with all ingredients
4. Add eggs beaten last of all
5. Bake in oven in a pan of water
6. Serve in mold or unmolded

title: Porkkanaputinki riisin kanssa (Carrot Pudding with Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup rice
- 3 cups water
- 1 pint milk
- 1 pound carrots
- 1 tablespoon almonds
- 1 dessert-spoon salt
- 1½ tablespoon sugar
- 1 egg
- 2 tablespoons butter

## Directions

1. Make a porridge of rice, water and milk
2. Peel, rinse and boil carrots until almost tender
3. Grate the carrots and almonds
4. Add carrots, sugar and butter to the porridge
5. Mix in the egg beaten
6. Pour into a buttered mold
7. Bake in oven about 1 hour

title: Porkkanaputinki riisin kanssa (Carrot Pudding with Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful rice
- 3 cupfuls water
- 1 pint milk
- 1 pound carrots
- 1 tablespoonful almonds
- 1 dessertspoonful salt
- 1/2 tablespoonful sugar
- 1 egg
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter

## Directions

1. Cook rice, water and milk until thick.
2. Peel, wash and cook carrots until nearly tender.
3. Grate the carrots and almonds together.
4. Mix the grated carrots and almonds with sugar and salt into the rice.
5. Whip the egg and stir into the mixture.
6. Pour into a buttered mould and bake in the oven for about 1 hour.

title: Porkkanasalaatti (Carrot Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- raw carrots
- chopped almonds or nuts
- lettuce leaves
- mayonnaise or cream dressing

## Directions

1. Grate raw carrots
2. Mix with chopped almonds or nuts
3. Place on a bed of lettuce
4. Cover with mayonnaise or cream dressing

title: Porkkanasoppa (Carrot Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts bouillon
- 1 cup carrots cut in pieces
- 1 small onion
- 2 stalks celery
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 cup cream
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Rinse, peel and cut in pieces the vegetables.
2. Put into a saucepan with 2 tablespoons of butter and some salt, cook slowly until lightly brown, stirring continually.
3. Add the bouillon and simmer until the vegetables are tender.
4. Press through a strainer, thicken with butter and flour.
5. Last of all add the egg yolks whipped with cream.
6. May be prepared without yolks and cream.

title: Porkkanatippoja (Carrot Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups grated carrots
- 4 eggs
- 1 cup cream or milk
- 6 tablespoons bread crumbs
- 6 tablespoons flour
- 4 tablespoons melted butter
- Salt

## Directions

1. Mix together the grated carrot, cream, whipped egg yolks, bread crumbs, flour, melted butter and salt
2. Stir well
3. Beat the egg whites to a firm froth and add last
4. Drop by spoonful into boiling fat
5. Cook until brown on both sides

title: Porkkanatippoja (Carrot Fritters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups boiled carrots
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 yolks of egg beaten
- 2 whites of egg beaten firm
- butter for frying

## Directions

1. Rub boiled carrots through a sieve
2. Add flour
3. Add beaten egg yolks and last of all beaten egg whites
4. Drop by spoonful into a well buttered frying pan
5. Fry on both sides until brown
6. Serve immediately

title: Porkkanoita ja herneitä (Carrots and Peas)
body:
## Ingredients

- Carrots
- Water or bouillon
- Salt
- Cooked green peas (equal amount to carrots)
- Pepper
- Butter
- Chopped parsley

## Directions

1. Peel and rinse the carrots, cut into tiny cubes.
2. Cook in slightly salted water until tender, or use bouillon instead of water.
3. Drain, mix with equal part of green peas, season with salt and pepper, add butter and a sprinkling of chopped parsley.

title: Porkkanoita sipulin kanssa (Carrots with Onions)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups carrots
- 3 onions
- salt
- water
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- butter
- flour
- liquor from vegetables

## Directions

1. Clean and cut carrots in cubes
2. Peel and cut onions in pieces
3. Boil together in salted water until tender
4. Drain and reserve liquor
5. Make a sauce of butter, flour and liquor from vegetables
6. Mix with the vegetables, bring to boiling and serve
7. Alternatively, cook onions in butter, add flour and liquor of carrots, mix with cooked carrots
8. Carrots may be cut in long strips and boiled together with white part of green onions
9. Make sauce of butter, flour and liquor of vegetables
10. Serve with mashed potatoes in the center and carrots around

title: Porsaan Kyljykset (Pork Chops)
body:
## Ingredients

- Pork chops
- Salt and pepper
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Butter or lard

## Directions

1. Sprinkle the chops with salt and pepper.
2. Place in a hot frying pan.
3. Fry on both sides until brown and done.
4. If desired, dip the chops in egg and roll in bread crumbs before frying.
5. Fry in butter or lard.

title: Porsas Torttu (Pig Tart)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 6 ozs. of sugar
- 1/2 lemon rind and juice
- 4 ozs. of corn starch
- 2 ozs. of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of white wine
- 2 ozs. of almonds

## Directions

1. Beat yolks and sugar well, add lemon rind, juice and corn starch.
2. Lastly mix with whites, whipped stiff.
3. Bake in oven.
4. When done, baste with following frosting: 2 ozs. of sugar, 1/2 cupful of white wine.
5. Peel almonds, cut into long thin pieces and stick on top of cake.

title: Porsashyytelö (Suckling Pig à la Aspic)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds suckling pig meat
- 2 quarts water
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 10 peppercorns
- 1 bay leaf
- 3 leaves of gelatine
- Knuckles of veal
- Egg whites
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- Tomato

## Directions

1. Wipe the meat and the knuckles with a cloth wrung out of hot water.
2. Place the knuckles on the fire in cold water; when coming to a boil add the meat.
3. Skim, spice and let boil slowly until tender.
4. Remove the skin, cut the meat into nice cubes.
5. Beat the whites of egg lightly, mix with the gelatine dissolved, 1 tablespoon of lemon juice and the liquor of meat carefully removing the fat.
6. Add some tomato.
7. Stir on the fire until it begins to boil, place the saucepan on the side of the range, cook slowly.
8. Strain through a fine cloth.
9. Line a mold thinly with clarified liquid jelly, garnish with hard boiled eggs and parsley.
10. Lay the pieces of meat into the mold lightly so as to fill it with plenty of liquid.
11. Put in a cold place to set.

title: Porsastorttu (Pig Tart)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 3/4 cup sugar
- Juice and yellow rind of 1 lemon
- 1 cup potato flour or cornstarch
- 1/2 cup almonds

## Directions

1. Beat the yolks with the sugar
2. Add the lemon and flour
3. Mix in the beaten egg whites last of all
4. Bake for 3/4 hour
5. When done, baste with 3/4 cup of white wine in which 2 tablespoons of sugar is dissolved, or with fruit juice
6. Blanch and cut lengthwise the almonds
7. Stick the almonds into the tart

title: Potato Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of mashed potatoes
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- salt and pepper
- yolks of 3 eggs
- egg
- bread crumbs
- lard

## Directions

1. Mix mashed potatoes with butter, salt, pepper and yolks.
2. Form into balls or oval-shaped croquettes.
3. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
4. Cook in lard.

title: Potato Dumplings
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful mashed potato
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls cream
- 3 tablespoonfuls bread crumbs
- 2 eggs, beaten
- flour enough to make a firm batter, about 1 cupful

## Directions

1. Mix mashed potato with butter, cream, bread crumbs, beaten eggs and flour enough to make a firm batter
2. Test first by dropping a little into boiling water
3. Drop by the spoonful into boiling salted water or into bouillon shortly before serving

title: Potato Dumplings (Peruna mykyjä)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of mashed potatoes
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 1 whole egg and 1 yolk
- 3/4 cupful of flour
- nutmeg and pepper
- bread crumbs
- lard

## Directions

1. Mix mashed potatoes with butter, salt, beaten egg and flour.
2. Form into croquettes and roll in flour.
3. Cook in salted water 15 minutes.
4. Serve as they are or dip the boiled rolls in egg, dredge with bread crumbs and fry in lard.

title: Potato Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- equal-sized potatoes
- salt
- pepper
- egg
- butter

## Directions

1. Cook equal-sized potatoes in salted water
2. Peel and scoop out the interior carefully
3. Fill with egg
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
5. Bake in oven
6. Send to the table with browned butter as sauce

title: Potato Eggs (Peruna-munia)
body:
## Ingredients

- uniform-sized potatoes
- eggs
- salt
- pepper
- browned butter

## Directions

1. Boil uniform-sized potatoes in salted water.
2. Peel and carefully hollow out the inside.
3. Fill the potato with egg, sprinkle with salt and pepper and bake in the oven.
4. Serve with browned butter as sauce.

title: Potato Fritters (Peruna-tippoja)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of mashed potatoes
- 1 tablespoonful of cream
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- nutmeg and pepper
- 1 egg yolk and 2 egg whites
- lard

## Directions

1. Mix the potatoes with cream, salt, nutmeg and pepper.
2. Add the egg whites last.
3. Drop with spoon into boiling lard.
4. Cook until brown.
5. Fritters of sweet potatoes may be made in the same way.

title: Potato Omelet (Peruna-omeletti)
body:
## Ingredients

- potato mash
- butter

## Directions

1. Lay potato mash in a buttered omelet pan.
2. Bake in oven until brown underneath.
3. Double on a platter as omelet.

title: Potato Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- onion juice
- parsley
- French dressing
- mayonnaise dressing
- bacon
- pickled cucumber
- beet
- lettuce leaves
- hard-boiled eggs
- capers

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes with skins on.
2. Let cool down, peel and cut in very thin slices.
3. Drop a little onion juice on and mix with minced parsley.
4. Pour French dressing on.
5. Mayonnaise dressing may also be used with potato salad.
6. Potato slices mixed with fried bacon cut in very small cubes, 1 pickled cucumber and thinly sliced beet, make a delicate salad; has to be served with French dressing.
7. Arrange lettuce leaves around and garnish with hard-boiled egg yolk and capers.

title: Potato Snow
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled potatoes
- salt

## Directions

1. Prepare same as boiled potatoes
2. Work through a potato press in center of a serving dish
3. Sprinkle with salt
4. Serve

title: Potato Snow
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- salt

## Directions

1. Prepare same as boiled potatoes.
2. Work through a potato press in center of a serving dish.
3. Sprinkle with salt.
4. Serve.

title: Potato Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 potatoes
- 3 leeks
- 3 quarts of vegetable stock
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- yolks of 2 eggs
- 1 cupful of cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Peel the potatoes and cut in pieces.
2. Cook in vegetable stock until tender.
3. Cut the leeks in pieces and cook in butter, add flour and the soup, and press through a strainer.
4. Return to the fire, stir until thick.
5. Finely chopped parsley gives it a good flavor.

title: Preserved Apples
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds sugar
- 1 quart water
- apples

## Directions

1. Prepare syrup allowing 2 pounds of sugar to 1 quart of water.
2. Peel apples, core and cut in pieces lengthwise or cook them whole.
3. Lay them carefully in glass jars with air-tight covers.
4. Fill the jars with the above syrup.
5. Seal the jars and place in a boiler on something to raise them off the bottom of the boiler, or they will break while boiling.
6. Pour lukewarm water into the boiler covering the jars until two-thirds of their height.
7. Place the boiler on fire, let slowly come to boil.
8. Cook for 20-30 minutes.
9. Let stand in water, in which they have been cooked, until cooled.

title: Preserved Berries
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds sugar
- 1 quart water
- raspberries, strawberries, gooseberries, or blackberries

## Directions

1. All kinds of berries, like raspberries, strawberries, gooseberries, blackberries may be preserved in the same way as directed for apples, but do not let them boil as long a time as apples.

title: Preserved Cherries
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds sugar
- 1 quart water
- cherries

## Directions

1. Prepare cherries as directed above for plums.

title: Preserved Peach
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds sugar
- 1 quart water
- peaches

## Directions

1. Prepare in the same way as preserved apples.
2. Skin peaches putting them first quickly in boiling water.
3. Cut them into pieces lengthwise or cook whole.
4. Boil peaches rapidly in syrup before you place them into jars.
5. All kinds of hard fruit are quickly cooked in boiling water before placing them into jars.

title: Preserved Pears
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds sugar
- 1 quart water
- pears

## Directions

1. Preserve pears in the same way as apples.

title: Preserved Pineapple
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds sugar
- 1 quart water
- pineapples

## Directions

1. Pare pineapples and remove the black eyes.
2. Slice or cut into dice.
3. Cook in syrup before you place them in jars.
4. Prepare like preserved apples.

title: Preserved Plums
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds sugar
- 1 quart water
- plums

## Directions

1. Prepare in the same way as preserved apples.
2. Remove the skins or leave them on.
3. When pricked in several places with a fork before cooking, the skins will not crack open or come off if boiled too long.
4. Do not boil plums as long a time as apples.

title: Preserved Quince
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds sugar
- 1 quart water
- quince

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed for preserved apples.
2. Pare and core the fruit, cook sliced or whole.

title: Preserved Rhubarb
body:
## Ingredients

- rhubarb
- cold water

## Directions

1. Skin young rhubarb and cut into pieces one inch long.
2. Place them in clean jars and pour cold water on filling the jars until three-fourths of their depth.
3. Place the jars in a boiler, fill it with water and put on fire to heat slowly.
4. Cook for 1/2 hour.
5. Keep the jars in water, in which they are cooked until it gets cool.
6. Seal the jars and keep in a cold place.

title: Preserved Rhubarb
body:
## Ingredients

- young rhubarb
- cold water

## Directions

1. Skin young rhubarb and cut into pieces one inch long.
2. Place them in clean jars and pour cold water on filling the jars until three-fourths of their depth.
3. Place the jars in a boiler, fill it with water and put on fire to heat slowly.
4. Cook for 3/4 hour.
5. Keep the jars in water, in which they are cooked until it gets cool.
6. Seal the jars and keep in a cold place.
7. Alternatively, rhubarb may be preserved without boiling: Place rhubarb in jars, pour cold water on, seal the jars and keep in a cool place.

title: Preserved Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- water

## Directions

1. Keep tomatoes in hot water until skins are easy to remove.
2. Cut in pieces and cook until done.
3. Skim and place in jars, cover closely and keep in a cool place.

title: Princess Cookies (Prinsessa Kakkuja)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of butter
- 3 ozs. of almonds
- whites of 2 eggs
- 1/2 lb. of flour

## Directions

1. Wash butter and sift flour onto a pastry board
2. Place butter in small pieces on the flour
3. Add almonds and egg whites unbeaten
4. Mix all ingredients well together into a smooth batter
5. Roll out batter
6. Cut small cookies with a cutter
7. Brush with egg white
8. Sprinkle chopped almonds and crystal sugar on top
9. Bake to a light brown in a moderate oven

title: Puffed Potatoes (Peruna-vanukas)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. of potatoes
- 1/4 lb. of butter
- 1 small tablespoonful of salt
- 4 eggs
- 8 tablespoonfuls of cream
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour

## Directions

1. Peel potatoes, cook and mash.
2. Add butter, salt, cream, flour and egg yolks.
3. Beat egg whites and add last.
4. Bake in oven to light brown.

title: Puffs
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 ozs. of butter
- 12 tablespoonfuls of milk, mixed with cream
- 5 ozs. of flour
- 1 1/2 ozs. of corn starch
- 6 eggs
- sugar
- jam
- cream

## Directions

1. Boil up butter and milk, mix thoroughly with flour.
2. Let boil until it begins to brown on the bottom.
3. Work one yolk immediately into it, and when the batter is cold, add the remaining egg yolks.
4. Lastly add whites, beaten stiff.
5. Drop with a spoon into boiling lard and cook until well done.
6. Sprinkle with sugar immediately and serve with jam and cream.

title: Pullia (Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- milk bread dough or wheat bread dough
- egg for brushing

## Directions

1. Prepare the dough as directed for milk bread and let rise
2. Form into a loaf and divide into equal parts
3. Form into rolls and place on a baking sheet to rise
4. Brush with egg and bake in a hot oven

title: Pumpkin-piirakka (Pumpkin Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups cooked and mashed pumpkin
- 2 egg yolks and 1 whole egg
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoon butter
- 2 cups milk
- 1/4 teaspoon each cinnamon, nutmeg, and mace
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1/4 teaspoon vanilla
- Some lemon juice

## Directions

1. Mix the pumpkin with the dry ingredients.
2. Add milk or cream and whipped eggs.
3. Bake in an open crust.

title: Punajuuria kastekkeen kanssa (Beets with Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- beets
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- 1/2 tablespoonful of corn starch
- 1/2 cupful of vinegar

## Directions

1. Cook beets until tender and cut into slices.
2. Prepare a sauce of 1/2 cupful of sugar, 1/2 tablespoonful of corn starch, 1/2 cupful of vinegar and let boil 5 minutes.
3. Pour the sauce over the beets.
4. Place the saucepan aside on the stove.
5. Let stand 1/2 hour.

title: Punajuuria kastikkeen kanssa (Sweet Sour Beets)
body:
## Ingredients

- Beets
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1/2 tablespoon cornstarch
- 1/2 cup vinegar
- 2 tablespoons water

## Directions

1. Boil the beets until tender, cut in slices
2. Make a sauce of 3/4 cup of sugar, 1/2 tablespoon of cornstarch, 1/2 cup of vinegar and 2 tablespoons of water
3. Cook for 5 minutes
4. Pour the sauce over the beets let simmer for 1/2 hour
5. Serve hot or cold

title: Punajuurikeitto (Beet Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 quarts bouillon
- 5 or 8 beets
- 2 or 3 tomatoes
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- lemon juice or vinegar
- salt and pepper
- sour cream

## Directions

1. Wash the beets and bake in oven until tender.
2. Peel and cut into small pieces.
3. Cook in butter, dropping some lemon juice or vinegar on them so as to keep the color.
4. Dust the beets with the flour and add gradually the bouillon.
5. Cook for 10 minutes.
6. Peel the tomatoes, grind, and add to the beets.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. The color may be improved by adding some raw grated beet to the soup.
9. Serve with sour cream.
10. Alternatively, the beets may be cooked until tender by simmering them in butter for a few hours covered.
11. Beet soup may be made by using vegetable stock instead of bouillon.
12. Last of all add the yolks of eggs and the cream.

title: Punajuurisalaatti (Pickled Beets)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart boiled beets, cut in slices
- salt
- sugar
- pepper
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Lay beets into a jar
2. Between the layers sprinkle some salt, sugar and pepper
3. Pour vinegar over

title: Punakaali sienien kanssa (Red Cabbage with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- Red cabbage
- Butter
- Salt
- Pepper
- Mushrooms
- Lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cut the cabbage in strips, put into cold water for 1/2 hour.
2. Let simmer with plenty of butter covered until tender, season.
3. Arrange in a serving dish.
4. Place mushrooms sprinkled with some lemon juice on top of or around the cabbage.

title: Punakaali-muhennus (Stewed Red Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 red cabbages
- 1 onion
- 3 apples or 3 tomatoes
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 1 tablespoonful of parsley
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1/2 cupful of wine
- a little pepper
- 1 tablespoonful of currant jelly

## Directions

1. Cut cabbage in thin slices
2. Remove the thickest stalks
3. Melt 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
4. Cook onion in it
5. Add the cabbage and apples, cut in pieces
6. Add sugar, salt, parsley and pepper
7. Let boil tightly covered 1-2 hours
8. Add wine, the rest of the butter and 1 tablespoonful of currant jelly
9. Let boil 5 minutes
10. Serve with meat

title: Punakaalimuhennus (Stewed Red Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 heads red cabbage
- 1 onion
- 3 apples or tomatoes
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 tablespoon parsley
- 4 tablespoons butter
- Juice of 1/2 lemon
- Some pepper

## Directions

1. Cut the cabbage in strips, remove the strongest ribs.
2. Cook the onion in butter, add the cabbage, the apples cut in pieces, sugar, salt, parsley and pepper.
3. Let boil tightly covered for 1 or 2 hours.
4. Add lemon juice, the rest of the butter and 1 tablespoon of currant jelly, continue boiling for 5 minutes.
5. Serve with meat.

title: Punakaalisalaatti (Red Cabbage Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- cabbage
- 2 teaspoons mustard
- salt
- pepper
- sugar
- 5 tablespoons salad oil
- 1 cup vinegar
- parsley

## Directions

1. Cut the cabbage in very fine shreds.
2. Mix 2 teaspoons of mustard, salt, pepper, sugar and 5 tablespoons of salad oil.
3. Add this mixture to a cup of vinegar.
4. Pour over the cabbage and place under a weight for a few hours.
5. Put the cabbage into a salad bowl, sprinkle with minced parsley.
6. Serve with steak.

title: Pähkinä-paisti (Nut Steak)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup ground nuts
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 2 cups boiled rice
- 1 cup cream
- 1 cup vegetable stock or water
- 1/4 pound butter
- 3 eggs
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Add the ground nuts to the rice or grind the rice together with the nuts.
2. Mix with bread crumbs soaked in vegetable stock or tomato juice.
3. Add beaten eggs and melted butter.
4. Combine with the mixture of rice and nuts.
5. Dilute with cream if necessary.
6. Season and stir well.
7. Place onto a buttered pan and form into a loaf.
8. Bake for 1 hour.
9. If brushed with egg, the steak will look nicer.
10. Prepare a gravy of the drippings.

title: Pähkinä-paisti (Nut Steak)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of shelled nuts
- 1/2 lb. of bread crumbs
- 10 ozs. of rice
- 3 cupfuls of vegetable stock
- 1 cupful of cream
- 1/4 lb. of butter
- 4 eggs
- salt to taste

## Directions

1. Grind boiled rice together with shelled nuts
2. Soak bread crumbs in vegetable stock mixed with cream
3. Mix soaked bread crumbs with beaten eggs and melted butter
4. Combine all mixtures
5. Season with salt
6. Rub mixture well
7. Form into a loaf on a buttered baking pan
8. Spread with egg and sprinkle with bread crumbs
9. Bake in oven 3/4 hour
10. Prepare a sauce by adding flour, vegetable stock and cream to drippings in pan
11. Serve with vegetables

title: Pähkinä-vanukas (Nut Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of bread
- 1/2 lb. of shelled nuts
- 3/4 lb. of butter
- 4 eggs
- 3/4 cupful of milk
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- a dash of pepper

## Directions

1. Grind nuts
2. Soak bread in milk
3. Mix bread with nuts
4. Add melted butter creamed with egg yolks
5. Season with salt and pepper
6. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites
7. Pour into buttered mold
8. Bake about 1 hour

title: Pähkinämureketta (Nut Farce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound nuts
- 1 pound potatoes
- 1/2 pound bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoons cornstarch
- 1 1/2 cups milk or strained tomato
- 3 eggs
- salt and pepper
- 1/4 pound butter

## Directions

1. Cook and mash the potatoes.
2. Put the shelled nuts through a meat grinder.
3. Combine the potatoes with the nuts.
4. Add the bread crumbs soaked in milk or tomato juice, beaten egg, cornstarch and the seasonings.
5. Bake in a buttered mold in a pan of water.
6. May be made into balls, croquettes, etc., and fried in butter.
7. Make a sauce of vegetable stock and cream or serve with tomato sauce.

title: Pähkinävanukasta (Nut Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup shelled walnuts
- 2 cups bread crumbs
- 1/2 cup butter
- 3 eggs
- 2.5 cup milk or tomato liquor
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Grind the nuts.
2. Mix bread crumbs soaked in milk with the ground nuts.
3. Add melted butter rubbed until creamy.
4. Add beaten egg yolks.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Mix in the beaten egg whites last of all.
7. Pour the mixture into a buttered mold.
8. Bake for 1 hour.

title: Pähkinävoileipiä (Nut Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful dates
- 1/2 cupful nuts
- lemon juice or cream

## Directions

1. Use 1 cupful of chopped dates and 1/2 cupful of chopped nuts.
2. Dilute with lemon juice or cream.

title: Päivällispullia (Dinner Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 2/3 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 yeast cake
- 1/3 cup butter
- 2 eggs
- flour

## Directions

1. Warm the milk mixed with salt and sugar
2. Add yeast and 1 1/2 cups flour, cover and let rise
3. Work in the eggs beaten well, melted butter and flour enough to make a moderately thick dough
4. Let rise again
5. Form into rolls and place on a buttered baking sheet to rise
6. Bake in a hot oven

title: Päärynä (Pears)
body:
## Ingredients

- pears
- walnuts
- celery
- apples
- mayonnaise
- whipped cream
- maraschino cherries
- lettuce leaves

## Directions

1. Cut pears in two and scoop a little in the center.
2. Fill with chopped walnuts, celery and apples.
3. Cover with mayonnaise diluted with cream.
4. Garnish with chopped maraschino cherries.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves.

title: Päärynäkakku (Pear Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart pears
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 1/2 cups milk
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 3 tablespoons flour
- yellow grated rind of 1 lemon
- 4 eggs

## Directions

1. Peel the pears, core and cook until tender with 1 cup of sugar.
2. Cook a paste of milk, flour and butter.
3. Add the yolks beaten with sugar and lemon rind.
4. Finally mix with the beaten egg whites.
5. Lay the pears on the bottom of a buttered mold.
6. Pour the paste over and bake for 3/4 hour.

title: Päärynäsalaatti (Pear Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pears
- Lemon juice
- Cucumber

## Directions

1. Cut 2 pears into pieces and sprinkle with lemon juice to preserve their color
2. Take the same amount of cut cucumber

title: Päärynäsalaatti (Pear Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pears
- lemon juice
- equal parts cucumber
- equal parts melon
- French dressing
- lettuce leaves
- string beans or asparagus tips

## Directions

1. Cut in pieces 2 pears
2. moisten with lemon juice
3. add equal parts of cucumber and melon
4. Mix with French dressing
5. Serve on lettuce leaves garnished with string beans or asparagus tips

title: Pääsiäis-pähkinöitä (Easter Doughnuts)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1/2 cup milk
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 yeast cake
- 1 whole egg and 1 yolk
- 1 1/2 teaspoon grated lemon rind
- Dash of nutmeg
- 1/2 cup currants washed and wiped

## Directions

1. Warm the milk, add yeast, salt and 1/2 cup flour, let rise.
2. Beat the eggs with the sugar, combine with the risen sponge, add butter rubbed until creamy, spices, currants and the rest of the flour, let rise.
