3. Drop by the spoonful into boiling fat, cook until thoroughly done and nice brown.
4. Drain on paper, sprinkle with powdered sugar.

title: Quince Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- quinces
- cold water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Core quince and cut in pieces.
2. Proceed as for apple jelly.

title: Raaka Kurkku (Raw Cucumber)
body:
## Ingredients

- cucumbers
- 1 cup vinegar
- 3/4 cup olive oil
- salt
- pepper
- parsley

## Directions

1. Have the cucumbers fresh and green.
2. Peel, cut in thin slices.
3. Make a French dressing of 1 cup vinegar, 3/4 cup of olive oil, salt and pepper.
4. Add to the cucumbers.
5. Sprinkle with parsley.

title: Raaka Kurkku (Raw Cucumber)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh cucumbers
- 1 cupful of vinegar
- ⅓ cupful of salad oil
- salt and pepper
- minced parsley

## Directions

1. See to it that the cucumbers are fresh
2. Peel and cut in thin slices
3. Make French dressing of vinegar and salad oil with salt and pepper to taste
4. Pour over the sliced cucumbers
5. Sprinkle with minced parsley

title: Ragii (Ragout of Beef)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2.5 pounds boiled or fried meat
- 1 onion
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 cups bouillon or gravy
- 2 tablespoons tomato
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cut the meat in cubes.
2. Chop the onion and brown in butter with the meat and flour.
3. Add the bouillon, tomato and seasonings.
4. Boil quickly.
5. When fried meat is used it will become tough if boiled too long.

title: Ragout of Beef
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 lbs. of cooked or fried meat
- 1 onion
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 2 cupfuls of meat stock or sauce
- salt and pepper
- 2 tablespoonfuls of tomato

## Directions

1. Cut meat into dice, chop onion, brown in butter.
2. Mix with meat and flour and continue frying.
3. Add meat stock, seasonings and tomato.
4. Bring to the boiling point.
5. When fried meat is used, it will get tough if boiled too long a time.

title: Ragout of Kidneys
body:
## Ingredients

- kidneys
- salt
- pepper
- bread crumbs
- butter
- onion
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- 1/2 cupful of meat stock
- 1/2 cupful of mushrooms

## Directions

1. Soak kidneys in cold water for an hour
2. Wipe and cut in pieces
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, roll in bread crumbs and fry in butter with a slice of onion
4. Mix with 1 tablespoonful of flour, 1/2 cupful of meat stock and let boil 5 minutes
5. Strain, add 1/2 cupful of mushrooms cleaned and cut into quarters
6. Season with salt and pepper, and let boil for a few minutes

title: Raisin Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1/3 cupful of butter
- 1 egg
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 1/2 teaspoonful of vanilla
- raisins to garnish

## Directions

1. Beat butter with sugar to a froth
2. Add beaten egg, vanilla and flour
3. Drop with spoon on a baking sheet
4. Fit edges with knife
5. Place a raisin or an almond on each one
6. Bake to a light brown

title: Ranskalainen omeletti (French Omelet)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoons milk or water
- 1 tablespoon butter
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Separate the yolks from the whites.
2. Beat the whites stiff.
3. Set aside until the yolks are beaten.
4. Mix the yolks with milk or water and season.
5. Add the beaten whites to the yolk mixture.
6. Melt butter in an omelet pan and turn the eggs into the pan.
7. Place on the stove to fry slowly, turning the pan now and then so the omelet browns evenly.
8. If the surface feels soft, place the pan in the oven for a moment.
9. Fold once and turn onto a hot platter.
10. Serve plain or with sauce.

title: Ranskalainen salaattikastike (French Dressing)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 tablespoons salad oil
- 1 tablespoon vinegar
- 1/2 tablespoon lemon juice
- 1/4 teaspoon pepper
- 1/2 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Mix the oil with salt and pepper
2. Add gradually the vinegar to the oil

title: Ranskalaisia munkkeja (French Puffs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1/2 cup flour
- 2 eggs
- Fine sugar for sprinkling
- Whipped cream mixed with fruit juice for serving

## Directions

1. Place butter and milk into a saucepan on the fire; when coming to boil, add the flour stirring well so as to have a smooth paste.
2. Cook until brown underneath.
3. Remove from the fire, let cool.
4. Beat the yolks, work into the paste, at the last add the whites beaten firm.
5. Force through a pastry bag or drop by the spoonful into boiling lard.
6. Sprinkle with sugar.
7. Serve with whipped cream mixed with fruit juice.

title: Ranskalaisia perunoita (French Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- lard or deep frying fat
- salt

## Directions

1. Pare the potatoes, rinse and wipe dry.
2. Cut into pieces of equal size, strips, balls, slices or any preferred shape.
3. Cook in deep lard until light brown.
4. Sprinkle with salt and serve on a folded napkin.

title: Raparperi ja Tapioca (Rhubarb with Tapioca)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3-4 cupfuls of boiling water
- 1/2 quart of rhubarb, cut in pieces
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of tapioca
- 2 teaspoonfuls of butter

## Directions

1. Soak tapioca in boiling water 10-15 minutes
2. Put pot on the fire, add rhubarb, sugar and butter
3. Let simmer gently 1/2 hour, stirring often, so that the mixture does not burn
4. Pour in a mold
5. Serve cold on a plate, garnished with whipped cream

title: Raparperi kohokas (Rhubarb Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of rhubarb
- 5 ozs. of granulated sugar
- 1/2 cupful of water
- 6 eggs
- 1 tablespoonful of cream
- 5 tablesp. of powdered sugar
- 1 teasp. of grated lemon rind

## Directions

1. Skin the stalks, cut in pieces and cook with granulated sugar.
2. Whip yolks with sugar, add cream and lemon rind.
3. Beat whites until stiff and stir into the mixture.
4. Put one half of the mixture into a buttered mold, lay the cooked and strained rhubarb on it.
5. Pour the remaining mixture in.
6. Steam in oven about 3/4 of an hour.
7. Serve hot with whipped cream.

title: Raparperi pai (Rhubarb Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups of rhubarb, cut in pieces
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1/2 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- a little corn starch or flour

## Directions

1. Skin rhubarb and cut in 1/2 inch long pieces
2. Mix with sugar and let stand 1 hour
3. Add a little corn starch or flour, when too smooth
4. Bake between two crusts

title: Raparperia ja Tapiocaa (Rhubarb Tapioca)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 or 4 cups boiling water
- 2 cups rhubarb cut in pieces
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup tapioca
- 2 teaspoons butter
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Soak the tapioca in boiling water for 10-15 minutes
2. Place on the fire, add rhubarb, sugar and butter
3. Simmer for 1/2 hour, stirring often
4. Pour into a serving dish
5. Serve cold, garnished with whipped cream

title: Raparperihillo (Rhubarb Compote)
body:
## Ingredients

- Rhubarb
- Sugar equal in weight to rhubarb

## Directions

1. Rinse rhubarb, skin and cut in pieces.
2. Weigh.
3. Have rhubarb and sugar in equal parts.
4. Lay alternately in a jar.
5. Let stand until following day.
6. Prepare a thick syrup of the liquor, put the rhubarb into it and simmer slowly until clarified.
7. Pour into a dry jar.

title: Raparperikohokas (Rhubarb Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound rhubarb
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup water
- 6 eggs
- 1 tablespoon cream
- 5 tablespoons powdered sugar
- 1 teaspoon grated lemon rind

## Directions

1. Cut the rhubarb in pieces, cook with the sugar.
2. Beat the yolks with powdered sugar, add cream and lemon rind.
3. Beat the whites to a firm froth, add to the yolks.
4. Put one half of the mixture into a buttered mold, lay the cooked and strained rhubarb on the top, cover the whole with the remaining mixture.
5. Bake in oven in a pan of water for 3/4 hour.

title: Raparperipiirakka (Rhubarb Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups rhubarb cut in pieces
- 1 cup sugar
- ½ teaspoon cinnamon
- cornstarch or flour
- pastry for two crusts

## Directions

1. Skin the rhubarb, cut in pieces inch long, mix with the sugar, let stand for 1 hour.
2. Add some cornstarch or flour, if needed.
3. Bake between two crusts.

title: Raparperipiirakka (Rhubarb Pie)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups rhubarb cut in pieces
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon
- cornstarch or flour as needed

## Directions

1. Skin the rhubarb and cut in pieces inch long.
2. Mix with the sugar and let stand for 1 hour.
3. Add some cornstarch or flour if necessary.
4. Bake between two crusts.

title: Raparperiputinki (Rhubarb Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- Bread soaked in milk
- Juice of 1 lemon
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1/2 cup sugar
- Stewed rhubarb
- Bread crumbs
- Butter for dotting

## Directions

1. Have bread soaked in milk, mix with the juice of 1 lemon, 3/4 cup butter and 1/2 cup sugar; drain through a sieve.
2. Lay alternately bread and stewed rhubarb into a mold.
3. Sprinkle with bread crumbs, dot with butter.
4. Bake for 40 minutes covered with buttered paper.
5. When nearly done remove the paper so as to brown the surface.
6. Serve with hard sauce.

title: Raparperivettä (Rhubarb Juice)
body:
## Ingredients

- rhubarb
- sugar
- water

## Directions

1. Wash rhubarb and cut in 1/2 inch long pieces without peeling
2. Allow 1 cup rhubarb to 3/4 cup sugar
3. Put into a bowl
4. Pour 2 cups boiling water over
5. Cover and let cool
6. Strain and serve immediately

title: Rapu Sienien Kanssa (Crab with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of boiled chopped crab meat
- 1½ cupfuls of chopped mushrooms
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of flour
- salt, pepper and lemon juice
- 1 slice of onion
- 1 cupful of milk
- sherry
- cream

## Directions

1. Cook chopped onion with butter.
2. Add flour, mushrooms, crab meat, seasonings and milk into it.
3. Bring to the boiling point.
4. Remove from the range, flavor with a little sherry and cream.
5. Serve hot.
6. Alternatively, fill the shells with the mixture.
7. Sprinkle with bread-crumbs, dot with butter and bake in oven until brown.

title: Rapu Sienien Kanssa (Crabs with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups crab meat boiled and cut in pieces
- 1 1/2 cups mushrooms chopped
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- Salt, pepper and lemon juice
- 1 slice of onion
- 1 cup milk

## Directions

1. Cook the onion with butter, add flour, mushrooms, crab meat, spices and milk
2. Boil quickly
3. Remove from fire, add some sherry and cream
4. Serve hot
5. Or fill the crab shells with the mixture (can be harder than the mixture above)
6. Sprinkle with bread crumbs, dot with butter
7. Brown in oven

title: Rapu à la Charlotte (Crab à la Charlotte)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup milk
- 3/8 package gelatine
- 2 tablespoons mayonnaise sauce
- 4 tablespoons cream
- Boiled crab
- Truffle

## Directions

1. Dissolve the gelatine in milk
2. When cool, add gradually the mayonnaise and the whipped cream
3. Garnish individual molds with truffle, cover the bottom with some of the mixture
4. When firm, cover with a layer of crab meat
5. Have a layer of the mixture on the top
6. Serve unmolded, garnish with lettuce leaves

title: Rapu à la Charlotte (Crab à la Charlotte)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled crabs
- ¾ cupful of milk
- 4 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- 2 tablespoonfuls of mayonnaise sauce
- 4 tablespoonfuls of cream
- truffles
- lettuce

## Directions

1. Shell boiled crabs, and cut the meat into cubes.
2. Dissolve the gelatine into the milk.
3. When cool add gradually the mayonnaise sauce.
4. Add last the whipped cream.
5. Garnish small forms with truffles, lay the mixture on the bottom.
6. When firm lay pieces of crab meat on it, and cover it with layer of the mixture.
7. Let stand until set.
8. Turn on a serving-dish, garnish with lettuce.

title: Rapu à la Mayonnaise (Crab à la Mayonnaise)
body:
## Ingredients

- crab shells
- crab meat
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Scrape and rinse the crab shells
2. Fill with crab meat mixed with mayonnaise
3. Garnish the top with red pepper and truffel
4. Serve on a platter garnished with lettuce leaves

title: Rapu à la Mayonnaise (Crab à la Mayonnaise)
body:
## Ingredients

- crab shells
- crab meat
- mayonnaise sauce
- red pepper
- truffles
- lettuce

## Directions

1. Clean and wash the crab shells.
2. Fill with crab meat mixed with mayonnaise sauce.
3. Garnish with red pepper and truffles.
4. Serve on a folded napkin garnished with lettuce.

title: Rapu-kotletteja (Crab Cutlets)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups crab meat boiled and cut in pieces
- 1 cup rich milk sauce
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- Some onion juice and pepper
- 1 teaspoon chopped parsley
- 1 raw yolk of egg

## Directions

1. Stir all the ingredients with the milk sauce, add 1 raw yolk of egg (may be made without egg)
2. Let stand for an hour in a cold place
3. Form into cutlets, roll in bread crumbs, dip in egg, roll in bread crumbs again
4. Cook in deep lard
5. Serve with tartare or Hollandaise sauce

title: Rapu-soppa (Crab Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 hard-shelled crabs
- 3½ cupfuls of fish or veal stock
- 1 small leek
- 2 sprigs of parsley
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 cupful of cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Remove meat from cooked crabs and chop it finely.
2. Mix with fish stock, leek and parsley and let simmer, covered, for half an hour.
3. Rub through a sieve.
4. Thicken with butter and flour.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Lastly add the cream.
7. Serve with crab balls or hard boiled egg yolks.

title: Rapu-soppa (Crab Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 hard-shelled crabs
- 3½ cupfuls of fish- or veal stock
- 1 small pickle onion
- 2 sprigs of parsley
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 cupful of cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Remove the meat from the cooked crabs and chop it finely.
2. Mix the fish stock, onion and parsley together and let simmer gently covered for half an hour.
3. Force through a sieve.
4. Thicken with butter and flour, season with salt and pepper and finally add cream.
5. Serve with crab balls or hard boiled yolks.

title: Rapukeitto (Crab Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 hard shelled crabs
- 3.5 cups fish stock or veal stock
- 1 leek
- 2 sprigs parsley
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 cup cream
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Remove the meat from boiled crabs and chop finely.
2. Mix with the fish stock, leek and parsley.
3. Simmer covered for 0.5 hour.
4. Press through a sieve, thicken with butter and flour.
5. Season with salt and pepper; last of all add the cream.
6. Serve with crab balls or hard boiled yolks of eggs.

title: Rapusalaatti (Crab Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups crab meat
- 3 hard boiled egg whites
- salt
- pepper
- boiled mayonnaise
- whipped cream
- lettuce leaves
- chopped almonds
- green pepper

## Directions

1. Take 2 cups of crab meat and remove the bones and cut into pieces
2. Add 3 hard boiled egg whites chopped
3. Season with salt and pepper
4. Mix boiled mayonnaise with whipped cream
5. Combine the mixture with the mayonnaise and cream
6. Place on a bed of lettuce leaves
7. Garnish with chopped almonds and green pepper

title: Rasva Putinki (Suet Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of chopped suet
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 cupful of molasses
- 1/2 cupful of currants
- 1 teaspoonful of soda
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 3 cupfuls of flour
- cinnamon and nutmeg

## Directions

1. Work together with fingers salt, flour and suet, add milk, molasses and spices, rub to an even paste.
2. Put in a mold with the cover on and cook in a pan of water 3 hours.
3. Serve with hard, chocolate or fruit sauce.

title: Rasvaputinki (Suet Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup chopped suet
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup syrup
- 1/2 cup currants
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 3 cups flour
- Cinnamon and nutmeg

## Directions

1. Mix with finger tips salt, flour and suet
2. Add soda dissolved in water, milk, syrup and spices
3. Rub to an even paste
4. Put into a mold
5. Steam for 3 hours
6. Serve with lemon or wine sauce

title: Red Cabbage Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- cabbage
- mustard
- pepper
- sugar
- oil
- vinegar
- parsley
- steak

## Directions

1. Cut cabbage into very thin shreds.
2. Mix together 2 teaspoonfuls of mustard, a little pepper and sugar, 5 tablespoonfuls of oil.
3. Take 1 cupful of vinegar and pour the oil gradually into the vinegar.
4. Pour this dressing on the cabbage and press with a weight for few hours.
5. Place the cabbage in a salad bowl, sprinkle with minced parsley.
6. Serve with steak.

title: Red Cabbage Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 red cabbage
- 3 quarts of vegetable stock
- 3 large apples
- 1 onion
- 1 tablespoonful of parsley
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cut the cabbage into shreds.
2. Cook the butter with the chopped onion.
3. Add the cabbage and cut apples, sugar, salt, parsley and pepper.
4. Let boil, closely covered, 2 hours, taking care not to burn it.
5. Add the scalded vegetable stock into it and let it boil for a while.
6. Flavor with wine and currant jelly.

title: Rhubarb Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- bread soaked in milk
- juice of 1 lemon
- 1/4 cupful of butter
- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- rhubarb
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Put bread, soaked in milk, into a saucepan, with juice of 1 lemon, 1/4 cupful of butter and 1/2 cupful of sugar and let come to boiling point.
2. Skin, cut and cook rhubarb with sugar and drain on a sieve.
3. Put layers of bread mixture and cooked rhubarb alternately in a mold.
4. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and dot with butter.
5. Bake in oven 40 minutes, first covered with paper; then uncovered so as to brown it.
6. Serve with hard sauce.

title: Rhubarb with Tapioca
body:
## Ingredients

- 3-4 cupfuls of boiling water
- 1/2 quart of rhubarb, cut in pieces
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of tapioca
- 2 teaspoonfuls of butter

## Directions

1. Soak tapioca in boiling water 10-15 minutes.
2. Place a saucepan on the fire, adding rhubarb, sugar and butter to tapioca.
3. Let simmer 1/2 hour, stirring often, so as not to burn the mixture.
4. Mold, serve cold, unmolded and garnished with whipped cream.

title: Rice and Tomato Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- rice, half-done
- tomato juice
- salt
- sugar
- pepper
- 1 big tablespoonful of butter
- 1 teaspoonful of onion juice
- 3 yolks of eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of cheese crumbs
- egg
- bread crumbs
- lard

## Directions

1. Drain off the water when the rice is half-done, add tomato juice, salt, sugar and pepper to season.
2. Cook 10 minutes or until the rice is tender.
3. Remove from fire, add 1 big tablespoonful of butter, 1 teaspoonful of onion juice, 3 yolks of eggs, 2 tablespoonfuls of cheese crumbs.
4. Cool thoroughly.
5. Form into croquettes, dip in egg and bread crumbs.
6. Fry in lard.

title: Rice and Tomato Croquettes (Riisi- ja tomaattipalleroita)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice (half cooked and strained)
- tomato
- salt
- sugar
- pepper
- 1 large tablespoon butter
- 1 teaspoon onion juice
- 3 egg yolks
- 2 tablespoons grated cheese
- egg for coating
- bread crumbs
- butter or lard for frying

## Directions

1. To half cooked strained rice add tomato, salt, sugar and pepper
2. Continue to boil for 10 minutes
3. Remove from the fire and add 1 large tablespoon butter, 1 teaspoon onion juice, 3 egg yolks and 2 tablespoons grated cheese
4. Cool thoroughly
5. Form into croquettes
6. Roll in egg and bread crumbs
7. Fry in butter or cook in deep lard

title: Rice Cream Jelly (Riisi kermahyytelö)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of rice
- 6 cupfuls of milk
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1/2 lemon
- 3 tablespoonfuls or 4 leaves of gelatine
- 3 cupfuls of cream

## Directions

1. Rinse rice and cook with milk until tender
2. Season with sugar
3. Let cool
4. Add rind and juice of 1/2 lemon
5. Add gelatine dissolved in water
6. Mix with cream whipped to a froth
7. Serve with fruit sauce

title: Rice Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled rice
- yolks of two eggs
- a little bread crumbs
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Mix boiled rice with yolks of two eggs and a little bread crumbs
2. Let stand a little while in a cold place
3. Form the mixture into round or oval balls
4. Dip in egg and bread crumbs
5. Fry in butter or in lard

title: Rice Croquettes (Riisipalleroita)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled rice
- 2 egg yolks
- bread crumbs
- butter or lard for frying
- egg for coating

## Directions

1. Mix boiled rice with 2 egg yolks and bread crumbs
2. Let stand in cold place for a while
3. Form into balls or croquettes
4. Coat in egg and bread crumbs
5. Fry in butter or cook in deep lard

title: Rice Foundation (Riisipohja)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled rice
- butter
- egg yolk (optional)

## Directions

1. Put boiled rice in a well buttered flat-bottomed mold
2. Bake for a few minutes in a hot oven
3. Pour onto a suitable dish
4. Use as a foundation on which to set various dishes
5. A little butter and egg yolk may be added

title: Rice Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ pound of rice
- fruit syrup or ½ cupful of sugar, ½ cupful of water, and few drops of vanilla

## Directions

1. Cook ½ pound of rice 15 minutes in deep water.
2. Drain and put the rice in a dish.
3. Pour fruit syrup over it or mixture made of ½ cupful of sugar, ½ cupful of water and few drops of vanilla.
4. Let stand covered 2–3 hours.
5. Mix with half-frozen vanilla ice cream.
6. Freeze.
7. Rice ice cream may be mixed with a little fruit or garnished with stewed fruit.

title: Rice in Soup (Lihalientä riisiryynejä seassa)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- salt
- water

## Directions

1. Boil rice in deep salted water until tender, taking care that they do not break.
2. Drain, pour cold water on.
3. Serve with soups.

title: Rice Timbale
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled rice
- butter

## Directions

1. Pack boiled rice firmly into well-buttered small molds with small bits of butter on top
2. Let stand in hot water a little while
3. Use as garnish for boiled meat
4. A little strained tomato may be added for color

title: Rice Timbale (Riisitimbali)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled rice
- butter
- strained tomato (optional)

## Directions

1. Fill individual buttered molds with boiled rice
2. Pack tightly
3. Dot with butter
4. Let stand for a while in a pan of boiling water
5. Use for garnishing meat dishes
6. If mixed with some strained tomato, the rice will have a nice color

title: Rice with Fruit
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- milk
- cream
- vanilla
- sugar
- wine
- two leaves of gelatine
- two egg yolks
- cooked fruit
- pounded almonds
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla

## Directions

1. Cook rice in milk mixed with cream until tender, flavor with vanilla, sugar and wine
2. Dissolve two leaves of gelatine in milk and add it to the rice
3. At the last mix it with two yolks of eggs
4. Put the rice on a serving dish, garnishing around with cooked fruit
5. Force a few fruits through a sieve and pour this mash on the serving dish
6. Alternatively, cook the rice in water, basting with sweetened boiled water, flavored with 1 teaspoonful of vanilla
7. Stir pounded almonds slightly into it
8. Put in oven for a few minutes until the sweetened water is absorbed
9. Place on a serving dish and baste with fruit sauce

title: Rice with Meat
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled rice
- butter
- cold chopped meat
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- lemon juice
- 1/4 cupful of bread crumbs
- 1 beaten egg
- beef stock

## Directions

1. Put a layer of boiled rice on bottom and sides of a well buttered pudding dish.
2. Fill the dish with cold chopped meat, seasoned with salt, pepper, onion and lemon juice.
3. Add 1/4 cupful of bread crumbs, 1 beaten egg and beef stock to moisten the mixture to a soft paste.
4. Put a layer of rice on the meat and leave a few dots of butter on the rice.
5. Bake in oven about 40 minutes, covered with buttered paper.

title: Rice with Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of boiled rice
- 1 cupful of thick strained tomato sauce
- salt
- pepper
- butter

## Directions

1. Stir boiled rice into tomato sauce with fork carefully so as not to break the rice
2. Season with butter, salt and pepper
3. Serve as vegetables

title: Rice with Tomatoes (Riisiä tomaattien kanssa)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups boiled rice
- 1 cup thick tomato sauce
- butter
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Mix 2 cups of boiled rice with 1 cup of thick tomato sauce with fork so as not to mash the rice
2. Add butter, salt and pepper
3. Serve as a vegetable

title: Riisi Griddle-kakkuja (Rice Griddle Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup boiled rice
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup flour
- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoon melted butter
- ½ teaspoon salt
- 2 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat the yolks of the eggs, add the milk and pour the mixture in the rice.
2. Mix all the dry ingredients with the flour.
3. Last of all fold in the egg whites beaten until firm.
4. Fry in a griddle pan.

title: Riisi Timboli (Rice Timbales)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled rice
- butter
- strained tomato (optional)

## Directions

1. Press the boiled rice well in small buttered timbales.
2. Dot with butter and let stand in boiling water a few minutes.
3. Use to garnish meat dishes.
4. The rice timbales may be mixed also with a little strained tomato to color them.

title: Riisi- ja tomaatti-palleroita (Rice and Tomato Croquettes)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice
- tomato juice
- salt
- sugar
- pepper
- butter
- onion juice
- egg yolks
- cheese crumbs
- egg
- bread crumbs
- lard

## Directions

1. When rice is half-done, drain off the water
2. Add tomato juice, salt, sugar and pepper to season
3. Cook 10 minutes more, or until rice is tender
4. Remove from fire and add butter, onion juice, egg yolks and cheese crumbs
5. Let cool completely
6. Form into croquettes
7. Dip in egg and bread crumbs
8. Fry in lard

title: Riisi-keitto (Rice Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of well-washed rice
- water
- 2 quarts of stock
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 cupful of cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Boil a cupful of well-washed rice in water for ten minutes.
2. Strain and cook the rice in 2 quarts of stock until tender.
3. Rub through a strainer and return to the fire.
4. Beat the yolks of two eggs, add a cupful of cream.
5. Pour the soup slowly into it and stir on the fire for a while, not allowing it to boil.
6. Season with salt and pepper.

title: Riisi-kermahyytelö (Rice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup rice
- 6 cups milk
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- Yellow rind of 1/2 lemon
- Juice of 1/2 lemon
- 3/4 package of gelatine
- 3 cups cream
- Vanilla (optional)

## Directions

1. Wash 1 cup of rice
2. Cook until tender in 6 cups of milk
3. Add 3 tablespoons of sugar
4. Let cool
5. Mix with the yellow rind and juice of 1/2 lemon and 3/4 package of dissolved gelatine
6. Mix with 3 cups of whipped cream
7. May be flavored with vanilla

title: Riisi-Putinki Lihan Kanssa (Rice Pudding with Meat)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of boiled chopped meat
- 1 red onion
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 1/2 tablespoonful of pepper
- 1 cupful of rice
- 1 quart of milk
- 1 egg
- 1 cupful of beef stock

## Directions

1. Chop onion and fry in butter with meat.
2. Add seasonings.
3. Cook rice and milk until a smooth paste and let cool.
4. Mix with the beaten egg and salt.
5. Stir browned meat and beef stock into the mixture.
6. Turn in a buttered mould and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
7. Bake in oven.

title: Riisihyydyke (Rice Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup rice
- 3 cups milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 3 eggs
- salt
- lemon juice or vanilla

## Directions

1. Cook the rice in milk until soft, add butter and salt
2. Let cool some
3. Beat the yolks with sugar, add to the porridge
4. Flavor with lemon juice or vanilla according to taste
5. Beat the whites until firm, mix with the porridge
6. Bake in a buttered mold in a pan of water
7. When half baked, coat the top of the pudding with whites of egg beaten with sugar, if preferred

title: Riisikeitto (Rice Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful rice
- Water
- 2 quarts bouillon
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 cup cream
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Parboil 1 cupful of rice.
2. Drain and cook in 2 quarts of bouillon until tender.
3. Force through a sieve, return to the fire, dilute with meat stock if necessary.
4. Beat 2 egg yolks with ½ cup of cream, add the bouillon gradually to the yolks.
5. Reheat, season with salt and pepper.
6. May be prepared without yolks and cream.

title: Riisimykyjä (Rice Balls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup rice
- salted water
- milk
- onion juice
- 3 egg yolks
- bread crumbs
- 3 egg whites
- butter for frying

## Directions

1. Parboil 1 cup of rice in salted water
2. Drain and add milk
3. Cook until the rice is very tender
4. Mix with onion juice and 3 egg yolks
5. If thin, add bread crumbs
6. Last of all mix with the whites of 3 eggs beaten until firm
7. Drop by spoonful into a pan and fry until brown on both sides
8. Serve with tomato sauce

title: Riisipohja (Rice Foundation)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled rice
- butter

## Directions

1. Pack boiled rice into a buttered shallow mold
2. Bake for a few minutes in a hot oven
3. Unmold on a serving platter
4. Use as a foundation for several kinds of dishes
5. The rice may be mixed with some butter and yolk of egg

title: Riisiputinki lihan kanssa (Rice Pudding with Meat)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint boiled chopped meat
- 1 onion
- 2 tablespoons butter
- salt
- pepper
- 1 cup rice
- water
- 1 quart milk
- 1 egg
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Chop the onion and fry in butter with the meat
2. Add seasonings
3. Cook a batter of rice with some water and milk
4. When cool, add the beaten egg and salt
5. Combine the meat mixture with the rice mixture
6. Put into a buttered mold
7. Sprinkle with bread crumbs
8. Bake in oven

title: Riisiryyni-Kermajäätelö (Rice Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- ¼ pound rice
- ½ cup sugar
- ½ cup water
- Vanilla
- Fruit (optional)
- Preserved fruit for garnish

## Directions

1. Cook ¼ pound rice for 20 minutes in deep water.
2. Drain and pour cold water over.
3. Put into a dish, baste with liquid of fruit or with syrup made of ½ cup of sugar boiled in ½ cup of water and flavored with vanilla.
4. Cover and let stand for 2 or 3 hours.
5. Mix into half frozen vanilla ice cream.
6. Continue to freeze until done.
7. May be mixed with some fruit or garnished around with fruit.

title: Riisiryyniputinki (Rice Grain Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cupful of rice grain
- 3 cupfuls of milk
- 2 ruokalus. of butter
- cinnamon
- 2 ruokalus. of sugar flour
- 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Cook grains and milk to a porridge, mix in butter, cinnamon and eggs beaten with sugar to the porridge.
2. Put in a buttered mold.
3. Bake in oven set in a pan of water about 30-40 minutes.
4. Raisins and almonds can be used if desired.

title: Riisiryyniputinki (Rice Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup rice
- 3 cups milk
- 2 tablespoons butter
- dash of cinnamon
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 3 eggs
- raisins and almonds (optional)

## Directions

1. Cook a porridge of the milk and the rice
2. Add the butter, the cinnamon and the eggs beaten with sugar
3. Bake in a buttered mold in a pan of water for 30 or 40 minutes
4. Raisins and chopped almonds may be used in the pudding, if desired

title: Riisiä hedelmien kanssa (Rice with Fruit)
body:
## Ingredients

- rice grains
- milk mixed with cream
- vanilla
- sugar
- lemon juice
- 2 leaves of gelatine or 1 tablespoon of granulated gelatine
- 2 egg yolks
- cooked fruit
- salt
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- chopped almonds
- fruit juice

## Directions

1. Cook rice in milk until tender, add vanilla, sugar and lemon juice
2. Dissolve 2 leaves of gelatine or 1 tablespoon of granulated gelatine, mix with the rice
3. Add last 2 egg yolks
4. Place the rice on a platter, garnish around with cooked fruit
5. Force through a strainer a few fruits, pour over the rice
6. Alternatively, cook the rice in slightly salted water for 20 minutes
7. Drain, rinse in cold water, let stand for a while
8. Baste with sweetened water mixed with 1 teaspoon of vanilla
9. Mix with chopped almonds, place into oven for a while
10. Arrange on a platter, baste with fruit juice

title: Riisiä lihan kanssa (Rice with Meat)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled rice
- butter
- cold chopped meat
- 1/4 cup bread crumbs
- 1 egg
- bouillon
- salt
- pepper
- 1 onion

## Directions

1. Line a well buttered mold with boiled rice
2. Fry the chopped onion in butter
3. Mix cold chopped meat with bread crumbs, beaten egg, and bouillon to achieve desired consistency
4. Season with salt and pepper
5. Add the fried onion to the mixture
6. Stir well
7. Fill the mold with the meat mixture
8. Add a layer of rice on top of the dish
9. Dot with butter
10. Bake in oven covered with buttered paper for 40 minutes

title: Rikottuja Munia Sienien Kanssa (Poached Eggs with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh mushrooms
- butter
- bread
- poached eggs
- milk sauce
- onion juice
- grated cheese
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Fry fresh mushrooms in butter.
2. Place the fried mushrooms on buttered toast.
3. Lay the toast in a heat-resistant mould.
4. Place poached eggs carefully on top.
5. Pour milk sauce mixed with onion juice and grated cheese over the eggs.
6. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and bake until browned.
7. Alternatively, use cooked finely chopped spinach seasoned with cream, salt and pepper, or fried tomato slices in place of mushrooms.

title: Rikotut munat (Poached Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- salt
- water or milk
- butter
- toasted bread slices

## Directions

1. Half fill a frying pan with boiling water and add a dash of salt
2. Break the egg carefully into a wet cup
3. Let it slip slowly from the cup into the boiling water
4. When the white is firm the egg is done
5. Remove the egg carefully with a perforated spoon
6. Alternatively, cook eggs in milk instead of water for better flavor
7. When eggs are poached, remove pan from fire and let stand covered for 5 minutes
8. Serve on toasted bread with butter or with sauces such as milk sauce or tomato sauce

title: Rikotut Munat (Poached Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- water
- salt
- butter
- bread

## Directions

1. Place a frying pan over the fire
2. Half fill with boiling water mixed with a little salt
3. Break the eggs carefully one by one into a cup and slip them gently upon the water
4. Boil until the whites are firm
5. Remove very carefully from the pan
6. Serve on buttered toast

title: Risen Doughnuts
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of scalded milk
- 3/4 cupfuls of sugar
- 1/4 cupful of butter
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 1/3 cake of yeast
- 2 eggs
- a dash of nutmeg
- flour

## Directions

1. Dissolve yeast, mix with milk, salt and flour to a thick batter and let rise over night
2. In the morning add melted butter and eggs whipped with sugar
3. Work more flour in if desired
4. Set to rise again
5. Roll out to 1/2 inch thickness, shape into rings or round cakes
6. Let rise, cook in boiling fat to a light brown
7. Dip in powdered sugar while hot

title: Risen Doughnuts (Noste Pyörylöitä)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of scalded milk
- 3/4 cupful of sugar
- 1/4 cupful of butter
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 1/3 cake of yeast
- 2 eggs
- a dash of nutmeg
- flour

## Directions

1. Dissolve yeast and mix with milk, salt and flour to a thick batter.
2. Let rise over night.
3. In the morning add melted butter and eggs whipped with sugar.
4. Work more flour in if desired.
5. Set to rise again.
6. Roll out to 1/2 inch thickness, shape into rings or round cakes.
7. Let rise and cook in hot fat until light brown.
8. Dip in powdered sugar while still hot.

title: Risen Muffins (Hiivakakkua)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 1/4 cake of yeast
- 2 eggs
- 3-4 cupfuls of flour

## Directions

1. Warm milk, add sugar, salt, butter, yeast dissolved in a small quantity of milk, and flour enough to make a thin batter.
2. Cover with towel and let rise over night.
3. Next morning beat eggs to a froth and stir into the batter.
4. Half fill buttered muffin rings with the batter.
5. Let rise until the rings are full and bake about 30 minutes.
6. If desired, use 1/3 cupful of corn meal and 2/3 cupfuls of flour to prepare the batter.
7. Muffins may be made also of hominy and rice in the same way, adding 2 beaten eggs into the batter in the morning.

title: Risen Oatmeal Muffins (Noste kauraryyni muffensit)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of milk
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 1/2 cake of yeast
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 1 cupful of cold cooked oatmeal
- 1 tablespoonful of butter

## Directions

1. Scald milk, add salt, sugar, butter and yeast dissolved in a small quantity of milk, oatmeal and flour.
2. Cover and let rise over night.
3. In the morning grease small muffin rings and fill two-thirds with the batter.
4. Let rise until full.
5. Bake nearly 30 minutes in a moderate oven.

title: Roast Goose
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 goose
- 1 lemon
- 2 tablespoonfuls of salt
- 1/2 teaspoonful of pepper
- 1/2 lb. of prunes
- 2 quarts of apples
- meat stock

## Directions

1. Clean the goose, wash and wipe with a cloth.
2. Rub inside with a little salt.
3. Wash the fruit and stuff the goose with them.
4. Truss and spread with butter or line with a slice of pork.
5. Place in a pan and roast in a hot oven basting often with its gravy.
6. Add meat stock if necessary.
7. When browned sprinkle with salt, and cover with buttered paper.
8. Allow 2-3 hours for roasting a goose.
9. Arrange on a platter, cut in pieces and garnish with prunes and apples.
10. Strain the gravy, skim off the fat, add a little cream.

title: Roast Little Pig
body:
## Ingredients

- salt
- pepper
- ginger
- slices of apple
- stoned prunes
- or paste made of bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Rub the inside of pig with salt, pepper and ginger.
2. Stuff with slices of apple and stoned prunes, or with paste made of bread crumbs as for chicken and turkey.
3. Sew up and place, back upward, into a buttered roaster.
4. Spread the skin with butter, add water for basting into the pan.
5. If getting too brown, cover with paper.
6. Allow 2-3 hours for baking.
7. When done lift on a platter.
8. Remove the meat from the backbone, cut into slices and replace around the backbone.
9. Prepare a sauce of the drippings.
10. Remove the grease carefully.

title: Roast Rabbit
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 rabbit
- ½ lemon
- ¼ lb. of pork
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 2 cupfuls of meat stock or water
- flour
- cream

## Directions

1. Clean the rabbit, wash and soak in water 2 hours to remove the skin easier.
2. Rub with lemon, line with thin slices of pork.
3. Melt butter in a dripping-pan, place the rabbit in it, sprinkle with salt and add gradually the meat stock.
4. Roast 1-1½ hours.
5. Prepare a sauce from the gravy in pan by adding a little flour and cream.

title: Roast Squab
body:
## Ingredients

- squab
- bacon
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- cream

## Directions

1. Clean a squab, lay on it a thin slice of bacon, put a little lump of butter in.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Roast 20-30 minutes.
4. Thicken the gravy with a little cream.
5. Divide the squab lengthwise in two, remove the backbone.
6. Arrange on a platter and strain over it the gravy.

title: Roast Veal
body:
## Ingredients

- veal
- butter or fat
- salt
- flour
- carrots
- celery
- peppercorns
- boiling water
- cream

## Directions

1. Wipe the meat.
2. Melt butter or fat in a dripping-pan and place the meat into it skinside down.
3. Put in a hot oven.
4. When lightly browned, sprinkle with salt and flour and baste with drippings.
5. Add carrots, celery and a few peppercorns.
6. When delicately browned, turn over.
7. Sprinkle with salt and flour and pour boiling water over.
8. Bake about 2 hours.
9. Prepare the sauce of drippings by adding a little cream.

title: Rommimunakas (Rum Omelet)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoons milk or cream
- 1/2 teaspoon sugar
- Some salt
- 1 tablespoon butter
- Fine sugar for sprinkling
- A few tablespoons rum or brandy

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs, add milk, salt and sugar.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a hot pan, add the mixture, shake the pan over the fire until the mixture is firm but not hard.
3. Heap quickly with a knife on one side of the pan, brown underneath and turn onto a platter.
4. Sprinkle with sugar, pour a few spoonfuls of rum or brandy around on the platter.
5. Light the brandy and serve immediately.

title: Rommimunakas (Rum Omelet)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of milk or cream
- a little salt
- 1/2 teaspoonful of sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- brandy or rum

## Directions

1. Whip eggs, add milk, salt and sugar.
2. Put hot butter in a pan, pour the mixture in and stir on heat until it sets but remains soft.
3. Push quickly to the edge of the pan with a knife, let the bottom brown slightly and turn onto a serving dish.
4. Put fine sugar on top and pour a few tablespoonfuls of brandy or rum on the serving dish and set on fire.

title: Royal Custard (Munapaistos)
body:
## Ingredients

- yolks of 2 eggs
- 1 whole egg
- 1/2 cupful beef stock or milk
- salt and pepper
- butter

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add beef stock and seasonings.
3. Pour in a well buttered mold.
4. Bake in oven in a pan of water until firm.
5. Turn on a dish, cut into nice pieces and serve with meat soups.

title: Royal Icing
body:
## Ingredients

- white of an egg
- 1 cupful of confectioner's sugar
- lemon juice or other flavoring

## Directions

1. Put white of an egg in bowl, mix slowly with 1 cupful of confectioner's sugar.
2. Stir a few drops of lemon or any other flavoring into it, whipping the mixture until even and smooth.
3. Place the icing in centre of cake, when the latter is yet a little warm, spreading evenly with wet knife.
4. If the icing is done before cake, cover it with wet cloth so that it will not get firm.
5. When using a little water and more sugar the icing will be smoother.
6. The icing may be colored pink with carmine or fruit juice, green with spinach juice, brown with chocolate, yellow with saffron.

title: Royal-laserrus (Royal Icing)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg white
- 1 cup powdered sugar
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice or other flavoring

## Directions

1. Put the white of an egg into a bowl
2. Mix gradually with 1 cup of powdered sugar
3. Add 1 tablespoon lemon juice or any other flavoring preferred
4. Beat until the mixture is smooth
5. Place the icing in the center of the cake when the latter is yet a little warm
6. Spread even over the cake with a knife dipped in water
7. If the icing is prepared before the cake is done, cover it with a damp cloth so that it will not harden
8. By using more sugar and a little water, the icing will be made thinner
9. Use fruit or vegetable juice or saffron for coloring

title: Royal-laserrus (Royal Icing)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg white
- 1 cup powdered sugar, finely sifted
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice or other flavoring

## Directions

1. Put one egg white in a bowl, rub into it 1 cup finely powdered sugar, added gradually.
2. Then work in 1 tablespoon lemon juice or other flavoring and beat until the mixture is smooth and of an even consistency.
3. When the cake is still somewhat warm, put the icing in the center of the cake and smooth it with a wet knife over the top and sides of the cake.
4. If the icing is prepared before the cake is finished, it should be covered with a damp cloth, otherwise it will harden.
5. If less water and more sugar are used in the mixture, the icing will be smoother.

title: Ruisleipä (Rye Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- rye flour or white flour and rye flour mixed
- caraway seeds
- water

## Directions

1. Prepare same as water bread. Instead of white flour use rye flour or 1 part white flour mixed with 3 parts rye flour. Caraway seeds may be used in rye bread.

title: Ruisleipä (Rye Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of milk or water
- 3 cupfuls of wheat flour
- rye flour
- 3/4 cupful of butter or lard
- 1 cupful of molasses or brown sugar
- 1 cake of yeast
- 2 teaspoonfuls of salt
- 1 tablespoonful of caraway seeds

## Directions

1. Dissolve yeast in a small quantity of lukewarm milk, mix with flour, set to rise.
2. Scald the rest of the milk, stir butter, molasses, salt and caraway seeds into it.
3. Mix with flour to make a very soft batter.
4. Pour the risen sponge into the batter, add rye flour enough to prepare a moderately thick dough.
5. Knead the dough well, set to rise.
6. Toss on board, knead again, form into round cakes or put in buttered baking pans to rise.
7. Bake in a moderate oven until quite done.

title: Ruisleipä (Rye Bread) - Second Method
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups rye flour
- boiling water or milk
- 1 yeast cake
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 1/2 cup lard or butter
- yellow rind of 4 oranges, chopped or grated
- salt
- white flour

## Directions

1. Mix 4 cups rye flour with boiling water just enough to soak the flour.
2. When cool add the risen sponge of 1 yeast cake, 3/4 cup molasses, 1/2 cup lard or butter, the yellow rind of 4 oranges chopped or grated and salt.
3. Add white flour enough to make a moderately thick dough.
4. Let rise.
5. Bake longer than white bread.
6. Brush the crust with water.

title: Rum Omelet
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of milk or cream
- a little salt
- 1/2 teaspoonful of sugar
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- a few tablespoonfuls of brandy or rum
- powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Beat eggs, add milk, salt and sugar.
2. Put 1 tablespoonful of butter in a hot fryingpan, pour the mixture in and fry, shaking the pan over the fire until omelet is thick, but not hard.
3. Heap quickly on one side and let brown underneath.
4. Turn on a serving-plate.
5. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and pour a few tablespoonfuls of brandy or rum over and light it.

title: Ruotsalainen Kakku (Swedish Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of sour cream
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of fine sugar
- 1 pound of wheat flour
- 4 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 1 teaspoonful of soda
- 1 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- 1 teaspoonful of cardamom

## Directions

1. Whip eggs and sugar to a froth
2. Add cream and spices
3. Mix soda with flour and combine with egg mixture
4. Add melted butter last
5. Pour into a buttered mold

title: Ruotsalainen Kakku (Swedish Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of sour cream
- 1 1/4 cupfuls of brown sugar
- 1 lb. of flour
- 4 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 1 teaspoonful of soda
- 1 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- 1 teaspoonful of cardamom

## Directions

1. Whip eggs and sugar to a froth
2. Add cream and spices
3. Mix soda with flour, stir it and the rest of the flour into the egg mixture
4. Add lastly butter to it
5. Pour the mixture in a buttered mold and bake in a moderate oven 3/4 — 1 hour

title: Rusinakakkuja (Raisin Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 6 tablespoons butter
- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup milk
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- Salt
- 1 1/2 cups flour

## Directions

1. Rub butter and sugar until creamy
2. Add beaten egg, vanilla, and milk
3. Mix in flour sifted with baking powder and raisins washed and wiped
4. Drop by the spoonful on a buttered baking sheet
5. Bake in a hot oven
6. May be made without milk and baking powder, placing a few raisins on top of each one as decoration

title: Ruskea kastike (Brown Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 slices carrot
- 1 slice onion
- 8 peppercorns
- 2 cups brown beef bouillon
- 1 bay leaf
- 1 sprig parsley
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Brown the carrot and the onion in butter
2. Add flour, bouillon and seasonings
3. Let boil
4. Strain and season with salt and pepper

title: Ruskeata perunahakkelusta (Brown Potato Hash)
body:
## Ingredients

- Cold potatoes
- Butter
- Salt
- Pepper

## Directions

1. Cut cold potatoes in small cubes
2. Fry in butter until thoroughly hot
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
4. Continue frying until brown underneath
5. Double on a serving dish like an omelet

title: Ruskeita piparkakkuja (Brown Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 2 cups brown sugar
- 3/4 cup cream
- 3/4 cup melted butter
- 1/4 pound almonds
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon cardamom
- 1/2 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 6 cups flour

## Directions

1. Beat to a froth eggs with sugar
2. Add cream, butter, spices, almonds blanched and cut in pieces lengthwise, soda mixed with flour
3. Form into flat loaves on a buttered baking sheet
4. Bake in a moderate oven
5. Cut crosswise in pieces the loaves while warm
6. Dry the cookies in a lukewarm oven

title: Ruskeita Piparkakkuja (Brown Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 1 lb. of brown sugar
- 3/4 cupful of cream
- 3/4 cupful of melted butter
- 1/4 lb. of almonds
- 1 teaspoonful of cinnamon
- 1 teaspoonful of cardamom
- 1/2 teaspoonful of cloves
- 1 teaspoonful of soda
- 1 1/2 lbs. of flour

## Directions

1. Beat eggs with sugar to a froth, add cream, spices, almonds, blanched and cut in pieces lengthwise and soda mixed with flour.
2. Form the batter into flat strips and bake on greased baking sheet in a moderate oven.
3. Cut the strips hot crosswise about 1 inch long pieces and dry in a cool oven.

title: Ruskeutetut lantut tai nauriit (Browned Turnips)
body:
## Ingredients

- turnips
- salted water
- butter
- sugar (optional)

## Directions

1. Prepare the same as directed for fried carrots.

title: Ruskeutetut porkkanat (Fried Carrots)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled carrots
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Peel the boiled carrots and cut lengthwise in strips
2. Brown in butter or lard on both sides
3. Alternatively, peel raw carrots and cut in cubes
4. Boil in salted water until half done
5. Drain carefully and brown with butter in a pan
6. If desired, season with sugar and lemon juice

title: Ruskeutetut porkkanat (Fried Carrots)
body:
## Ingredients

- Carrots
- Butter or lard
- Salt
- Sugar (optional)
- Lemon (optional)

## Directions

1. Peel boiled carrots, cut lengthwise in strips, brown in butter or lard on both sides.
2. Or peel raw carrots, cut into cubes, cook in salted water until half done, drain carefully, and brown the carrots in butter in a pan.
3. If desired, season with sugar and lemon.

title: Ruskeutetut porkkanat (Fried Carrots)
body:
## Ingredients

- carrots
- salted water
- butter
- sugar (optional)

## Directions

1. Peel carrots and cut into dice.
2. Cook in salted water until half done.
3. Drain off the water.
4. Brown the carrots with butter in a frying pan.
5. Season with a dash of sugar if desired.

title: Russian Blinis (Russian Pancakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cupful of cream
- 2½ cupfuls of water
- 2 teaspoonfuls of salt
- 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- ½ lb. of buckwheat flour
- 10 ozs. of wheat flour
- 2—3 cupfuls of scalded milk
- ½ cake of yeast

## Directions

1. Dissolve yeast in lukewarm water.
2. Whip eggs, mix with cream, water, salt and flour and lastly butter, stirring carefully.
3. Put to rise over night.
4. In the morning mix it with lukewarm milk until a moderately thick batter.
5. Fry like griddle cakes.
6. Serve with melted butter and maple syrup.

title: Rye Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of butter
- 3/4 lb. of powdered sugar
- 7 lbs. of flour
- 6 ozs. of rye flour
- 2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder

## Directions

1. Wash butter and work to a froth
2. Sift flour with baking powder
3. Mix all ingredients well together and put the batter in a cold place for a little while

title: Saddle of Veal
body:
## Ingredients

- veal
- butter
- paper
- salt
- pork slices
- egg
- bread crumbs
- meat stock
- cream

## Directions

1. Wipe the meat and trim into a good shape.
2. Roll into a buttered paper and bake in oven same as roast veal.
3. Remove the paper 1/2 hour before you send the meat to the table.
4. Sprinkle with salt and let brown.
5. May be prepared also with pork by laying thinly sliced pork on the veal.
6. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
7. Bake as usually, basting often and adding meat stock into the pan.
8. Prepare the sauce of its own liquor and cream.

title: Saksalainen kuha (German Bass)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2½ pounds fresh bass
- ½ pound butter
- 5 eggs
- 1 cup sour cream

## Directions

1. Clean the fish, cut in pieces.
2. Sprinkle with salt.
3. Place in a casserole having the melted butter in it before putting the fish in.
4. Bake covered.
5. When half done, add eggs beaten and cream.
6. Cover.
7. Continue baking.
8. Serve in the baking dish.

title: Saksalainen kuha (German Bass)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 pounds fresh bass
- 1/2 pound butter
- 5 eggs
- 1 cup sour cream
- Salt

## Directions

1. Clean and cut the fish into pieces.
2. Sprinkle with salt.

title: Saksalainen Kuha (German Bass)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 lbs. of fresh bass
- 1 lb. of butter
- 5 eggs
- 1 cupful of sour cream

## Directions

1. Clean bass and cut in pieces.
2. Sprinkle with salt.
3. Melt butter in a casserole and put the bass into it.
4. Bake covered in oven.
5. When half done add beaten eggs and cream.
6. Continue baking until thoroughly done.
7. Serve in the casserole.

title: Saksalaisia virnaa (German Lentils)
body:
## Ingredients

- lentils
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- cream (optional)
- onion
- parsley

## Directions

1. Boil the lentils until tender
2. Press through a sieve
3. Season with salt and pepper
4. Mix with butter
5. Dilute with cream if desired
6. Make a little cavity on top of the mound
7. Fill with fried chopped onions

title: Saksanpähkinä Kakku (Walnut Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- 6 ozs. of sugar
- ½ cupful of butter
- ½ cupful of milk
- 1 cupful of walnut meats chopped with shell
- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder

## Directions

1. Rub butter and sugar to a froth, add well-beaten egg yolks and continue with the remaining ingredients as directed.

title: Saksanpähkinä-kakku (Walnut Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1/2 cup milk
- 1 cup chopped walnuts
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Rub until creamy the butter with the sugar
2. Add the egg yolks beaten until frothy
3. Add walnuts, milk, baking powder and flour sifted together
4. Add vanilla or lemon juice
5. Last of all fold in the whites of the eggs beaten until firm
6. Bake in a tub tin

title: Salaatti Omenat (Pickled Apples)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound small apples
- 3 ounces sugar
- 5 cloves
- 1.5 cups water
- 0.5 cup vinegar

## Directions

1. Rinse and peel the apples well.
2. Boil the sugar, water and vinegar.
3. Put the apples into the mixture and let simmer slowly until half soft.
4. Place carefully in glass jars with air-tight covers and fill the jars with the syrup.

title: Salaatti-kurkkuja (Dill Pickles)
body:
## Ingredients

- 100 medium-sized cucumbers
- 1/2 cup salt
- 4 quarts water
- dill
- black or white peppercorns
- horseradish
- cherry, currant or oak leaves
- 10 quarts water
- 1 quart vinegar
- 2 cups salt

## Directions

1. Let cucumbers stand in salt water over night (1/2 cup salt to 4 quarts water)
2. Lay into an earthen jar having dill, black or white peppercorns and horseradish between the layers
3. Place cherry, currant or oak leaves between the cucumbers for better preservation
4. Boil 10 quarts water with 1 quart vinegar and 2 cups salt
5. Let cool
6. Pour over the cucumbers
7. Cover with a cloth, place a cover on having the cover to fit inside the jar
8. Put a weight on top

title: Salaatti-luumuja (Pickled Plums)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 pounds plums
- 7 cups sugar
- 2 cups vinegar
- 1 tablespoon cloves
- Some cinnamon

## Directions

1. Remove the stones from the plums
2. Boil the sugar with vinegar and spices
3. Add the plums and simmer until tender, about 1/2 hour
4. Put into glass jars
5. Cover airtight

title: Salaatti-persikoita (Pickled Peaches)
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 pounds peaches
- 10 cups sugar
- 2 cups cider vinegar
- 2 tablespoons whole cloves
- Some stick cinnamon

## Directions

1. Pare the peaches
2. Boil until clear sugar with vinegar and spices tied in a bag
3. Add the peaches, cook until half done
4. Place the peaches into jars, cover up until all the peaches are cooked, cooking a few peaches at a time so that they will not crush
5. Pour the boiling hot liquid over
6. Cover airtight

title: Salaatti-päärynöitä (Pickled Pears)
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 pounds pears
- 7 cups sugar
- ¾ cup water
- 3¾ cups vinegar
- 2 tablespoons cinnamon
- 2 tablespoons cloves, cut in pieces

## Directions

1. Pare the pears, leave the stems on.
2. Place alternate layers of pears and sugar into a jar, pour water and vinegar over, let stand over night.
3. Drain the juice, put into a kettle with the spices tied in a bag.
4. Bring slowly to boiling point.
5. Add to the juice the pears, simmer, not allowing them to become too tender.
6. Place the pears carefully into glass jars, pour the juice over.
7. Cover airtight.

title: Salaatti-sipulia (Pickled Onions)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 quarts small white onions
- 2 quarts vinegar
- 1 pound sugar
- 1 teaspoon white pepper
- mace
- cloves
- ginger, a dash of each
- 1/2 cup salt
- 1 quart water

## Directions

1. Wash the onions, pour boiling water over
2. Peel when cool
3. Let stand in salt water (1/2 cup salt to 1 quart water) for 24 hours
4. Boil for 10 minutes vinegar with sugar and spices tied in a bag
5. Remove the spices
6. Add the onions, cook until nearly done
7. Place the onions into jars
8. Strain the liquid over
9. Cover and keep in cool place

title: Salaatti-vesimelooni (Pickled Watermelon)
body:
## Ingredients

- watermelon (rind removed)
- salt (1 cup per 2 pounds melon)
- 4 quarts water per 2 pounds melon
- 8 cups vinegar
- 4 cups sugar
- 2 tablespoons cinnamon
- 2 tablespoons cloves

## Directions

1. Remove the red part of melon
2. Cut the remaining part in squares
3. Weigh the melon, allow 1 cup salt and 4 quarts water to 2 pounds melon
4. Let stand in salt water overnight
5. In the morning put into cold water, let stand for 2 hours
6. Boil 8 cups vinegar with 4 cups sugar, 2 tablespoons cinnamon, 2 tablespoons cloves (the spices tied in a bag) until the liquid becomes clear
7. Add the pieces of the melon, cook until tender
8. Place carefully into glass jars
9. Continue to cook the liquid until reduced some
10. Pour over the melon
11. Cover airtight

title: Salaattiomenia (Pickled Apples)
body:
## Ingredients

- 9 pounds small apples
- 8 cups sugar
- 2 cups water
- 4 cups vinegar
- 2 tablespoons cinnamon and cloves

## Directions

1. Pare the apples.
2. Place them in layers with sugar into a jar, pour vinegar and water over and let stand covered over night.
3. Drain the juice, put into a kettle over the fire with the spices, which are tied in a bag.
4. When the juice begins to boil and appears clear, add the apples and cook almost tender.
5. Place the apples in glass jars and pour the boiling juice over.
6. Cover the jars.

title: Salaattivoileipiä (Combination) (Lettuce Sandwiches Combination)
body:
## Ingredients

- lettuce leaf
- tomato slice
- fresh cucumber slices
- chopped onion
- mayonnaise
- fried smoked herring slices

## Directions

1. Put a slice of tomato on a lettuce leaf.
2. Add a few slices of cucumber and chopped onion.
3. Spread thinly with mayonnaise.
4. Add 2 slices of fried smoked herring if desired.

title: Salaattivoileipiä (Lettuce Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- lettuce leaves
- bread slices
- mayonnaise
- walnuts

## Directions

1. Rinse and wipe lettuce leaves.
2. Place on slices of bread spread with mayonnaise.
3. Sprinkle with chopped walnuts if desired.
4. Cover with another slice of bread.

title: Salatin kastike (Salad Dressing)
body:
## Ingredients

- Lemon juice
- Orange juice
- Olive oil
- Sugar
- Onion juice
- Salt
- Minced parsley
- Cooked egg yolk
- Cream or sour cream
- Roqueford cheese

## Directions

1. Lemon and orange juice may be used with salad plain or mixed with olive oil and some sugar
2. Lemon juice mixed with oil may be seasoned with salt and flavored with onion juice and minced parsley
3. Rub well the cooked yolk of an egg, add gradually the juice of a lemon, season with salt, pepper and sugar
4. Last of all mix with ¾ cup of cream
5. Sour cream may be used
6. Grated cheese may be used in salad dressing, Roquefort is the best
7. Mix the grated cheese with lemon juice and seasonings
8. Last of all add cream

title: Sally's Muffins (Sallyn muffensit)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 1 cupful of milk
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cupful of butter
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 2 tablespoonfuls of baking powder

## Directions

1. Sift flour with salt and baking powder.
2. Whip eggs with sugar, add milk and melted butter.
3. Pour it slowly into the flour kneading well.
4. Bake in greased muffin tins.
5. Serve with tea or as luncheon bread.

title: Sallyn muffensit (Sally's Muffins)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 1 cup milk
- 3 eggs
- 1/4 cup butter
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 2 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Sift together flour, salt and baking powder
2. Beat the eggs with sugar, add milk and melted butter
3. Pour gradually the flour in, stirring well
4. Bake in buttered muffin tins

title: Salmon Mayonnaise
body:
## Ingredients

- salmon
- mayonnaise sauce
- lettuce
- boiled potatoes
- artichokes
- beets
- carrots
- cauliflower
- string beans
- green peas
- tomatoes
- mushrooms
- lemon halves or hard-boiled eggs
- French dressing

## Directions

1. Boil the salmon as directed, skin while hot; and place on a platter to cool.
2. Cover with thick mayonnaise sauce.
3. Garnish the dish with lettuce.
4. Arrange neatly on the leaves boiled vegetables, as potatoes, artichokes, beets, carrots, cauliflower, string beans, green peas, tomatoes and mushrooms cut in dice.
5. Fill cups made of halves of lemons or whites of hard-boiled eggs with mayonnaise sauce or salmon jelly and place around the fish.
6. Sprinkle the fish with chopped yolks of eggs and pour French dressing over the lettuce leaves.

title: Salmon Mousse
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of salmon
- whites of 2 eggs
- 2 cupfuls of rich cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Skin and bone the fish.
2. Grind several times.
3. Rub well in a wooden bowl.
4. Add the whites of eggs one by one to it.
5. Force through a sieve.
6. Put the mixture in a kettle or bowl, place it in ice water.
7. Mix with cream whipping well.
8. Pour the cream very carefully into it; if added too quickly the mixture will curdle.
9. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Decorate an individual mold with truffles, chopped parsley, turn the mixture carefully into it.
11. Cover with buttered paper.
12. Bake in a pan of water about 15 min. or until firm when touched with fingertips.
13. Turn on a serving-dish, serve with crab- or Hollandaise sauce.
14. Test the mixture before baking by dropping a teaspoonful of it into boiling water.
15. If too thick, a little cream may be added, if too thin, harden with white of egg.
16. May be prepared earlier and kept in ice box until baking.

title: Salmon Mousse (Lohi-mousse)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb of salmon
- whites of 2 eggs
- 2 cupfuls of rich cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Skin and bone the fish.
2. Grind several times.
3. Rub well in a wooden bowl.
4. Add the whites of eggs one by one to it.
5. Force through a sieve.
6. Put the mixture in a kettle or bowl, place it in ice water.
7. Mix with cream whipping well, pouring the cream very carefully to avoid curdling.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Decorate an individual mold with truffles or chopped parsley, turn the mixture carefully into it.
10. Cover with buttered paper.
11. Bake in a pan of water for about 15 minutes or until firm to the touch when pressed with a finger.
12. Turn onto a serving dish.
13. Serve with crab or hollandaise sauce.

title: Salmon à la Aspic (Lohi-hyytelö)
body:
## Ingredients

- salmon
- salt
- pepper
- 4 bay leaves
- 2 cupfuls of fish-stock
- 1 cupful of tomatoes
- juice of 1/2 lemon
- 1/2 box of gelatine
- whites of 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Boil the fish with salt, pepper and bay leaf.
2. When done lift off to cool.
3. Put all the above ingredients into a kettle and stir over the fire until boiling.
4. Let simmer without stirring on a slow fire 5 min. until clear.
5. Strain through a fine cloth.
6. Cover the bottom of an individual mold with the jelly, garnish with hard-boiled egg and parsley.
7. Lay the fish pieces carefully into the mold and pour the jelly over gradually.
8. Turn out onto a platter, garnish with tomato slices, lemon and parsley.
9. Serve with mayonnaise sauce.

title: Salted Almonds
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 pound of almonds
- oil or fat
- salt

## Directions

1. Blanch almonds and wipe them with a cloth.
2. Cook in oil or fat until delicately browned.
3. Place on brown paper and sprinkle with salt.
4. Alternatively, when browning in oven place almonds in dry pan stirring often until evenly browned; sprinkle with salt when they are done.

title: Sammakko a la Poulette (Frog à la Poulette)
body:
## Ingredients

- frog legs
- water
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- milk
- flour
- chopped parsley
- 2 egg yolks
- cream
- fried mushrooms

## Directions

1. Skin and clean the frog legs
2. Place in boiling water mixed with a tablespoon of lemon juice
3. Parboil covered for a few minutes
4. Remove from the water and wipe the legs
5. Immerse in hot butter seasoned with salt and pepper
6. Cook covered until tender (may alternatively be boiled in milk)
7. Prepare a gravy of butter, flour and milk, seasoned with salt and pepper
8. Flavor the gravy with lemon juice and chopped parsley
9. Beat 2 egg yolks with some cream
10. Stir the beaten egg yolks into the gravy over the fire until thick, but do not allow it to boil
11. Arrange the frog legs on a platter
12. Arrange fried mushrooms around the legs
13. Pour the gravy over

title: Sammakko à la Poulette (Frog à la Poulette)
body:
## Ingredients

- frogs' legs
- butter
- flour
- milk
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- parsley
- egg yolks
- cream
- mushrooms

## Directions

1. Skin and clean the frogs' legs.
2. Put into boiling water and place on the fire.
3. Cook for a few minutes, wipe dry and immerse in hot butter.
4. Cook covered until tender. (Milk may be used also in cooking.)
5. Make the sauce of butter, flour and milk, seasoned with salt, pepper, lemon juice and chopped parsley.
6. Add last into it beaten yolks of two eggs, mixed with a little cream.
7. Stir over the fire until thick.
8. Arrange the legs on a serving platter, garnish with fried mushrooms and pour the sauce over.

title: Sammakon reisiä paistettuna (Fried Frog's Legs)
body:
## Ingredients

- frog's legs
- salt
- pepper
- bread crumbs
- egg
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Skin, clean and wipe the frog's legs.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Dip in bread crumbs, whipped egg and again in bread crumbs.
4. Fry in butter or cook in lard.

title: Sammakonreisiä paistettuna (Fried Frog Legs)
body:
## Ingredients

- frog legs
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- bread crumbs
- egg
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Skin, clean and wipe the frog legs
2. Sprinkle with salt, pepper and lemon juice
3. Let stand for a while
4. Wipe the frog legs
5. Roll in cracker crumbs, dip in egg, and roll in cracker crumbs again
6. Fry in butter or lard
7. Place the pan in oven covered for a few minutes

title: Sammalputinki mantelien kanssa (Moss Pudding with Almonds)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons almonds
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 1/2 cup milk
- 2 eggs
- 1/4 package gelatine
- 1 pint whipping cream

## Directions

1. Blanch the almonds, grate and rub with the sugar to a paste.
2. Add the milk and the eggs, stir over the fire until thick.
3. Mix in the gelatine dissolved in water.
4. When cool add the whipped cream.
5. Dip a mold into cold water, pour the mixture in, garnish with macaroons and berries.

title: Sammalputinki Mantelien Kera (Moss Pudding with Almonds)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 ozs. of almonds
- 2 ozs. of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of milk
- 2 eggs
- 6 leaves or 4 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- 1 pint of rich cream

## Directions

1. Blanch almonds and pound with sugar to a paste.
2. Stir the almond paste, milk and eggs on the fire to a thick mixture.
3. Add gelatine leaves, dissolved in a small quantity of water.
4. When cool, add the whipped cream into it.
5. Wet a mold with cold water and pour the mixture into it.
6. Set to stiffen.
7. Unmold and garnish with macaroons and berries.

title: Samppanja Kastike (Champagne Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of brown sauce
- 1/2 cupful of champagne
- few grains of pepper
- 1 bay leaf
- a little sugar

## Directions

1. Make a cupful of brown sauce
2. Add champagne, few grains of pepper, bay leaf and a little sugar
3. Cook 10 minutes
4. Strain

title: Samppanja-kastike (Champagne Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sauce
- 1/2 cup Champagne
- A few peppercorns
- 1 bay leaf
- Some sugar

## Directions

1. Prepare brown sauce, add Champagne, peppercorns, bay leaf and sugar.
2. Cook for 10 minutes and strain.

title: Sandwiches with Filled Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 hard-boiled eggs
- 1 teaspoonful minced parsley
- 1 teaspoonful anchovy paste
- 1 teaspoonful butter
- salt and pepper
- toast

## Directions

1. Remove the tops from the eggs.
2. Split in halves, remove the yolk.
3. Mix yolk well with anchovy paste and butter; season with salt and pepper.
4. Fill the whites with this mixture, rounding the top of the filling.
5. Garnish with parsley.
6. Place the filled halves of eggs on toast.
7. Serve hot.

title: Saratoga perunoita (Saratoga Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- lard or deep frying fat
- salt

## Directions

1. Cut potatoes into thin slices.
2. Rinse and wipe dry.
3. Cook in deep lard until light brown.
4. Sprinkle with salt and serve hot or cold.

title: Saratoga Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- lard
- salt

## Directions

1. Cut potatoes into thin slices.
2. Wash and wipe.
3. Cook in lard until lightly browned.
4. Sprinkle with salt.
5. Serve hot or cold.

title: Sardiini hyydyke (Sardine Aspic)
body:
## Ingredients

- small fishmolds
- sardines
- aspic
- eggs or mayonnaise sauce

## Directions

1. Garnish small fishmolds, place the sardines in and fill with aspic.
2. Turn on toast.
3. Garnish with egg or mayonnaise sauce.

title: Sardiini Majoneesi soosin kera (Sardine with Mayonnaise)
body:
## Ingredients

- bread pieces
- anchovy paste
- sardines
- 5 tablespoonfuls of milk
- 5 gelatine leaves
- 4 tablespoonfuls of mayonnaise sauce
- salt
- whipped cream
- pink color

## Directions

1. Spread pieces of bread with anchovy paste, place the sardine on it.
2. Prepare a sauce: dissolve 5 gelatine leaves in 5 tablespoonfuls of milk.
3. Let cool until firm.
4. Add 4 tablespoonfuls of mayonnaise sauce stirring gradually into it.
5. Season with salt.
6. Mix with the whipped cream.
7. Put a layer of this mixture on the bread.
8. Mix the rest of it with a little gelatine and pink color to garnish the top with.

title: Sardiini voileipä (Sardine Canapes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 sardines
- 1 dessertspoonful of flour
- 1/2 cupful of water
- 2 ozs. of butter
- 1 teaspoonful of anchovy paste
- milk
- hard-boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Cut 6 thin slices of bread, spread with butter and brown in oven.
2. Bone and skin the sardines.
3. Mix the sardines, butter and anchovy to a smooth paste.
4. Put flour, water and milk in a saucepan on the fire, stir until it comes to a boil.
5. Add the sardine butter to it.
6. Lay on the pieces of bread, garnish with hard-boiled eggs, and serve hot on a folded napkin.

title: Sardiini-hyydyke (Sardine Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- small fish molds
- sardine
- aspic
- toast
- egg
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Garnish small fish molds
2. Place a sardine on the bottom of each
3. Fill with aspic
4. Turn on toast
5. Decorate with egg and mayonnaise

title: Sardiini-muussi (Sardine Mousse)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup sardines
- 1/2 cup bread crumbs
- 1 1/2 teaspoons anchovy paste
- 1 egg yolk
- 2 egg whites
- milk
- hard boiled egg white
- parsley
- toast
- anchovy sauce

## Directions

1. Soak bread crumbs in milk.
2. Add finely chopped sardine, anchovy paste, and egg yolk.
3. Mix in egg whites last.
4. Garnish individual fish molds with hard boiled egg white and parsley.
5. Fill with sardine mousse.
6. Bake in oven in a pan of water until firm.
7. Serve on toast with anchovy sauce.

title: Sardiini-voileipiä (Sardine Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- sardines
- yolks of hard boiled eggs
- salt
- pepper
- mustard
- lemon juice
- olive oil
- mayonnaise
- whites of egg
- parsley

## Directions

1. Bone and skin sardines
2. Mix equal parts of yolks of hard boiled eggs and sardines
3. Season with salt, pepper and mustard
4. Rub until smooth
5. Dilute with lemon juice and olive oil or with mayonnaise
6. Make sandwiches
7. Sprinkle the top with whites of egg chopped fine and parsley

title: Sardiini-voileipiä (Sardine Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 large sardines
- 1 desert spoon flour
- 3/4 cup water
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1/4 cup cream
- 1 teaspoon anchovy paste
- toasted bread slices
- hard boiled egg

## Directions

1. Bone and skin sardines
2. Mix with butter and anchovy paste, rubbing well
3. Put flour, water and cream into a saucepan
4. Let boil stirring well
5. Add sardine mixture to it
6. Spread on toast
7. Garnish with hard boiled egg
8. Serve hot

title: Sardiinia majoneesi-kastikkeen kanssa (Sardine with Mayonnaise)
body:
## Ingredients

- slices of bread
- anchovy paste
- butter
- sardine
- 5 tablespoons milk
- 5 tablespoons gelatine
- 4 tablespoons mayonnaise
- salt
- 2 or 3 tablespoons whipped cream
- red coloring

## Directions

1. Spread slices of bread with anchovy mixed with butter
2. Place a sardine on top
3. Stir 5 tablespoons of gelatine into 5 tablespoons milk
4. Let cool until thick
5. Add slowly 4 tablespoons of mayonnaise
6. Season with salt
7. Mix with 2 or 3 tablespoons whipped cream
8. Spread a layer of this mixture on the bread
9. Add a little more gelatine and red coloring to the mixture left over
10. Use for decorating the sandwiches

title: Sardiinisalaatti (Sardine Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- sardines
- 1 pickle
- 2 hard boiled egg whites
- lettuce leaves
- boiled mayonnaise
- hard boiled egg yolks

## Directions

1. Remove the bones from sardines and cut into pieces
2. Add 1 chopped pickle and 2 hard boiled egg whites
3. Place on a bed of lettuce leaves
4. Cover with mayonnaise
5. Garnish the top with hard boiled egg yolks rubbed through a sieve

title: Sardine Mousse
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ cupful of sardines
- ½ cupful of bread crumbs
- 1½ teaspoonfuls of anchovy paste
- yolk of 1 egg
- whites of 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Soak bread crumbs in milk.
2. Add the minced sardine, anchovy paste and egg yolk.
3. Add lastly the egg whites.
4. Decorate small fish molds with hard boiled egg yolk and parsley, fill with sardine mixture and bake in a pan of water until firm.
5. Serve on toast with anchovy sauce.

title: Sardine Mousse
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of sardines
- 1/2 cupful of bread crumbs
- 1 1/2 teaspoonfuls of anchovy paste
- yolk of 1 egg
- whites of 2 eggs
- milk

## Directions

1. Soak the bread crumbs in milk, add the minced sardines, anchovy paste and the yolk.
2. At the last mix with the whites.
3. Garnish small fish-molds with hard-boiled white of egg and parsley, fill with the sardine mixture and bake in oven in a pan of water until firm.
4. Serve on toast with anchovy sauce.

title: Sarvia (Crullers)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 3 tablespoons melted butter
- Flour

## Directions

1. Beat until frothy 2 eggs with 3 tablespoons sugar, add 3 tablespoons melted butter and flour enough to make a moderately thick dough.
2. Roll the dough 1/4 inch thick, divide in parts 3 inches long and 2 inches wide.
3. Make three 1 inch gashes on one side, give both ends a twist.
4. Cook in fat.

title: Sarvia (Crullers)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 3 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- flour

## Directions

1. Beat eggs and sugar to a froth
2. Add melted butter and flour enough to make a moderately thick dough
3. Roll the dough 1/4 inch thick
4. Cut into pieces three inches long and two inches broad
5. Make three one-inch gashes crosswise on one side and twist the ends slightly
6. Cook in fat like doughnuts

title: Sauce Hollandaise
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 4 egg yolks
- juice of 1/2 lemon
- 1/4 teaspoonful of salt
- a little pepper
- 3/4 cupful of hot water

## Directions

1. Cream butter in a saucepan
2. Add yolks one by one whipping well between each one
3. Add lemon juice, salt, and pepper
4. Add hot water
5. Stir the sauce in a pot of boiling water on the fire until it is thick
6. Remove from the fire and stir a little while
7. Serve with fish, asparagus and cauliflower

title: Scallop Stew
body:
## Ingredients

- scallops
- milk
- cream
- butter
- flour

## Directions

1. Prepare in the same way as oyster stew
2. Instead of oysters use scallops
3. Cook the scallops for 2 minutes

title: Scalloped Eggplant
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 eggplant
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1/2 onion, finely chopped
- 1 green pepper, chopped
- 3/4 tablespoonful of finely chopped parsley
- butter for baking dish
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Pare an eggplant and cut in 3/4 inch cubes
2. Cook in a small quantity of boiling water until soft
3. Drain
4. Cook butter with onion, green pepper, parsley and eggplant
5. Turn into a buttered baking dish
6. Cover with buttered crumbs
7. Bake until the crumbs are brown

title: Scalloped Lobster
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled lobster
- milk sauce
- 1 hard-boiled egg yolk
- mace
- lemon juice
- pepper
- lobster shells
- bread crumbs
- butter
- chicken stock
- cream

## Directions

1. Mix boiled lobster cut into cubes with a little milk sauce.
2. Add yolk of one hard-boiled egg, a little mace, lemon juice and pepper.
3. Fill the shells with this mixture.
4. Dredge with bread crumbs.
5. Dot with butter.
6. Bake in oven until brown.
7. Serve with sauce prepared of chicken stock and cream.

title: Scalloped Oysters (Oisteri-kalopsi)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of oysters
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 cupful of bread crumbs
- salt
- pepper
- oyster liquor
- milk

## Directions

1. Clean and drain 1 pint of oysters
2. Mix 2 tablespoonfuls of butter with 1 cupful of bread crumbs
3. Butter a mold and sprinkle with bread crumbs
4. Lay oysters in it alternating with bread crumbs sprinkled with salt and pepper
5. Fill mold with oyster liquor and milk mixed in equal parts
6. Dredge with bread crumbs and dot with butter
7. Bake in a hot oven 20-30 minutes
8. Serve in the same mold

title: Scalloped Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can of tomatoes
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- sugar
- butter
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Take 1 can of tomatoes and drain
2. Season the tomatoes with salt, pepper, a small quantity of onion juice and sugar
3. Butter a mould
4. Sprinkle with bread crumbs
5. Lay the tomatoes in it
6. Sprinkle with buttered bread crumbs
7. Bake in oven about 15 minutes
8. Serve in the same dish

title: Scotch Ginger (Skotlantilainen inkiväärijuoma)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds of granulated sugar
- 2 lemons
- 1 ounce of wine acid
- 1½ ounces of powdered ginger
