2. Work butter in with fingers
3. then add milk into the mixture
4. Put the paste in two molds bake in oven
5. Clean strawberries and sweeten with sugar
6. Put a layer of strawberries between and on the cakes
7. Cover with whipped cream

title: String Bean Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- string beans
- salted water
- lettuce leaves
- mayonnaise sauce

## Directions

1. Cut stringbeans lengthwise into shreds, cook in salted water until tender.
2. Let cool, arrange on lettuce leaves and cover with mayonnaise sauce.

title: Stuffed Celery
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 large roots of celery
- 1/4 lb. of veal
- 3/8 lb. of beef
- 2 ozs. of suet
- 1 tablespoonful of bread crumbs
- 1 egg
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 tablespoonful of chopped onion
- salt and pepper
- salted water
- butter
- beef stock
- cream

## Directions

1. Scrape celery and wash well; cook in salted water until half done.
2. Drain, remove tops nicely and scoop out the insides.
3. Stuff the celery with mixture made of the described ingredients as usually.
4. Replace the tops.
5. Butter a baking pan, and bake the celery slowly in it, covered, basting often with beef stock until the celery is soft and the stuffing done.
6. Place in a dish, prepare the sauce of the liquor in the pan by adding a little cream.

title: Stuffed Chicken or Turkey Legs
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken and veal, ground several times
- salt
- pepper
- finely chopped parsley
- bread crumbs
- milk
- 1 egg
- butter

## Directions

1. Remove the bones carefully, leaving only one inch of bone in the legs.
2. Fill the space with stuffing made of chicken and veal ground several times.
3. Season with salt, pepper and finely chopped parsley.
4. Soak a little bread crumbs in milk, mix with 1 egg and a bit butter.
5. Combine the mixtures rubbing well.
6. Put a spoonful of mixture into each leg, truss and cook in water or chicken stock mixed with salt, celery, onion and parsley about 1 hour.
7. Remove from the pan, keep under a weight until cool.
8. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, dip in egg and bread crumbs, fry in butter or in lard until brown.
9. Arrange on a platter same as chops.
10. Serve with Bearnaise or Tartar Sauce.

title: Stuffed Eggplant
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 eggplant
- salted water
- 1 cupful of bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1/2 tablespoonful of chopped onion
- beef stock or water
- salt and pepper
- 1 to 2 eggs
- bread crumbs for topping

## Directions

1. Cook eggplant 10 minutes in salted water
2. Cool thoroughly
3. Cut a piece from the top or split the eggplant in two
4. Scoop the insides out and chop it
5. Add 1 cupful of bread crumbs, 2 tablespoonfuls of butter, and 1/2 tablespoonful of chopped onion
6. Cook the mixture for a few minutes
7. Pour a little beef stock or water over, add salt and pepper
8. Stir in 1 to 2 whipped eggs
9. Fill the eggplant with this mixture
10. Sprinkle with bread crumbs
11. Bake in oven till brown

title: Stuffed Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- half-cooked eggs
- warm meat stuffing
- spinach or mashed potatoes

## Directions

1. Cut a slice off the tops of half-cooked eggs
2. Take out the yolks
3. Stuff the eggs with warm meat stuffing
4. Replace the tops
5. Serve with spinach or mashed potatoes

title: Stuffed Onions
body:
## Ingredients

- large red onions
- salted water
- 1/4 pound of beef
- 1/4 pound of veal
- 2 ozs. of suet
- 1 tablespoonful of bread crumbs
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 egg
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- mushrooms
- melted butter
- mushroom sauce
- tomato sauce

## Directions

1. Cook large red onions 15 minutes in salted water.
2. Scoop them carefully.
3. Stuff with meat mixture made of 1/4 pound of beef, 1/4 pound of veal, 2 ozs. of suet, 1 tablespoonful of bread crumbs, 1 cupful of milk, 1 egg, salt and pepper to taste, a little onion juice and minced mushrooms.
4. Brush onions with melted butter, sprinkle with bread crumbs and bake in oven, using plenty of butter in the pan and baste often so they do not burn.
5. Serve as an entree, with mushroom sauce or tomato sauce.

title: Stuffed Shoulder of Mutton
body:
## Ingredients

- shoulder of mutton with bone and ribs
- salt
- 1 cupful of bread crumbs
- 1 tablespoonful of chopped parsley
- 1 teaspoonful of chopped onion
- 6 chopped mushrooms
- melted butter
- 1 egg
- meat stock to moisten the mixture
- pepper

## Directions

1. Remove carefully the bone from the shoulder and the ribs taking care not to break the skinside
2. Rub inside with salt
3. Mix together bread crumbs, chopped parsley, chopped onion, chopped mushrooms, melted butter, egg, meat stock, salt and pepper
4. Fill the space with the mixture
5. Sew up
6. Bake in oven same as baked mutton usually
7. Instead of mushrooms oysters may be used for stuffing

title: Stuffed Shoulder of Veal
body:
## Ingredients

- shoulder of veal
- few tablespoonfuls of suet
- 1 egg
- 3 tablespoonfuls of bread crumbs
- 1/2 cupful of cream or milk
- 1/2 tablespoonful of salt
- 1/2 tablespoonful of parsley
- chopped mushrooms or pork
- white pepper

## Directions

1. Remove the bones and the blade carefully; scrape the meat from the blade.
2. Grind and mix with chopped suet, egg, bread crumbs, cream, salt, parsley and white pepper.
3. Rub the space with salt, stuff and sew up.
4. Bake same as roast veal.

title: Stuffed Tomato
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- salt
- celery
- boiled chicken or veal
- mayonnaise sauce
- cucumber
- pineapple
- apple

## Directions

1. Peel tomatoes and scoop mellow out; sprinkle inside with salt.
2. Keep on ice until they have to be served.
3. Stuff the tomatoes with celery cut in very small pieces and mixed with boiled, chopped chicken or veal and mayonnaise sauce.
4. Tomato may be filled with cucumber and pineapple, both separately, celery and apple (together) cut in small pieces, mixed with mayonnaise sauce.

title: Stuffed Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- salt
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of onion
- 1/2 cupful of boiled, chopped chicken or any kind of meat
- 1/2 cupful of bread crumbs
- 1 teaspoonful of minced parsley
- 1 egg
- bread crumbs for topping
- brown sauce

## Directions

1. Wipe and cut a slice from top of tomatoes, leave skins on
2. Scoop out the inside part and sprinkle the insides with salt
3. Cook 1 tablespoonful of butter with 1 tablespoonful of onion
4. Add 1/2 cupful of boiled, chopped chicken or any kind of meat
5. Add 1/2 cupful of bread crumbs
6. Add the insides of tomatoes
7. Add 1 teaspoonful of minced parsley
8. Let the mixture come to boiling point
9. Add 1 egg
10. Put the filled tomatoes in a buttered baking pan
11. Sprinkle with bread crumbs
12. Bake in oven nearly 20 minutes
13. Serve with brown sauce

title: Stuffed Tomatoes (with Rice)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 tomatoes
- 2 ounces of bread
- 1/2 cupful of rich milk
- 2 egg yolks
- 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- chopped parsley
- sugar

## Directions

1. Remove the tops of 6 tomatoes
2. Scoop out the insides
3. Soak 2 ounces of bread in 1/2 cupful of rich milk
4. Mix with the tomatoes
5. Add yolks of 2 eggs
6. Add 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
7. Add salt, pepper, onion juice, chopped parsley and a little sugar
8. Add hard-beaten whites of eggs at the last
9. Sprinkle the insides of the tomatoes with salt and stuff
10. Place in a buttered pan
11. Bake, covered, 30-40 minutes

title: Stuffing I
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of cracker crumbs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 small onion chopped
- chopped parsley
- pickles
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cook the onion in butter in a frying pan.
2. Add to it the cracker crumbs soaked in a small quantity of water or fish stock, parsley, salt and pepper.
3. Fry for a little while on a slow fire.

title: Stuffing II
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of rice
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 hard boiled chopped eggs
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 8 prunes

## Directions

1. Boil the rice in salted water and drain off the water.
2. Mix with melted butter, chopped eggs, prunes and salt.
3. Stuff the fish with this mixture.

title: Suckling Pig à la Aspic
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 lbs. of suckling pig
- 2 quarts of water
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- 10 peppercorns
- 1 bay leaf
- 3 leaves of gelatine
- knuckles of veal
- 2 eggs
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Wipe the meat and the knuckles with cloth wrung out from hot water.
2. Put into hot water, place over the fire.
3. Skin carefully, season, let simmer on a slow fire until tender.
4. Remove the skin, cut the meat into nice cubes.
5. Beat the whites lightly, mix with gelatine dissolved in water and 1 tablespoonful of lemon juice.
6. Add the liquor of meat carefully skimming.
7. Whisk over the fire until it begins to boil.
8. Move the kettle to the side of the stove and let it simmer gently for 5 minutes.
9. Strain through a fine cloth.
10. Pour a little clear aspic into the bottom of the mold, decorate with hard-boiled eggs and parsley.
11. Lay the meat pieces into the mold gently, so that there is room for plenty of liquid in between.
12. Place the mold in a cold place and let the liquid set.
13. Serve with potato salad.

title: Sugar Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of butter
- 1/2 cupfuls of lard
- 1 egg
- 5 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 3 teaspoonfuls of baking powder
- 1 cupful of milk
- lemon or vanilla to flavor

## Directions

1. Rub sugar, butter and lard to a froth
2. Mix with egg, milk and dry ingredients
3. Roll into a thin sheet
4. Cut with a cutter into cakes
5. Bake to a light brown

title: Sugar Puffs
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cupfuls of water
- 1/2 pound of butter
- 1/2 pound of flour
- 6 eggs
- sugar for sprinkling

## Directions

1. Boil up 4 cupfuls of water, add 1/2 pound of butter into it, reheat to boiling point, mix with 1/2 pound of flour.
2. Then whip the mixture well until you can easily remove it from the saucepan.
3. Pour in a bowl to cool.
4. Then mix with 6 eggs, two at a time, beating well.
5. Form into small round cakes on baking sheet, bake to a light brown.
6. When done, sprinkle with sugar.

title: Sugared Cranberries
body:
## Ingredients

- powdered sugar
- white of egg
- cleaned, wiped cranberries

## Directions

1. Warm sifted powdered sugar on paper or in a clean pan.
2. Whip white of egg.
3. Dip cleaned, wiped cranberries into it.
4. Drain in a colander.
5. Roll in heated sugar until white and covered with sugar.
6. Keep in a warm place until the sugar is fastened on berries.

title: Suklaa (Chocolate)
body:
## Ingredients

- milk
- chocolate
- sugar
- salt

## Directions

1. Prepare in the same way as cocoa using chocolate cakes melted in dry kettle or grated

title: Suklaa Kakku (Chocolate Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ cupful of butter
- 1¼ cupfuls of sugar
- 4 eggs
- ¾ cupful of milk
- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder
- 2½ ozs. of chocolate
- ½ teaspoonful of vanilla

## Directions

1. Rub butter and sugar to a cream, add beaten yolks, chocolate dissolved in milk, vanilla, flour and baking powder.
2. Add the stiff beaten whites of eggs.
3. Pour in a buttered mold and bake in a moderate oven ¾—1 hour.

title: Suklaa Kakku (Chocolate Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 cupfuls of sugar
- 4 tablespoonfuls of cream
- 2 tablespoonfuls of finely chopped chocolate
- 2½ cupfuls of wheat flour
- ¼ cupful of almonds
- ½ teaspoonful of soda
- 6 egg whites

## Directions

1. Rub butter and sugar together, add cream with soda dissolved in it, blanched and finely chopped almonds, chocolate, wheat flour and lastly egg whites beaten to a froth.
2. Place in a buttered mold and bake in a moderate oven.

title: Suklaa kastike (Chocolate Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of water
- 3 ozs. of melted chocolate
- a little vanilla
- a little cream

## Directions

1. Cook 1/2 cupful of sugar and 1/2 cupful of water 5 minutes
2. Add 3 ozs. of melted chocolate and a little vanilla
3. Let stand in double-boiler until served
4. Add a little cream
5. When too smooth the sauce may be thickened with arrowroot

title: Suklaa laserrus I (Chocolate Icing I)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of sugar
- 1 cupful of water
- 4 ounces of chocolate
- flavoring

## Directions

1. Cook sugar with water until the syrup will thread when dropped from spoon
2. Melt chocolate in a dry pan
3. Pour the syrup gradually into the chocolate
4. Stir until the mixture becomes even
5. Add flavoring
6. Spread cake with the icing

title: Suklaa laserrus II (Chocolate Icing II)
body:
## Ingredients

- chocolate
- a little water
- confectioner's sugar

## Directions

1. Melt chocolate in dry pan
2. Add a little water and confectioner's sugar until a moderately thick icing
3. Spread it immediately on cakes, before it becomes firm

title: Suklaa täyte (Chocolate Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- yolks of 4 eggs
- 8 tablespoonfuls of cream
- 1/2 lb. of sweet butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 2 teaspoonfuls of vanilla
- 3 tablespoonfuls of cocoa
- a little water

## Directions

1. Put yolks, cream and sugar into a kettle
2. Beat over the fire until thick
3. When cool add creamed butter
4. Add vanilla and cocoa melted in a small quantity of water

title: Suklaahyytelö (Chocolate Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of rich milk
- 2 ozs. of chocolate
- 8-9 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 8 leaves of gelatine
- 1 cupful of cream
- 1/2 teaspoonful of vanilla

## Directions

1. Boil up milk
2. Mix with vanilla, melted chocolate, gelatine leaves and a part of sugar
3. Stir well until all ingredients have dissolved and the mixture has boiled up
4. Set aside to cool
5. Whip cream and the rest of the sugar to a stiff froth
6. Mix with chocolate mixture just when getting firm
7. Turn in a mold and let get quite firm
8. Serve unmolded, garnished with whipped cream

title: Suklaajälkiruoka (Chocolate Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 2.5 cups milk
- 3 or 4 tablespoons grated chocolate
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 0.5 teaspoon vanilla
- 2 or 3 eggs
- 3 tablespoons butter
- Salt

## Directions

1. Melt the chocolate in a hot pan, add gradually the scalded milk, bread crumbs, butter, vanilla and salt.
2. Beat the eggs with the sugar, add to the mixture.
3. Bake in a buttered mold in a pan of water until firm.
4. Serve with whipped cream or vanilla sauce. Instead of chocolate cocoa may be used.

title: Suklaakohokas (Chocolate Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 cupful of rich milk
- 5 eggs
- 4 ozs. of sugar
- 2 ozs. of cocoa

## Directions

1. Cook a batter of flour and milk; mix cocoa with the hot batter.
2. Whip well the yolks and sugar and add into the cocoa mixture.
3. Lastly stir stiffly beaten whites into it.
4. Pour the mixture immediately in a well buttered mold.
5. Cover and steam in oven or on the stove.
6. Instead of cocoa coffee may be used if preferred.

title: Suklaati (Chocolate)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 ounces chocolate
- milk
- sugar
- salt
- boiling water

## Directions

1. Prepare as for cocoa
2. Instead of cocoa use 1 1/2 ounces chocolate grated or dissolved in a double boiler

title: Suklaati-Kermajäätelö (Chocolate Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- Vanilla ice cream
- 2 to 4 ounces dissolved chocolate
- Milk or cream
- Sugar
- Vanilla

## Directions

1. Mix vanilla ice cream with 2 or 4 ounces of dissolved chocolate dissolved in milk or cream, and freeze.
2. Alternatively, when made without eggs mix the cream with the dissolved chocolate, add sugar and vanilla, and freeze.

title: Suklaati-laserrus No. 1 (Chocolate Icing No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup water
- 4 ounces chocolate
- vanilla for flavoring
- 1/2 cup water or milk (for filling)
- 1/2 tablespoon cornstarch (for filling)
- salt (for filling)
- butter (for filling)

## Directions

1. Boil 2 cups of sugar in 1 cup of water until it threads when dropped from a spoon
2. Dissolve in a dry pan 4 ounces chocolate
3. Add gradually the syrup to the chocolate
4. Stir until smooth
5. Flavor with vanilla
6. Spread on cakes
7. For chocolate filling: Cook 1/2 cup water or milk with 1/2 tablespoon cornstarch
8. Add chocolate according to taste, salt, and a dot of butter
9. Instead of cornstarch the yolk of an egg may be used

title: Suklaati-laserrus No. 2 (Chocolate Icing No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 ounce chocolate
- 6 tablespoons boiling water
- vanilla
- sifted confectioner's powdered sugar, about 1 1/2 cups

## Directions

1. Dissolve 1 ounce chocolate in a dry pan
2. Add about 6 tablespoons boiling water
3. Add a little vanilla and stir well
4. Add sifted confectioner's powdered sugar gradually, enough to make the mixture reasonably thick, about 1 1/2 cups
5. Spread immediately on the cakes
6. If cocoa is used it must be dissolved in hot water

title: Suklaati-laserrus No. 2 (Chocolate Icing No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 ounce chocolate
- 6 tablespoons boiling water
- vanilla
- 1½ cups confectioner's sugar

## Directions

1. Dissolve 1 ounce chocolate in a dry pan
2. Add 6 tablespoons boiling water and some vanilla
3. Stir well
4. Mix in 1½ cups confectioner's sugar gradually until the mixture is moderately thick
5. Spread immediately on cakes
6. If cocoa is used instead, it must be dissolved in hot water

title: Suklaati-leipäputinki (Chocolate Bread Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 2 1/2 cups milk
- 3 or 4 tablespoons grated chocolate
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 3/4 teaspoon vanilla
- 2 or 3 eggs
- Salt
- 3 tablespoons butter

## Directions

1. Melt the chocolate in a dry pan
2. Gradually add the boiling milk, bread crumbs, butter, vanilla and salt
3. Beat the eggs with the sugar and add last to the mixture
4. Pour the mixture into a buttered mold
5. Bake in a pan of water until firm

title: Suklaatihyytelö (Chocolate Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint rich milk
- 2 ounces chocolate
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon (1/4 package) gelatine
- 1 cup cream (may be made without)
- 1/2 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Scald the milk.
2. Add vanilla, chocolate and gelatine dissolved and a part of the sugar.
3. Stir until the gelatine is dissolved.
4. Let cool.
5. Whip the cream with the rest of the sugar.
6. Add to the chocolate mixture just when it begins to set.
7. Pour into a mold dipped in water and let set.
8. Serve unmolded garnished with whipped cream.

title: Suklaatikakku (Chocolate Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 1/4 cups sugar
- 4 eggs
- 3/4 cup milk
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 cup grated chocolate
- 1/2 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Rub butter with sugar until creamy
2. Add egg yolks beaten until frothy
3. Mix in chocolate diluted with milk, vanilla, flour and baking powder
4. Last of all fold in the whites of the eggs beaten to firm froth
5. Bake for 1 hour in a buttered tin in a moderately hot oven

title: Suklaatikakkuja (Chocolate Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup butter
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 2 tablespoons milk
- 2 cups flour
- 1 egg
- 2 squares chocolate
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- Cinnamon, cloves, chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Work until frothy butter with sugar
2. Add eggs beaten well, melted chocolate, milk and flour sifted with baking powder
3. Work all the ingredients well together
4. Roll thin
5. Cut in cookies with a small cutter
6. Brush with egg white
7. Sprinkle with sugar
8. Bake in a moderate oven
9. May be prepared without spices

title: Suklaatikastike (Chocolate Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup water
- 1 or 2 squares of chocolate
- vanilla
- cream
- arrowroot

## Directions

1. Cook 1/2 cup sugar in 1/2 cup water for 5 minutes
2. Add 1 or 2 squares of chocolate dissolved and some vanilla
3. Add some cream
4. Serve very hot
5. If too thin, thicken the sauce with arrowroot

title: Suklaatikastike Jäätelöille (Chocolate Sauce for Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 or 2 ounces chocolate
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 1 cup boiling water
- 2 cups sugar
- Vanilla

## Directions

1. Melt 1 or 2 ounces of chocolate in a dry pan set in a double boiler.
2. Add 3 tablespoons of sugar and 1 cup of boiling water gradually stirring well.
3. Add 2 cups more of sugar and let boil for a little while stirring well.
4. Flavor with vanilla.
5. Serve cold.

title: Suklaatikastike Jäätelöille (Chocolate Sauce for Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 or 2 ounces chocolate
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 1 cup boiling water

## Directions

1. Dissolve chocolate in double boiler
2. Add 3 tablespoons sugar and pour gradually boiling water over, stirring well
3. Add 2 cups sugar, let boil for a while, stirring well
4. Flavor with vanilla
5. Serve cold

title: Suklaatikermahyydyke (Chocolate Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups whipping cream
- 1 ounce chocolate
- 2 tablespoons powdered sugar
- 1/4 package gelatine
- 1/2 cup water
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Dissolve the chocolate in a saucepan
2. Add sugar, water, gelatine and vanilla
3. When the gelatine is all dissolved, let cool
4. Whip the cream
5. Pass through a sieve the cold chocolate mixture into the cream
6. Put into a wet mold to set

title: Suklaatikohokas (Chocolate Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 square vanilla chocolate, grated
- 5 egg whites
- 1/4 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice

## Directions

1. Prepare as directed for prune souffle. Instead of prunes use one square of vanilla chocolate grated.

title: Suklaatikohokas (Chocolate Soufflé)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons butter
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 1 cup rich milk
- 5 eggs
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1/2 or 3/4 cups grated chocolate

## Directions

1. Cook a batter of butter, flour and milk.
2. Dissolve the chocolate in a hot pan, add to the hot batter.
3. Mix with the yolks beaten with sugar.
4. At the last add the whites whipped to a firm froth.
5. Fill a well-buttered mold with the mixture.
6. Cover carefully.
7. Bake in oven in a pan of water, or steam on the stove.
8. Instead of chocolate, cocoa or strong coffee may be used.

title: Suklaatileivät (Chocolate Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 egg whites
- 6 tablespoons sugar
- 1½ tablespoons grated chocolate
- Vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat the egg whites to a firm froth.
2. Continue to beat for 15 minutes.
3. Sift slowly the powdered sugar and chocolate into the whites.
4. Beat together.
5. Form into small cookies on a buttered and floured baking sheet.
6. Let harden in a slow oven.
7. Grated cocoanut may be used instead of chocolate.

title: Sunshine Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 9 whites of eggs
- 1 cupful of powdered sugar
- 1 cupful of flour
- 6 yolks of eggs
- ½ teaspoonful of cream of tartar
- 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice
- a pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Whip whites of eggs to a firm froth, continue whipping 10 minutes
2. Add slowly sugar and lemon juice
3. Mix the beaten whites of eggs with beaten yolks
4. Add gradually flour mixed with cream of tartar and sifted several times
5. Bake in a domeshaped mold

title: Suolattua, savustettua paistia (Ham)
body:
## Ingredients

- ham
- rye flour
- water
- bread crumbs
- brown sugar
- egg yolk
- cloves
- cider

## Directions

1. Soak the ham and clean well with a brush
2. Make a thick paste of rye flour and water
3. Spread the paste over the ham taking care not to leave any openings
4. Place in a roasting pan in a hot oven
5. Roast slowly for 5 hours
6. Shortly before removing from oven, make a little hole in the paste and pour some of the liquor from the pan into the hole, repeating several times
7. When done, remove the paste and the skin
8. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and brown sugar
9. Place in the oven until brown
10. Alternatively, spread the ham with yolk of egg, sprinkle with sugar and bread crumbs and dot with cloves

title: Suolattuja mantelia (Salted Almonds)
body:
## Ingredients

- ¼ pound almonds
- Salt
- Oil or fat

## Directions

1. Blanch the almonds and wipe with a cloth.
2. Cook in oil or fat until nice brown.
3. Drain on brown paper and sprinkle with salt.
4. Alternatively, place the almonds in a dry baking tin, stir often until evenly browned, and sprinkle with salt when browned.

title: Suomalainen pannukakku (Finnish Pancake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1½ cups milk
- ½ teaspoon salt
- 1 cup flour
- 1 tablespoon butter

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs with the sugar, add salt, melted butter, milk and flour.
2. Bake in buttered pan about an hour.
3. The pancake will be lighter if the batter is left to stand for a while after the flour has been mixed in milk.
4. Add yolks beaten with sugar.
5. Last fold in the egg whites beaten until firm.
6. May be fried on the stove.
7. The batter may be mixed with very thin slices of apples.

title: Suomalainen sokerikakku (Finnish Sponge Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 eggs
- 8 tablespoons powdered sugar
- 8 tablespoons flour

## Directions

1. Beat the egg yolks with the sugar to a thick froth.
2. Add some vanilla or lemon juice.
3. Stir in gradually the sifted flour.
4. Last of all fold in the egg whites beaten until firm.
5. Bake in a buttered tin in a moderate oven for 3/4 hour.

title: Suomalainen Tee-rinkeli (Finnish Tea-ring)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 2 lbs. of flour
- 3 eggs
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 3/4 lb. of butter
- 1 cake of yeast
- melted butter
- chopped blanched almonds
- granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Dissolve yeast in lukewarm milk, mix with 3 tablespoonfuls of flour and set in a warm place to rise.
2. Heat milk. Work butter to a cream.
3. Whip eggs and sugar in a bowl, add milk and flour into it to make a smooth paste.
4. Mix thoroughly with risen sponge and with the rest of the flour, lastly the butter.
5. Knead briskly and long.
6. Set in a warm place to rise and cover with a towel.
7. Knead the dough again on board.
8. Roll into a thin sheet, spread with melted butter, sprinkle with sugar and chopped blanched almonds.
9. Roll together, cut even from each end and join the ends to form a ring.
10. Place on a buttered baking sheet and cut with scissors into equal sized slices and turn them crosswise on both sides.
11. Set to rise. Brush over with egg, sprinkle with granulated sugar and peeled, chopped almonds.
12. Bake in a moderate oven.

title: Suomalaisia sieni-palleroita (Finnish Mushroom Croquettes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of mushrooms
- 4 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 2 eggs
- 4 tablespoonfuls of bread crumbs
- 4 tablespoonfuls of milk or beef stock
- pepper and salt
- few drops of onion juice

## Directions

1. Grind mushrooms
2. Mix bread crumbs, milk and eggs together
3. Add the mushrooms and seasonings
4. Stir thoroughly together
5. Form into croquettes
6. Let simmer in salted water 15 minutes
7. Dip in egg, dredge with bread crumbs, fry rapidly in butter
8. Serve with brown sauce and vegetables

title: Suomalaisia sienipalleroita (Finnish Mushroom Balls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound mushrooms
- 4 tablespoons melted butter
- 2 eggs
- 4 tablespoons bread crumbs
- 4 tablespoons milk or vegetable stock
- white pepper and salt to taste
- onion juice

## Directions

1. Grind the mushrooms
2. Add bread crumbs, milk and eggs mixed together
3. Season and stir until smooth
4. Form into balls
5. Boil slowly in salted water for 15 minutes
6. Dip in egg and turn in bread crumbs
7. Fry quickly in butter
8. Serve with brown sauce

title: Suomalaista kahvileipää (Finnish Coffee Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups milk
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1/4 pound butter
- 1 yeast cake
- 1/2 teaspoon cardamom
- 2 pounds flour

## Directions

1. Dissolve yeast in lukewarm milk
2. Mix in some flour and let rise in a warm place
3. Warm the milk and heat or whip the butter
4. Beat eggs and sugar
5. Add the milk, cardamom and enough flour to make a thick batter
6. Add the risen yeast
7. Mix in the butter and remaining flour
8. Knead the dough well until it becomes soft and elastic
9. Cover and let rise in a warm place
10. Knead the dough on a table and form into long loaves or roll thin and spread with melted butter

title: Suomalaista Kahvileipää (Finnish Coffee Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 1 cake of yeast
- 1¼ cupfuls of melted butter
- 2 eggs
- 1 cupful of sugar
- blanched almonds, finely chopped

## Directions

1. Prepare dough the same way as for tea-rings.
2. Form into long-shaped cakes.
3. Before putting into oven, brush with egg and sprinkle finely chopped blanched almonds on top.

title: Suomenmielisiä (Finnish Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1/2 lb. of sugar
- 1/4 lb. of butter
- 10 ozs. of flour

## Directions

1. Whip eggs and sugar to a froth
2. Add creamed butter and flour
3. Form the batter into cookies of various shapes
4. Bake in oven to a light brown

title: Survottua lanttua tai naurista (Mashed Turnips)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 medium-sized turnips
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup rich milk
- Salt
- Pepper
- Sugar
- 2 egg yolks
- 2 tablespoons cream

## Directions

1. Cook 2 medium-sized turnips in salted water until tender.
2. Mash.
3. Make a sauce of 2 tablespoons butter, 1 tablespoon flour and 1 cup rich milk.
4. Season with salt and pepper, sweeten with sugar.
5. Mix with the mashed turnips.
6. Let boil.
7. Last of all add 2 yolks of egg mixed with 2 tablespoons cream.

title: Survottua lanttua tai naurista (Mashed Turnips)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 middle-sized turnips
- salted water
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter
- 1 tablespoonful flour
- 3/4 cupful rich milk
- salt
- pepper
- sugar
- 2 egg yolks
- 2 tablespoonfuls cream

## Directions

1. Cook the turnips in salted water until tender.
2. Mash the turnips.
3. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and rich milk.
4. Season the sauce with salt, pepper and sugar.
5. Mix the mashed turnip into the sauce and let it come to a boil.
6. Beat 2 egg yolks with 2 tablespoonfuls cream and stir in last.

title: Suuteloita (Kisses)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound almonds
- 1 1/4 pounds powdered sugar
- 2 egg whites
- jelly

## Directions

1. Blanch and grate the almonds
2. Pound with sugar in a mortar or in a wooden bowl
3. Beat the egg whites to a firm froth
4. Combine with the mixture above
5. Drop by the spoonful on a baking sheet
6. Press lightly with finger in the center of each
7. Put jelly in
8. Bake in a slow oven
9. Let harden

title: Sveitsin Torttu (Swiss Tart)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 1 1/4 cupfuls of melted butter
- 1 1/4 cupfuls of sugar
- 1 1/4 cupfuls of flour
- few tablespoonfuls of fruit juice
- few tablespoonfuls of apple sauce
- 1/2 quart of rich cream
- 3-4 tablespoonfuls of sugar

## Directions

1. Work butter to a cream, add eggs one at a time, then sugar and flour.
2. Beat well the mixture.
3. Put the paste in two equal-sized hot, buttered baking dishes and bake to a light brown.
4. Pile the cakes on a serving dish placing jam between them.
5. Let get cold and cover with whipped cream.

title: Sveitsin-torttu (Swiss Tart)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- equal weight of butter
- equal weight of sugar
- equal weight of flour

## Directions

1. Rub the butter with sugar until creamy
2. Add the eggs one by one and the flour
3. Beat hard
4. Divide into two parts and bake separately
5. Pile the cakes on a serving platter having jam between
6. Let cool
7. Cover with whipped cream and serve

title: Sweet Potato Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of potato mash
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- beaten yolks of 2 eggs
- parsley
- pepper
- egg for dipping
- bread crumbs
- lard for frying

## Directions

1. Form into round or oval balls.
2. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
3. Fry in lard.

title: Sweet Potato Souffle
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of potato mash
- 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 1 cupful of cream or milk
- 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Mix butter, cream and yolks with potato mash.
2. Add the stiffly beaten whites last.
3. Bake in a buttered mold.

title: Sweet Potatoes au Gratin
body:
## Ingredients

- five cold sweet potatoes
- salt
- pepper
- 1 tablespoonful of brown sugar
- butter
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Cut five cold sweet potatoes into dice.
2. Put in a buttered mold, sprinkle with salt and pepper and 1 tablespoonful of brown sugar.
3. Dot with bits of butter, sprinkle with bread crumbs.
4. Bake in oven, covered, 20 minutes.
5. Then uncover and leave in oven until brown.

title: Sweet Rings
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 glassful of eggs
- 1 glassful of sugar
- 1 glassful of milk
- 1 glassful of melted butter
- 1 cake of yeast
- enough flour to make a moderately thick dough
- granulated sugar
- chopped almonds
- egg for brushing

## Directions

1. Prepare the dough as for usual tea-ring
2. Set to rise and form it into small rings
3. When risen, brush over with egg
4. Sprinkle with granulated sugar and chopped almonds
5. Bake in oven about 10 minutes

title: Sweetbreads with Tomato Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- sweetbreads
- pork
- vegetables
- meat stock
- tomato sauce or Allemande sauce
- boiled artichokes
- rice
- mushroom sauce
- french peas

## Directions

1. Boil sweetbreads and place under a weight for a little while.
2. Cut in two lengthwise and place in a pan.
3. Put a thin slice of pork on each.
4. Cut vegetables into dice, put in the pan with the sweetbreads and pour meat stock over them until the bottom is covered.
5. Bake in a slow oven about 15 minutes, basting often.
6. Mask with tomato or Allemande sauce.
7. Arrange boiled artichokes on a foundation of rice.
8. Place the sweetbreads on top.
9. Serve with mushroom sauce in the center of the foundation.
10. Garnish around with french peas.

title: Taikina-pyörylöitä (Doughnuts)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1/4 cup butter
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon cream of tartar
- 1/2 teaspoon soda
- 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon
- 4 cups flour

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs with the sugar to a froth.
2. Add butter rubbed until creamy.
3. Add milk with soda and cream of tartar dissolved in it.
4. Add salt, cinnamon and flour.
5. Roll out to 1/2 inch thickness.
6. Cut in rings with a round cutter (doughnut cutter).
7. Cook in lard until light brown on both sides.
8. Drain on brown paper and dip in powdered sugar.
9. Cook 2 or 3 at a time.
10. Ensure lard is at moderate temperature - if not hot enough, doughnuts will absorb lard; if too hot, they will brown before sufficiently risen.

title: Taikinassa Paistettuja Oisteria (Oysters Fried in Batter)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 egg yolks
- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon butter, melted
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 teaspoon baking powder
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 3 egg whites
- lemon juice
- large oysters
- butter or lard
- lemon
- parsley
- tartare sauce or lemon butter

## Directions

1. Beat 3 egg yolks
2. Add 1 cup of milk, 1 tablespoon of butter melted, 1 teaspoon of salt
3. Add 1/2 teaspoon of baking powder mixed with 1 1/2 cups of flour
4. Last of all add 3 egg whites beaten stiff
5. Have the batter thick
6. Use some lemon juice for flavor
7. Rinse and wipe large oysters
8. Dip in batter and fry in butter or lard
9. Serve on a napkin garnished with lemon and parsley
10. Serve with tartare sauce or lemon butter

title: Talonpojan-kakku (Farmer's Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 4 tablespoons cream
- 1 cup currants
- 2 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon cardamom
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Beat the egg yolks with the sugar until creamy
2. Add the melted butter, cream, spices and flour sifted with soda
3. At the last fold in the whites beaten to a firm froth

title: Tanskalaisia munia (Danish Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- toast
- salt
- pepper
- red pepper
- Hollandaise sauce

## Directions

1. Boil eggs 5 minutes
2. Shell and place on scooped toast
3. Beat a few whites of egg to firm froth
4. Force through a pastry bag covering the edges of toast and the eggs
5. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
6. Garnish with pieces of red pepper
7. Bake in oven until light brown
8. Serve with Hollandaise sauce on a platter with eggs on top

title: Tapioka omenien kanssa (Apple Tapioca)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 or 6 apples
- Sugar
- Salt
- 1 cup tapioca
- 1 quart water

## Directions

1. Peel and core 5 or 6 apples and fill with sugar
2. Lay into a buttered mold
3. Cook 1 cup of tapioca in 1 quart of water, season with salt and sugar
4. Cover the apples with tapioca and bake until the apples are done
5. Alternatively, cook the apples with sugar in water; when tender, lay the apples into a mold, cook the tapioca in the liquor of the apples, pour over the apples, and brown quickly in oven
6. Or cook the tapioca in a saucepan with 2 cups of apples and 3 or 4 cups of water; add sugar and salt according to taste

title: Tapioka putinki (Tapioca Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of tapioca
- 5 cupfuls of milk
- 3 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt

## Directions

1. Cook a batter of milk and tapioca
2. Work butter to a cream, beat yolks well with sugar
3. Mix with creamed butter
4. Combine the mixtures when the tapioca batter is cold
5. Add lastly the hard-beaten whites of eggs into it
6. Put in a buttered mold and steam in oven about 3/4 hour

title: Tapioka putinki (Tapioca Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of tapioca grain
- 5 cupfuls of milk
- 3 ruokalus. of sugar
- 2 ruokalus. of butter
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 teelus. of salt

## Directions

1. Cook milk and grain to a porridge.
2. Cream butter, whip egg yolks with sugar and mix with the porridge.

title: Tapioka putinki omenien kera (Tapioca Pudding with Apples)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5-6 apples
- 1 cupful of tapioca
- salt
- sugar

## Directions

1. Pare and core 5-6 apples and fill the cores with sugar
2. Put in a buttered mold
3. Cook 1 cupful of tapioca and season with a little salt and sugar
4. Pour tapioca on the apples and bake in oven until the apples are softened
5. Serve with whipped cream

title: Tapiokaputinki (Tapioca Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup tapioca
- 3 cups milk
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 2 or 3 eggs
- 1/2 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Cook a porridge of milk and tapioca
2. Rub the butter until creamy
3. Beat the egg yolks with sugar and add to the butter
4. Combine with the porridge when it is cold
5. Add the egg whites beaten firm
6. Pour the mixture into a buttered mold
7. Bake in a pan of water for 3/4 hour
8. Optional additions: juice of 1 lemon, 1/2 cup raisins, 1/4 cup chopped almonds, or vanilla to taste
9. Serve with cream or fruit sauce

title: Tartare Kastike (Tartare Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of mayonnaise sauce prepared with mustard
- 1/2 tablespoonful of capers
- 1/2 tablespoonful of olives
- 1/2 tablespoonful of pickles
- 1/2 tablespoonful of minced parsley

## Directions

1. Mix mayonnaise sauce prepared with mustard with capers, olives, pickles and minced parsley
2. The sauce should be made just before serving
3. If served hot, mix with 1 cupful of white sauce and keep on the fire until thoroughly hot

title: Tartare Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cupful of mayonnaise sauce prepared with mustard
- 1/2 tablespoonful of capers
- 1/2 tablespoonful of olives
- 1/2 tablespoonful of pickles
- 1/2 tablespoonful of minced parsley
- 1 cupful of white sauce (if served hot)

## Directions

1. Mix 1/2 cupful of mayonnaise sauce prepared with mustard with 1/2 tablespoonful of capers, 1/2 tablespoonful of olives, 1/2 tablespoonful of pickles and 1/2 tablespoonful of minced parsley.
2. The sauce should be made just before serving.
3. If served hot, mix with 1 cupful of white sauce and keep on the fire until thoroughly hot.

title: Tartare-kastike (Tartare Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup mayonnaise prepared with mustard
- 1/2 tablespoon capers
- 1/2 tablespoon olives
- 1/2 tablespoon pickles
- 1/2 tablespoon parsley, all chopped
- 1 cup milk sauce (for serving hot)

## Directions

1. Mix 1/2 cup of mayonnaise prepared with mustard with 1/2 tablespoon of capers, 1/2 tablespoon of olives, 1/2 tablespoon of pickles and 1/2 tablespoon of parsley having all the ingredients chopped
2. When served hot the sauce must be mixed with 1 cup of milk sauce and kept on the fire until thoroughly hot

title: Tattari kakkuja (Buckwheat Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 cupful of water
- 2 tablespoonfuls of molasses
- ½ cake of yeast
- ½ teaspoonful of salt
- 1½ cupfuls of buckwheat flour
- ½ cupful of flour

## Directions

1. Dissolve yeast in lukewarm water.
2. Add all other ingredients stirring well.
3. Set to rise.
4. Bake like griddle cakes.

title: Tattarikakkuja (Buckwheat Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups water
- 2 cups milk
- 1/2 yeast cake
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 3 1/2 cups buckwheat flour
- 2 tablespoons molasses

## Directions

1. Dissolve the yeast in lukewarm water
2. Add salt and buckwheat flour
3. Let rise over night
4. In the morning stir in slowly the scalded milk and molasses, so as to make a thin batter
5. 1/2 teaspoon of soda may be added to the batter to make them rise better
6. Fry on griddle until brown on both sides

title: Tea (Tee)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 teaspoonfuls of tea
- 2 cupfuls of water

## Directions

1. Heat the tea-pot, put tea in and pour ¾ cupful of boiling water on
2. Let stand in a warm place for 5 minutes
3. Pour the rest of the water into the pot just before serving

title: Tee (Tea)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 teaspoons tea
- 2 cups water

## Directions

1. Heat the teapot
2. Put the tea in
3. Pour 3/4 cup boiling water over
4. Let stand for 5 minutes in a warm place
5. Add the remaining water just before serving

title: Tee Leipiä (Tea Biscuits)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cupfuls of flour
- 2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 eggs
- 1½ cupfuls of milk
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of salt

## Directions

1. Sift flour and baking powder together
2. Work butter in flour
3. Beat eggs until light
4. Add sugar, salt and milk into the eggs
5. Mix gradually with flour
6. Add milk if the batter is too hard
7. Roll into a sheet ½ inch thick
8. Shape into round cakes
9. Bake in a hot oven for 20 minutes

title: Teekakkuja (Tea Biscuits)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- 1 yeast cake

## Directions

1. Warm the milk, add butter, sugar and salt.
2. Mix with the yeast and a part of the flour, let rise.
3. Add the rest of the flour and let rise again.
4. Form into rolls, place on a buttered baking sheet, let rise and bake in a hot oven.
5. May be baked in gem pans by having the batter very thin.

title: Teeleipiä (Tea Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1/4 lb. of sugar
- 1/4 lb. of butter
- 1/2 lb. of flour

## Directions

1. Whip 2 yolks of eggs and 1 white with sugar to a froth
2. Mix with creamed butter and flour, kneading the batter well
3. Roll thin and shape into round cakes
4. Place on a buttered baking sheet
5. Brush over with the rest of the whites
6. Sprinkle with chopped almonds and granulated sugar
7. Bake in oven to a light brown

title: Teeleipä (Tea Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 2 cups flour

## Directions

1. Beat 2 egg yolks and 1 white with sugar
2. Add butter rubbed until creamy and flour, beating well
3. Roll thin, shape into round cookies
4. Place on a buttered baking sheet
5. Spread with egg white
6. Sprinkle with chopped almonds and granulated sugar
7. Bake until light brown

title: Thousand Island-kastike No. 1 (Thousand Island Dressing No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup mayonnaise
- 1/2 cup whipped cream
- 1 tablespoon catsup
- 1 tablespoon Chili sauce
- 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce
- 1 or 2 tablespoons chopped green peppers
- 2 tablespoons chopped pimento
- 2 tablespoons chives
- 1 teaspoon onion juice
- Salt and paprika

## Directions

1. Put all the ingredients into a bowl
2. Add the mayonnaise stirring well
3. Last mix slowly with the whipped cream
4. Add a hard boiled chopped egg, if preferred
5. Dilute with lemon juice, if necessary

title: Thousand Island-kastike No. 2 (Thousand Island Dressing No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 yolk of a hard boiled egg
- 1 raw yolk
- 1 1/4 cups salad oil
- 3 tablespoons lemon juice
- 2 tablespoons chopped chives
- 1 pimento
- 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce
- 3 tablespoons chopped olives
- 1 cup whipped cream

## Directions

1. Rub well the yolk of a hard boiled egg
2. Add 1 raw yolk and stir well
3. Pour slowly 1 1/4 cups salad oil into the yolks
4. Add 3 tablespoons lemon juice, 2 tablespoons chopped chives, 1 pimento and 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce
5. Add 3 tablespoons chopped olives
6. Add 1 cup of whipped cream before serving

title: Timboli Kuppeja (Timbale Cups)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoonful of sugar
- 1/2 teaspoonful of salt
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour

## Directions

1. Mix all above ingredients.
2. Heat timbale iron in hot fat.
3. Lower in batter to 3/4 of its height.
4. Immerse in hot fat.
5. When the timbale is light brown lift on paper and remove from the iron.

title: Timboli-Kiippeja (Timbale Cups)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup flour
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon melted butter or olive oil
- Fat for heating the timbale iron

## Directions

1. Mix 1 cup flour, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1 teaspoon sugar
2. Beat 1 egg and add 1 cup milk
3. Pour into the flour mixture and beat well
4. Add 1 tablespoon melted butter or olive oil last
5. Heat the timbale iron in fat until hot
6. Dip the iron into the batter, leaving a little of the top edge bare
7. Place the iron into the hot fat and fry until the batter is brown and comes away easily
8. If the cups do not look crispy, the batter is too thick and needs more milk added

title: Timboli-kiippeja (Timbale Cups)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup flour
- 2 teaspoons salt
- 1 teaspoon sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon melted butter or olive oil
- lard for frying

## Directions

1. Mix flour with salt and sugar.
2. Beat egg and dilute with milk.
3. Add to flour and beat well.
4. Stir in melted butter or olive oil last.
5. Heat a timbale iron in lard.
6. Dip iron into batter, leaving upper edge out.
7. Stick into boiling lard and cook until brown and it loosens easily.
8. If cups are tough, add some milk as batter may be too thick.
9. Fill the cups with creamed fish or meat of various kinds.

title: Timboli-kuppia (Timbale Cups)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon sugar
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup milk
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- hot lard for frying

## Directions

1. Mix together all the ingredients.
2. Heat a timbale iron in hot lard.
3. Lower into the batter 3/4 of its height.
4. Immerse into hot lard.
5. When light brown lift onto paper and remove from the iron.

title: Tip Top Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cupfuls of sugar
- 1/2 cupful of butter
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cupful of milk
- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 1/2 teaspoonful of cream of tartar
- 1/4 teaspoonful of soda

## Directions

1. Rub butter and sugar to a froth, add yolks of eggs and continue rubbing a little while.
2. Mix with milk, flour, soda and cream of tartar.
3. At the last add whites beaten stiff.
4. Bake in small molds or form into layer cakes.

title: Tippa Taikina (Drop Dumplings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of flour
- 1 cupful of milk or water
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar for sweet dumplings
- 1 tablespoonful of melted butter
- 1/2 teaspoonful of baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat egg yolks and add milk, butter, flour and salt.
2. Finally fold in stiffly beaten egg whites.
3. The batter should be of firm consistency; it is best to test first.
4. If it is too stiff, add egg white.
5. Cognac and a little lemon juice may be used as flavoring.

title: Tippaleipä (Finnish Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 2 cups milk
- 1 pound flour
- 1 yeast cake

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs
2. Add warmed milk, yeast and flour
3. Let rise
4. Force through a pastry bag having a very narrow opening into boiling fat, forming into zig-zags 1 inch thick and 2 inches wide
5. Turn with a perforated spoon
6. Cook until light brown on both sides
7. Drain on brown paper
8. Sprinkle with powdered sugar

title: Tippataikina (Fritter Batter)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ cups flour
- 1 cup milk or water
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 3 eggs
- 1 teaspoon sugar for sweet fritters
- 1 tablespoon melted butter
- ⅜ teaspoon baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat the egg yolks
2. Add milk or water, sugar, butter, flour and salt
3. Last of all fold in the beaten whites
4. Test if the batter is thick enough
5. If too thick, dilute with an egg white
6. Flavor with lemon juice and vanilla

title: Toasteja ytimen kanssa (Marrow Sandwiches)
body:
## Ingredients

- marrow bones
- flour
- water
- salt
- pepper
- pickled onions
- parsley
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Spread a thick dough (made of flour and water) on each end of marrow bone to keep the marrow in while cooking.
2. Put the marrow bones on the fire in boiling water; let boil 1-2 hours.
3. Spread the marrow on toasts, sprinkle salt and pepper on top.
4. Set the bread pieces in the oven for a pair of minutes, so they can be served very hot.
5. Alternative way: Before spreading the marrow on the toasts, mix with it a little pickled onions and parsley, finely chopped, season with salt, pepper and lemon juice.

title: Tomaatteja Maitosoosin Kanssa (Tomatoes with Milk Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- butter
- milk sauce

## Directions

1. Cut tomatoes into slices
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
3. Dip in flour
4. Fry in butter
5. Place in hot dish
6. Pour loose milk sauce over top

title: Tomaatti Hyydyke (Tomato Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 can of tomatoes
- 1 small onion
- 1 bay leaf
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- a little sugar
- 3/8 box or 8 leaves of gelatine

## Directions

1. Cook seasonings with tomato until tomato is soft.
2. Add gelatine and strain.
3. Pour into an individual mold to set.
4. Serve with salad.
5. If desired, the jelly may be cleared with white of an egg.

title: Tomaatti Kastike (Tomato Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 slice of onion
- 1 piece of celery
- 1 cupful of beef stock
- 1 cupful of canned or 5 - 6 fresh tomatoes
- parsley
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Put butter in a saucepan and cook onion and celery in it
2. Add flour and cook a few minutes
3. Stir in tomato, beef stock and seasonings
4. Let simmer 1/2 hour, or until tomato is soft
5. Strain and season with salt and pepper if wanted

title: Tomaatti marmelaadia (Tomato Marmalade)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 lbs. of green tomatoes
- 5 lbs. of sugar
- 2 lemons

## Directions

1. Wash tomatoes and put in salted water for three or four days.
2. Rinse in cold water and let stand in cold water until next day.
3. Cook in a small quantity of water until stewed, force through a sieve.
4. Place to simmer with lemon juice and sugar.
5. Cook until of firm consistency skimming carefully.
6. Pour into jar and seal when cooled.

title: Tomaatti-buljonki (Tomato Bouillon)
body:
## Ingredients

- Six medium sized tomatoes
- 5 cupfuls of vegetable stock
- Salt and pepper
- Whipped cream

## Directions

1. Peel six medium sized tomatoes, split, remove the seeds.
2. Cut in pieces, cook with 5 cupfuls of vegetable stock for 15-20 minutes.
3. Strain through a fine cloth, season with salt and pepper.
4. Serve with whipped cream.

title: Tomaatti-kääryleitä (Tomato Rolls)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls mashed potatoes
- 1 cupful ground tomatoes
- 1 cupful bread crumbs
- 3 eggs
- 4 tablespoonfuls butter
- salt, pepper, and onion juice

## Directions

1. Grind tomatoes
2. Add potatoes, bread crumbs, seasonings, and eggs
3. Form into rolls
4. Dip in egg and bread crumbs
5. Fry in butter or cook in deep fat
6. Serve with milk or egg sauce

title: Tomaatti-muhennus (Stewed Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh tomatoes
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- corn starch
- water

## Directions

1. Put tomatoes in boiling water for few minutes
2. Peel tomatoes
3. Cut in pieces
4. Put in kettle and cook until soft
5. Season with salt, pepper, and butter
6. Thicken with corn starch diluted with cold water

title: Tomaatti-palleroita (Tomato Croquettes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pauna tomaattia
- 1 pauna keitettyjä perunoita
- 1/4 paunaa leipäjauhoa
- 2 munaa
- 1 sipuli
- suolaa
- 2 ruokalus. voita

## Directions

1. Jauha tomaatit ja perunat lihamyllyssä.
2. Keitä hienonnettu sipuli voissa ja lisää perunaseokseen.
3. Lisää vatkattua munaa ja leipäjauhoa.
4. Muodosta mieltä myöten, kastele munassa ja leipäjauliossa paista voissa.
5. Tarjotaan tomaatti- tai höystetyn maitosoosin kanssa.

title: Tomaatti-pyree (Tomato Puree)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 quarts of stock
- 2 lbs. of tomatoes or 2 cupfuls of canned tomatoes
- 1/4 lb. of ham
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 slice of onion
- 1 sprig of parsley
- 1 stalk of celery
- 6 peppercorns

## Directions

1. Cut the ham into pieces, brown it in butter, add the onion into it and cook for a few minutes.
2. Add flour and tomatoes stirring thoroughly.
3. Pour the boiling stock gently on, add parsley, celery and pepper; let cook until the tomatoes are stewed.
4. Strain and season.
5. Serve with small meatballs.

title: Tomaatti-vanukas (Tomato Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pauna tomaattia
- 6 unssia voita
- 1/2 paunaa jauhoja
- 3 kuppia maitoa
- 1 kuppi leipäjauhoa
- 3 munaa
- 1 teelus. suolaa
- 1 teelus. sokuria
- vähän pippuria

## Directions

1. Tomaatit huuhdellaan ja jauhetaan lihamyllyssä.
2. Voista, jauhoista ja maidosta valmistetaan kasteke, tomaatit lisätään sekaan ja annetaan jäähtyä.
3. Mausteet ja munanruskuaiset seotetaan sekaan ja viimeksi kovaksi vaahdoksi vatkatut valkuaiset.
4. Kaadetaan voideltuun vormuun ja paistetaan vesiastiaan asetettuna 1-1 1/2 tuntia.

title: Tomaatti-vanukas (Tomato Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound tomatoes
- 1/4 cup butter
- 1 cup flour
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 1 cup milk
- 4 eggs
- salt, pepper and sugar
- onion juice (if desired)

## Directions

1. Mix the butter with the flour in a saucepan.
2. Add the tomatoes peeled and ground.
3. Boil quickly and let cool.
4. Mix bread crumbs soaked in rich milk.
5. Add to the egg yolks.
6. Season and add the egg whites beaten until firm.
7. Bake in a buttered mold in a pan of water for 1 or 1.5 hours.
8. If made of canned tomatoes, use 2 cups of tomatoes.

title: Tomaattihyydyke (Tomato Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can of tomato or 8-9 fresh tomatoes
- 1 small onion
- 1 bay leaf
- 1 teaspoon of salt
- Some lemon juice
- Sugar according to taste
- 2 tablespoons or 1/2 package of gelatine
- Lettuce leaves
- Mayonnaise (for serving)
- Egg white (optional for clarification)

## Directions

1. Cook the tomato with seasonings, add the gelatine and strain.
2. Put into a jelly mold or individual molds to set.
3. Serve on a bed of lettuce garnished with mayonnaise.
4. Or cut in pieces and serve with cold meat.
5. May be clarified with the white of an egg, if desired.

title: Tomaattikastike (Tomato Catsup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 quarts tomatoes
- a few white onions
- 2 bay leaves
- mace, 1 teaspoon
- celery salt, 1 teaspoon
- cloves, 1 teaspoon
- 2 tablespoons salt
- 4 cups sugar
- 2 cups vinegar

## Directions

1. Cut in pieces 4 quarts tomatoes and a few white onions
2. Cook together until tender
3. Force through a sieve, return to the fire
4. Add 2 bay leaves, mace, celery salt, cloves, 1 teaspoon each tied in a bag, 2 tablespoons salt, 4 cups sugar, or according to taste
5. Simmer for 4 or 5 hours stirring now and then
6. Remove the spices, add 2 cups vinegar, bring to boil
7. Cool, put into bottles, cork and keep in a cool place

title: Tomaattikastike (Tomato Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 slice onion
- 1 stalk celery
- 1 cup bouillon
- 1 cup canned tomatoes or 5-6 fresh tomatoes
- Parsley, salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Put butter into the saucepan, cook with onion, add flour, continue to cook for a few minutes.
2. Add tomato, bouillon and seasonings, cook slowly for half hour or until the tomatoes are tender.
3. Strain if preferred.

title: Tomaattikastike maidon kanssa (Tomato Sauce with Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 cup tomato
- 1 slice onion
- Celery and parsley
- 1/3 teaspoon soda
- Salt and pepper
- 2 1/3 cups milk or cream

## Directions

1. Cook onion and celery with butter in a saucepan, add flour, cook a few minutes longer.
2. Mix with tomato and seasonings, continue to cook until the tomato is tender.
3. Add soda and scalded milk gradually and stirring well.
4. Strain and season.

title: Tomaattikeitto (Tomato Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups tomato
- 1 quart meat stock or water
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 slice onion
- 1 stalk celery
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cook the onion with butter or bacon, add flour and tomato, stirring well.
2. Add gradually the meat stock and the celery cut in pieces.
3. Let boil until the tomato is tender.
4. Strain, add stock and season.
5. Serve with tiny meat balls or croutons.

title: Tomaattikeitto maidon kanssa (Tomato Soup with Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups tomatoes, canned or fresh
- 1 quart milk
- 1 slice of onion
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1/4 teaspoon soda
- Some sugar
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cook the onion in butter, add flour and tomato, stirring well, let boil, stirring often until the tomato is tender.
2. Remove from the fire, add 1/4 teaspoonful of soda and the scalded milk gradually and stirring well.
3. Strain, season with salt and pepper.

title: Tomaattimuhennus (Stewed Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh tomatoes
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- cornstarch
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. If using fresh tomatoes, they must first be peeled.
2. Keep them in boiling water for a few seconds so as to remove the skin easier.
3. Cut in pieces, boil until tender with butter, salt and pepper.
4. Thicken with cornstarch dissolved in cold water or with 1 cup of bread crumbs.
5. Or serve plain.

title: Tomaattimuhennus (Stewed Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh tomatoes
- boiling water
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- cornstarch or bread crumbs

## Directions

1. If using fresh tomatoes, they must first be peeled.
2. Keep them in boiling water for a few seconds so as to remove the skin.
3. Peel them.
4. Slice them.
5. Put in a pot and cook until tender with butter, salt and pepper.
6. Thicken with cornstarch mixed with water or add bread crumbs.
7. May be served without thickening.

title: Tomaattiomeletti (Tomato Omelet)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 3 tomatoes
- 1 cup milk
- Chopped parsley
- Salt and pepper
- Butter for the pan

## Directions

1. Lay the skinned sliced tomatoes in a buttered pan.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, add a little melted butter to it.
3. Beat the eggs, add milk, salt and parsley.
4. Pour over the tomatoes and bake until firm.

title: Tomaattipalleroita (Tomato Croquettes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups boiled potatoes
- 2 cups tomatoes
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 2 eggs
- 1 onion
- 2 tablespoons butter
- salt

## Directions

1. Force through a meat grinder the potatoes with the tomatoes
2. Fry in butter the chopped onion
3. Add to the ground potatoes
4. Mix with the eggs beaten until frothy and the bread crumbs
5. Form into any shape preferred
6. Dip in egg, roll in bread crumbs
7. Fry in butter
8. Serve with tomato or rich milk sauce

title: Tomaattisalaatti (Tomato Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- boiling water
- lettuce
- mayonnaise dressing
- parsley
- French dressing

## Directions

1. Peel the tomatoes. If kept in boiling water for a minute the skin is easy to remove.
2. Cut in halves or in quarters, arrange on lettuce leaves, coat with mayonnaise.
3. Or place the tomatoes whole on a bed of lettuce, coat with mayonnaise add a sprinkling of parsley.
4. Tomatoes cut in thin slices may be served with French dressing.

title: Tomato Catsup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck unskinned tomatoes
- few white onions
- 2 bay leaves
- mace
- pepper
- celery-salt
- cloves
- 2 teaspoonfuls of each spice
- sugar to taste
- salt to taste
- 2 cupfuls vinegar

## Directions

1. Cut 1 peck of unskinned tomatoes and few white onions in pieces
2. Cook together until tender
3. Force through a sieve
4. Place on fire and mix with two bay leaves, mace, pepper, celery-salt, cloves, 2 teaspoonfuls of each, boiled in a bag
5. Add sugar and salt to taste
6. Cook for 4-5 hours, stirring now and then
7. Remove the bag of spices
8. Pour 2 cupfuls of vinegar into the mixture and let boil up
9. When cooled, bottle, cork and keep in a cool place

title: Tomato Catsup (Tomaatti kastike)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 peck of unskinned tomatoes
- few white onions
- two bay leaves
- mace, 2 teaspoonfuls
- pepper, 2 teaspoonfuls
- celery-salt, 2 teaspoonfuls
- cloves, 2 teaspoonfuls
- sugar, to taste
- salt, to taste
- 2 cupfuls of vinegar

## Directions

1. Cut 1 peck of unskinned tomatoes and few white onions in pieces
2. Cook together until tender, force through a sieve
3. Place on fire and mix with two bay leaves, mace, pepper, celery-salt, cloves, 2 teaspoonfuls of each, boiled in a bag
4. Add sugar and salt to taste
5. Cook 4-5 hours, stirring occasionally
6. Remove the spices, add 2 cupfuls of vinegar and let boil up
7. Cool and put in bottles, seal and store

title: Tomato Omelet
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- 3 tomatoes
- 3/4 cupful of milk
- chopped parsley
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Butter the omelet dish, lay the skinned tomato-slices on the bottom of it.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Beat the eggs to a froth, add milk, melted butter, pepper, parsley and salt.
4. Pour the mixture over the tomatoes and bake until firm in a moderate oven.

title: Tomato Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- lettuce leaves
- mayonnaise sauce
- minced parsley

## Directions

1. Peel tomatoes, putting them first in boiling water for a few minutes.
2. Split them in halves or quarters and arrange on lettuce leaves and pour mayonnaise sauce on.
3. Or place tomatoes whole in a bowl on a bed of lettuce leaves, cover with mayonnaise sauce and sprinkle with minced parsley.

title: Tomato Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- boiling water
- lettuce leaves
- mayonnaise sauce
- parsley

## Directions

1. Peel tomatoes, putting them first in boiling water for a few minutes.
2. Split them in halves or quarters and arrange on lettuce leaves and pour mayonnaise sauce on.
3. Or place tomatoes whole in a bowl on a bed of lettuce leaves, cover with mayonnaise sauce and sprinkle with minced parsley.

title: Tongue with Sweetbreads
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- thin slices of tongue
- small pieces of sweetbread
- white of an egg
- buttered paper
- spinach
- truffle sauce

## Directions

1. Butter the small molds
2. Lay thin slices of tongue on the sides
3. Fill with small, fried pieces of sweetbread
4. Fasten the tongue and the sweetbread together with white of an egg
5. Bake in oven in a pan of water, covered with a buttered paper
6. Serve on a foundation of spinach with truffle sauce

title: Tongue à la Daube
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of ground tongue
- 1/2 cupful of whipped cream
- 3 tablespoonfuls of gelatine
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sherry
- Pepper and salt
- Liquid jelly
- Red pepper
- Whites of hard-boiled eggs
- Lettuce salad

## Directions

1. Mix tongue with salt, pepper, sherry, gelatine and cream.
2. Line a mold with liquid jelly.
3. Garnish with red pepper and whites of hard-boiled eggs cut in slices.
4. Put the tongue into the mold.
5. Let thicken.
6. Unmold; serve with lettuce salad.

title: Tumma hedelmäkakku (Dark Fruit Cake)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/4 cups butter
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 cup milk
- 3 cups flour
- 1/4 cup each raisins, currants, walnuts and almonds cut in pieces
- 1/4 cup yellow rind of lemon cut in pieces
- Cinnamon, cloves and nutmeg, 1/2 teaspoon each
- 1/4 teaspoon soda
- 1/4 teaspoon cream of tartar

## Directions

1. Rub butter and sugar until creamy
2. Add molasses and rub again
3. Add egg yolks beaten well
4. Add milk, spices, fruits rolled in flour, soda and cream of tartar mixed with flour
5. Fold in egg whites beaten

title: Tuoreita Hedelmiä (Fresh Fruit)
body:
## Ingredients

- pineapple
- oranges
- grapes
- grapefruit
- bananas
- sugar
- lemon juice
- walnuts

## Directions

1. Cut pineapple in cubes.
2. Split grapes and remove stones.
3. Mix all kinds of fresh fruit either plain or combined as desired.
4. Serve in glasses or in half orange peels.
5. Sweeten with sugar and flavor with lemon juice.
6. Serve ice cold.
7. Add chopped walnuts just before serving if desired.
8. Mix bananas just before serving, otherwise they will turn black.

title: Turska Filettejä (Fillets of Cod)
body:
## Ingredients

- middle part of fish
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- onion juice
- melted butter
- cracker dust
- eggs, whipped

## Directions

1. Cut the middle part of fish into pieces two inches long
2. Split the pieces
3. Remove the bones and skin with a sharp knife
4. Rub with salt, pepper, lemon and onion juice and let stand about 1/2 hour
5. Wipe and dip in melted butter, cracker dust, whipped egg and again in cracker dust
6. Fry using enough butter for frying
7. Serve with Tartar or tomato sauce

title: Turska fillettejä (Fillets of Cod)
body:
## Ingredients

- cod
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- onion juice
- butter
- bread crumbs
- egg
- tartare sauce or tomato sauce

## Directions

1. Cut the middle part of fish into pieces two inches thick and cut these pieces in half
2. Remove skin and bones with a sharp knife
3. Rub the fish pieces with salt, pepper, lemon juice and onion juice
4. Let stand for about half an hour
5. Wipe dry
6. Coat in melted butter, then bread crumbs, then beaten egg, then bread crumbs again
7. Fry in plenty of butter or fat
8. Serve with tartare or tomato sauce
9. For a simpler preparation: coat fish pieces in flour mixed with salt and pepper, and fry

title: Täyte I (Stuffing I for Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of bread crumbs
- ½ cupful of chicken stock
- 1 tablespoonful of chopped parsley
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- a dash of nutmeg and pepper
- chicken liver and heart

## Directions

1. Soak breadcrumbs in chicken stock
2. Add parsley, eggs finely chopped, liver and heart
3. Add a dash of nutmeg, pepper and salt
4. Mix well

title: Täyte II (Stuffing II for Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 onion
- 1 tablespoonful of chopped parsley
- ½ cupful of chicken stock
- 1 egg

## Directions

1. Fry onion in butter
2. Add soaked bread crumbs and parsley
3. Dilute with chicken stock
4. Add 1 egg
5. Mix well

title: Täyte luuttomalle kanalle I (Stuffing for Boned Chicken I)
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ lb. of pork
- ½ lb. of veal
- 6 tablespoonfuls of milk sauce
- 4 tablespoonfuls of cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Grind the meat several times
2. Mix with milk sauce, cream, pepper and salt
3. Stir until smooth

title: Täyte luuttomalle kanalle II (Stuffing for Boned Chicken II)
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ lb. of fowl and liver
- ½ lb. of veal
- a little pork or suet
- ¾ cupful of bread crumbs
- 1 egg
- ¾ cupful of cream or milk
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Soak bread crumbs in milk
2. Mix with beaten egg and seasonings
3. Grind fowl several times
4. Pound well
5. Combine little by little both mixtures
6. Work until smooth

title: Täyte luuttomalle kanalle No. 1 (Stuffing for Boned Chicken No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 pound pork
- 1/4 pound veal
- 6 tablespoons milk sauce
- 4 tablespoons cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Grind the meat several times.
2. Add the milk sauce, cream, pepper and salt to it, rubbing well.

title: Täyte luuttomalle kanalle No. 2 (Stuffing for Boned Chicken No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 pound chicken meat and liver
- 1/4 pound veal
- some pork or suet
- 1/4 cup bread crumbs
- 1 egg
- 1/4 cup milk or cream
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Soak the bread crumbs in milk.
2. Add the egg beaten and spices.
3. Grind the meat several times.
4. Pound well.
5. Add slowly the bread mixture to the meat, rubbing well.

title: Täytetty Eggplant (Stuffed Eggplant)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eggplant
- Salted water
- 3/4 cup bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1/2 tablespoon chopped onion
- Bouillon or water
- Salt
- Pepper
- 1 or 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Parboil the eggplant in salted water for 10 minutes.
2. Let cool thoroughly.
3. Cut a slice off the top or split lengthwise.
4. Scoop out the mellow and chop.
5. Add 3/4 cup bread crumbs, 2 tablespoons butter, and 1/2 tablespoon chopped onion.
6. Cook for a few minutes.
7. Dilute with some bouillon or water.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Add 1 or 2 eggs beaten.
10. Stuff the eggplant with the mixture.
11. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
12. Brown in oven.

title: Täytetty kaali sienien kanssa (Stuffed Cabbage with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 medium head of cabbage
- Salted water
- Mushroom ball paste

## Directions

1. Cook the cabbage in salted water until tender
2. Drain and cool
3. Prepare a paste of mushrooms as for mushroom balls
4. Place the cabbage on a towel wrung out of water
5. Open the leaves carefully
6. Fill the spaces between the leaves with the paste
7. Close the cabbage upon itself
8. Tie a towel around
9. Cook in the liquor of the cabbage for 1 hour
10. Serve with milk sauce or make a sauce of the liquor of the cabbage

title: Täytetty Kaali Sienien Kanssa (Stuffed Cabbage with Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- middle-sized cabbage
- salted water
- mushroom mixture
- towel

## Directions

1. Cook cabbage in salted water until tender
2. Lift out to cool
3. Prepare mushroom mixture same as for croquettes
4. Place cabbage on a towel wrung from water and carefully open the leaves
5. Fill the spaces between the leaves with mushroom mixture
6. Close the cabbage again and tie it up in the wet towel
7. Place in boiling cabbage broth and cook for 1 hour
8. Serve with milk sauce or a sauce made from the cabbage broth
9. May also be prepared like stuffed cabbage with meat and baked in oven

title: Täytetty kala (Stuffed Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 fish weighing about 3 pounds
- 1/2 cup bread crumbs
- 2 eggs
- salt
- pepper
- 1 onion
- fish stock or water
- 1 stalk of celery
- butter

## Directions

1. Scale and clean the fish. Split in the back, remove the bones and scrape the meat off carefully with a knife to prevent the skin from breaking. Force through a meat chopper.
2. Soak 1/2 cup of bread crumbs in water, add 2 eggs, salt, pepper, 1 onion grated or ground with the fish and ground fish. Rub the mixture well.
3. Stuff the fish and sew together.
4. Put some fish stock or water in the pan, lay 1 onion, 1 stalk of celery finely cut and few dots of butter around the fish in the pan. Add pepper and salt.
5. Cover and bake until tender. May be cooked on the stove also.
6. Lift carefully onto a platter, garnish and serve.

title: Täytetty Kana (Stuffed Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- Chicken
- Stuffing
- Bacon slices or butter
- Melted butter
- Water
- Kitchen Bouquet
- Cream

## Directions

1. Clean and stuff the chicken.
2. Tie with string, put in a pan, line with bacon, or dot with butter.
3. Place in a hot oven, baste often with melted butter and water.
4. Bake until done or about 1½ hours.
5. Make a gravy of the drippings by adding some Kitchen Bouquet and cream.

title: Täytetty kana (Stuffed Chicken)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken
- slices of pork or butter
- melted butter
- water

## Directions

1. Clean and stuff the chicken with one of the provided stuffings
2. Tie with cord and place in a buttered pan, lined with slices of pork or dotted with butter
3. Put in hot oven and baste often with melted butter and water
4. Roast for 1½ hours until done
5. Prepare sauce from the liquor of the chicken by adding a little cream

title: Täytetty Kurkku (Stuffed Cucumber)
body:
## Ingredients

- cucumbers
- chicken or any meat
- ham
- bread crumbs
- bouillon
- egg
- butter
- mushrooms

## Directions

1. Split lengthwise, remove the insides.
2. Fill with mixture of chicken or any other kind of meat and ham with bread crumbs, half of the amount of meat, diluted with bouillon and one egg.
3. Rub well.
4. Sprinkle the top with bread crumbs.
5. Arrange in a buttered pan with 1 cup of bouillon or water and lumps of butter.
6. Cover with buttered paper.
7. Bake for an hour or until done.
8. Arrange on a platter, make a sauce of the drippings.
9. Cucumbers may be stuffed with chicken mousse and baked covered with buttered paper for 40 minutes.
10. Serve on toast with Béchamel sauce.
11. Instead of meat, mushrooms may be used for stuffing.

title: Täytetty Kurkku (Stuffed Cucumber)
body:
## Ingredients

- cucumbers
- chopped chicken or any meat
- boiled ham in equal parts to meat
- bread crumbs, half as much as meat
- egg
- beef stock
- butter for pan
- 1 cupful beef stock

## Directions

1. Split cucumbers lengthwise in two
2. Scoop out the insides
3. Make filling of chopped chicken or meat and boiled ham in equal parts
4. Add bread crumbs, half the amount of meat, moistened with egg and beef stock
5. Fill cucumber halves with mixture
6. Sprinkle with bread crumbs
7. Place in buttered pan
8. Pour 1 cupful of beef stock over them
9. Bake covered with buttered paper for one hour or until done
10. Arrange on serving dish
11. Prepare sauce from the cooking liquid

title: Täytetty Kyssäkaali (Stuffed Squash)
body:
## Ingredients

- summer squash
- chopped onion
- butter or lard
- bread crumbs
- salt
- pepper
- eggs
- parsley
- milk or cream

## Directions

1. Cut the squash in nice pieces
2. Bake in oven until tender
3. Remove the inside with a spoon and mash
4. Fry a tablespoonful of chopped onion in butter or lard
5. Add 1/2 cup of soaked bread crumbs, salt, pepper and the squash
6. Cook for a few minutes
7. Add 2 beaten eggs and rub well
8. Fill the shells with this mixture
9. Sprinkle with bread crumbs
10. Brown in oven
11. Serve garnished with parsley
12. The mixture may be baked in a mold, some milk or cream added to it

title: Täytetty lampaanlapaa (Stuffed Shoulder of Mutton)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 1 tablespoon chopped parsley
- 1 teaspoon chopped onion
- Chopped mushrooms
- 1 egg
- Melted butter
- Bouillon to moisten the mixture
- Salt and pepper
- Shoulder of mutton

## Directions

1. Remove carefully the bone from the shoulder and the ribs, taking care not to break the skin side.
2. Rub with salt inside.
3. Stuff the space with the stuffing.
4. Sew up.
5. Roast in oven same as directed for roast mutton.

title: Täytetty simpukka (Stuffed Clams)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint clams
- 2 cups crackers
- clam liquor
- milk
- salt
- paprika
- lemon juice
- 3 egg yolks
- clam shells
- grated cheese
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Chop a pint of clams
2. Soak 2 cups of crackers in clam liquor and milk mixed in equal parts
3. Season the soaked crackers with salt, paprika and lemon juice
4. Add the chopped clams and 3 egg yolks to the mixture
5. Stuff the clam shells with this mixture
6. Sprinkle with grated cheese and bread crumbs
7. Dot with butter
8. Bake in a hot oven until the bread crumbs are brown
9. Alternatively, the mixture may be baked in a buttered serving mold and served in the same dish

title: Täytetty simpukka (Stuffed Clams)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of clams
- 2 cupfuls of crackers
- clam liquor
- milk
- salt
- paprika
- lemon juice
- eggs
- cheese
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Chop 1 pint of clams
2. Soak 2 cupfuls of crackers in clam liquor and milk mixed in equal parts
3. Season with salt, paprika and lemon juice
4. Add chopped clams and three egg yolks
5. Fill clam shells with this mixture
6. Sprinkle with cheese and bread crumbs and small pieces of butter
7. Bake in a hot oven until the bread crumbs brown

title: Täytetty Tomaatti (Stuffed Tomato)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- salt
- finely cut celery
- cooked and minced chicken or veal
- mayonnaise
- cucumber or celery

## Directions

1. Peel the tomatoes and scoop out the inside
2. Sprinkle the inside with salt
3. Let stand on ice until they have to be served
4. Fill the tomatoes with finely cut celery mixed with equal parts of chicken or veal and mayonnaise
5. Alternatively, the tomatoes may be filled with cucumber or celery mixed with mayonnaise

title: Täytetty vasikanlapa (Stuffed Shoulder of Veal)
body:
## Ingredients

- shoulder of veal
- suet
- egg
- bread crumbs
- cream or milk
- salt and pepper
- parsley

## Directions

1. Remove the bones and the blade carefully.
2. Scrape the meat from the blade and grind finely.
3. Mix with chopped suet, egg, bread crumbs, cream, salt, parsley and pepper.
4. Rub the space with salt, stuff and sew up.
5. Roast as directed for veal.

title: Täytettyjä juuriksia (Stuffed Vegetables)
body:
## Ingredients

- Onions
- Turnips
- Celery
- Boiled rice
- Bread crumbs
- Eggs
- Butter
- Rich milk
- Salt
- Pepper

## Directions

1. Cook the vegetables until nearly done, peel and scoop.
2. Grind the insides.
3. Mix with boiled rice and onion, add bread crumbs, eggs, butter and rich milk, according to taste.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Stuff the vegetables with the mixture.
6. Bake in a buttered pan.
7. Serve with sauce.

title: Täytettyjä Juuriksia (Stuffed Vegetables)
body:
## Ingredients

- onion, turnip, celery root, or rutabaga
- butter
- flour
- rich milk
- boiled rice
- cooked onion
- egg
- salt

## Directions

1. Half cook the vegetables
2. Peel and scoop out the insides
3. Grind the insides with boiled rice and cooked onion in a meat grinder
4. Prepare a stuffing of butter, flour and rich milk
5. Mix the ground vegetable insides with the butter mixture, add egg and salt
6. Stuff the scooped vegetables with this mixture
7. Put in a buttered pan and bake in oven
8. Serve with any kind of sauce

title: Täytettyjä kanan tai kalkkunan jalkoja (Stuffed Chicken or Turkey Legs)
body:
## Ingredients

- Chicken or turkey legs
- Chicken and veal
- Pork
- Chicken liver
- Salt
- Pepper
- Parsley
- Bread crumbs
- Milk
- Egg
- Butter
- Water or bouillon
- Celery
- Onion

## Directions

1. Remove the bones carefully leaving only 1 inch of bone in the legs.
2. Make stuffing of chicken and veal, some pork and chicken liver added to it and ground several times.
3. Season with salt, pepper and chopped parsley.
4. Soak some bread crumbs in milk, add 1 egg and some butter.
5. Combine the mixtures rubbing well.
6. Put a spoonful of mixture into each leg, truss.
7. Cook in water or in bouillon with salt, celery, onion and parsley for 1 hour.
8. Remove from the pan, keep under a weight until cool.
9. Fry dipped in egg and bread crumbs or serve cold.

title: Täytettyjä munia (Filled Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 hard boiled eggs
- boiled mushrooms
- milk sauce
- lemon juice or onion juice
- salt
- pepper
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter

## Directions

1. Cut 3 hard boiled eggs neatly in halves
2. Separate the yolks and mix with chopped boiled mushrooms, 1 tablespoon of milk sauce, a few drops of lemon or onion juice, salt and pepper
3. Fill the halves with the mixture
4. Place together so as to give the appearance of whole eggs
5. Dip in egg and roll in bread crumbs
6. Bake quickly in a hot oven in a buttered mold

title: Täytettyjä nauriita (Stuffed Turnips)
body:
## Ingredients
