- 12 middle-sized turnips
- 1/2 cupful almonds
- 1/2 cupful bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoonfuls butter salt
- 1 tablespoonful sugar
- 1 teaspoonful salt
- 2 eggs
- nutmeg and pepper

## Directions

1. Wash turnips and cook almost tender in water with pepper and salt.
2. Peel when cooled.
3. Hollow out the turnips and mash the removed flesh.
4. Mix the mashed flesh with sugar, almonds, bread crumbs, butter salt, eggs, nutmeg and pepper.

title: Täytettyjä naurista (Stuffed Turnips)
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 medium-sized turnips
- 1 cup almonds
- 3/4 cup bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 2 eggs
- Pinch of nutmeg and pepper
- Water and butter for basting

## Directions

1. Rinse the turnips, boil with salt and pepper until almost tender.
2. When cool, peel them.
3. Scoop, mash the interior.
4. Add sugar, blanched and grated almonds, butter, salt, pepper, nutmeg, bread crumbs and eggs beaten.
5. Stuff the hollowed turnips with this mixture.
6. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
7. Bake until light brown, basting often with water mixed with butter.

title: Täytettyjä norsia (Stuffed Smelts)
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 smelts
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- 1/2 tablespoon butter
- onion, chopped
- 1/2 cup fried mushrooms, chopped
- 1/2 cup fish mousse
- cream
- milk sauce
- flour
- egg
- bread crumbs
- Bearnaise sauce or lobster sauce

## Directions

1. Clean about 10 smelts and remove the backbones with a sharp thin knife.
2. Starting from the head, slip the knife along the backbone loosening the flesh from the bone on both sides.
3. Break off the bone carefully to prevent the tails from breaking.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, flavor with lemon juice.
5. Lay aside until the stuffing is made.
6. Cook 1/2 tablespoon of butter with some chopped onion.
7. Add 1/2 cup of chopped fried mushrooms and 1/2 cup of fish mousse.
8. If too thick, dilute with cream or thicken with milk sauce, if too thin.
9. Stuff the smelts.
10. Roll in flour, dip in egg and bread crumbs.
11. Bake until brown on both sides.
12. If they become too dry, cover and leave until done.
13. Serve with Bearnaise or lobster sauce.

title: Täytettyjä Oisteria (Deviled Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint oysters
- 4 tablespoons butter
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 3/4 cup milk
- Lemon juice
- Chopped parsley
- Salt, pepper, mustard
- 1 egg yolk
- Bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Drain and chop the oysters
2. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and milk
3. Add the beaten egg yolk to the sauce
4. Add oysters, lemon juice, parsley and spices to the sauce
5. Put the mixture into clean buttered oyster shells
6. Dredge with bread crumbs
7. Bake in a hot oven for 15 minutes
8. Serve on plates with 3 shells each, garnished with lemon and parsley

title: Täytettyjä Rapuja (Deviled Crabs)
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 crabs
- 1 cup cream or milk
- 1 1/4 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 tablespoon chopped parsley
- 1/2 teaspoon lemon juice
- 1 1/2 cups chopped mushrooms
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 2 hard boiled yolks of egg

## Directions

1. Prepare a sauce of butter, flour and milk or cream
2. Add the yolks chopped and the meat
3. Season with mustard according to taste
4. Stir well
5. Wash the shells, fill with the mixture, sprinkle with bread crumbs, dot with butter
6. Brown in oven
7. Serve on a platter

title: Täytettyjä sieniä (Stuffed Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- large mushrooms of equal size
- cooked chicken
- mushrooms
- cream
- white chaufroid sauce
- bread crumbs
- egg
- bacon

## Directions

1. Peel large mushrooms of equal size, remove the stems.
2. Make a mousse of chopped chicken and chopped mushrooms diluted with cream.
3. Lay the mousse between the mushrooms, two and two.
4. Baste with white chaufroid sauce; let cool.
5. Turn in bread crumbs, dip in egg and turn in bread crumbs again.
6. Fry in butter or bake in oven having a thin slice of bacon on top of each.
7. Bake covered for 15 minutes.

title: Täytettyjä sieniä (Stuffed Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- large mushrooms of equal size
- cooked chicken
- mushrooms
- cream
- White Chaufroid sauce
- bread crumbs
- eggs
- bacon

## Directions

1. Peel large mushrooms of equal size and remove stems
2. Prepare a forcemeat of cooked chicken and finely chopped mushrooms, softened slightly with cream
3. Place this mixture between the mushroom caps
4. Coat the mushrooms with White Chaufroid sauce
5. Let cool, then roll in bread crumbs, dip in egg, and roll again in bread crumbs
6. Fry in butter, or arrange in a baking pan with a small piece of smoked bacon on each, and bake covered for 15 minutes

title: Täytettyjä Tomaatteja (Stuffed Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- butter
- onion
- chopped cooked chicken or meat, 1/2 cupful
- bread crumbs, 1/2 cupful
- tomato insides from scooped tomatoes
- minced parsley, 1 teaspoonful
- egg
- salt

## Directions

1. Wipe tomatoes and remove a slice from top
2. Do not peel
3. Remove soft inside portion
4. Sprinkle salt inside
5. Melt 1 tablespoonful butter with 1 tablespoonful onion
6. Add 1/2 cupful chopped cooked chicken or meat
7. Add 1/2 cupful bread crumbs
8. Add tomato insides removed from tomatoes
9. Add 1 teaspoonful minced parsley
10. Bring mixture to boil
11. Add one egg
12. Fill tomatoes with mixture
13. Place in buttered pan
14. Sprinkle bread crumbs on top
15. Bake in oven about 20 minutes
16. Serve with brown sauce

title: Täytettyjä tomaatteja No. 1 (Stuffed Tomatoes No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- salt
- butter
- chopped onion
- chopped boiled chicken or other meat
- bread crumbs
- parsley
- pepper
- egg

## Directions

1. Wipe and cut a slice off top of tomatoes; leave skins on.
2. Scoop out the insides, sprinkle the cavities with salt.
3. Cook 1 tablespoon of butter with 1 tablespoon of chopped onion.
4. Add 1 cup chopped boiled chicken or any other kind of meat, 1/2 cup bread crumbs, the insides of tomatoes, 1 teaspoon chopped parsley, salt and pepper.
5. Boil quickly, add 1 egg.
6. Place into a buttered pan, sprinkle with bread crumbs.
7. Bake about 20 minutes.
8. Serve with brown sauce.

title: Täytettyjä tomaatteja No. 2 (Stuffed Tomatoes No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 tomatoes
- 2 ounces bread
- 1/2 cup rich milk
- 2 egg yolks
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- salt
- pepper
- chopped onion
- chopped parsley
- sugar
- 2 egg whites

## Directions

1. Cut a slice off the tops of six tomatoes, scoop out the insides.
2. Soak 2 ozs. of bread in 1/2 cup rich milk.
3. Add tomato, 2 yolks of egg, 2 tablespoons melted butter, salt, pepper, chopped onion, chopped parsley and some sugar.
4. Last of all add 2 whites of egg beaten stiff.
5. Sprinkle the cavities with salt, stuff.
6. Bake covered in a buttered mold for 30 or 40 minutes.

title: Täytettyjä tomaatteja No. 3 (Stuffed Tomatoes No. 3)
body:
## Ingredients

- macaroni
- salted water
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1/2 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon grated cheese
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 whole egg
- salt
- pepper
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Boil macaroni in salted water; drain, chop.
2. Make a sauce of 2 tablespoons butter, 1 tablespoon flour and 1/2 cup milk.
3. Add 2 cups of macaroni, 1 tablespoon grated cheese, 2 yolks of egg and 1 whole egg, salt and pepper.
4. Stuff the tomatoes, sprinkle with bread crumbs.
5. Bake for 3/4 hour.
6. Serve with tomato, milk or brown sauce.

title: Täytettyjä tomaattia (Stuffed Tomatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- chicken mousse
- parsley
- truffles

## Directions

1. Skin the tomatoes and scoop the inside.
2. Stuff with chicken mousse.
3. Garnish the top with chopped parsley and truffles.

title: Täytettyä kaalinpäätä (Stuffed Head of Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- Head of cabbage
- Ground meat
- Butter
- Salt
- Pepper
- Bouillon
- Mushrooms
- Rice
- Tomato
- Chestnuts or chicken

## Directions

1. Cook a head of cabbage whole for 1/2 an hour and drain
2. When cool, open the outer leaves and remove the inner leaves, chop finely
3. Fry in butter until brown
4. Mix the fried cabbage with meat farce
5. Stuff the cabbage with this mixture and close the cabbage upon itself
6. Tie with cord crosswise
7. Bake in a buttered pan
8. When brown on top, sprinkle with salt and pepper
9. Pour some boiling bouillon into the pan for basting the cabbage with
10. Have enough liquid in the pan
11. Cover and continue baking until tender
12. Alternately, the head of cabbage may be stuffed with rice mixed with mushrooms: have chopped mushrooms, add a few spoonfuls of boiled rice, some tomato, melted butter and salt, or use chestnuts or cold chicken instead of mushrooms

title: Täytettyä Kalaa (Stuffed Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- Fish
- Stuffing

## Directions

1. Prepare the fish the same as for baked fish.
2. Remove the backbone carefully.
3. Stuff with stuffing.
4. Sew together.
5. Bake.

title: Täytettyä selleriä (Stuffed Celery)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 celery roots
- 1/4 pound beef
- 1/4 pound veal
- 2 ounces suet or lard
- 1 tablespoon bread crumbs
- 1 cup milk
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon chopped onion
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Scrape the celery and rinse well
2. Parboil in salted water
3. Remove the top of the roots and scoop the insides
4. Stuff the celery with a mixture made of the described ingredients as usually
5. Replace the tops, place in a buttered pan
6. Bake slowly, basting often with bouillon
7. When the celery is tender and the stuffing done, remove onto a platter
8. Make a gravy of the drippings

title: Täytettyä sipulia (Stuffed Onions)
body:
## Ingredients

- large red onions
- beef
- veal
- melted lard or butter
- bread crumbs
- milk
- egg
- salt
- pepper
- onion juice
- chopped onion
- mushrooms (alternative)
- cream (alternative)
- parsley (alternative)
- tomato (alternative)
- boiled rice (alternative)

## Directions

1. Cook large red onions for 15 minutes in salted water
2. Scoop carefully
3. Make a stuffing of 1/4 pound beef and 1/4 pound veal ground, 2 tablespoons melted lard or butter, 1 tablespoon bread crumbs, 1/4 cup milk, 1 egg, salt, pepper, some onion juice and chopped onion
4. Prepare the stuffing as directed
5. Spread the onions with melted butter and sprinkle with bread crumbs
6. Bake in oven with plenty of butter and some water in the pan
7. Baste often so as not to burn the onions
8. Serve as an entree with mushroom or tomato sauce
9. Alternative stuffing: Make of 1/2 pound chopped mushrooms, 4 tablespoons bread crumbs soaked in 1/2 cup of cream, 1 egg and the insides of the scooped onions chopped and fried
10. Simple stuffing: Fry the insides of the onions in butter with bread crumbs, add chopped parsley, 2 tablespoons tomato, salt and pepper. Boiled rice plain may be used instead of bread crumbs

title: Täytettyä Viheriää Pippuria (Stuffed Green Pepper)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 green peppers
- 2 tablespoons rice
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 onion
- 1 tablespoon chopped mushrooms
- 1 tablespoon chopped green pepper
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons tomato
- Pepper
- Bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Cut a piece off the top of the pepper.
2. Scoop carefully to remove seeds.
3. Place in cold water for 1/2 hour, or boil in hot fat for a few minutes.
4. Cook the rice until tender.
5. Mix in the butter, onion, mushrooms, chopped green pepper, salt, tomato, and pepper.
6. Fill the peppers with the mixture.
7. Sprinkle bread crumbs on top.
8. Bake in a buttered pan, basting occasionally or cover with a lid.

title: Täytetyt nauriit (Stuffed Turnips)
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 middle-sized turnips
- 1/2 cupful of almonds
- 1/2 cupful of bread crumbs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 2 eggs
- a pinch of nutmeg and pepper

## Directions

1. Wash turnips and cook in water with salt and pepper until nearly tender.
2. When cool, peel them.
3. Scoop the turnips and mash the interior.
4. Add grated almonds, bread crumbs, butter, salt and pepper, nutmeg and egg.
5. Stuff the turnips with this mixture.
6. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
7. Place in a buttered baking pan and bake in oven to a light brown.
8. Baste often with melted butter.

title: Täytetyt norsiat (Stuffed Smelts)
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 smelts
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- 1/2 tablespoonful of butter
- chopped parsley
- 1/2 cupful of chopped fried mushrooms
- 1/2 cupful of fish mousse
- cream
- thick milk sauce
- flour
- egg
- breadcrumbs
- Bearnaise or lobster sauce

## Directions

1. Clean 10 smelts taking out the backbones with a sharp knife.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and lemon juice and put aside until you have the stuffing ready.
3. Cook 1/2 tablespoonful of butter with a little chopped parsley.
4. Add 1/2 cupful of chopped fried mushrooms and 1/2 cupful of fish mousse.
5. If the mixture is too thick, add a little cream; if too thin, thicken with a little thick milk sauce.
6. Fill the smelts with this mixture.
7. Roll in flour, dip in egg and breadcrumbs.
8. Fry on both sides until brown in the oven.
9. If they begin to dry out, cover and let braise until done.
10. Serve with Bearnaise or lobster sauce.

title: Täytetyt Omenat (Stuffed Apples)
body:
## Ingredients

- apples
- lemon juice
- celery
- chopped walnuts
- mayonnaise
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Scoop the apples and peel them
2. Moisten with lemon juice to prevent browning
3. Mix pieces of the scooped apple with celery and some chopped walnuts
4. Mix this mixture with mayonnaise
5. Fill the apples with the mixture
6. Place whipped cream on top

title: Täytetyt tötteröt (Cream Cones)
body:
## Ingredients

- batter for roll tart
- whipped cream
- sugar
- jam

## Directions

1. Prepare a batter same as for roll tart.
2. Spread on a buttered baking sheet shaping into round cakes.
3. Roll immediately into cones.
4. Shortly before serving, fill the cones with whipped cream mixed with sugar and jam.

title: Täytetyt Tötteröt (Filled Cones)
body:
## Ingredients

- batter as for roll tart
- whipped cream
- sugar
- jam

## Directions

1. Prepare a batter as for roll tart.
2. Spread on a buttered baking sheet shaping it into round cakes.
3. Bake.
4. Roll immediately into cones.
5. Just before serving fill the cones with whipped cream mixed with sugar and jam.

title: Unkarilainen Muhennus (Hungarian Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2½ pounds beef removed from bone
- 1 teaspoon salt
- ½ teaspoon pepper
- 1 onion
- 4 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 3 tablespoons tomato
- 1 teaspoon mustard
- 4 cups bouillon or water
- cream (optional)

## Directions

1. Cut the meat in cubes.
2. Fry in butter until brown.
3. Add chopped onion, seasonings and flour, and continue frying for a little while.
4. Pour the bouillon over the meat and let simmer with lid on until the meat is tender.
5. Add the strained tomato and a little cream.
6. Let it come to a boil and serve.

title: Unkarilainen Muhennus (Hungarian Veal Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound lean beef
- 1 pound veal
- lard
- onion
- salt
- pepper
- 1 cup strained tomato
- small potatoes

## Directions

1. Cut beef and veal into 1 inch thick pieces
2. Fry in lard with onion, season with salt and pepper
3. When brown, add a cupful of strained tomato
4. Cook slowly covered
5. Add small potatoes to the stew
6. Serve when done

title: Unkarilainen pihvi (Hungarian Stew)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2½ lbs. of beef removed from bone
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- ¼ teaspoonful of pepper
- 1 onion
- 4 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 2 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 3 tablespoonfuls of tomato
- 1 teaspoonful of mustard
- 4 cupfuls of bouillon or water

## Directions

1. Cut the meat into cubes and fry in butter until brown
2. Add chopped onion, seasonings and flour
3. Continue frying for a little while
4. Pour the stock over
5. Let simmer covered until the meat is tender
6. Mix with strained tomato and a little cream
7. Bring to the boiling point
8. Serve

title: Uuni-kaali (Baked Cabbage Head)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 (2 1/2 lb.) cabbage head
- 4-5 tablespoonfuls of brown sugar
- 4-5 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- a little white pepper and nutmeg
- water

## Directions

1. Remove the outermost leaves from the cabbage head
2. Hollow it from the center
3. Place sugar, nutmeg and pepper in the hollow
4. Brown the butter in a pan
5. Place the cabbage head in it
6. Cover and let it gradually cook through
7. Pour water mixed with salt over the cabbage
8. Let cook about two hours, basting often to prevent burning on top

title: Uuni-Kaali (Baked Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 (2½ lb.) cabbage head
- 4–5 tablespoonfuls of brown sugar
- 4–5 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of salt
- pinch of white pepper and nutmeg

## Directions

1. Remove old leaves from the cabbage head and scoop it a little from the stem end
2. Put sugar, nutmeg and pepper into the hole
3. Brown butter in a baking dish
4. Put the cabbage head into it and cover
5. Let cook slowly
6. Pour salted water on top
7. Let cook for 2 hours, basting often so as not to burn the surface

title: Uunikaali (Baked Cabbage)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 head of cabbage
- 4 or 5 tablespoons brown sugar
- Salt
- Nutmeg
- Pepper
- Butter
- Water

## Directions

1. Remove the outer leaves, scoop out the stem end.
2. Fill the cavity with brown sugar, salt, nutmeg and pepper.
3. Brown some butter in a pan, place the head of cabbage in, cover.
4. Fry slowly until tender.
5. Baste with salted water when becoming dry and turn now and then.
6. May be baked in oven covered.

title: Uunimunia (Shirred Eggs)
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- eggs
- salt
- pepper
- cream
- grated cheese

## Directions

1. Butter the small dishes.
2. Break the eggs carefully, one into each dish.
3. Sprinkle with salt and bake in oven until the eggs are firm.
4. Alternatively, put a little cream on the bottom of the cups, break the eggs in the cream, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and when half done, sprinkle with grated cheese and bake until firm.

title: Uunisipulia (Baked Onions)
body:
## Ingredients

- Spanish onions
- salt
- water
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Boil Spanish onions in salt water for 15 minutes or until half done
2. Lay in a pan, split the tops
3. Stick a dot of butter in the split; sprinkle with salt
4. Pour some water into the pan and add a dot of butter or lard
5. Bake until tender
6. Ordinary larger onions of equal size may be prepared the same way

title: Uunissa paistettu ankerias (Baked Eel)
body:
## Ingredients

- Eel
- Salt
- Pepper
- Lemon juice
- Egg
- Bread crumbs
- Tartar sauce

## Directions

1. Clean the fish, split in back, remove the backbone.
2. Rub with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
3. Dip in egg, roll in bread crumbs, bake for ½ hour.
4. Serve with any kind of tartar sauce.

title: Uunissa paistettu ankerias (Baked Eel)
body:
## Ingredients

- eels
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- egg
- crackerdust

## Directions

1. Clean the eels, split down the back.
2. Remove the backbone.
3. Rub with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
4. Dip in egg and crackerdust, and bake about half an hour.
5. Serve with sour sauce.

title: Uunissa Paistettu Ankerias (Eel Baked in Oven)
body:
## Ingredients

- eel
- salt
- pepper
- lemon juice
- egg
- crackerdust

## Directions

1. Clean the eel.
2. Split along the back and remove the backbone.
3. Rub with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
4. Roll in egg and crackerdust.
5. Bake in oven for about half an hour.
6. Serve with a sour sauce.

title: Uunissa paistettu Halibut (Baked Halibut)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 or 3 pound halibut
- salt
- pepper
- bacon slices
- onion slices
- butter
- flour
- bread crumbs
- lemon juice
- water or cream

## Directions

1. Take a 2 or 3 pound halibut, clean and wipe
2. Rub with salt and pepper
3. Lay in a pan lined with slices of bacon and place a few slices of onion around the fish
4. Cover with batter made of equal parts of butter and flour
5. Sprinkle with bread crumbs, and line with slices of bacon or dot with butter
6. Bake basting often
7. If the surface is becoming too brown, cover with paper
8. Make a sauce of drippings by adding some flour, lemon juice, water or cream

title: Uunissa paistettu Halibut (Baked Halibut)
body:
## Ingredients

- chicken halibut, 2 or 3 pounds
- salt
- pepper
- bacon or salt pork slices
- onion, sliced
- butter
- flour
- bread crumbs
- lemon juice
- water or cream

## Directions

1. Take a 2 or 3 pound chicken halibut.
2. Clean, wipe and rub with salt and pepper.
3. Place in a pan on bacon or salt pork slices with onion slices on the edges.
4. Cover the fish with a paste made from equal parts butter and flour mixed well.
5. Sprinkle bread crumbs on top.
6. Place a few slices of salt pork or lumps of butter on top.
7. Bake in the oven frequently basting.
8. If it becomes too brown on top, cover with buttered paper.
9. Make a sauce from the drippings by adding a little flour, lemon juice, water or cream.

title: Uunissa paistettu Halibut (Baked Halibut)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2-3 pounds Chicken Halibut
- salt
- pepper
- pork slices
- onion slices
- butter
- flour
- crackerdust
- lemon juice
- cream

## Directions

1. Take a 2-3 pound Chicken Halibut, wipe and rub with salt and pepper
2. Place in a pan lined with pork slices
3. Put onion slices around the edges
4. Cover the fish with batter made from equal parts butter and flour mixed well
5. Sprinkle crackerdust on top
6. Place slices of smoked pork or dots of butter on top
7. Bake in oven, basting often
8. If browning too quickly, cover with buttered paper
9. Make sauce from the drippings by adding lemon juice and cream

title: Uunissa Paistettu Hummeri (Baked Lobster)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lobster
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Prepare for baking as directed.
2. Put in a frying pan.
3. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, dot with butter, and add a sprinkling of bread crumbs.
4. Bake in a hot oven for about 15 minutes, basting with drippings in pan.

title: Uunissa Paistettu Kala (Baked Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- Fish
- Salt
- Pepper
- Egg
- Cracker crumbs or flour
- Bacon or butter
- Chopped onion
- Vegetables
- Water or cream
- Flour
- Parsley
- Lemon

## Directions

1. Scale the fish, clean and wipe.
2. Rub with salt and pepper.
3. Spread with egg and dip in cracker crumbs or flour.
4. Lay bacon or butter in a pan, place the fish upright on it.
5. Place chopped onion and vegetables around.
6. Bake basting often.
7. When done, place on a platter.
8. Make a gravy of the drippings in the pan by adding a little water or cream and flour.
9. Pour the gravy over the fish.
10. Garnish with parsley and lemon.

title: Uunissa paistettu kala (Baked Fish)
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- salt
- pepper
- eggs
- cracker dust
- butter or salt pork
- chopped onion
- vegetables
- cream

## Directions

1. Scale the fish, clean and wipe dry
2. Rub with salt and pepper
3. Spread with eggs on both sides
4. Roll in cracker dust
5. Put butter in pan or lay slices of salt pork in it
6. Place the fish upright on it
7. Put chopped onion and vegetables around the fish
8. Bake in oven basting often
9. When done place the fish on serving-dish
10. Add a little cream into the pan
11. Pour the sauce on the fish

title: Uunissa Paistettu Kyssäkaali (Baked Summer Squash)
body:
## Ingredients

- summer squash
- butter
- lemon juice or syrup
- parsley

## Directions

1. Cut the squash in nice pieces
2. Remove the seeds
3. Bake in the lower part of oven for an hour or until tender
4. Baste with melted butter flavored with lemon juice or syrup, according to taste
5. Serve in shells garnished with parsley

title: Uunissa paistettu lahna tomaatin kera (Baked Bream with Tomato)
body:
## Ingredients

- bream
- salted water
- vinegar
- tomato sauce
- butter

## Directions

1. Boil bream in salted water with a little vinegar
2. Skin the fish
3. Place in a buttered pan
4. Pour 3/4 cupful of tomato sauce over the top
5. Bake for 20 minutes in a hot oven

title: Uunissa paistettu lahna tomaatin kera (Baked Trout with Tomato)
body:
## Ingredients

- trout
- salt
- vinegar
- butter
- tomato sauce

## Directions

1. Parboil the fish with some salt and vinegar
2. Wipe and put in a buttered pan
3. Pour 3/4 cup of tomato sauce over
4. Bake in hot oven for 20 minutes basting often
5. Remove to a platter and strain tomato sauce over

title: Uunissa paistettu mahasylkirauhanen (Baked Sweetbreads)
body:
## Ingredients

- Slices of bacon
- Carrots
- Celery
- Turnip
- Boiled sweetbreads
- Bouillon
- Brown sauce or mushroom sauce

## Directions

1. Place slices of bacon, carrots, celery and turnip in a pan.
2. Cover the bacon with big pieces of boiled sweetbreads.
3. Add some bouillon so that the bottom of the pan is covered.
4. Bake for 20 minutes basting often.
5. Serve with brown or mushroom sauce.

title: Uunissa paistettu mahasylkirauhanen (Baked Sweetbreads)
body:
## Ingredients

- pork
- carrots
- celery
- turnip
- boiled sweetbreads
- meat stock
- brown sauce or mushroom sauce

## Directions

1. Line a pan with pork, carrots, celery and turnip
2. Place boiled sweetbreads on the pork
3. Pour meat stock over them so as to cover the bottom of the pan
4. Bake for 20 minutes, basting often
5. Serve with brown or mushroom sauce

title: Uunissa paistettu maksa-muusi (Liver Mousse)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds beef liver
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 1 onion
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 1 cup water or cream
- 1 or 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Soak the liver in cold water.
2. The liver may be boiled in salted water, or ground fresh with an onion.
3. Soak the bread crumbs in water or fry in lard.
4. Add egg and combine with liver stirring briskly.
5. Form into patties and fry in butter, or bake in a mold lined with bacon slices on top.
6. Bake until nice brown or about 1 to 1 1/2 hours.
7. Cover with buttered paper to keep it juicy.
8. If the onion is fried in butter before added to the liver, it will taste better.

title: Uunissa paistettu munahyydyke (Baked Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups milk
- 3 eggs
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- Salt and nutmeg

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs
2. Add sugar, salt and nutmeg
3. Pour gradually the scalded milk into the eggs
4. Bake in a buttered mold in a pan of water until firm

title: Uunissa paistettu munahyydyke (Baked Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cupful of sugar
- a pinch of salt
- a pinch of nutmeg

## Directions

1. Beat eggs, add sugar, salt and nutmeg
2. Pour the scalded milk gradually into it
3. Put in a buttered mold and steam in oven until firm

title: Uunissa Paistettu Munahyydyke (Baked Custard)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of milk
- 3 eggs
- 1/4 cupful of sugar
- a little salt and nutmeg

## Directions

1. Beat eggs, add sugar, salt and nutmeg, pour gradually heated milk into mixture.
2. Put into a buttered mold and place in oven in a water bath until it sets.

title: Uunissa Paistettu Oisteri (Baked Oysters)
body:
## Ingredients

- oysters in shells
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Clean and rinse the oysters in shells changing the water several times
2. Keep in oven until the shells open
3. Remove carefully the upper shells
4. Put 3 oysters in each deep half of the shells
5. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
6. Place a little dot of butter on each
7. Dredge with bread crumbs
8. Bake in oven until the bread crumbs are brown

title: Uunissa paistettu talvikyssäkaali (Baked Winter Squash)
body:
## Ingredients

- winter squash
- butter
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Cut squash in two
2. Remove the mellow insides
3. Bake the shells in oven, covered, for two hours
4. Scrape the insides from the shells
5. Chop
6. Season with salt, pepper and butter

title: Uunissa paistettu vasikan maksa (Baked Calf's Liver)
body:
## Ingredients

- Calf's liver
- Flour
- Salt
- Onion slices
- Bacon slices or lard
- Carrots, celery, potatoes, and onions (optional)

## Directions

1. Rinse the liver.
2. Dip in flour mixed with salt.
3. Place in a buttered pan.
4. Line with slices of onion and bacon around, or dot with lard.
5. Vegetables such as carrots, celery, potatoes and onions cut in pieces may be baked with the liver.
6. Bake for 1 hour.
7. When brown, cover to keep it juicy.
8. Serve plain or with fried bacon.
9. Make a gravy of the drippings.

title: Uunissa Paistettua Kinkkua (Roast Ham)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh ham
- water
- salt
- pepper
- ginger
- mustard powder
- bread crumbs
- vegetables
- rice
- baked beans
- apple sauce or boiled prunes

## Directions

1. Place ham skin side down in a dripping-pan
2. Pour 1 cupful of water into the pan and put in a hot oven
3. When the surface is lightly browned sprinkle with salt and baste with the drippings
4. Turn over and remove the skin when it begins to loosen from the meat
5. Sprinkle the ham with salt, pepper, ginger, a little mustard powder and bread crumbs
6. Return to the oven and bake until done, basting often
7. Lift on a serving platter, skim the fat from the sauce, season with mustard, pepper and tomato
8. Send the ham to the table with vegetables, rice, baked beans, apple sauce or boiled prunes

title: Uunissa paistettua kinkkua (Roast Pork)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh pork
- water
- salt
- pepper
- ginger
- mustard powder
- bread crumbs
- tomato

## Directions

1. Place the pork skin side down in a dripping pan
2. Pour a cupful of water over and put in a hot oven
3. When the surface is brown, sprinkle with salt and baste with drippings
4. Turn over and remove the skin when it begins to loosen
5. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, ginger, some mustard and bread crumbs
6. Return to the oven and roast until done, basting often
7. Place on a platter, remove the fat from the drippings
8. Thicken with flour and season with mustard, pepper and tomato
9. Serve with vegetables, brown beans, apple sauce or stewed prunes

title: Uunissa paistettua makaroonia (Baked Macaroni)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 pound macaroni
- 1 quart milk
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1/2 tablespoon sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 teaspoon salt
- salted water

## Directions

1. Break the macaroni into 2 inch long pieces
2. Parboil in salted water
3. Drain
4. Put on the fire in boiling milk
5. Cook until tender or 20 minutes
6. Add the butter, salt and the sugar
7. Let cool some
8. Beat the egg and mix with the macaroni
9. Bake in a buttered mold until light brown for 20 to 30 minutes
10. Sprinkle with cheese, if preferred

title: Uunissa paistettua makaroonia juuston kanssa (Baked Macaroni with Cheese)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled macaroni
- butter
- grated cheese
- milk sauce
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Put boiled macaroni into a buttered mold
2. Sprinkle with grated cheese
3. Cover with milk sauce
4. Add a sprinkling of bread crumbs
5. Dot with butter
6. If more cheese is preferred, put two layers of macaroni into the mold
7. Sprinkle both layers with cheese and cover with milk sauce

title: Uunissa Paistettua Paistia (Oven-Roasted Steak)
body:
## Ingredients

- sirloin steak or other steak
- 1 carrot
- 1 onion
- 1 tomato or tomato catsup
- salt
- pepper
- parsley
- water
- butter or lard (optional)
- mushrooms (optional)

## Directions

1. Broil or fry the steak for a few minutes.
2. Place in a casserole with the carrot and onion cut in pieces, tomato or catsup, salt, pepper and parsley.
3. Add a little water to the drippings in the frying pan and pour over the meat.
4. Bake until the vegetables are tender.
5. May be made without vegetables and dotted with butter. If mushrooms are added, they will give fine flavor to the meat.

title: Uunissa paistettua paistia (Sailor's Steak)
body:
## Ingredients

- Sirloin steak or other beef steak
- 1 carrot, chopped
- 1 onion, chopped
- 1 tomato or small amount of catsup
- Salt
- Pepper
- Parsley
- Water

## Directions

1. Broil the steak for a few minutes or brown in a pan.
2. Place in a covered pan or casserole with the chopped carrot, onion, tomato or catsup, salt, pepper and parsley.
3. Pour a little water into the pan in which the meat was browned and pour over the meat.
4. Let cook until the vegetables are tender.
5. Alternatively, cook without vegetables by placing small pieces of butter on top instead.

title: Uunissa paistettua silliä (Baked Herring)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 salted or fresh herrings
- 1 tablespoon finely chopped onion, fresh or pickled
- 2 bay leaves
- 4 or 5 cloves
- juice of 1 lemon
- 1/4 cup tomato
- salt
- sugar

## Directions

1. Soak over night 4 salted or fresh herrings
2. Lay into a buttered baking dish with the cover on
3. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon finely chopped onion fresh or pickled, 2 bay leaves, 4 or 5 cloves, the juice of 1 lemon, 1/4 cup tomato, some salt and sugar
4. Bake covered until done

title: Uunissa paistettua silliä omenoiden kanssa (Baked Herring with Apples)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 or 5 salted herrings
- 1 tablespoon chopped onion
- 2 bay leaves
- 4 or 5 cloves
- juice of 1 lemon or 1 cup vinegar
- 1/2 cup tomato
- pepper
- salt if using fresh herrings
- sugar
- sour apples, sliced thin
- butter

## Directions

1. Soak over night 4 or 5 salted herrings
2. Remove the skin and the bones
3. Lay the herrings in a buttered baking dish with the cover on
4. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon chopped onion, 2 bay leaves, 4 or 5 cloves, the juice of 1 lemon or 1 cup vinegar, 1/2 cup tomato, some pepper, and if the herrings are fresh, some salt and some sugar
5. Cover with a layer of sliced sour apples
6. Dot with butter if preferred
7. Bake for 3/4 hour
8. Serve hot or cold

title: Uunissa paistettua spaghettia (Baked Spaghetti)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled spaghetti
- butter
- onion
- green pepper
- strained tomato
- Parmesan cheese

## Directions

1. Fill a buttered mold with boiled spaghetti
2. Place chopped onion and green pepper fried or raw between the layers of spaghetti
3. Cover with strained tomato
4. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese
5. Bake in the oven

title: Uunissa Paistettua Vasikan Mureketta (Baked Veal Farcie)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lbs. of veal
- 3/4 lb. of suet or butter
- 2 ozs. of bread crumbs
- 1 cupful of milk
- 2 eggs
- salt and pepper
- macaroni

## Directions

1. Grind veal.
2. Soak bread crumbs in milk, add egg, and seasonings, and mix with the meat.
3. Rub well.
4. Cook macaroni in salted water, drain off the water, add a lump of butter and grated cheese.
5. Line a buttered mold with macaroni.
6. Fill with farcie, and bake in oven one hour.

title: Uunissa paistettua vasikan mureketta (Veal Farce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 pounds veal
- 1/4 pound suet or butter
- 2 ounces bread crumbs
- 1 cup milk
- 2 eggs
- salt and pepper
- macaroni
- grated cheese

## Directions

1. Grind the veal.
2. Soak the bread crumbs in the milk, add egg and seasonings.
3. Mix with the veal.
4. Rub well.
5. Boil the macaroni in salted water, drain; add some butter and grated cheese.
6. Line the bottom and edges of a buttered mold with the macaroni.
7. Fill with meat.
8. Bake for 1 hour.

title: Uunissa paistettuja banaaneja (Baked Bananas)
body:
## Ingredients

- Bananas
- Sugar
- Lemon juice
- Butter

## Directions

1. Peel the bananas, lay into a pan, add sugar and lemon juice.
2. Dot with butter.
3. Bake for 20 minutes.

title: Uunissa paistettuja makeita perunoita (Baked Sweet Potatoes Stuffed)
body:
## Ingredients

- Baked sweet potatoes
- Butter
- Salt and spices
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 cup water
- 3 1/2 tablespoons butter for syrup

## Directions

1. Halve baked sweet potatoes lengthwise, scoop out the insides and mash.
2. Add some butter and spices, return to the peels.
3. Cook 1/2 cup of sugar in 1 cup of water for 5 minutes, add 3 1/2 tablespoons of butter to the syrup.
4. Spread the tops of potatoes with the syrup.
5. Bake until nice brown basting often with the syrup.

title: Uunissa paistettuja omenia (Baked Apples)
body:
## Ingredients

- Apples
- Sugar
- Water
- Butter

## Directions

1. Have apples of equal size, wipe and core.
2. Butter a pan, lay the apples in the pan, fill the hollowed cores with sugar.
3. Pour some water into the pan to prevent the apples from burning.
4. Bake until tender.
5. Serve with whipped cream or vanilla sauce. May be baked without sugar.

title: Uunissa paistettuja perunaviipaleita (Baked Sliced Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ quarts potatoes
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 3 tablespoons cheese crumbs
- 2 tablespoons butter
- Pepper
- Water

## Directions

1. Peel the potatoes, cut into slices
2. Lay into a buttered mold having salt, pepper, dots of butter and cheese crumbs between the layers of potato
3. Add a little water
4. Bake covered until done
5. Instead of cheese, slices of onion or tomato may be used

title: Uunissa paistettuja perunoita (Baked Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 medium potatoes
- 2 tablespoons butter
- salt
- pepper
- 2 tablespoons milk or cream
- egg whites, optional
- grated cheese, optional
- paprika, optional

## Directions

1. Rinse well 6 potatoes of uniform, moderately large size.
2. Bake for 1 hour or until tender.
3. Serve on a folded napkin.
4. Alternatively, cut the potatoes in half lengthwise and scoop out the insides.
5. Mash the insides and add 2 tablespoons of butter, some salt and pepper, and 2 tablespoons of milk or cream.
6. Fill the potato halves with this mixture and bake in a hot oven until they brown.
7. Two stiffly beaten egg whites added to the mashed potato mixture will make it fluffy.
8. Grated cheese may be sprinkled on top if desired, or paprika may be mixed into the mashed potato to make paprika potatoes.

title: Uunissa paistettuja perunoita (Franconia Potatoes)
body:
## Ingredients

- Potatoes of equal size
- Butter or lard
- Salt

## Directions

1. Peel potatoes of equal size, cut in two lengthwise
2. Place in a pan with butter or lard
3. Sprinkle with salt
4. Bake until tender and nice brown
5. Potatoes may be baked in a dripping pan with roast beef or roast mutton

title: Uunissa paistettuja pääryniä (Baked Pears)
body:
## Ingredients

- Small pears
- Sugar
- Syrup
- Water

## Directions

1. Peel small pears, lay into a mold, add sugar, syrup and some water.
2. Bake covered for 2 hours.

title: Uunissa paistettuja scallopeja (Baked Scallops)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups fish
- 3 tablespoons butter
- ½ cup liquid of scallops
- 3 tablespoons cream
- Salt and pepper
- Bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Bring the fish to the boiling point, strain, grind.
2. Rub the butter until creamy, add the fish, liquid, salt and pepper.
3. Put into a buttered mold, sprinkle with bread crumbs and bake.
4. If used whole, place the scallops in a buttered mold; make Béchamel sauce using liquid of scallops for it.
5. Pour over the fish, sprinkle with bread crumbs and dot with butter.

title: Uunissa Paistettuja Scallopeja (Baked Scallops)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cupfuls of fish
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1/2 cupful of liquid of scallops
- 3 tablespoonfuls of cream
- salt
- pepper
- crackerdust

## Directions

1. Bring the fish to the boiling point.
2. Strain and chop fine.
3. Cream the butter.
4. Add the chopped fish, liquid, pepper and salt to it.
5. Put in a buttered dish.
6. Sprinkle with crackerdust and bake in oven.
7. Alternatively, put the scallops whole into a buttered dish.
8. Prepare Bechamel sauce using liquid of scallops for it.
9. Pour it over the fish.
10. Sprinkle with crackerdust and dot with butter.

title: Uunissa Paistettuja Sieniä (Baked Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- Mushrooms
- Salt
- Pepper
- Butter
- Cream

## Directions

1. Place the cleaned mushrooms in a pan stem side down
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper
3. Dot with butter and add some cream
4. Bake in a hot oven for 10 minutes
5. Serve on toast with the sauce poured over the mushrooms

title: Uunissa paistettuja sieniä (Baked Mushrooms)
body:
## Ingredients

- cleaned mushrooms
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- cream

## Directions

1. Place the cleaned mushrooms in a pan stem side down.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, dot with butter and add some cream.
3. Bake in a hot oven for 10 minutes.
4. Serve on toast having the sauce poured over the mushrooms on the dish.

title: Vaahterasiirappi-Kastike Jäätelölle (Maple Syrup Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup syrup
- 2 tablespoons butter

## Directions

1. Cook syrup and butter until moderately thick and smooth, when dropped from a spoon it stretches ribbon-like

title: Vadelmahillo (Raspberry Compote)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 lbs. of raspberries
- 4 lbs. of sugar
- 2 cupfuls of water

## Directions

1. Cook water with sugar to a clear syrup threading when dropped from the tip of spoon.
2. Skim carefully.
3. Put the berries into the syrup, simmer slowly, taking care not to break the berries, shaking the kettle and skimming until the scum ceases to rise.
4. When clarified pour into a dry jar.

title: Vadelmahilloke (Raspberry Jam)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 pounds raspberries
- 3 or 4 pounds sugar
- 2 cups water

## Directions

1. Cook sugar in water until clear.
2. Add raspberries to the syrup.
3. Continue to simmer, shaking the kettle.
4. Skim carefully.
5. Let cook until the scum ceases to rise, taking care not to crush the berries.
6. Pour into glass jars while hot.
7. Cover airtight immediately.

title: Vadelmahyytelo (Raspberry Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- raspberries
- sugar
- water

## Directions

1. Prepare as given for currant jelly above.

title: Vadelmahyytelö (Raspberry Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 quarts of ripe raspberries
- 1 cupful of water
- granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Mash raspberries, mix with 1 cupful of water and cook on a slow fire for 20 minutes, stirring constantly.
2. Pour on a cloth to drain without stirring.
3. Weigh the juice and mix with equal part of granulated sugar.
4. Place in kettle and let simmer nearly 1/2 hour.
5. Preserve in glass jars.
6. Cover jars only when jelly has cooled completely.

title: Vadelmamehu (Raspberry Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups water
- 1.5 cups berries
- 1 pound sugar per 1.5 pounds berry juice

## Directions

1. Crush the berries and put on the fire in cold water
2. Stir while heating and let boil for a few minutes
3. Strain the juice and weigh it
4. Allow 1 pound sugar to 1.5 pounds juice
5. Put sugar and juice into a kettle and bring quickly to boil
6. Cook for 10-15 minutes
7. Let cool and pour into dry bottles
8. Cork carefully

title: Vadelmamehu (Raspberry Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cupfuls water
- 1 1/2 cupfuls berries
- 1 pound sugar to 1 1/2 pounds liquor

## Directions

1. Allow 3 cupfuls of water to 1 1/2 cupfuls of berries
2. Mash berries and put in cold water
3. Place on fire stirring all the while the mixture heats up
4. Let boil for a few minutes
5. Drain the liquor
6. Allow 1 pound of sugar to 1 1/2 pounds of liquor
7. Put in kettle, boil quickly 10-15 minutes
8. Let cool down, pour in dry bottles, cork well and keep in a cold place

title: Vadelmamehua (Raspberry Wine)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups water per 1.5 cups berries
- raspberries
- 1 pound sugar per pound of raspberry juice

## Directions

1. Crush raspberries and put them in cold water
2. Stir while heating and then boil for a few minutes
3. Strain the juice, weigh it
4. Allow 1 pound sugar per pound of raspberry juice
5. Put sugar and juice in a kettle and bring to boil quickly for 10-15 minutes
6. Allow juice to cool

title: Valkea kastike (Milk Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 cups milk
- ½ cup cream
- Salt and white pepper

## Directions

1. Cook butter, flour and milk together
2. Add cream, pepper and salt
3. For use as Hollandaise sauce: mix with 1 teaspoon of lemon juice and yolk of egg

title: Valkoisia kakkuja (White Cookies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 1/2 lb. of sugar
- 3/4 cupful of cream
- 1/2 teaspoonful of cream of tartar
- 1/4 lb. of melted butter
- 1 teaspoonful of lemon juice
- a little cinnamon and cardamom
- 1/2 lb. of corn starch
- flour

## Directions

1. Whip eggs and sugar to a froth
2. Mix in cream, cream of tartar, butter, spices, and corn starch
3. Add flour enough to make a dough tolerable to handle
4. Roll out and shape into cakes with a form
5. Bake in a slow oven

title: Vanilja kastike (Vanilla Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of cream
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla
- 2 yolks

## Directions

1. Whip on the fire until thick

title: Vanilja Kermajäätelö (Vanilla Ice Cream)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of rich milk
- 1 pint of cream
- 3/4 cupful of sugar
- 6-8 yolks of eggs
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla extract or 1 vanilla bean

## Directions

1. Put milk on the fire and let boil up.
2. Whip yolks of eggs with sugar.
3. Pour the boiling milk slowly in it.
4. Put in a double-boiler on the fire and beat until thick, but do not let it boil, because it will curdle.
5. Remove from the fire and let cool down.
6. Add vanilla and cream, then freeze.
7. When using vanilla bean, it has to be cut in pieces and boiled with milk.
8. Care should be taken when using whites of eggs, that they do not curdle.

title: Vanilja Ranssia (Vanilla Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 ozs. of butter
- 1/2 lb. of sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 lb. of flour
- 1/2 teaspoonful of vanilla
- 1/2 lb. of almonds

## Directions

1. Work butter to a froth.
2. Beat egg with sugar until light.
3. Combine the butter and egg mixtures.
4. Mix in finely chopped almonds, vanilla and flour, stirring well.
5. Force through a pastry bag onto a baking sheet into small rings.
6. Bake in a slow oven.

title: Vanilja-Kermajäätelö No. 1 (Vanilla Ice Cream No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint rich milk
- egg yolks
- sugar
- vanilla
- cream

## Directions

1. Scald the milk.
2. Beat the egg-yolks with the sugar.
3. Pour gradually the scalded milk into the yolks.
4. Beat in a double boiler over the fire until thick, not allowing it to boil as it will curdle.
5. Remove from the fire, let cool.
6. Add the vanilla and the cream.
7. Freeze.
8. If vanilla bean is used instead of vanilla extract, cut the bean in pieces and scald with milk.

title: Vanilja-Kermajäätelö No. 2 (Vanilla Ice Cream No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups milk
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 tablespoons cornstarch
- 1 or 2 eggs
- 2 teaspoons vanilla
- 1 quart cream
- Salt

## Directions

1. Scald the milk.
2. Mix together sugar, salt and cornstarch, pour gradually the scalded milk in, cook for a few minutes stirring well.
3. Remove from the fire, add the beaten eggs.
4. When cool, add vanilla and cream.
5. Strain and freeze.
6. Use more eggs if cream is not used.

title: Vanilja-rinkeleitä (Vanilla Rings)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 3 cups flour
- 1/2 teaspoon vanilla
- 1/2 pound almonds

## Directions

1. Rub until frothy butter
2. Beat egg with sugar
3. Combine the mixtures
4. Add minced almonds, vanilla and flour
5. Beat well
6. Force through a pastry bag forming into small rings on a baking sheet

title: Vaniljakastike (Vanilla Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cream
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 2 egg yolks

## Directions

1. Beat over the fire until thick

title: Vaniljakastike Jäätelölle (Vanilla Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/2 cup water
- 2 cups cream
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Cook sugar in water for 8 minutes
2. Let cool
3. Add 2 cups cream and 1 teaspoon vanilla when served
4. Serve with chocolate and strawberry ice cream

title: Vaniljakohokas (Vanilla Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 1 cupful of rich milk
- 5 eggs
- 2 ozs. of powdered sugar
- 1 teaspoonful of vanilla
- fruit cooked with sugar

## Directions

1. Cook a batter of butter, flour and milk.
2. Whip yolks of eggs with sugar to froth, stir into the batter; flavor with vanilla.
3. Lastly add the whites, beaten stiff.
4. Butter a mold, lay fruit on the bottom and sides.
5. Pour the souffle mixture on the fruit.
6. Steam in oven 1/2 hour.
7. Serve hot.
8. The souffle may be cooked also on the stove.

title: Vaniljakohokas (Vanilla Soufflé)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons butter
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 1 cup rich milk
- 5 eggs
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- Fruit cooked with sugar

## Directions

1. Cook a paste of butter, flour and milk.
2. Beat the yolks of 5 eggs with sugar, add to the paste, flavor with vanilla.
3. Last of all add the egg whites beaten firm.
4. Butter a soufflé mold, line the bottom and the sides with fruit, fill the mold with the mixture.
5. Cover carefully with a lid or buttered paper.
6. Bake in oven in a pan of water or steam on the stove for 1/2 or 3/4 hour.
7. Unmold onto a platter; serve hot.

title: Vaniljatäyte (Vanilla Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 egg yolks
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 2 cups cream
- 1 tablespoon butter
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Stir egg yolks, cream, sugar and vanilla until thick in a double boiler
2. Add butter in small dots
3. Let cool
4. Instead of cream lemon juice with water may be used
5. Chocolate or cocoa may be used in this filling

title: Vaniljatäyte kakkuihin (Vanilla Filling for Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- yolks of 4 eggs
- 2 tablespoonfuls of sugar
- 2 cupfuls of cream
- 1 tablespoonful of butter
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat yolks, cream, sugar and vanilla over the fire until thick
2. Mix with small dots of butter
3. Let cool

title: Vanilla Rings
body:
## Ingredients

- 10 ozs. of butter
- 1/2 lb. of sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 lb. of flour
- 1/2 teaspoonful of vanilla
- 1/2 lb. of almonds

## Directions

1. Work butter to a froth.
2. Beat egg with sugar until light.
3. Combine the above mixtures.
4. Mix with finely chopped almonds, vanilla and flour, stirring well.
5. Force through a pastry bag on baking sheet into small rings.

title: Vanukas makeista perunoista (Sweet Potato Souffle)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups mashed sweet potato
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- 1 cup cream or milk
- 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Mix the mashed potatoes with butter, cream, and yolks of eggs
2. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites
3. Bake in a buttered mold

title: Vasikan aivot (Calf's Brain)
body:
## Ingredients

- Calf's brain
- Cold water
- Salt
- Lemon juice or vinegar

## Directions

1. Soak in cold water for about an hour.
2. Put on fire in boiling water, cook with salt, some lemon juice or vinegar.
3. Place into cold water to cool, remove the skin and fiber.
4. Prepare the same as sweetbreads and serve with any kind of sauce.

title: Vasikan Kieli à la Parisienne (Calf's Tongue à la Parisienne)
body:
## Ingredients

- Calf's tongue
- Fresh tomatoes or toast or hominy for foundation
- Carrots
- Cooked currants
- Parsley
- Hollandaise sauce

## Directions

1. Cook calf's tongue and cut in thin slices while hot
2. Make a foundation of fresh tomatoes, toast, or hominy arranged in a ring on the platter
3. Place a slice of tongue on each item
4. On top of each tongue slice place a cup made of carrots filled with cooked currants
5. Place a sprig of parsley in the center of the ring
6. Pour Hollandaise sauce mixed with currants around the platter

title: Vasikan Sydän (Calf's Heart)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 calf's heart
- salted water
- ground meat or bread
- onion, fried and chopped
- pepper
- chopped parsley
- 1 tablespoon tomato
- 1 egg
- a few slices of bacon
- carrots
- celery
- onion
- bouillon
- salt
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Clean the heart and soak in salted water for an hour to draw out the blood.
2. Fill the heart with a mixture made of ground meat or bread, chopped fried onion, pepper, chopped parsley, 1 tablespoon of tomato and 1 egg.
3. Sew up the opening.
4. Place a few slices of bacon, carrots, celery and onion in a roasting pan.
5. Bake in the oven for about 2 hours, basting often with the drippings in the pan.
6. If the meat begins to dry, add some bouillon.
7. Cover with a lid so as not to burn.
8. Make a gravy from the drippings, seasoning with salt, pepper and lemon juice.
9. Serve hot.

title: Vasikan sydän (Calf's Heart)
body:
## Ingredients

- Calf's heart
- Salted water
- Ground meat or bread
- Onion
- Pepper
- Parsley
- 1 tablespoon tomato
- 1 egg
- Bacon slices
- Carrots
- Celery
- Onion
- Meat broth

## Directions

1. Clean the heart and place in salted water for an hour to draw out the blood.
2. Fill the cavity with a forcemeat made of ground meat or bread mixed with finely chopped onion fried in butter, pepper, fine parsley, 1 tablespoon tomato and 1 egg.
3. Sew the cavity closed.
4. Place in a baking pan with bacon slices, carrots, celery and onion.
5. Bake in the oven for about 2 hours, frequently basting with the broth in the pan.
6. If it begins to dry, add meat broth.
7. Keep covered so it does not burn.

title: Vasikan Sydän (Calf's Heart)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 calf heart
- salted water
- ground meat or bread
- onion
- butter
- parsley
- salt
- pepper
- 1 egg
- pork slices
- carrots
- celery
- meat stock
- lemon

## Directions

1. Clean heart and soak in salted water 1 hour to draw out the blood.
2. Fill the heart with mixture made of ground meat or bread mixed with chopped onion cooked in butter, chopped parsley, salt, pepper and 1 egg.
3. Sew up the opening.
4. Place a few slices of pork, carrots, celery and onion in a baking pan.
5. Bake in oven for 2 hours.
6. Baste often with the drippings.
7. Add meat stock if necessary.
8. Cover to prevent burning.
9. Prepare sauce of the gravy in the pan.
10. Season with salt, pepper and lemon.

title: Vasikan Sydän (Veal Heart)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal heart
- salt water
- ground meat or bread
- butter
- onion
- pepper
- egg

## Directions

1. Clean heart and place in salted water for one hour to remove blood.
2. Fill the opening with stuffing made from ground meat or bread mixed with finely chopped onion fried in butter, pepper and 1 egg.
3. Sew the opening closed and roast in the oven.

title: Vasikanpaisti (Roast Veal)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal roast
- butter or fat
- salt
- pepper
- carrots
- celery
- onion
- peppercorns
- boiling water
- flour
- cream

## Directions

1. Wipe the meat.
2. Heat butter or fat in a dripping-pan, place the meat into the pan skin side down.
3. Put in a hot oven.
4. When brown sprinkle with salt and pepper and baste with the drippings.
5. Add carrots, celery, onion and a few peppercorns.
6. When half done, turn the roast over, sprinkle with salt, add boiling water to the drippings.
7. Roast about 2 hours basting often.
8. Make a gravy of the drippings by adding some flour and cream.

title: Vasikanpää Vinaigrette-kastikkeen Kanssa (Calf's Head with Vinaigrette Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- calf's head
- spices
- 2 tablespoons vinegar
- 10 peppercorns
- 1 bay leaf
- 1 onion
- 1 carrot
- sprig of parsley
- egg
- bread crumbs
- butter
- 3 tablespoons salad oil
- 1 tablespoon vinegar
- 1 teaspoon grated onion
- chopped parsley
- caper
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Boil the calf's head with spices
2. Cut in nice pieces
3. Baste the pieces with tomato sauce made of tomato and cornstarch
4. Serve with vinaigrette sauce made of 3 tablespoons of salad oil, 1 tablespoon of vinegar, 1 teaspoon of grated onion, chopped parsley, caper, salt and pepper mixed

title: Vasikanpää ä la Terrapine (Calf's Head à la Terrapine)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled calf's head
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 cup white meat broth
- salt
- pepper
- 2 cups cream
- 2 egg yolks
- lemon juice or Madeira

## Directions

1. Cut the boiled calf's head into cubes
2. Make gravy of 2 tablespoons butter and 2 tablespoons flour mixed together
3. Add 1 cup of white meat broth and season with salt and pepper
4. Add 2 cups of cream
5. Add 2 beaten egg yolks
6. Add lemon juice or Madeira at the end

title: Vasikanpää-hyytelö ä la Piquante (Glazed Calf's Head à la Piquante)
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled calf's head
- milk sauce
- toasted bread
- tomato jelly
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup brown sauce
- 1 cup tomato
- chopped parsley
- fresh chopped cucumber

## Directions

1. Cut the boiled calf's head into pieces
2. Cover with milk sauce
3. Place on toast
4. Line with liquid jelly of tomato
5. Prepare Piquante sauce by cooking together 1 tablespoon of butter, 1 tablespoon of flour, 1 cup of brown sauce, 1 cup of tomato, chopped parsley, and fresh chopped cucumber
6. Serve with Piquante sauce poured around the meat on the platter

title: Vasikansatula (Saddle of Veal)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal saddle
- butter
- paper
- salt
- pepper
- pork slices
- egg
- bread crumbs
- water
- cream

## Directions

1. Wipe the meat and trim into a good shape.
2. Wrap into a buttered paper and roast in oven as directed for roast veal.
3. Remove the paper 3/4 hour before serving, add a sprinkling of salt, let brown.
4. Line the meat with thin slices of pork, dip in egg, roll in bread crumbs and roast as directed for veal, basting often and adding water to the drippings.
5. Make gravy of the drippings and cream.

title: Vasikka-Kanan Poika (Calf Bird)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. of veal
- 1 egg
- 4 tablespoonfuls of bread crumbs
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 tablespoonful of chopped parsley
- salt
- pepper
- veal stock or butter
- cream

## Directions

1. Cut veal crosswise into slices; pound them.
2. Cream the butter, and mix with parsley and a little pepper.
3. Lay this mixture on the slices of veal, roll together, fasten with cord.
4. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
5. Fry in butter until brown.
6. Pour veal stock or butter over and let boil 1/2 hour.
7. Make sauce from the stock by adding a little cream.

title: Vasikka-Kananpoikia (Veal Bird)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound veal
- 1 egg
- 4 tablespoons bread crumbs
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon chopped parsley
- salt
- pepper
- water or bouillon
- cream

## Directions

1. Cut the veal crosswise into slices and pound them.
2. Rub the butter until foamy and mix with parsley and pepper.
3. Spread the mixture on the veal slices, roll together and tie with string.
4. Dip in egg and bread crumbs or in flour only.
5. Fry in butter or lard until brown.
6. Add water or bouillon and cook for about 1/2 hour until done.
7. Make a gravy of the drippings by adding cream.

title: Vasikka-Timboli (Calf Timbales)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1¼ pounds of veal (without bones)
- 2 ounces of butter
- 2 eggs
- 1⅜ cupfuls of cream
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- salt and pepper
- macaroni

## Directions

1. Wipe meat with cloth wrung out from hot water
2. Remove fibres and bits of skin, cut into dice and grind fine
3. Mix gradually with butter and yolks of eggs
4. Add cream, flour, salt and pepper
5. Butter a mold, line the bottom and the sides with cooked macaroni cut in pieces ¼ inch long
6. Beat the whites of eggs to a firm froth, mix with the meat
7. Turn the mixture into the mold
8. Cover with buttered paper, cook in a pan of water on the range or in oven 1—1½ hours

title: Vasikka-Timboli (Veal Timbale)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound veal
- 2 ounces butter
- 2 eggs
- 1.5 cups cream
- 3 tablespoons bread crumbs
- salt
- pepper
- macaroni

## Directions

1. Remove fibers from meat and put through meat chopper three times
2. Pound well
3. Add gradually the butter and egg yolks, rub until smooth
4. Soak bread crumbs in milk and mix with the meat
5. Last of all add the egg whites beaten firm
6. Butter the molds and garnish with macaroni
7. Fill with the mousse
8. Bake in oven in a pan of water covered with buttered paper for an hour
9. Serve with tomato or brown sauce

title: Vasikka-Timboli (Veal Timbale)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pauna vasikanlihaa (1 lb. of veal)
- 2 unssia voita (2 ozs. of butter)
- 2 munaa (2 eggs)
- 1½ kupillista kermaa (1½ cupfuls of cream)
- 3 ruokalusikallista leipäjauhoa (3 tablespoonfuls of bread crumbs)
- suolaa ja pippuria (salt and pepper)

## Directions

1. Remove the fibres and force the meat through a meat chopper three times.
2. Then pound the meat well.
3. Add gradually the butter into the meat and rub the mixture until smooth.
4. Soak the bread crumbs in milk and stir into the meat.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Finally add the whites, beaten stiff and dry.
7. Butter the mold, garnish with macaroni and fill with the mixture.
8. Bake in oven in a pan of water, covered with buttered paper, about 1 hour.

title: Vasikka-Viilokkia (Veal Cutlets)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal cutlets
- salt
- pepper
- egg
- bread crumbs
- pork fat or butter
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. The cutlets may be fried whole or cut in nice pieces.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Dip in egg and bread crumbs.
4. Fry in pork fat or butter to a golden brown on both sides.
5. Arrange on a hot platter, sprinkle with lemon juice.
6. Serve with brown-, tomato- or Bearnaise sauce.

title: Vasikkaviilokkia (Veal Cutlets)
body:
## Ingredients

- veal cutlets
- salt
- pepper
- egg
- bread crumbs
- flour
- butter or lard
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cut the cutlets into nice pieces or leave whole.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Dip in egg and roll in bread crumbs or flour only.
4. Fry in butter or lard until brown on both sides.
5. When done, place on a hot platter and sprinkle with lemon juice.
6. Serve with brown, tomato or Bearnaise sauce.

title: Vegetable Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 quart of fresh peas
- 1 cauliflower
- 1/2 quart of string beans
- 3/8 lb. of asparagus
- caper
- cucumber slices
- salted water
- mayonnaise sauce
- lettuce leaves
- parsley leaves

## Directions

1. Clean vegetables and cook in salted water, all separately.
2. Pour off the water and let cool.
3. Arrange the vegetables nicely in a bowl and pour mayonnaise sauce on.
4. Sprinkle with caper and thinly sliced cucumber.
5. Garnish with lettuce and parsley leaves.

title: Velvet Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cupful of butter
- 1 1/2 cupfuls of sugar
- 6 eggs
- 1/2 cupful of water
- 2 cupfuls of flour
- 1/2 cupful of corn starch
- 3 teaspoonfuls of baking powder
- 1/2 cupful of chopped almonds

## Directions

1. Work butter with sugar to a froth
2. Add yolks of eggs beaten well, water, flour sifted with baking powder, and one half of the almonds
3. Stir lastly stiff beaten whites into it
4. Put in a buttered mold and sprinkle with the rest of the almonds and powdered sugar
5. Bake 40 minutes in a moderate oven

title: Venison Cutlets
body:
## Ingredients

- loin of venison
- salt
- pepper
- melted butter
- bread crumbs
- fried slices of onion
- meat stock
- cream
- wine sauce

## Directions

1. Wipe loin of venison with cloth wrung out from hot water, cut into thick pieces, pound on both sides, trim with a knife.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper, spread with melted butter, and dip in bread crumbs.
3. Broil over a clear fire or fry with butter in a fryingpan until done.
4. Arrange on a platter, lay fried slices of onion on.
5. Mix the gravy with meat stock and cream, or serve with wine sauce.

title: Venison Steak
body:
## Ingredients

- venison
- slices of pork
- flour
- cream

## Directions

1. Line with slices of pork, roast in oven the same as mutton.
2. May be prepared also the same as pot roast, thicken the gravy with flour and cream.

title: Venäläinen Punajuurikeitto (Russian Beet Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 quarts bouillon
- 5 or 8 beets
- 2 or 3 tomatoes
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour

## Directions

1. Rinse beets and roast them in the oven until tender.
2. Peel and cut them into small pieces and sauté in butter.
3. Add a few drops of lemon juice or vinegar to preserve the color.
4. Add flour to the beets and pour boiling bouillon gradually into them.
5. Let the soup boil for about 10 minutes.
6. Peel tomatoes, chop them finely and add to the beets.
7. Season with salt and pepper.

title: Venäläinen punajuurikeitto (Russian Beet Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 quarts of bouillon
- 6–8 beets
- 2–3 tomatoes
- 3 tablespoonfuls of flour
- 3 tablespoonfuls of butter
- lemon juice or vinegar
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Wash the beets and bake them in the oven until tender.
2. Peel and cut into slices and fry in butter (a few drops of lemon juice or vinegar on them will keep them nicely colored).
3. Sprinkle the flour on the beets, then slowly pour the boiling stock on them.
4. Let it boil about 10 minutes.
5. Peel the tomatoes, mash and add to the beets.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. The color can be improved with raw grated beet.
8. Serve with sour cream.

title: Venäläisiä bliniä (Russian Blinies)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 cup cream
- 2 cups water
- 2 teaspoons salt
- 4 tablespoons melted butter
- 3 1/2 cups buckwheat flour
- 1 cup white flour
- 2 cups warmed milk
- 1/2 yeast cake

## Directions

1. Dilute the yeast in lukewarm water
2. Beat the eggs
3. Add cream, water, salt, butter and flour
4. Let rise over night
5. In the morning pour into the batter lukewarm milk enough to make a thin batter
6. Fry as directed for pancakes
7. Serve with melted butter and maple syrup

title: Venäläisiä bliniä (Russian Blinis)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cupful of cream
- 2½ cupfuls of water
- 2 teaspoonfuls of salt
- 2 tablespoonfuls of melted butter
- ½ pound of buckwheat flour
- 10 ounces of wheat flour
- 2-3 cupfuls of lukewarm milk
- ½ cake of yeast

## Directions

1. Dissolve yeast in lukewarm water.
2. Whip eggs, add cream, water, salt, flours and lastly butter, whipping well.
3. Set batter to rise over night.
4. In the morning stir in lukewarm milk until batter is of moderate thickness.
5. Bake like griddle cakes.
6. Serve with melted butter and syrup.

title: Veriohukkaita (Blood Cakes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups blood
- 2 cups milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 onion
- 4 tablespoons suet or butter
- ½ tablespoon salt
- Some thyme
- 4 tablespoons rye flour
- 4 tablespoons white flour
- Pepper

## Directions

1. Strain the blood and beat
2. Add milk, flour, eggs beaten, onion fried in butter, salt and some pepper
3. Heat the frying pan and spread with butter
4. Fry pancakes of the batter
5. Serve with lingon or cranberries and melted butter

title: Vesi Leipa (Water Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cupfuls of water
- 2 tablespoonfuls of butter
- 1 teaspoonful of salt
- 1/2 cake of yeast
- 6-7 cupfuls of flour
- 1 tablespoonful of sugar

## Directions

1. Dissolve yeast in lukewarm water
2. Add enough flour to make it like batter and let it rise
3. Heat the remaining water, pour it in a bowl
4. Mix in salt and butter, and add flour until the batter is like thin dough
5. Add the yeast mixture and gradually stir in the flour evenly to the dough and work until the dough is smooth and pliable
6. Cover the dough with a cloth and set in a warm place to rise
7. When it has risen well, knead thoroughly

title: Vesileipä (Water Bread)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups water
- 1 tablespoon butter or lard
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1/2 cake of yeast
- 6 or 6 1/2 cups flour

## Directions

1. Dissolve the yeast in lukewarm water, add flour enough to make a very thin paste. Let rise.
2. Warm the rest of the water, pour into a baking pan, add salt, sugar and butter, also flour so as to make a soft paste.
3. Work in the risen sponge and the rest of the flour, kneading until the dough is smooth.
4. Cover with a towel and put into a warm place to rise.
5. When risen until light, toss the dough on the baking board, knead briskly, divide into loaves and place them into buttered pans.
6. Cover, let rise again.
7. Bake in a moderate oven for an hour. If the whole yeast cake is used, the dough will rise quicker.

title: Vesiruohosalaatti (Watercress Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- watercress
- French dressing
- lettuce leaves
- oranges
- pears

## Directions

1. Wash and drain the watercress
2. Mix with plenty of French dressing
3. Serve on a bed of lettuce garnished with fruit such as oranges cut in pieces, pears, etc.

title: Vesivohvelia (Water Waffles)
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 1½ cupfuls of thick cream
- 1½ cupfuls of water
- ¾ cupful of melted butter
- ½ cupful of sugar
- flour

## Directions

1. Whip cream to a stiff froth.
2. Beat eggs with sugar until light.
3. Combine both mixtures.
4. Mix with water, butter and last flour enough to make a thick batter.
5. Bake as directed.

title: Vihannes-keitto (Vegetable Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of bouillon
- several kinds of half cooked vegetables, cut into pieces
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Put several kinds of half cooked vegetables, cut into pieces, into 1 quart of bouillon.
2. Let simmer until soft but not stewed.
3. Season with salt and pepper.

title: Vihanneskeitto (Vegetable Soup)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts meat stock
- several kinds of vegetables, parboiled and cut in pieces
- salt and pepper
- soup meat and bones (optional)
- tomato (optional)

## Directions

1. To 2 quarts of meat stock add several kinds of vegetables parboiled and cut in pieces.
2. Let simmer until tender but not stewed.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Instead of using meat stock the vegetables may be cooked with soup meat.
5. Tomato will improve the taste of the soup.

title: Vihannessalaatti (Vegetable Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cauliflower
- 1/2 cup peas
- 1/2 cup string beans cut in 3/4 inch pieces
- 1/4 cup asparagus cut in pieces
- 1/4 cup carrots cut in pieces
- 1/2 cup turnip or potato cut in pieces
- capers
- cucumber slices
- salt
- French dressing
- boiled mayonnaise
- lettuce leaves
- parsley
- hard boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Wash the vegetables
2. Cook each type separately in salted boiling water
3. Drain and let cool
4. Pour French dressing over and arrange on a platter
5. Coat with boiled mayonnaise
6. Sprinkle the top with chopped capers and cucumber
7. Place lettuce leaves around the edges
8. Garnish with parsley and hard boiled eggs
9. If not all types of vegetables are available, combine those that are on hand

title: Viheriä tomaattisalaatti No. 1 (Pickled Green Tomatoes No. 1)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds green tomatoes
- 1 quart small onions
- 2 cups salt
- 2 quarts cider vinegar
- 1 or 2 pounds brown sugar
- 1/4 pound mustard seed
- 2 tablespoons cinnamon
- 2 tablespoons cloves
- 1 tablespoon celery seed
- 1 tablespoon allspice

## Directions

1. Cut in pieces the tomatoes, peel the onions, sprinkle the salt over them
2. Let stand for 24 hours
3. Drain, place into cold water
4. Put into a kettle the onions and tomatoes with sugar and spices tied in a bag
5. Simmer for a few hours
6. Note: A few cucumbers cut in pieces may be added to the tomatoes

title: Viheriä tomaattisalaatti No. 2 (Pickled Green Tomatoes No. 2)
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 quarts tomatoes
- 1 cup onions cut in pieces
- 3 red peppers chopped
- 4 quarts vinegar
- 3 tablespoons salt
- 1 cup prepared mustard
- 2 cups sugar
- 2 tablespoons cinnamon and cloves

## Directions

1. Let stand in salt water the tomatoes, onion and pepper
2. Or add a little vinegar to the vegetables, parboil, drain off the vinegar
3. Add to the vegetables vinegar, sugar, salt, mustard and spices
4. Let simmer, put into glass jars, cover airtight

title: Viheriäpippuri Mahasylkirauhasen Kanssa (Green Pepper with Sweetbreads)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup chicken stock
- 1 sweetbread
- salt
- pepper
- Worcestershire sauce
- boiled chopped mushrooms
- green peppers
- lard
- bread crumbs
- 1 egg yolk
- cream

## Directions

1. Prepare a gravy of 1 tablespoon butter, 1 tablespoon flour and 1 cup chicken stock.
2. Cook sweetbreads as directed, cut in pieces, add to the gravy.
3. Season with salt, pepper and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Last of all add boiled chopped mushrooms.
5. Boil green pepper quickly in lard, so as to easily remove the bitter skin.
6. Cool, fill with sweetbreads, sprinkle with bread crumbs.
7. Bake until the surface is brown.
8. Make the gravy of butter, flour and chicken stock, season with salt and pepper.
9. Last of all add 1 yolk of egg and some cream.

title: Viheriäpippurisalaatti (Green Pepper Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 green peppers
- 4 tomatoes
- 4 apples
- lard
- French dressing
- mayonnaise dressing
- lettuce

## Directions

1. Cook quickly in lard the green peppers so as to remove the skin.
2. Skin and cut in fine strips.
3. Peel the apples and tomatoes, cut in pieces.
4. Mix together and pour French dressing over.
5. Place into a salted bowl on a bed of lettuce, garnish around with mayonnaise.

title: Vihreä Salaatti (Lettuce Salad)
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh crisp lettuce
- cold water
- French dressing
- minced parsley

## Directions

1. Use light colored fresh crisp lettuce
2. Let stand in cold water for awhile
3. Remove the leaves from the stalks
4. wash quickly one by one in cold water
5. Place on a clean towel so the water may drip from the leaves
6. Arrange the lettuce in a circle into a salad bowl, having the hearts in the center
7. Pour French dressing on
8. sprinkle with minced parsley

title: Viikimatälyte (Fig Filling)
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ pound figs
- ½ cup boiling water
- ½ cup sugar
- lemon juice or vanilla
- 1 egg white
- 2 tablespoons powdered sugar

## Directions

1. Chop ½ pound figs exceedingly fine
2. Add ½ cup boiling water, ½ cup sugar and some lemon juice or vanilla
3. Let simmer to a soft paste
4. Let cool before using
5. The stiffly beaten white of an egg mixed with 2 tablespoons powdered sugar may be added to this filling

title: Viikunaputinki (Fig Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound chopped figs
- 1 cup chopped suet
- 2 1/2 cups bread crumbs
- 1/4 cup sugar
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup milk
- 1/2 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Soak the figs in lukewarm water, chop and mix thoroughly with the suet.
2. Soak the bread crumbs in milk; beat the eggs with sugar, add to the bread crumbs.
3. Combine the mixtures by stirring well.
4. Steam for 3 hours in a buttered mold.
5. Serve with vanilla, wine or brandy sauce.

title: Viilipiimä (Sour Milk)
body:
## Ingredients

- rich milk
- ginger
- sugar

## Directions

1. Have rich milk and let stand covered in a warm room until sour (solid but not watery)
2. Cool
3. Serve, which may be whipped and served in glasses
4. Mix with sugar and ginger according to taste

title: Viini kastike (Wine Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of water
- 1/2 cupful of sherry
- 1/2 cupful of white wine or madeira
- yellow rind of 1 lemon
- 1-2 tablespoonfuls of arrowroot
- 1/2 cupful of sugar

## Directions

1. Mix sugar with arrowroot
2. Pour boiling water slowly into it stirring well
3. Cook until the mixture is clear
4. Add wines and yellow lemon rind
5. The sauce may be thickened also with yolk of an egg

title: Viini kastike kova (Hard Wine Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cupful of butter
- 3/4 cupful of powdered sugar
- 3 tablespoonfuls of madeira

## Directions

1. Work butter and sugar to a cream
2. Add wine slowly to it

title: Viinihyytelö (Wine Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup wine (madeira, sherry, claret or port)
- 1/2 cup white wine
- 2 cups water
- 2 tablespoons or 1/2 package gelatine
- 1 cup sugar
- 3 tablespoons lemon juice
- whites and shells of 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Prepare as stated for lemon jelly, clarified or unclarified
2. If desired, less water may be used or orange juice instead of water
3. May be prepared without white wine

title: Viinihyytelö (Wine Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cupfuls of white wine
- 2 cupfuls of madeira or sherry
- 2 cupfuls of water
- 1½ ozs. of gelatine
- 7 ozs. of sugar
- 2 lemons
- 2 whites of eggs and shells

## Directions

1. Prepare in the same manner as lemon jelly.
2. If desired, you may use less wine and sugar and more water, so that the taste is milder.

title: Viinikastike (kova) (Hard Wine Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 cup butter
- 3/4 cup powdered sugar
- 3 tablespoons Madeira wine

## Directions

1. Rub until creamy the butter with the sugar
2. Add gradually the wine

title: Viinikastike (Wine Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup water
- 1/2 cup sherry
- 1 cup white wine or madeira
- Yellow rind of 1 lemon
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 or 2 tablespoons arrowroot

## Directions

1. Sift together the sugar and the arrowroot
2. Add slowly boiling water, stirring well
3. Cook until clear
4. Add the wines and the yellow rind of a lemon
5. May be thickened with egg yolks instead of arrowroot

title: Viinimarjahyytelö (Currant Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- currants
- sugar

## Directions

1. Wash currants, put into a saucepan
2. Extract the juice by crushing the berries
3. Simmer until the berries turn almost white
4. Strain through a cloth
5. Weigh the juice, have an equal amount of sugar
6. Cook the juice for 10 minutes
7. Add the heated sugar, continue to simmer until the sugar is dissolved and the juice becomes clear
8. Skim, pour into jelly glasses
9. Seal as directed and keep in cool place

title: Vilkuna Putinki (Fig Pudding)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. of figs
- 1/4 lb. of chopped suet
- 3 ozs. of flour
- 1/4 lb. of bread crumbs
- 2 ozs. of sugar
- 3 eggs
- 1 cupful of milk
- 1 teaspoonful of salt

## Directions

1. Soak figs in lukewarm water, chop and mix with suet.
2. Add flour, bread crumbs, soaked in milk, eggs beaten with sugar.
3. Rub the mixture well.
4. Put in a buttered mold and cook in a pan of water about 3 hours.

title: Vinaigrette Kastike (Vinaigrette Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 tablespoonfuls of salad oil
- 2 tablespoonfuls of vinegar
- 1 tablespoonful of chopped pickles
- 1/2 tablesp. of chopped green pepper
- 1 teaspoonful of parsley
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Pour gradually oil into vinegar
2. Add pickles, green pepper, parsley, salt and pepper

title: Vinaigrette-kastike (Vinaigrette Sauce)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 tablespoons olive oil
- 2 tablespoons vinegar
- 1 tablespoon chopped pickles
- 1/4 tablespoon chopped green pepper
- 1 teaspoon chopped parsley
- Salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Pour gradually oil into vinegar
2. Add pickles, green pepper, parsley, salt and pepper

title: Virnapalleroita (Lentil Croquettes)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup lentils
- 1/2 cup brown beans
- 1/2 onion
- celery
- carrot
- sprig of parsley
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup milk sauce
- salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Wash lentils and brown beans
2. Put over the fire in cold water with onion, celery, carrot and a sprig of parsley
3. Cook until tender and the water has evaporated
4. Force through a sieve
5. Add bread crumbs, egg, milk sauce, salt and pepper
6. Stir until smooth
7. Form into any shape preferred
8. Dip in egg and turn in bread crumbs
9. Cook or fry in butter

title: Vispilöity Karpalohyytelö (Whipped Cranberry Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/4 cups cranberry liquor without sugar
- 2 1/2 cups water
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 tablespoons or 1/2 package gelatine

## Directions

1. Boil together the cranberry liquid, water, sugar and gelatine
2. Pour into a large bowl
3. When beginning to jelly whip until it becomes frothy
4. Serve in a glass dish or small glasses

title: Vispilöity karpalohyytelö (Whipped Cranberry Jelly)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ cupfuls of cranberry liquor without sugar
- 2½ cupfuls of water
- 1 cupful of sugar
- 8 leaves of gelatine

## Directions

1. Cook cranberry liquor, water, sugar and gelatine together.
2. Pour in a bowl stirring well until it gets cold, light and firm.
3. Turn in a serving dish and serve in small glasses.

title: Vohveleita (Waffles)
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 1½ cups milk
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- ½ teaspoon salt
- 1 tablespoon melted butter
- 2 or 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Sift together flour, baking powder and salt.
2. Beat yolks, add milk and pour gradually in the flour; mix with butter.
3. Last of all fold in the beaten egg whites.
4. Fry in hot greased waffle iron until brown on both sides.

title: Vohveleita I (Waffles I)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cupful of flour
- 1½ cupfuls of milk
- 2 teaspoonfuls of baking powder
- ½ teaspoonful of salt
